authors_text: Yifan Zhu,Pranay Thangeda,Melkior Ornik,Kris Hauser
title: Few-shot Adaptation for Manipulating Granular Materials Under Domain Shift
title_zh: 在域转移下操纵颗粒材料的少样本适应
abstract: Autonomous lander missions on extraterrestrial bodies will need to sample granular material while coping with domain shift, no matter how well a sampling strategy is tuned on Earth. This paper proposes an adaptive scooping strategy that uses deep Gaussian process method trained with meta-learning to learn on-line from very limited experience on the target terrains. It introduces a novel meta-training approach, Deep Meta-Learning with Controlled Deployment Gaps (CoDeGa), that explicitly trains the deep kernel to predict scooping volume robustly under large domain shifts. Employed in a Bayesian Optimization sequential decision-making framework, the proposed method allows the robot to use vision and very little on-line experience to achieve high-quality scooping actions on out-of-distribution terrains, significantly outperforming non-adaptive methods proposed in the excavation literature as well as other state-of-the-art meta-learning methods. Moreover, a dataset of 6,700 executed scoops collected on a diverse set of materials, terrain topography, and compositions is made available for future research in granular material manipulation and meta-learning.
summary: Autonomous lander missions on extraterrestrial bodies will need to sample granular material while coping with domain shift, no matter how well a sampling strategy is tuned on Earth. This paper proposes an adaptive scooping strategy that uses deep Gaussian process method trained with meta-learning to learn on-line from very limited experience on the target terrains. It introduces a novel meta-training approach, Deep Meta-Learning with Controlled Deployment Gaps (CoDeGa), that explicitly trains the deep kernel to predict scooping volume robustly under large domain shifts. Employed in a Bayesian Optimization sequential decision-making framework, the proposed method allows the robot to use vision and very little on-line experience to achieve high-quality scooping actions on out-of-distribution terrains, significantly outperforming non-adaptive methods proposed in the excavation literature as well as other state-of-the-art meta-learning methods. Moreover, a dataset of 6,700 executed scoops collected on a diverse set of materials, terrain topography, and compositions is made available for future research in granular material manipulation and meta-learning.
abstract_zh: 无论地球上的采样策略调整得多么好，地外天体上的自主着陆器任务都需要在应对域转移的同时对颗粒物质进行采样。本文提出了一种自适应铲取策略，该策略使用经过元学习训练的深度高斯过程方法，从目标地形上非常有限的经验中进行在线学习。它引入了一种新颖的元训练方法，即具有受控部署间隙的深度元学习（CoDeGa），该方法显式训练深度内核以在大域变化下稳健地预测舀量。该方法采用贝叶斯优化顺序决策框架，允许机器人利用视觉和很少的在线经验在分布外的地形上实现高质量的铲斗动作，显着优于挖掘文献中提出的非自适应方法以及其他最先进的元学习方法。此外，还提供了在各种材料、地形地形和成分上收集的 6,700 个执行勺数据集，可用于颗粒材料操纵和元学习的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度高斯过程和元学习的自适应挖掘策略，用于在域偏移情况下高效操纵颗粒材料。
AI.motivation: 外星探测任务中，机器人需在未知地形中采样颗粒物质，传统方法因域偏移问题难以适应新环境。
AI.method: 提出CoDeGa元训练框架，结合深度高斯过程与贝叶斯优化，通过少量在线样本实现地形适应性挖掘决策。
AI.result: 在多样化地形数据集上显著优于现有非自适应方法及元学习算法，公开6700次挖掘数据供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为域偏移场景下的颗粒物质操作提供了有效解决方案，并推动了元学习在机器人领域的应用研究。

authors_text: Gabrielle Kaili-May Liu
title: Perspectives on the Social Impacts of Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
title_zh: 关于人类反馈强化学习的社会影响的观点
abstract: Is it possible for machines to think like humans? And if it is, how should we go about teaching them to do so? As early as 1950, Alan Turing stated that we ought to teach machines in the way of teaching a child. Reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) has emerged as a strong candidate toward allowing agents to learn from human feedback in a naturalistic manner. RLHF is distinct from traditional reinforcement learning as it provides feedback from a human teacher in addition to a reward signal. It has been catapulted into public view by multiple high-profile AI applications, including OpenAI's ChatGPT, DeepMind's Sparrow, and Anthropic's Claude. These highly capable chatbots are already overturning our understanding of how AI interacts with humanity. The wide applicability and burgeoning success of RLHF strongly motivate the need to evaluate its social impacts. In light of recent developments, this paper considers an important question: can RLHF be developed and used without negatively affecting human societies? Our objectives are threefold: to provide a systematic study of the social effects of RLHF; to identify key social and ethical issues of RLHF; and to discuss social impacts for stakeholders. Although text-based applications of RLHF have received much attention, it is crucial to consider when evaluating its social implications the diverse range of areas to which it may be deployed. We describe seven primary ways in which RLHF-based technologies will affect society by positively transforming human experiences with AI. This paper ultimately proposes that RLHF has potential to net positively impact areas of misinformation, AI value-alignment, bias, AI access, cross-cultural dialogue, industry, and workforce. As RLHF raises concerns that echo those of existing AI technologies, it will be important for all to be aware and intentional in the adoption of RLHF.

abstract_zh: 机器有可能像人类一样思考吗？如果是的话，我们应该如何教导他们这样做？早在 1950 年，艾伦·图灵就提出，我们应该像教育孩子一样教育机器。人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）已成为允许智能体以自然方式从人类反馈中学习的有力候选者。 RLHF 与传统的强化学习不同，因为除了奖励信号之外，它还提供来自人类教师的反馈。它已通过多个备受瞩目的人工智能应用程序进入公众视野，包括 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT、DeepMind 的 Sparrow 和 Anthropic 的 Claude。这些功能强大的聊天机器人已经颠覆了我们对人工智能如何与人类互动的理解。 RLHF 的广泛适用性和迅速取得的成功强烈激发了评估其社会影响的需要。鉴于最近的发展，本文考虑了一个重要问题：RLHF的开发和使用是否可以在不对人类社会产生负面影响的情况下？我们的目标有三个：对 RLHF 的社会影响进行系统研究；确定 RLHF 的关键社会和道德问题；并讨论对利益相关者的社会影响。尽管 RLHF 基于文本的应用程序受到了广泛关注，但在评估其社会影响时，考虑其可能部署的不同领域至关重要。我们描述了基于 RLHF 的技术通过人工智能积极改变人类体验来影响社会的七种主要方式。本文最终提出，RLHF 有潜力对错误信息、人工智能价值一致性、偏见、人工智能访问、跨文化对话、行业和劳动力领域产生积极影响。由于 RLHF 引发的担忧与现有人工智能技术的担忧相呼应，因此所有人在采用 RLHF 时都必须意识到并有意识地采用。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）的社会影响，旨在评估其对人类社会的潜在影响并提出关键伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 随着RLHF在AI应用中的广泛使用（如ChatGPT等），需评估其社会影响以确保技术发展不会对人类社会造成负面影响。
AI.method: 通过分析RLHF的技术特性及其在多个领域的应用案例，结合社会学与伦理学视角，系统梳理其可能带来的社会影响。
AI.result: 提出RLHF在减少虚假信息、对齐AI价值观、降低偏见、促进跨文化对话等七个领域具有积极影响，同时强调需关注其潜在风险。
AI.conclusion: RLHF具备改善社会问题的潜力，但需在技术开发与应用中保持伦理意识，确保其符合人类社会利益。

authors_text: Chenjie Cao,Yanwei Fu
title: Improving Transformer-based Image Matching by Cascaded Capturing Spatially Informative Keypoints
title_zh: 通过级联捕获空间信息关键点来改进基于 Transformer 的图像匹配
comment: Accepted by ICCV2023, Codes will be released in https://github.com/ewrfcas/CasMTR
comments: Accepted by ICCV2023, Codes will be released in https://github.com/ewrfcas/CasMTR
abstract: Learning robust local image feature matching is a fundamental low-level vision task, which has been widely explored in the past few years. Recently, detector-free local feature matchers based on transformers have shown promising results, which largely outperform pure Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based ones. But correlations produced by transformer-based methods are spatially limited to the center of source views' coarse patches, because of the costly attention learning. In this work, we rethink this issue and find that such matching formulation degrades pose estimation, especially for low-resolution images. So we propose a transformer-based cascade matching model -- Cascade feature Matching TRansformer (CasMTR), to efficiently learn dense feature correlations, which allows us to choose more reliable matching pairs for the relative pose estimation. Instead of re-training a new detector, we use a simple yet effective Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-process to filter keypoints through the confidence map, and largely improve the matching precision. CasMTR achieves state-of-the-art performance in indoor and outdoor pose estimation as well as visual localization. Moreover, thorough ablations show the efficacy of the proposed components and techniques.
summary: Learning robust local image feature matching is a fundamental low-level vision task, which has been widely explored in the past few years. Recently, detector-free local feature matchers based on transformers have shown promising results, which largely outperform pure Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based ones. But correlations produced by transformer-based methods are spatially limited to the center of source views' coarse patches, because of the costly attention learning. In this work, we rethink this issue and find that such matching formulation degrades pose estimation, especially for low-resolution images. So we propose a transformer-based cascade matching model -- Cascade feature Matching TRansformer (CasMTR), to efficiently learn dense feature correlations, which allows us to choose more reliable matching pairs for the relative pose estimation. Instead of re-training a new detector, we use a simple yet effective Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-process to filter keypoints through the confidence map, and largely improve the matching precision. CasMTR achieves state-of-the-art performance in indoor and outdoor pose estimation as well as visual localization. Moreover, thorough ablations show the efficacy of the proposed components and techniques.
abstract_zh: 学习鲁棒的局部图像特征匹配是一项基本的低级视觉任务，在过去几年中得到了广泛的探索。最近，基于 Transformer 的无检测器局部特征匹配器已经显示出有希望的结果，其性能很大程度上优于基于纯卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的匹配器。但是，由于注意力学习成本高昂，基于变压器的方法产生的相关性在空间上仅限于源视图的粗斑块的中心。在这项工作中，我们重新思考这个问题，发现这种匹配公式会降低姿态估计，特别是对于低分辨率图像。因此，我们提出了一种基于变压器的级联匹配模型——级联特征匹配TRansformer（CasMTR），以有效地学习密集的特征相关性，这使我们能够选择更可靠的匹配对来进行相对位姿估计。我们没有重新训练新的检测器，而是使用简单而有效的非极大值抑制（NMS）后处理来通过置信图过滤关键点，并大大提高匹配精度。 CasMTR 在室内和室外姿态估计以及视觉定位方面实现了最先进的性能。此外，彻底的消融显示了所提出的组件和技术的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的级联匹配模型CasMTR，通过捕捉空间信息关键点提升图像匹配精度。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法因注意力机制计算成本高，导致匹配相关性仅局限于源视图粗粒度区域中心，影响低分辨率图像的姿态估计效果。
AI.method: 设计Cascade feature Matching TRansformer（CasMTR）模型，通过密集特征相关性学习选择可靠匹配对，并采用非极大值抑制（NMS）后处理筛选关键点。
AI.result: 在室内外姿态估计和视觉定位任务中达到SOTA性能，消融实验验证了方法组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CasMTR通过高效学习密集特征关联并结合NMS后处理，显著提升了图像匹配精度和姿态估计效果。

search_text: Improving Transformer-based Image Matching by Cascaded Capturing Spatially Informative Keypoints 通过级联捕获空间信息关键点来改进基于 Transformer 的图像匹配 Learning robust local image feature matching is a fundamental low-level vision task, which has been widely explored in the past few years. Recently, detector-free local feature matchers based on transformers have shown promising results, which largely outperform pure Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based ones. But correlations produced by transformer-based methods are spatially limited to the center of source views' coarse patches, because of the costly attention learning. In this work, we rethink this issue and find that such matching formulation degrades pose estimation, especially for low-resolution images. So we propose a transformer-based cascade matching model -- Cascade feature Matching TRansformer (CasMTR), to efficiently learn dense feature correlations, which allows us to choose more reliable matching pairs for the relative pose estimation. Instead of re-training a new detector, we use a simple yet effective Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) post-process to filter keypoints through the confidence map, and largely improve the matching precision. CasMTR achieves state-of-the-art performance in indoor and outdoor pose estimation as well as visual localization. Moreover, thorough ablations show the efficacy of the proposed components and techniques. 学习鲁棒的局部图像特征匹配是一项基本的低级视觉任务，在过去几年中得到了广泛的探索。最近，基于 Transformer 的无检测器局部特征匹配器已经显示出有希望的结果，其性能很大程度上优于基于纯卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的匹配器。但是，由于注意力学习成本高昂，基于变压器的方法产生的相关性在空间上仅限于源视图的粗斑块的中心。在这项工作中，我们重新思考这个问题，发现这种匹配公式会降低姿态估计，特别是对于低分辨率图像。因此，我们提出了一种基于变压器的级联匹配模型——级联特征匹配TRansformer（CasMTR），以有效地学习密集的特征相关性，这使我们能够选择更可靠的匹配对来进行相对位姿估计。我们没有重新训练新的检测器，而是使用简单而有效的非极大值抑制（NMS）后处理来通过置信图过滤关键点，并大大提高匹配精度。 CasMTR 在室内和室外姿态估计以及视觉定位方面实现了最先进的性能。此外，彻底的消融显示了所提出的组件和技术的功效。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的级联匹配模型CasMTR，通过捕捉空间信息关键点提升图像匹配精度。 Chenjie Cao,Yanwei Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Michelle S. Lam,Zixian Ma,Anne Li,Izequiel Freitas,Dakuo Wang,James A. Landay,Michael S. Bernstein
title: Model Sketching: Centering Concepts in Early-Stage Machine Learning Model Design
title_zh: 模型草图：以早期机器学习模型设计中的概念为中心
abstract: Machine learning practitioners often end up tunneling on low-level technical details like model architectures and performance metrics. Could early model development instead focus on high-level questions of which factors a model ought to pay attention to? Inspired by the practice of sketching in design, which distills ideas to their minimal representation, we introduce model sketching: a technical framework for iteratively and rapidly authoring functional approximations of a machine learning model's decision-making logic. Model sketching refocuses practitioner attention on composing high-level, human-understandable concepts that the model is expected to reason over (e.g., profanity, racism, or sarcasm in a content moderation task) using zero-shot concept instantiation. In an evaluation with 17 ML practitioners, model sketching reframed thinking from implementation to higher-level exploration, prompted iteration on a broader range of model designs, and helped identify gaps in the problem formulation$\unicode{x2014}$all in a fraction of the time ordinarily required to build a model.
summary: Machine learning practitioners often end up tunneling on low-level technical details like model architectures and performance metrics. Could early model development instead focus on high-level questions of which factors a model ought to pay attention to? Inspired by the practice of sketching in design, which distills ideas to their minimal representation, we introduce model sketching: a technical framework for iteratively and rapidly authoring functional approximations of a machine learning model's decision-making logic. Model sketching refocuses practitioner attention on composing high-level, human-understandable concepts that the model is expected to reason over (e.g., profanity, racism, or sarcasm in a content moderation task) using zero-shot concept instantiation. In an evaluation with 17 ML practitioners, model sketching reframed thinking from implementation to higher-level exploration, prompted iteration on a broader range of model designs, and helped identify gaps in the problem formulation$\unicode{x2014}$all in a fraction of the time ordinarily required to build a model.
abstract_zh: 机器学习从业者通常最终会挖掘模型架构和性能指标等低级技术细节。早期模型开发是否可以重点关注模型应该关注哪些因素的高级问题？受到设计中草图绘制实践的启发，这种实践将想法提炼为最小化表示，我们引入了模型草图绘制：一种用于迭代和快速创作机器学习模型决策逻辑的函数近似的技术框架。模型草图将从业者的注意力重新集中在构建高层次的、人类可理解的概念上，模型期望使用零样本概念实例化来推理这些概念（例如，内容审核任务中的脏话、种族主义或讽刺）。在对 17 名 ML 从业者进行的评估中，模型草图重新构建了从实施到更高层次探索的思维，促进了更广泛的模型设计的迭代，并帮助识别问题表述中的差距$\unicode{x2014}$，所有这些只需要构建模型通常所需时间的一小部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为模型草图的技术框架，旨在通过聚焦高层次概念而非低级技术细节，改进早期机器学习模型设计过程。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习实践中，开发者过度关注模型架构和性能指标，忽视了对模型应关注的核心概念（如内容审核中的辱骂、种族主义等）的早期探索。
AI.method: 受设计草图启发，构建迭代式框架快速生成模型决策逻辑的功能近似，通过零样本概念实例化引导开发者组合可理解的高层概念。
AI.result: 17名ML从业者参与的评估显示，该方法将思考重心从实现转向高层探索，促进更多模型设计迭代，并在更短时间内发现问题定义中的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 模型草图有效推动了早期阶段基于核心概念的模型设计，提高了开发效率并揭示了问题定义中的潜在缺口。

authors_text: Yi Zhang,Dasong Li,Xiaoyu Shi,Dailan He,Kangning Song,Xiaogang Wang,Hongwei Qin,Hongsheng Li
title: KBNet: Kernel Basis Network for Image Restoration
title_zh: KBNet：用于图像恢复的内核基础网络
abstract: How to aggregate spatial information plays an essential role in learning-based image restoration. Most existing CNN-based networks adopt static convolutional kernels to encode spatial information, which cannot aggregate spatial information adaptively. Recent transformer-based architectures achieve adaptive spatial aggregation. But they lack desirable inductive biases of convolutions and require heavy computational costs. In this paper, we propose a kernel basis attention (KBA) module, which introduces learnable kernel bases to model representative image patterns for spatial information aggregation. Different kernel bases are trained to model different local structures. At each spatial location, they are linearly and adaptively fused by predicted pixel-wise coefficients to obtain aggregation weights. Based on the KBA module, we further design a multi-axis feature fusion (MFF) block to encode and fuse channel-wise, spatial-invariant, and pixel-adaptive features for image restoration. Our model, named kernel basis network (KBNet), achieves state-of-the-art performances on more than ten benchmarks over image denoising, deraining, and deblurring tasks while requiring less computational cost than previous SOTA methods.
summary: How to aggregate spatial information plays an essential role in learning-based image restoration. Most existing CNN-based networks adopt static convolutional kernels to encode spatial information, which cannot aggregate spatial information adaptively. Recent transformer-based architectures achieve adaptive spatial aggregation. But they lack desirable inductive biases of convolutions and require heavy computational costs. In this paper, we propose a kernel basis attention (KBA) module, which introduces learnable kernel bases to model representative image patterns for spatial information aggregation. Different kernel bases are trained to model different local structures. At each spatial location, they are linearly and adaptively fused by predicted pixel-wise coefficients to obtain aggregation weights. Based on the KBA module, we further design a multi-axis feature fusion (MFF) block to encode and fuse channel-wise, spatial-invariant, and pixel-adaptive features for image restoration. Our model, named kernel basis network (KBNet), achieves state-of-the-art performances on more than ten benchmarks over image denoising, deraining, and deblurring tasks while requiring less computational cost than previous SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 如何聚合空间信息在基于学习的图像恢复中起着至关重要的作用。现有的基于CNN的网络大多采用静态卷积核来编码空间信息，无法自适应地聚合空间信息。最近基于变压器的架构实现了自适应空间聚合。但它们缺乏理想的卷积归纳偏差，并且需要大量的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种核基注意（KBA）模块，该模块引入可学习的核基来对空间信息聚合的代表性图像模式进行建模。不同的内核库被训练来模拟不同的局部结构。在每个空间位置，它们通过预测的像素系数线性自适应地融合以获得聚合权重。基于KBA模块，我们进一步设计了一个多轴特征融合（MFF）块来编码和融合通道方式、空间不变和像素自适应特征以进行图像恢复。我们的模型名为内核基础网络 (KBNet)，在图像去噪、去雨和去模糊任务的十多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，同时比以前的 SOTA 方法需要更少的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KBNet，一种结合可学习核基注意力模块和多轴特征融合块的图像修复网络，旨在解决传统CNN和Transformer在空间信息聚合中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN使用静态卷积核无法自适应聚合空间信息，而Transformer虽具备自适应性但计算成本高且缺乏卷积的归纳偏置，需设计兼顾效率与性能的新型网络结构。
AI.method: 提出核基注意力（KBA）模块，通过可学习的核基建模局部结构并自适应融合特征；设计多轴特征融合（MFF）块整合通道、空间不变及像素自适应特征，构建高效图像修复网络KBNet。
AI.result: KBNet在十多个图像去噪、去雨和去模糊基准测试中达到SOTA性能，计算成本低于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: KBNet通过核基注意力与多轴特征融合有效结合CNN与Transformer优势，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升图像修复效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出KBNet，一种结合可学习核基注意力模块和多轴特征融合块的图像修复网络，旨在解决传统CNN和Transformer在空间信息聚合中的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN使用静态卷积核无法自适应聚合空间信息，而Transformer虽具备自适应性但计算成本高且缺乏卷积的归纳偏置，需设计兼顾效率与性能的新型网络结构。
ai_content.method: 提出核基注意力（KBA）模块，通过可学习的核基建模局部结构并自适应融合特征；设计多轴特征融合（MFF）块整合通道、空间不变及像素自适应特征，构建高效图像修复网络KBNet。
ai_content.result: KBNet在十多个图像去噪、去雨和去模糊基准测试中达到SOTA性能，计算成本低于现有最优方法。
ai_content.conclusion: KBNet通过核基注意力与多轴特征融合有效结合CNN与Transformer优势，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升图像修复效果。

search_text: KBNet: Kernel Basis Network for Image Restoration KBNet：用于图像恢复的内核基础网络 How to aggregate spatial information plays an essential role in learning-based image restoration. Most existing CNN-based networks adopt static convolutional kernels to encode spatial information, which cannot aggregate spatial information adaptively. Recent transformer-based architectures achieve adaptive spatial aggregation. But they lack desirable inductive biases of convolutions and require heavy computational costs. In this paper, we propose a kernel basis attention (KBA) module, which introduces learnable kernel bases to model representative image patterns for spatial information aggregation. Different kernel bases are trained to model different local structures. At each spatial location, they are linearly and adaptively fused by predicted pixel-wise coefficients to obtain aggregation weights. Based on the KBA module, we further design a multi-axis feature fusion (MFF) block to encode and fuse channel-wise, spatial-invariant, and pixel-adaptive features for image restoration. Our model, named kernel basis network (KBNet), achieves state-of-the-art performances on more than ten benchmarks over image denoising, deraining, and deblurring tasks while requiring less computational cost than previous SOTA methods. 如何聚合空间信息在基于学习的图像恢复中起着至关重要的作用。现有的基于CNN的网络大多采用静态卷积核来编码空间信息，无法自适应地聚合空间信息。最近基于变压器的架构实现了自适应空间聚合。但它们缺乏理想的卷积归纳偏差，并且需要大量的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种核基注意（KBA）模块，该模块引入可学习的核基来对空间信息聚合的代表性图像模式进行建模。不同的内核库被训练来模拟不同的局部结构。在每个空间位置，它们通过预测的像素系数线性自适应地融合以获得聚合权重。基于KBA模块，我们进一步设计了一个多轴特征融合（MFF）块来编码和融合通道方式、空间不变和像素自适应特征以进行图像恢复。我们的模型名为内核基础网络 (KBNet)，在图像去噪、去雨和去模糊任务的十多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，同时比以前的 SOTA 方法需要更少的计算成本。 本文提出KBNet，一种结合可学习核基注意力模块和多轴特征融合块的图像修复网络，旨在解决传统CNN和Transformer在空间信息聚合中的不足。 Yi Zhang,Dasong Li,Xiaoyu Shi,Dailan He,Kangning Song,Xiaogang Wang,Hongwei Qin,Hongsheng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Yan Qin,Yong Liang Guan,Chau Yuen
title: Spatiotemporal Capsule Neural Network for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于车辆轨迹预测的时空胶囊神经网络
comment: IEEE TVT has accepted this paper
comments: IEEE TVT has accepted this paper
abstract: Through advancement of the Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) network, road safety, energy consumption, and traffic efficiency can be significantly improved. An accurate vehicle trajectory prediction benefits communication traffic management and network resource allocation for the real-time application of the V2X network. Recurrent neural networks and their variants have been reported in recent research to predict vehicle mobility. However, the spatial attribute of vehicle movement behavior has been overlooked, resulting in incomplete information utilization. To bridge this gap, we put forward for the first time a hierarchical trajectory prediction structure using the capsule neural network (CapsNet) with three sequential components. First, the geographic information is transformed into a grid map presentation, describing vehicle mobility distribution spatially and temporally. Second, CapsNet serves as the core model to embed local temporal and global spatial correlation through hierarchical capsules. Finally, extensive experiments conducted on actual taxi mobility data collected in Porto city (Portugal) and Singapore show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Through advancement of the Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) network, road safety, energy consumption, and traffic efficiency can be significantly improved. An accurate vehicle trajectory prediction benefits communication traffic management and network resource allocation for the real-time application of the V2X network. Recurrent neural networks and their variants have been reported in recent research to predict vehicle mobility. However, the spatial attribute of vehicle movement behavior has been overlooked, resulting in incomplete information utilization. To bridge this gap, we put forward for the first time a hierarchical trajectory prediction structure using the capsule neural network (CapsNet) with three sequential components. First, the geographic information is transformed into a grid map presentation, describing vehicle mobility distribution spatially and temporally. Second, CapsNet serves as the core model to embed local temporal and global spatial correlation through hierarchical capsules. Finally, extensive experiments conducted on actual taxi mobility data collected in Porto city (Portugal) and Singapore show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 通过车联网（V2X）网络的进步，可以显着改善道路安全、能源消耗和交通效率。准确的车辆轨迹预测有利于通信流量管理和网络资源分配，以实现V2X网络的实时应用。最近的研究报告了循环神经网络及其变体用于预测车辆移动性。然而，忽视了车辆运动行为的空间属性，导致信息利用不完整。为了弥补这一差距，我们首次提出了一种使用具有三个连续组件的胶囊神经网络（CapsNet）的分层轨迹预测结构。首先，将地理信息转换为网格地图表示，描述车辆在空间和时间上的流动性分布。其次，CapsNet 作为核心模型，通过分层胶囊嵌入局部时间和全局空间相关性。最后，对在波尔图市（葡萄牙）和新加坡收集的实际出租车移动数据进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于胶囊神经网络（CapsNet）的时空分层结构，用于提升车辆轨迹预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如RNN）未充分考虑车辆运动的空间属性，导致信息利用不完整，需改进以提升V2X网络的实时应用效果。
AI.method: 将地理信息转化为网格地图表示，通过分层胶囊网络嵌入局部时序与全局空间关联，分三阶段建模轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在葡萄牙波尔图和新加坡的真实出租车数据集上，该方法优于当前最先进的轨迹预测技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效融合时空特征，为V2X网络的交通管理与资源分配提供了更精确的预测支持。

authors_text: Zhiqin Chen
title: A Review of Deep Learning-Powered Mesh Reconstruction Methods
title_zh: 深度学习驱动的网格重建方法综述
abstract: With the recent advances in hardware and rendering techniques, 3D models have emerged everywhere in our life. Yet creating 3D shapes is arduous and requires significant professional knowledge. Meanwhile, Deep learning has enabled high-quality 3D shape reconstruction from various sources, making it a viable approach to acquiring 3D shapes with minimal effort. Importantly, to be used in common 3D applications, the reconstructed shapes need to be represented as polygonal meshes, which is a challenge for neural networks due to the irregularity of mesh tessellations. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of mesh reconstruction methods that are powered by machine learning. We first describe various representations for 3D shapes in the deep learning context. Then we review the development of 3D mesh reconstruction methods from voxels, point clouds, single images, and multi-view images. Finally, we identify several challenges in this field and propose potential future directions.
summary: With the recent advances in hardware and rendering techniques, 3D models have emerged everywhere in our life. Yet creating 3D shapes is arduous and requires significant professional knowledge. Meanwhile, Deep learning has enabled high-quality 3D shape reconstruction from various sources, making it a viable approach to acquiring 3D shapes with minimal effort. Importantly, to be used in common 3D applications, the reconstructed shapes need to be represented as polygonal meshes, which is a challenge for neural networks due to the irregularity of mesh tessellations. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of mesh reconstruction methods that are powered by machine learning. We first describe various representations for 3D shapes in the deep learning context. Then we review the development of 3D mesh reconstruction methods from voxels, point clouds, single images, and multi-view images. Finally, we identify several challenges in this field and propose potential future directions.
abstract_zh: 随着硬件和渲染技术的最新进步，3D 模型在我们的生活中随处可见。然而，创建 3D 形状是一项艰巨的任务，需要大量的专业知识。同时，深度学习已经实现了来自各种来源的高质量 3D 形状重建，使其成为一种以最少的努力获取 3D 形状的可行方法。重要的是，为了在常见的 3D 应用中使用，重建的形状需要表示为多边形网格，由于网格细分的不规则性，这对神经网络来说是一个挑战。在本次调查中，我们对机器学习支持的网格重建方法进行了全面回顾。我们首先描述深度学习环境中 3D 形状的各种表示。然后我们回顾了基于体素、点云、单图像和多视图图像的 3D 网格重建方法的发展。最后，我们确定了该领域的几个挑战并提出了未来潜在的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的网格重建方法，分析了从不同数据源（如体素、点云、图像等）生成三维网格模型的技术进展。
AI.motivation: 三维模型在生活中的广泛应用与创建过程的复杂性形成矛盾，深度学习虽能高效生成三维形状，但将其转化为不规则网格仍面临挑战，需系统总结现有方法。
AI.method: 通过梳理深度学习中三维形状的多种表示方式，按数据源分类回顾网格重建技术的发展，并总结当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.result: 全面总结了基于深度学习的网格重建方法体系，明确了不同数据源下的技术路线，并指出了数据稀疏性、计算效率等关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著推动了网格重建技术，但如何提升模型泛化能力与计算效率仍是未来研究的核心方向。

We first describe various representations for 3D shapes in the deep learning context. Then we review the development of 3D mesh reconstruction methods from voxels, point clouds, single images, and multi-view images. Finally, we identify several challenges in this field and propose potential future directions. 随着硬件和渲染技术的最新进步，3D 模型在我们的生活中随处可见。然而，创建 3D 形状是一项艰巨的任务，需要大量的专业知识。同时，深度学习已经实现了来自各种来源的高质量 3D 形状重建，使其成为一种以最少的努力获取 3D 形状的可行方法。重要的是，为了在常见的 3D 应用中使用，重建的形状需要表示为多边形网格，由于网格细分的不规则性，这对神经网络来说是一个挑战。在本次调查中，我们对机器学习支持的网格重建方法进行了全面回顾。我们首先描述深度学习环境中 3D 形状的各种表示。然后我们回顾了基于体素、点云、单图像和多视图图像的 3D 网格重建方法的发展。最后，我们确定了该领域的几个挑战并提出了未来潜在的方向。 本文综述了基于深度学习的网格重建方法，分析了从不同数据源（如体素、点云、图像等）生成三维网格模型的技术进展。 Zhiqin Chen cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Qichen Xu,I. P. Miranda,Manuel Pereiro,Filipp N. Rybakov,Danny Thonig,Erik Sjöqvist,Pavel Bessarab,Anders Bergman,Olle Eriksson,Pawel Herman,Anna Delin
title: Metaheuristic conditional neural network for harvesting skyrmionic metastable states
title_zh: 用于收获斯格明子亚稳态的元启发式条件神经网络
abstract: We present a metaheuristic conditional neural-network-based method aimed at identifying physically interesting metastable states in a potential energy surface of high rugosity. To demonstrate how this method works, we identify and analyze spin textures with topological charge $Q$ ranging from 1 to $-13$ (where antiskyrmions have $Q<0$) in the Pd/Fe/Ir(111) system, which we model using a classical atomistic spin Hamiltonian based on parameters computed from density functional theory. To facilitate the harvest of relevant spin textures, we make use of the newly developed Segment Anything Model (SAM). Spin textures with $Q$ ranging from $-3$ to $-6$ are further analyzed using finite-temperature spin-dynamics simulations. We observe that for temperatures up to around 20\,K, lifetimes longer than 200\,ps are predicted, and that when these textures decay, new topological spin textures are formed. We also find that the relative stability of the spin textures depend linearly on the topological charge, but only when comparing the most stable antiskyrmions for each topological charge. In general, the number of holes (i.e., non-self-intersecting curves that define closed domain walls in the structure) in the spin texture is an important predictor of stability -- the more holes, the less stable is the texture. Methods for systematic identification and characterization of complex metastable skyrmionic textures -- such as the one demonstrated here -- are highly relevant for advancements in the field of topological spintronics.

To demonstrate how this method works, we identify and analyze spin textures with topological charge $Q$ ranging from 1 to $-13$ (where antiskyrmions have $Q<0$) in the Pd/Fe/Ir(111) system, which we model using a classical atomistic spin Hamiltonian based on parameters computed from density functional theory. Spin textures with $Q$ ranging from $-3$ to $-6$ are further analyzed using finite-temperature spin-dynamics simulations. We observe that for temperatures up to around 20\,K, lifetimes longer than 200\,ps are predicted, and that when these textures decay, new topological spin textures are formed. We also find that the relative stability of the spin textures depend linearly on the topological charge, but only when comparing the most stable antiskyrmions for each topological charge. In general, the number of holes (i.e., non-self-intersecting curves that define closed domain walls in the structure) in the spin texture is an important predictor of stability -- the more holes, the less stable is the texture. Methods for systematic identification and characterization of complex metastable skyrmionic textures -- such as the one demonstrated here -- are highly relevant for advancements in the field of topological spintronics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于元启发式条件神经网络的方法，旨在识别高粗糙度势能表面中物理上有趣的亚稳态。为了演示该方法的工作原理，我们识别并分析了 Pd/Fe/Ir(111) 系统中拓扑电荷 $Q$ 范围从 1 到 $-13$（其中反斯格明子的 $Q<0$）的自旋纹理，我们使用基于密度泛函理论计算的参数的经典原子自旋哈密顿量对其进行建模。为了促进相关旋转纹理的收获，我们利用新开发的分段任意模型（SAM）。使用有限温度自旋动力学模拟进一步分析了 $Q$ 范围从 $-3$ 到 $-6$ 的自旋纹理。我们观察到，对于高达 20\,K 左右的温度，预计寿命将超过 200\,ps，并且当这些纹理衰减时，会形成新的拓扑自旋纹理。我们还发现，自旋纹理的相对稳定性与拓扑电荷线性相关，但仅在比较每个拓扑电荷的最稳定的反斯格明子时。一般来说，自旋纹理中的孔（即，定义结构中的闭合畴壁的非自相交曲线）的数量是稳定性的重要预测因素——孔越多，纹理越不稳定。复杂亚稳态斯格明子纹理的系统识别和表征方法（例如这里演示的方法）与拓扑自旋电子学领域的进步高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元启发式条件神经网络的方法，用于在高粗糙势能面上识别具有物理意义的亚稳态skyrmion结构，并在Pd/Fe/Ir(111)系统中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以高效识别复杂拓扑结构的亚稳态，而系统化识别这些结构对拓扑自旋电子学的发展具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合元启发式算法与条件神经网络，利用Segment Anything Model提取自旋纹理，并通过有限温度自旋动力学模拟分析其稳定性。
AI.result: 识别出拓扑电荷Q范围为1至-13的自旋结构，发现稳定性与拓扑电荷线性相关，且孔数量越多结构越不稳定；在20K以下温度下寿命超过200ps。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为系统化识别和表征复杂亚稳态skyrmion结构提供了新途径，有助于推动拓扑自旋电子学研究。

authors_text: Tokuhiro Nishikawa,Kazumi Aoyama,Shunichi Sekiguchi,Takayoshi Takayanagi,Jianing Wu,Yu Ishihara,Tamaki Kojima,Jerry Jun Yokono
title: Naming Objects for Vision-and-Language Manipulation
title_zh: 为视觉和语言操作命名对象
abstract: Robot manipulation tasks by natural language instructions need common understanding of the target object between human and the robot. However, the instructions often have an interpretation ambiguity, because the instruction lacks important information, or does not express the target object correctly to complete the task. To solve this ambiguity problem, we hypothesize that "naming" the target objects in advance will reduce the ambiguity of natural language instructions. We propose a robot system and method that incorporates naming with appearance of the objects in advance, so that in the later manipulation task, instruction can be performed with its unique name to disambiguate the objects easily. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we build a system that can memorize the target objects, and show that naming the objects facilitates detection of the target objects and improves the success rate of manipulation instructions. With this method, the success rate of object manipulation task increases by 31% in ambiguous instructions.
summary: Robot manipulation tasks by natural language instructions need common understanding of the target object between human and the robot. However, the instructions often have an interpretation ambiguity, because the instruction lacks important information, or does not express the target object correctly to complete the task. To solve this ambiguity problem, we hypothesize that "naming" the target objects in advance will reduce the ambiguity of natural language instructions. We propose a robot system and method that incorporates naming with appearance of the objects in advance, so that in the later manipulation task, instruction can be performed with its unique name to disambiguate the objects easily. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we build a system that can memorize the target objects, and show that naming the objects facilitates detection of the target objects and improves the success rate of manipulation instructions. With this method, the success rate of object manipulation task increases by 31% in ambiguous instructions.
abstract_zh: 通过自然语言指令进行的机器人操纵任务需要人类和机器人之间对目标物体的共同理解。然而，指令常常存在解释歧义，因为指令缺乏重要信息，或者没有正确表达完成任务的目标对象。为了解决这个歧义问题，我们假设提前“命名”目标对象将减少自然语言指令的歧义。我们提出了一种机器人系统和方法，预先将命名与物体的外观结合起来，以便在以后的操作任务中，可以使用其唯一的名称来执行指令，以轻松消除物体的歧义。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们构建了一个可以记忆目标对象的系统，并表明命名对象有助于目标对象的检测并提高操作指令的成功率。通过该方法，在模糊指令中对象操作任务的成功率提高了31%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过提前命名目标物体来减少自然语言指令在机器人操作任务中的歧义性，从而提高任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 自然语言指令常因信息缺失或表述不清导致机器人无法准确识别目标物体，影响操作任务的完成。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合物体外观特征的命名系统，在操作前为物体分配唯一名称，并通过该名称在后续指令中明确目标物体。
AI.result: 实验表明，命名方法使模糊指令下的物体操作任务成功率提升了31%。
AI.conclusion: 提前命名目标物体能有效消除指令歧义，显著提升机器人基于自然语言的视觉-语言操作性能。

authors_text: Tosin Ige,Abosede Kolade,Olukunle Kolade
title: Enhancing Border Security and Countering Terrorism Through Computer Vision: a Field of Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 通过计算机视觉加强边境安全和反恐：人工智能领域
abstract: Border security had been a persistent problem in international border especially when it get to the issue of preventing illegal movement of weapons, contraband, drugs, and combating issue of illegal or undocumented immigrant while at the same time ensuring that lawful trade, economic prosperity coupled with national sovereignty across the border is maintained. In this research work, we used open source computer vision (Open CV) and adaboost algorithm to develop a model which can detect a moving object a far off, classify it, automatically snap full image and face of the individual separately, and then run a background check on them against worldwide databases while making a prediction about an individual being a potential threat, intending immigrant, potential terrorists or extremist and then raise sound alarm. Our model can be deployed on any camera device and be mounted at any international border. There are two stages involved, we first developed a model based on open CV computer vision algorithm, with the ability to detect human movement from afar, it will automatically snap both the face and the full image of the person separately, and the second stage is the automatic triggering of background check against the moving object. This ensures it check the moving object against several databases worldwide and is able to determine the admissibility of the person afar off. If the individual is inadmissible, it will automatically alert the border officials with the image of the person and other details, and if the bypass the border officials, the system is able to detect and alert the authority with his images and other details. All these operations will be done afar off by the AI powered camera before the individual reach the border
summary: Border security had been a persistent problem in international border especially when it get to the issue of preventing illegal movement of weapons, contraband, drugs, and combating issue of illegal or undocumented immigrant while at the same time ensuring that lawful trade, economic prosperity coupled with national sovereignty across the border is maintained. In this research work, we used open source computer vision (Open CV) and adaboost algorithm to develop a model which can detect a moving object a far off, classify it, automatically snap full image and face of the individual separately, and then run a background check on them against worldwide databases while making a prediction about an individual being a potential threat, intending immigrant, potential terrorists or extremist and then raise sound alarm. Our model can be deployed on any camera device and be mounted at any international border. There are two stages involved, we first developed a model based on open CV computer vision algorithm, with the ability to detect human movement from afar, it will automatically snap both the face and the full image of the person separately, and the second stage is the automatic triggering of background check against the moving object. This ensures it check the moving object against several databases worldwide and is able to determine the admissibility of the person afar off. If the individual is inadmissible, it will automatically alert the border officials with the image of the person and other details, and if the bypass the border officials, the system is able to detect and alert the authority with his images and other details. All these operations will be done afar off by the AI powered camera before the individual reach the border
abstract_zh: 边境安全一直是国际边境的一个长期存在的问题，特别是在防止武器、违禁品、毒品的非法流动以及打击非法或无证移民问题，同时确保维护合法贸易、经济繁荣以及跨境国家主权的问题上。在这项研究工作中，我们使用开源计算机视觉（Open CV）和adaboost算法开发了一个模型，可以检测远处的移动物体，对其进行分类，自动分别拍摄个人的完整图像和面部，然后根据全球数据库对其进行背景检查，同时预测某个人是否是潜在威胁、潜在移民、潜在恐怖分子或极端分子，然后发出声音警报。我们的模型可以部署在任何相机设备上并安装在任何国际边界。涉及两个阶段，首先我们开发了一个基于开放式CV计算机视觉算法的模型，具有远距离检测人体运动的能力，它会自动分别捕捉人的面部和完整图像，第二阶段是自动触发针对运动物体的背景检查。这确保了它根据全球多个数据库检查移动物体，并能够确定远处人员的可接受性。如果该人被禁止入境，系统会自动向边境官员发出该人的图像和其他详细信息的警报，如果绕过边境官员，系统能够检测到该人的图像和其他详细信息，并向当局发出警报。所有这些操作都将在人员到达边境之前由人工智能摄像头在远处完成

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉和AdaBoost算法的AI模型，用于增强边境安全和反恐，通过远程检测、分类移动目标并自动进行背景检查。
AI.motivation: 边境安全面临非法物品运输、非法移民等挑战，需在保障合法贸易和国家主权的同时有效防范威胁。
AI.method: 采用OpenCV计算机视觉算法和AdaBoost模型，实现远距离移动目标检测、人脸识别、图像捕捉及全球数据库背景核查。
AI.result: 系统可远程自动检测潜在威胁个体，触发警报并提供图像与信息，即使绕过边境官员也能持续追踪。
AI.conclusion: 该AI驱动的摄像头系统能有效提升边境安全防控能力，实现自动化威胁识别与预警。

search_text: Enhancing Border Security and Countering Terrorism Through Computer Vision: a Field of Artificial Intelligence 通过计算机视觉加强边境安全和反恐：人工智能领域 Border security had been a persistent problem in international border especially when it get to the issue of preventing illegal movement of weapons, contraband, drugs, and combating issue of illegal or undocumented immigrant while at the same time ensuring that lawful trade, economic prosperity coupled with national sovereignty across the border is maintained. In this research work, we used open source computer vision (Open CV) and adaboost algorithm to develop a model which can detect a moving object a far off, classify it, automatically snap full image and face of the individual separately, and then run a background check on them against worldwide databases while making a prediction about an individual being a potential threat, intending immigrant, potential terrorists or extremist and then raise sound alarm. Our model can be deployed on any camera device and be mounted at any international border. There are two stages involved, we first developed a model based on open CV computer vision algorithm, with the ability to detect human movement from afar, it will automatically snap both the face and the full image of the person separately, and the second stage is the automatic triggering of background check against the moving object. This ensures it check the moving object against several databases worldwide and is able to determine the admissibility of the person afar off. If the individual is inadmissible, it will automatically alert the border officials with the image of the person and other details, and if the bypass the border officials, the system is able to detect and alert the authority with his images and other details. All these operations will be done afar off by the AI powered camera before the individual reach the border 边境安全一直是国际边境的一个长期存在的问题，特别是在防止武器、违禁品、毒品的非法流动以及打击非法或无证移民问题，同时确保维护合法贸易、经济繁荣以及跨境国家主权的问题上。在这项研究工作中，我们使用开源计算机视觉（Open CV）和adaboost算法开发了一个模型，可以检测远处的移动物体，对其进行分类，自动分别拍摄个人的完整图像和面部，然后根据全球数据库对其进行背景检查，同时预测某个人是否是潜在威胁、潜在移民、潜在恐怖分子或极端分子，然后发出声音警报。我们的模型可以部署在任何相机设备上并安装在任何国际边界。涉及两个阶段，首先我们开发了一个基于开放式CV计算机视觉算法的模型，具有远距离检测人体运动的能力，它会自动分别捕捉人的面部和完整图像，第二阶段是自动触发针对运动物体的背景检查。这确保了它根据全球多个数据库检查移动物体，并能够确定远处人员的可接受性。如果该人被禁止入境，系统会自动向边境官员发出该人的图像和其他详细信息的警报，如果绕过边境官员，系统能够检测到该人的图像和其他详细信息，并向当局发出警报。所有这些操作都将在人员到达边境之前由人工智能摄像头在远处完成 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉和AdaBoost算法的AI模型，用于增强边境安全和反恐，通过远程检测、分类移动目标并自动进行背景检查。 Tosin Ige,Abosede Kolade,Olukunle Kolade cs.CV

authors_text: Dejun Feng,Hongyu Chen,Suning Liu,Ziyang Liao,Xingyu Shen,Yakun Xie,Jun Zhu
title: Boundary-semantic collaborative guidance network with dual-stream feedback mechanism for salient object detection in optical remote sensing imagery
title_zh: 具有双流反馈机制的边界语义协同引导网络用于光学遥感图像中的显着目标检测
abstract: With the increasing application of deep learning in various domains, salient object detection in optical remote sensing images (ORSI-SOD) has attracted significant attention. However, most existing ORSI-SOD methods predominantly rely on local information from low-level features to infer salient boundary cues and supervise them using boundary ground truth, but fail to sufficiently optimize and protect the local information, and almost all approaches ignore the potential advantages offered by the last layer of the decoder to maintain the integrity of saliency maps. To address these issues, we propose a novel method named boundary-semantic collaborative guidance network (BSCGNet) with dual-stream feedback mechanism. First, we propose a boundary protection calibration (BPC) module, which effectively reduces the loss of edge position information during forward propagation and suppresses noise in low-level features without relying on boundary ground truth. Second, based on the BPC module, a dual feature feedback complementary (DFFC) module is proposed, which aggregates boundary-semantic dual features and provides effective feedback to coordinate features across different layers, thereby enhancing cross-scale knowledge communication. Finally, to obtain more complete saliency maps, we consider the uniqueness of the last layer of the decoder for the first time and propose the adaptive feedback refinement (AFR) module, which further refines feature representation and eliminates differences between features through a unique feedback mechanism. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that BSCGNet exhibits distinct advantages in challenging scenarios and outperforms the 17 state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches proposed in recent years. Codes and results have been released on GitHub: https://github.com/YUHsss/BSCGNet.
summary: With the increasing application of deep learning in various domains, salient object detection in optical remote sensing images (ORSI-SOD) has attracted significant attention. However, most existing ORSI-SOD methods predominantly rely on local information from low-level features to infer salient boundary cues and supervise them using boundary ground truth, but fail to sufficiently optimize and protect the local information, and almost all approaches ignore the potential advantages offered by the last layer of the decoder to maintain the integrity of saliency maps. To address these issues, we propose a novel method named boundary-semantic collaborative guidance network (BSCGNet) with dual-stream feedback mechanism. First, we propose a boundary protection calibration (BPC) module, which effectively reduces the loss of edge position information during forward propagation and suppresses noise in low-level features without relying on boundary ground truth. Second, based on the BPC module, a dual feature feedback complementary (DFFC) module is proposed, which aggregates boundary-semantic dual features and provides effective feedback to coordinate features across different layers, thereby enhancing cross-scale knowledge communication. Finally, to obtain more complete saliency maps, we consider the uniqueness of the last layer of the decoder for the first time and propose the adaptive feedback refinement (AFR) module, which further refines feature representation and eliminates differences between features through a unique feedback mechanism. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that BSCGNet exhibits distinct advantages in challenging scenarios and outperforms the 17 state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches proposed in recent years. Codes and results have been released on GitHub: https://github.com/YUHsss/BSCGNet.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在各个领域的应用不断增加，光学遥感图像中的显着目标检测（ORSI-SOD）引起了人们的广泛关注。然而，大多数现有的ORSI-SOD方法主要依赖于低级特征的局部信息来推断显着边界线索并使用边界地面实况对其进行监督，但未能充分优化和保护局部信息，并且几乎所有方法都忽略了解码器最后一层为保持显着图完整性所提供的潜在优势。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有双流反馈机制的边界语义协作引导网络（BSCGNet）的新方法。首先，我们提出了边界保护校准（BPC）模块，该模块可以有效减少前向传播过程中边缘位置信息的丢失，并在不依赖边界地面实况的情况下抑制低级特征中的噪声。其次，基于BPC模块，提出了双特征反馈互补（DFFC）模块，聚合边界-语义双特征，并提供有效反馈来协调不同层的特征，从而增强跨尺度的知识交流。最后，为了获得更完整的显着性图，我们首次考虑了解码器最后一层的唯一性，并提出了自适应反馈细化（AFR）模块，该模块进一步细化特征表示并通过独特的反馈机制消除特征之间的差异。对三个基准数据集的大量实验表明，BSCGNet 在具有挑战性的场景中表现出明显的优势，并且优于近年来提出的 17 种最先进（SOTA）方法。代码和结果已发布在GitHub上：https://github.com/YUHsss/BSCGNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于光学遥感影像显著目标检测的边界-语义协同引导网络（BSCGNet），通过双流反馈机制优化边界信息和语义特征的融合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在显著目标检测中过度依赖低层局部信息，导致边界线索优化不足，且忽视了解码器最后一层对保持显著图完整性的潜在优势。
AI.method: 设计了边界保护校准模块（BPC）减少边缘信息损失，双特征反馈互补模块（DFFC）聚合边界-语义特征并跨层协调，以及自适应反馈细化模块（AFR）利用解码器最后一层特性优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，BSCGNet在复杂场景下优于17种最新方法，代码和结果已开源。
AI.conclusion: BSCGNet通过边界-语义协同与多级反馈机制有效提升了光学遥感影像显著目标检测的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jianping Jiang,Jiahe Li,Baowen Zhang,Xiaoming Deng,Boxin Shi
title: EvHandPose: Event-based 3D Hand Pose Estimation with Sparse Supervision
title_zh: EvHandPose：具有稀疏监督的基于事件的 3D 手部姿势估计
abstract: Event camera shows great potential in 3D hand pose estimation, especially addressing the challenges of fast motion and high dynamic range in a low-power way. However, due to the asynchronous differential imaging mechanism, it is challenging to design event representation to encode hand motion information especially when the hands are not moving (causing motion ambiguity), and it is infeasible to fully annotate the temporally dense event stream. In this paper, we propose EvHandPose with novel hand flow representations in Event-to-Pose module for accurate hand pose estimation and alleviating the motion ambiguity issue. To solve the problem under sparse annotation, we design contrast maximization and hand-edge constraints in Pose-to-IWE (Image with Warped Events) module and formulate EvHandPose in a weakly-supervision framework. We further build EvRealHands, the first large-scale real-world event-based hand pose dataset on several challenging scenes to bridge the real-synthetic domain gap. Experiments on EvRealHands demonstrate that EvHandPose outperforms previous event-based methods under all evaluation scenes, achieves accurate and stable hand pose estimation with high temporal resolution in fast motion and strong light scenes compared with RGB-based methods, generalizes well to outdoor scenes and another type of event camera, and shows the potential for the hand gesture recognition task.

However, due to the asynchronous differential imaging mechanism, it is challenging to design event representation to encode hand motion information especially when the hands are not moving (causing motion ambiguity), and it is infeasible to fully annotate the temporally dense event stream. In this paper, we propose EvHandPose with novel hand flow representations in Event-to-Pose module for accurate hand pose estimation and alleviating the motion ambiguity issue. To solve the problem under sparse annotation, we design contrast maximization and hand-edge constraints in Pose-to-IWE (Image with Warped Events) module and formulate EvHandPose in a weakly-supervision framework. We further build EvRealHands, the first large-scale real-world event-based hand pose dataset on several challenging scenes to bridge the real-synthetic domain gap. Experiments on EvRealHands demonstrate that EvHandPose outperforms previous event-based methods under all evaluation scenes, achieves accurate and stable hand pose estimation with high temporal resolution in fast motion and strong light scenes compared with RGB-based methods, generalizes well to outdoor scenes and another type of event camera, and shows the potential for the hand gesture recognition task.
abstract_zh: 事件相机在 3D 手部姿势估计方面显示出巨大潜力，特别是以低功耗方式解决快速运动和高动态范围的挑战。然而，由于异步差分成像机制，设计事件表示来编码手部运动信息具有挑战性，特别是当手不移动时（导致运动模糊），并且完全注释时间密集的事件流是不可行的。在本文中，我们在事件到姿势模块中提出了具有新颖手流表示的 EvHandPose，用于准确的手部姿势估计并减轻运动模糊问题。为了解决稀疏注释下的问题，我们在 Pose-to-IWE（带有扭曲事件的图像）模块中设计了对比度最大化和手边缘约束，并在弱监督框架中制定了 EvHandPose。我们进一步在几个具有挑战性的场景上构建了 EvRealHands，这是第一个基于现实世界事件的大规模手部姿势数据集，以弥补真实合成领域的差距。 EvRealHands 上的实验表明，EvHandPose 在所有评估场景下均优于之前的基于事件的方法，与基于 RGB 的方法相比，在快速运动和强光场景中实现了准确稳定的手部姿势估计，具有高时间分辨率，可以很好地推广到室外场景和其他类型的事件相机，并显示了手势识别任务的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvHandPose方法，利用事件相机实现稀疏标注下的3D手部姿态估计，并构建真实场景数据集EvRealHands。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在高速运动和高动态场景中具有低功耗优势，但其异步差分成像机制导致静止时运动模糊且难以标注密集事件流，现有方法存在标注依赖和运动歧义问题。
AI.method: 设计Event-to-Pose模块的新型手部流表示以编码运动信息，结合对比度最大化和手部边缘约束的Pose-to-IWE模块，在弱监督框架下实现稀疏标注下的姿态估计，并构建首个真实场景事件相机手部姿态数据集EvRealHands。
AI.result: 在EvRealHands数据集上优于现有事件相机方法，实现高速运动和强光场景下的高精度稳定姿态估计，可泛化至户外场景及其他类型事件相机，并展示手势识别潜力。
AI.conclusion: EvHandPose通过创新表示学习和弱监督框架有效解决了事件相机的运动歧义与标注稀疏问题，在多场景下验证了方法的有效性，为事件相机手部姿态估计提供了新方向。

authors_text: Zilin Si,Tianhong Catherine Yu,Katrene Morozov,James McCann,Wenzhen Yuan
title: RobotSweater: Scalable, Generalizable, and Customizable Machine-Knitted Tactile Skins for Robots
title_zh: RobotSweater：可扩展、通用且可定制的机器人机织触觉皮肤
abstract: Tactile sensing is essential for robots to perceive and react to the environment. However, it remains a challenge to make large-scale and flexible tactile skins on robots. Industrial machine knitting provides solutions to manufacture customizable fabrics. Along with functional yarns, it can produce highly customizable circuits that can be made into tactile skins for robots. In this work, we present RobotSweater, a machine-knitted pressure-sensitive tactile skin that can be easily applied on robots. We design and fabricate a parameterized multi-layer tactile skin using off-the-shelf yarns, and characterize our sensor on both a flat testbed and a curved surface to show its robust contact detection, multi-contact localization, and pressure sensing capabilities. The sensor is fabricated using a well-established textile manufacturing process with a programmable industrial knitting machine, which makes it highly customizable and low-cost. The textile nature of the sensor also makes it easily fit curved surfaces of different robots and have a friendly appearance. Using our tactile skins, we conduct closed-loop control with tactile feedback for two applications: (1) human lead-through control of a robot arm, and (2) human-robot interaction with a mobile robot.
summary: Tactile sensing is essential for robots to perceive and react to the environment. However, it remains a challenge to make large-scale and flexible tactile skins on robots. Industrial machine knitting provides solutions to manufacture customizable fabrics. Along with functional yarns, it can produce highly customizable circuits that can be made into tactile skins for robots. In this work, we present RobotSweater, a machine-knitted pressure-sensitive tactile skin that can be easily applied on robots. We design and fabricate a parameterized multi-layer tactile skin using off-the-shelf yarns, and characterize our sensor on both a flat testbed and a curved surface to show its robust contact detection, multi-contact localization, and pressure sensing capabilities. The sensor is fabricated using a well-established textile manufacturing process with a programmable industrial knitting machine, which makes it highly customizable and low-cost. The textile nature of the sensor also makes it easily fit curved surfaces of different robots and have a friendly appearance. Using our tactile skins, we conduct closed-loop control with tactile feedback for two applications: (1) human lead-through control of a robot arm, and (2) human-robot interaction with a mobile robot.
abstract_zh: 触觉传感对于机器人感知环境并对环境做出反应至关重要。然而，在机器人上制造大规模且灵活的触觉皮肤仍然是一个挑战。工业机械针织提供制造可定制织物的解决方案。与功能性纱线一起，它可以生产高度可定制的电路，这些电路可以制成机器人的触觉皮肤。在这项工作中，我们展示了 RobotSweater，这是一种机器编织的压敏触觉皮肤，可以轻松应用于机器人。我们使用现成的纱线设计和制造参数化的多层触觉皮肤，并在平面测试台和曲面上表征我们的传感器，以展示其强大的接触检测、多接触定位和压力传感功能。该传感器采用成熟的纺织制造工艺和可编程工业针织机制造而成，因此具有高度可定制性和低成本。传感器的纺织特性也使其能够轻松贴合不同机器人的曲面，并具有友好的外观。使用我们的触觉皮肤，我们对两种应用进行带有触觉反馈的闭环控制：（1）机器人手臂的人类引导控制，以及（2）与移动机器人的人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobotSweater，一种基于工业针织技术的可扩展、通用且可定制的机器人触觉皮肤，用于提升机器人对环境的感知能力。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉皮肤存在大规模制造困难、灵活性不足及定制化成本高的问题，需开发低成本且适配复杂曲面的触觉解决方案。
AI.method: 利用工业针织机和市售纱线制造参数化多层触觉皮肤，通过编程控制实现电路定制，并在平面和曲面测试其接触检测、多点定位及压力感知能力。
AI.result: 触觉皮肤成功实现鲁棒接触检测与压力感知，应用于机械臂的人机协同控制及移动机器人交互，验证其在不同曲面机器人上的适配性与低成本优势。
AI.conclusion: RobotSweater通过纺织工艺实现了高定制化、低成本的触觉皮肤，为机器人提供了一种可扩展且友好的环境感知方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出RobotSweater，一种基于工业针织技术的可扩展、通用且可定制的机器人触觉皮肤，用于提升机器人对环境的感知能力。

authors_text: Fateme Bahri,Nilanjan Ray
title: Weakly Supervised Realtime Dynamic Background Subtraction
title_zh: 弱监督实时动态背景扣除
abstract: Background subtraction is a fundamental task in computer vision with numerous real-world applications, ranging from object tracking to video surveillance. Dynamic backgrounds poses a significant challenge here. Supervised deep learning-based techniques are currently considered state-of-the-art for this task. However, these methods require pixel-wise ground-truth labels, which can be time-consuming and expensive. In this work, we propose a weakly supervised framework that can perform background subtraction without requiring per-pixel ground-truth labels. Our framework is trained on a moving object-free sequence of images and comprises two networks. The first network is an autoencoder that generates background images and prepares dynamic background images for training the second network. The dynamic background images are obtained by thresholding the background-subtracted images. The second network is a U-Net that uses the same object-free video for training and the dynamic background images as pixel-wise ground-truth labels. During the test phase, the input images are processed by the autoencoder and U-Net, which generate background and dynamic background images, respectively. The dynamic background image helps remove dynamic motion from the background-subtracted image, enabling us to obtain a foreground image that is free of dynamic artifacts. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conducted experiments on selected categories of the CDnet 2014 dataset and the I2R dataset. Our method outperformed all top-ranked unsupervised methods. We also achieved better results than one of the two existing weakly supervised methods, and our performance was similar to the other. Our proposed method is online, real-time, efficient, and requires minimal frame-level annotation, making it suitable for a wide range of real-world applications.

Our framework is trained on a moving object-free sequence of images and comprises two networks. The dynamic background images are obtained by thresholding the background-subtracted images. The second network is a U-Net that uses the same object-free video for training and the dynamic background images as pixel-wise ground-truth labels. During the test phase, the input images are processed by the autoencoder and U-Net, which generate background and dynamic background images, respectively. The dynamic background image helps remove dynamic motion from the background-subtracted image, enabling us to obtain a foreground image that is free of dynamic artifacts. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conducted experiments on selected categories of the CDnet 2014 dataset and the I2R dataset. abstract_zh: 背景扣除是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，具有从对象跟踪到视频监控的众多实际应用。动态背景在这里提出了重大挑战。基于监督的深度学习技术目前被认为是这项任务的最先进技术。然而，这些方法需要逐像素的真实标签，这可能既耗时又昂贵。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个弱监督框架，可以执行背景减法，而不需要每像素的地面实况标签。我们的框架是在移动的无物体图像序列上进行训练的，并包含两个网络。第一个网络是自动编码器，用于生成背景图像并准备动态背景图像以训练第二个网络。通过对背景扣除图像进行阈值处理来获得动态背景图像。第二个网络是 U-Net，它使用相同的无对象视频进行训练，并使用动态背景图像作为像素级地面实况标签。在测试阶段，输入图像由自动编码器和 U-Net 处理，分别生成背景图像和动态背景图像。动态背景图像有助于从背景扣除图像中消除动态运动，使我们能够获得没有动态伪影的前景图像。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们对 CDnet 2014 数据集和 I2R 数据集的选定类别进行了实验。我们的方法优于所有排名靠前的无监督方法。我们还取得了比现有两种弱监督方法中的一种更好的结果，并且我们的性能与另一种类似。我们提出的方法是在线、实时、高效的，并且需要最少的帧级注释，使其适合广泛的实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督实时动态背景减除框架，无需像素级标注即可实现动态背景分离。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而现有无监督方法效果有限，需开发更高效且标注需求低的弱监督方案。
AI.method: 采用双网络架构：第一阶段用自编码器生成背景图像并提取动态背景伪标签，第二阶段用U-Net以动态背景图像作为监督信号训练模型，测试时通过两阶段网络联合处理输入图像。
AI.result: 在CDnet 2014和I2R数据集上优于所有无监督方法，性能接近现有最佳弱监督方法，且具备实时性与低标注需求优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线实时框架通过弱监督学习有效解决动态背景问题，适用于需要高效背景减除的现实场景。

authors_text: Mingshan Chang,Min Yang,Qingshan Jiang,Ruifeng Xu
title: Contrastive variational information bottleneck for aspect-based sentiment analysis
title_zh: 基于方面的情感分析的对比变分信息瓶颈
abstract: Deep learning techniques have dominated the literature on aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA), achieving state-of-the-art performance. However, deep models generally suffer from spurious correlations between input features and output labels, which hurts the robustness and generalization capability by a large margin. In this paper, we propose to reduce spurious correlations for ABSA, via a novel Contrastive Variational Information Bottleneck framework (called CVIB). The proposed CVIB framework is composed of an original network and a self-pruned network, and these two networks are optimized simultaneously via contrastive learning. Concretely, we employ the Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) principle to learn an informative and compressed network (self-pruned network) from the original network, which discards the superfluous patterns or spurious correlations between input features and prediction labels. Then, self-pruning contrastive learning is devised to pull together semantically similar positive pairs and push away dissimilar pairs, where the representations of the anchor learned by the original and self-pruned networks respectively are regarded as a positive pair while the representations of two different sentences within a mini-batch are treated as a negative pair. To verify the effectiveness of our CVIB method, we conduct extensive experiments on five benchmark ABSA datasets and the experimental results show that our approach achieves better performance than the strong competitors in terms of overall prediction performance, robustness, and generalization. Code and data to reproduce the results in this paper is available at: https://github.com/shesshan/CVIB.
summary: Deep learning techniques have dominated the literature on aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA), achieving state-of-the-art performance. However, deep models generally suffer from spurious correlations between input features and output labels, which hurts the robustness and generalization capability by a large margin. In this paper, we propose to reduce spurious correlations for ABSA, via a novel Contrastive Variational Information Bottleneck framework (called CVIB). The proposed CVIB framework is composed of an original network and a self-pruned network, and these two networks are optimized simultaneously via contrastive learning. Concretely, we employ the Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) principle to learn an informative and compressed network (self-pruned network) from the original network, which discards the superfluous patterns or spurious correlations between input features and prediction labels. Then, self-pruning contrastive learning is devised to pull together semantically similar positive pairs and push away dissimilar pairs, where the representations of the anchor learned by the original and self-pruned networks respectively are regarded as a positive pair while the representations of two different sentences within a mini-batch are treated as a negative pair. To verify the effectiveness of our CVIB method, we conduct extensive experiments on five benchmark ABSA datasets and the experimental results show that our approach achieves better performance than the strong competitors in terms of overall prediction performance, robustness, and generalization. Code and data to reproduce the results in this paper is available at: https://github.com/shesshan/CVIB.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）文献中占据主导地位，实现了最先进的性能。然而，深度模型通常会受到输入特征和输出标签之间的虚假相关性的影响，这在很大程度上损害了鲁棒性和泛化能力。在本文中，我们建议通过一种新颖的对比变分信息瓶颈框架（称为 CVIB）来减少 ABSA 的虚假相关性。所提出的CVIB框架由原始网络和自剪枝网络组成，这两个网络通过对比学习同时优化。具体来说，我们采用变分信息瓶颈（VIB）原理从原始网络中学习信息丰富且压缩的网络（自剪枝网络），该网络丢弃了输入特征和预测标签之间的多余模式或虚假相关性。然后，设计自修剪对比学习，将语义相似的正对放在一起，并推开不相似的对，其中原始网络和自修剪网络分别学习到的锚点的表示被视为正对，而小批量中两个不同句子的表示被视为负对。为了验证我们的 CVIB 方法的有效性，我们在五个基准 ABSA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果表明，我们的方法在整体预测性能、鲁棒性和泛化方面比强大的竞争对手取得了更好的性能。重现本文结果的代码和数据可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/shesshan/CVIB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对比变分信息瓶颈框架（CVIB），用于解决基于方面的情感分析中深度模型存在的虚假相关性问题，提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）中虽表现优异，但易受输入特征与标签间虚假相关性影响，导致模型鲁棒性和泛化能力下降。
AI.method: 设计CVIB框架，包含原始网络与自剪枝网络，通过对比学习联合优化。利用变分信息瓶颈原则压缩原始网络，去除冗余模式；通过自剪枝对比学习拉近语义相似样本（正例）并推远不同句子（负例）。
AI.result: 在五个ABSA基准数据集上实验表明，CVIB在整体预测性能、鲁棒性和泛化能力上均优于现有强竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: CVIB有效缓解了深度模型的虚假相关性问题，验证了方法在ABSA任务中的有效性，代码与数据已开源。

Then, self-pruning contrastive learning is devised to pull together semantically similar positive pairs and push away dissimilar pairs, where the representations of the anchor learned by the original and self-pruned networks respectively are regarded as a positive pair while the representations of two different sentences within a mini-batch are treated as a negative pair. To verify the effectiveness of our CVIB method, we conduct extensive experiments on five benchmark ABSA datasets and the experimental results show that our approach achieves better performance than the strong competitors in terms of overall prediction performance, robustness, and generalization. Code and data to reproduce the results in this paper is available at: https://github.com/shesshan/CVIB. 深度学习技术在基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）文献中占据主导地位，实现了最先进的性能。然而，深度模型通常会受到输入特征和输出标签之间的虚假相关性的影响，这在很大程度上损害了鲁棒性和泛化能力。在本文中，我们建议通过一种新颖的对比变分信息瓶颈框架（称为 CVIB）来减少 ABSA 的虚假相关性。所提出的CVIB框架由原始网络和自剪枝网络组成，这两个网络通过对比学习同时优化。具体来说，我们采用变分信息瓶颈（VIB）原理从原始网络中学习信息丰富且压缩的网络（自剪枝网络），该网络丢弃了输入特征和预测标签之间的多余模式或虚假相关性。然后，设计自修剪对比学习，将语义相似的正对放在一起，并推开不相似的对，其中原始网络和自修剪网络分别学习到的锚点的表示被视为正对，而小批量中两个不同句子的表示被视为负对。为了验证我们的 CVIB 方法的有效性，我们在五个基准 ABSA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果表明，我们的方法在整体预测性能、鲁棒性和泛化方面比强大的竞争对手取得了更好的性能。重现本文结果的代码和数据可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/shesshan/CVIB。 本文提出一种对比变分信息瓶颈框架（CVIB），用于解决基于方面的情感分析中深度模型存在的虚假相关性问题，提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。 Mingshan Chang,Min Yang,Qingshan Jiang,Ruifeng Xu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xian Wang,Lik-Hang Lee,Carlos Bermejo Fernandez,Pan Hui
title: The Dark Side of Augmented Reality: Exploring Manipulative Designs in AR
title_zh: 增强现实的黑暗面：探索 AR 中的操控设计
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) applications are becoming more mainstream, with successful examples in the mobile environment like Pokemon GO. Current malicious techniques can exploit these environments' immersive and mixed nature (physical-virtual) to trick users into providing more personal information, i.e., dark patterns. Dark patterns are deceiving techniques (e.g., interface tricks) designed to influence individuals' behavioural decisions. However, there are few studies regarding dark patterns' potential issues in AR environments. In this work, using scenario construction to build our prototypes, we investigate the potential future approaches that dark patterns can have. We use VR mockups in our user study to analyze the effects of dark patterns in AR. Our study indicates that dark patterns are effective in immersive scenarios, and the use of novel techniques such as `haptic grabbing' to drag participants' attention can influence their movements. Finally, we discuss the impact of such malicious techniques and what techniques can mitigate them.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) applications are becoming more mainstream, with successful examples in the mobile environment like Pokemon GO. Current malicious techniques can exploit these environments' immersive and mixed nature (physical-virtual) to trick users into providing more personal information, i.e., dark patterns. Dark patterns are deceiving techniques (e.g., interface tricks) designed to influence individuals' behavioural decisions. However, there are few studies regarding dark patterns' potential issues in AR environments. In this work, using scenario construction to build our prototypes, we investigate the potential future approaches that dark patterns can have. We use VR mockups in our user study to analyze the effects of dark patterns in AR. Our study indicates that dark patterns are effective in immersive scenarios, and the use of novel techniques such as `haptic grabbing' to drag participants' attention can influence their movements. Finally, we discuss the impact of such malicious techniques and what techniques can mitigate them.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 应用程序正变得越来越主流，移动环境中的成功示例包括 Pokemon GO。当前的恶意技术可以利用这些环境的沉浸式和混合性质（物理-虚拟）来诱骗用户提供更多个人信息，即暗模式。黑暗模式是旨在影响个人行为决策的欺骗技术（例如界面技巧）。然而，关于 AR 环境中深色图案潜在问题的研究很少。在这项工作中，我们使用场景构建来构建原型，研究了暗模式未来可能具有的潜在方法。我们在用户研究中使用 VR 模型来分析 AR 中深色图案的影响。我们的研究表明，黑暗模式在沉浸式场景中是有效的，并且使用“触觉抓取”等新颖技术来吸引参与者的注意力可以影响他们的动作。最后，我们讨论此类恶意技术的影响以及哪些技术可以减轻它们。

AI.tldr: 本文研究增强现实（AR）环境中潜在的操纵设计（暗模式），探讨其对用户行为的影响及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 随着AR技术普及，其沉浸式特性可能被恶意利用，但现有研究缺乏对AR中暗模式的系统分析，需揭示其风险并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建场景原型与VR模拟实验，设计暗模式（如触觉抓取技术）进行用户测试，分析其对用户行为的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明暗模式在沉浸式AR场景中有效，例如触觉反馈可显著引导用户移动，存在隐私泄露和行为操控风险。
AI.conclusion: AR环境中的暗模式具有潜在危害，需通过技术手段（如用户教育、界面透明化）和政策规范进行防范。

authors_text: Bixing Yan,Shaoling Chen,Yuxuan He,Zhihan Li
title: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Natural Language Understanding Tasks in Finance
title_zh: 用于金融自然语言理解任务的模型无关元学习
abstract: Natural language understanding(NLU) is challenging for finance due to the lack of annotated data and the specialized language in that domain. As a result, researchers have proposed to use pre-trained language model and multi-task learning to learn robust representations. However, aggressive fine-tuning often causes over-fitting and multi-task learning may favor tasks with significantly larger amounts data, etc. To address these problems, in this paper, we investigate model-agnostic meta-learning algorithm(MAML) in low-resource financial NLU tasks. Our contribution includes: 1. we explore the performance of MAML method with multiple types of tasks: GLUE datasets, SNLI, Sci-Tail and Financial PhraseBank; 2. we study the performance of MAML method with multiple single-type tasks: a real scenario stock price prediction problem with twitter text data. Our models achieve the state-of-the-art performance according to the experimental results, which demonstrate that our method can adapt fast and well to low-resource situations.
summary: Natural language understanding(NLU) is challenging for finance due to the lack of annotated data and the specialized language in that domain. As a result, researchers have proposed to use pre-trained language model and multi-task learning to learn robust representations. However, aggressive fine-tuning often causes over-fitting and multi-task learning may favor tasks with significantly larger amounts data, etc. To address these problems, in this paper, we investigate model-agnostic meta-learning algorithm(MAML) in low-resource financial NLU tasks. Our contribution includes: 1. we explore the performance of MAML method with multiple types of tasks: GLUE datasets, SNLI, Sci-Tail and Financial PhraseBank; 2. we study the performance of MAML method with multiple single-type tasks: a real scenario stock price prediction problem with twitter text data. Our models achieve the state-of-the-art performance according to the experimental results, which demonstrate that our method can adapt fast and well to low-resource situations.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏注释数据和该领域的专业语言，自然语言理解（NLU）对金融业来说是一个挑战。因此，研究人员提出使用预训练的语言模型和多任务学习来学习鲁棒的表示。然而，激进的微调通常会导致过度拟合，多任务学习可能有利于数据量显着较大的任务等。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们研究了低资源金融 NLU 任务中的模型不可知元学习算法（MAML）。我们的贡献包括： 1. 我们探索了 MAML 方法在多种类型任务中的性能：GLUE 数据集、SNLI、Sci-Tail 和 Financial PhraseBank； 2.我们研究了MAML方法在多个单一类型任务上的性能：一个使用twitter文本数据的真实场景股票价格预测问题。根据实验结果，我们的模型实现了最先进的性能，这表明我们的方法可以快速且良好地适应资源匮乏的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型无关元学习（MAML）在低资源金融自然语言理解（NLU）任务中的应用，以解决金融领域数据稀缺和领域特定语言的挑战。
AI.motivation: 金融领域的自然语言理解因标注数据不足和专业术语复杂而困难，传统方法如预训练语言模型和多任务学习存在过拟合和数据量不平衡的问题。
AI.method: 采用MAML算法，在多种任务（如GLUE、SNLI、Sci-Tail、Financial PhraseBank）及实际场景（如基于推文的股价预测）中验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在低资源环境下达到最先进水平，证明其快速适应能力。
AI.conclusion: MAML能有效应对金融NLU任务中的低资源挑战，为领域自适应提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Peng-Tao Jiang,Yuqi Yang,Yang Cao,Qibin Hou,Ming-Ming Cheng,Chunhua Shen
title: Traffic Scene Parsing through the TSP6K Dataset
title_zh: 通过 TSP6K 数据集进行交通场景解析
abstract: Traffic scene perception in computer vision is a critically important task to achieve intelligent cities. To date, most existing datasets focus on autonomous driving scenes. We observe that the models trained on those driving datasets often yield unsatisfactory results on traffic monitoring scenes. However, little effort has been put into improving the traffic monitoring scene understanding, mainly due to the lack of specific datasets. To fill this gap, we introduce a specialized traffic monitoring dataset, termed TSP6K, containing images from the traffic monitoring scenario, with high-quality pixel-level and instance-level annotations. The TSP6K dataset captures more crowded traffic scenes with several times more traffic participants than the existing driving scenes. We perform a detailed analysis of the dataset and comprehensively evaluate previous popular scene parsing methods, instance segmentation methods and unsupervised domain adaption methods. Furthermore, considering the vast difference in instance sizes, we propose a detail refining decoder for scene parsing, which recovers the details of different semantic regions in traffic scenes owing to the proposed TSP6K dataset. Experiments show its effectiveness in parsing the traffic monitoring scenes. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/TSP6K.
summary: Traffic scene perception in computer vision is a critically important task to achieve intelligent cities. To date, most existing datasets focus on autonomous driving scenes. We observe that the models trained on those driving datasets often yield unsatisfactory results on traffic monitoring scenes. However, little effort has been put into improving the traffic monitoring scene understanding, mainly due to the lack of specific datasets. To fill this gap, we introduce a specialized traffic monitoring dataset, termed TSP6K, containing images from the traffic monitoring scenario, with high-quality pixel-level and instance-level annotations. The TSP6K dataset captures more crowded traffic scenes with several times more traffic participants than the existing driving scenes. We perform a detailed analysis of the dataset and comprehensively evaluate previous popular scene parsing methods, instance segmentation methods and unsupervised domain adaption methods. Furthermore, considering the vast difference in instance sizes, we propose a detail refining decoder for scene parsing, which recovers the details of different semantic regions in traffic scenes owing to the proposed TSP6K dataset. Experiments show its effectiveness in parsing the traffic monitoring scenes. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/TSP6K.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉中的交通场景感知是实现智慧城市的一项至关重要的任务。迄今为止，大多数现有数据集都专注于自动驾驶场景。我们观察到，在这些驾驶数据集上训练的模型通常在交通监控场景上产生不令人满意的结果。然而，由于缺乏具体的数据集，人们在提高交通监控场景理解方面所做的努力很少。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一个专门的交通监控数据集，称为 TSP6K，其中包含来自交通监控场景的图像，以及高质量的像素级和实例级注释。 TSP6K 数据集捕获了更拥挤的交通场景，交通参与者比现有驾驶场景多几倍。我们对数据集进行了详细的分析，并综合评估了之前流行的场景解析方法、实例分割方法和无监督域适应方法。此外，考虑到实例大小的巨大差异，我们提出了一种用于场景解析的细节精炼解码器，由于所提出的 TSP6K 数据集，它恢复了交通场景中不同语义区域的细节。实验证明了其在解析交通监控场景方面的有效性。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/TSP6K 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为TSP6K的交通监控专用数据集，并设计细节优化解码器以提升交通场景解析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集在交通监控场景表现不佳，但缺乏专门针对交通监控的高质量数据集，制约了相关研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含密集交通参与者的TSP6K数据集，提出针对实例尺寸差异的细节优化解码器以恢复场景细节。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在交通监控场景解析任务中的有效性，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: TSP6K数据集和细节优化解码器为交通监控场景理解提供了新基准，推动了该领域的研究发展。

search_text: Traffic Scene Parsing through the TSP6K Dataset 通过 TSP6K 数据集进行交通场景解析 Traffic scene perception in computer vision is a critically important task to achieve intelligent cities. To date, most existing datasets focus on autonomous driving scenes. We observe that the models trained on those driving datasets often yield unsatisfactory results on traffic monitoring scenes. However, little effort has been put into improving the traffic monitoring scene understanding, mainly due to the lack of specific datasets. To fill this gap, we introduce a specialized traffic monitoring dataset, termed TSP6K, containing images from the traffic monitoring scenario, with high-quality pixel-level and instance-level annotations. The TSP6K dataset captures more crowded traffic scenes with several times more traffic participants than the existing driving scenes. We perform a detailed analysis of the dataset and comprehensively evaluate previous popular scene parsing methods, instance segmentation methods and unsupervised domain adaption methods. Furthermore, considering the vast difference in instance sizes, we propose a detail refining decoder for scene parsing, which recovers the details of different semantic regions in traffic scenes owing to the proposed TSP6K dataset. Experiments show its effectiveness in parsing the traffic monitoring scenes. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/TSP6K. 计算机视觉中的交通场景感知是实现智慧城市的一项至关重要的任务。迄今为止，大多数现有数据集都专注于自动驾驶场景。我们观察到，在这些驾驶数据集上训练的模型通常在交通监控场景上产生不令人满意的结果。然而，由于缺乏具体的数据集，人们在提高交通监控场景理解方面所做的努力很少。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一个专门的交通监控数据集，称为 TSP6K，其中包含来自交通监控场景的图像，以及高质量的像素级和实例级注释。 TSP6K 数据集捕获了更拥挤的交通场景，交通参与者比现有驾驶场景多几倍。我们对数据集进行了详细的分析，并综合评估了之前流行的场景解析方法、实例分割方法和无监督域适应方法。此外，考虑到实例大小的巨大差异，我们提出了一种用于场景解析的细节精炼解码器，由于所提出的 TSP6K 数据集，它恢复了交通场景中不同语义区域的细节。实验证明了其在解析交通监控场景方面的有效性。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/TSP6K 获取。 本文提出一个名为TSP6K的交通监控专用数据集，并设计细节优化解码器以提升交通场景解析效果。 Peng-Tao Jiang,Yuqi Yang,Yang Cao,Qibin Hou,Ming-Ming Cheng,Chunhua Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Hasan Ferdous,Uzma Hasan,Md Osman Gani
title: eCDANs: Efficient Temporal Causal Discovery from Autocorrelated and Non-stationary Data (Student Abstract)
title_zh: eCDAN：从自相关和非平稳数据中进行高效的时间因果发现（学生摘要）
abstract: Conventional temporal causal discovery (CD) methods suffer from high dimensionality, fail to identify lagged causal relationships, and often ignore dynamics in relations. In this study, we present a novel constraint-based CD approach for autocorrelated and non-stationary time series data (eCDANs) capable of detecting lagged and contemporaneous causal relationships along with temporal changes. eCDANs addresses high dimensionality by optimizing the conditioning sets while conducting conditional independence (CI) tests and identifies the changes in causal relations by introducing a surrogate variable to represent time dependency. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that eCDANs can identify time influence and outperform the baselines.
summary: Conventional temporal causal discovery (CD) methods suffer from high dimensionality, fail to identify lagged causal relationships, and often ignore dynamics in relations. In this study, we present a novel constraint-based CD approach for autocorrelated and non-stationary time series data (eCDANs) capable of detecting lagged and contemporaneous causal relationships along with temporal changes. eCDANs addresses high dimensionality by optimizing the conditioning sets while conducting conditional independence (CI) tests and identifies the changes in causal relations by introducing a surrogate variable to represent time dependency. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that eCDANs can identify time influence and outperform the baselines.
abstract_zh: 传统的时间因果发现（CD）方法存在高维度问题，无法识别滞后的因果关系，并且经常忽略关系的动态。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于约束的 CD 方法，用于自相关和非平稳时间序列数据 (eCDAN)，能够检测滞后和同期因果关系以及时间变化。 eCDAN 通过在进行条件独立性 (CI) 测试的同时优化条件集来解决高维问题，并通过引入替代变量来表示时间依赖性来识别因果关系的变化。对合成数据和真实世界数据的实验表明，eCDAN 可以识别时间影响并优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为eCDANs的高效约束-based方法，用于从自相关和非平稳时间序列数据中发现滞后和同期因果关系。
AI.motivation: 传统时间因果发现方法存在高维数据处理困难、无法识别滞后因果关系及忽略关系动态变化等问题。
AI.method: 通过优化条件集进行条件独立性检验，并引入代理变量表征时间依赖性，以应对高维性和非平稳性挑战。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了eCDANs能有效识别时间影响，性能优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: eCDANs通过优化条件集和代理变量设计，成功解决了高维非平稳时间序列的因果发现难题。

authors_text: Leopoldo Bertossi
title: Attribution-Scores and Causal Counterfactuals as Explanations in Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 归因分数和因果反事实作为人工智能的解释
comment: Submitted as chapter contribution. In this version some additional comments were added, and some wrong equation references corrected
comments: Submitted as chapter contribution. In this version some additional comments were added, and some wrong equation references corrected
abstract: In this expository article we highlight the relevance of explanations for artificial intelligence, in general, and for the newer developments in {\em explainable AI}, referring to origins and connections of and among different approaches. We describe in simple terms, explanations in data management and machine learning that are based on attribution-scores, and counterfactuals as found in the area of causality. We elaborate on the importance of logical reasoning when dealing with counterfactuals, and their use for score computation.
summary: In this expository article we highlight the relevance of explanations for artificial intelligence, in general, and for the newer developments in {\em explainable AI}, referring to origins and connections of and among different approaches. We describe in simple terms, explanations in data management and machine learning that are based on attribution-scores, and counterfactuals as found in the area of causality. We elaborate on the importance of logical reasoning when dealing with counterfactuals, and their use for score computation.
abstract_zh: 在这篇说明性文章中，我们强调了一般情况下对人工智能以及可解释人工智能的最新发展的解释的相关性，涉及不同方法之间的起源和联系。我们用简单的术语描述基于归因分数的数据管理和机器学习的解释，以及因果关系领域中发现的反事实。我们详细阐述了逻辑推理在处理反事实时的重要性，以及它们在分数计算中的用途。

AI.tldr: 阐述解释在人工智能中的重要性，并探讨归因分数与因果反事实作为解释方法的应用。
AI.motivation: 强调解释在AI系统中的必要性，推动更透明和可信赖的AI技术发展。
AI.method: 通过归因分数分析和因果反事实模型，结合逻辑推理，解释AI决策过程。
AI.result: 系统梳理了不同解释方法的起源与联系，明确了逻辑推理在反事实解释中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 归因分数与因果反事实是提升AI可解释性的重要工具，需结合逻辑推理以增强解释的有效性。
