authors_text: Taihui Li,Hengkang Wang,Peng Le,XianE Tang,Ju Sun
title: Robust Autoencoders for Collective Corruption Removal
title_zh: 用于集体腐败消除的鲁棒自动编码器
comment: This paper has been accepted to ICASSP2023
comments: This paper has been accepted to ICASSP2023
abstract: Robust PCA is a standard tool for learning a linear subspace in the presence of sparse corruption or rare outliers. What about robustly learning manifolds that are more realistic models for natural data, such as images? There have been several recent attempts to generalize robust PCA to manifold settings. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$- and scaling-invariant $\ell_1/\ell_2$-robust autoencoders based on a surprisingly compact formulation built on the intuition that deep autoencoders perform manifold learning. We demonstrate on several standard image datasets that the proposed formulation significantly outperforms all previous methods in collectively removing sparse corruption, without clean images for training. Moreover, we also show that the learned manifold structures can be generalized to unseen data samples effectively.
summary: Robust PCA is a standard tool for learning a linear subspace in the presence of sparse corruption or rare outliers. What about robustly learning manifolds that are more realistic models for natural data, such as images? There have been several recent attempts to generalize robust PCA to manifold settings. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$- and scaling-invariant $\ell_1/\ell_2$-robust autoencoders based on a surprisingly compact formulation built on the intuition that deep autoencoders perform manifold learning. We demonstrate on several standard image datasets that the proposed formulation significantly outperforms all previous methods in collectively removing sparse corruption, without clean images for training. Moreover, we also show that the learned manifold structures can be generalized to unseen data samples effectively.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒 PCA 是一种标准工​​具，用于在存在稀疏损坏或罕见异常值的情况下学习线性子空间。对于自然数据（例如图像）来说，稳健学习流形是更现实的模型怎么样？最近有一些尝试将稳健的 PCA 推广到流形设置。在本文中，我们提出了 $\ell_1$- 和缩放不变 $\ell_1/\ell_2$- 鲁棒自动编码器，基于一个令人惊讶的紧凑公式，该公式建立在深度自动编码器执行流形学习的直觉上。我们在几个标准图像数据集上证明，在没有用于训练的干净图像的情况下，所提出的公式在集体消除稀疏损坏方面显着优于所有以前的方法。此外，我们还表明，学习到的流形结构可以有效地推广到未见过的数据样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出鲁棒自编码器方法，用于在无干净图像训练的情况下，从被稀疏污染的图像数据中集体去除噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒PCA适用于线性子空间，但自然数据如图像更符合流形结构，现有方法在流形场景下效果不足，需更有效的鲁棒去噪方案。
AI.method: 基于深度自编码器的流形学习直觉，提出ℓ1和尺度不变的ℓ1/ℓ2鲁棒自编码器，通过紧凑公式实现集体去噪。
AI.result: 在多个图像数据集上，该方法在无干净图像训练的情况下显著优于现有方法，且学到的流形结构能有效推广至新数据。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在鲁棒去噪和流形学习任务中均表现优异，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Robust Autoencoders for Collective Corruption Removal 用于集体腐败消除的鲁棒自动编码器 Robust PCA is a standard tool for learning a linear subspace in the presence of sparse corruption or rare outliers. What about robustly learning manifolds that are more realistic models for natural data, such as images? There have been several recent attempts to generalize robust PCA to manifold settings. In this paper, we propose $\ell_1$- and scaling-invariant $\ell_1/\ell_2$-robust autoencoders based on a surprisingly compact formulation built on the intuition that deep autoencoders perform manifold learning. We demonstrate on several standard image datasets that the proposed formulation significantly outperforms all previous methods in collectively removing sparse corruption, without clean images for training. Moreover, we also show that the learned manifold structures can be generalized to unseen data samples effectively. 鲁棒 PCA 是一种标准工​​具，用于在存在稀疏损坏或罕见异常值的情况下学习线性子空间。对于自然数据（例如图像）来说，稳健学习流形是更现实的模型怎么样？最近有一些尝试将稳健的 PCA 推广到流形设置。在本文中，我们提出了 $\ell_1$- 和缩放不变 $\ell_1/\ell_2$- 鲁棒自动编码器，基于一个令人惊讶的紧凑公式，该公式建立在深度自动编码器执行流形学习的直觉上。我们在几个标准图像数据集上证明，在没有用于训练的干净图像的情况下，所提出的公式在集体消除稀疏损坏方面显着优于所有以前的方法。此外，我们还表明，学习到的流形结构可以有效地推广到未见过的数据样本。 本文提出鲁棒自编码器方法，用于在无干净图像训练的情况下，从被稀疏污染的图像数据中集体去除噪声。 Taihui Li,Hengkang Wang,Peng Le,XianE Tang,Ju Sun eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Lin Zhang
title: Artificial Intelligence: 70 Years Down the Road
title_zh: 人工智能：70 年的发展
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has a history of nearly a century from its inception to the present day. We have summarized the development trends and discovered universal rules, including both success and failure. We have analyzed the reasons from both technical and philosophical perspectives to help understand the reasons behind the past failures and current successes of AI, and to provide a basis for thinking and exploring future development. Specifically, we have found that the development of AI in different fields, including computer vision, natural language processing, and machine learning, follows a pattern from rules to statistics to data-driven methods. In the face of past failures and current successes, we need to think systematically about the reasons behind them. Given the unity of AI between natural and social sciences, it is necessary to incorporate philosophical thinking to understand and solve AI problems, and we believe that starting from the dialectical method of Marx is a feasible path. We have concluded that the sustainable development direction of AI should be human-machine collaboration and a technology path centered on computing power. Finally, we have summarized the impact of AI on society from this trend.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has a history of nearly a century from its inception to the present day. We have summarized the development trends and discovered universal rules, including both success and failure. We have analyzed the reasons from both technical and philosophical perspectives to help understand the reasons behind the past failures and current successes of AI, and to provide a basis for thinking and exploring future development. Specifically, we have found that the development of AI in different fields, including computer vision, natural language processing, and machine learning, follows a pattern from rules to statistics to data-driven methods. In the face of past failures and current successes, we need to think systematically about the reasons behind them. Given the unity of AI between natural and social sciences, it is necessary to incorporate philosophical thinking to understand and solve AI problems, and we believe that starting from the dialectical method of Marx is a feasible path. We have concluded that the sustainable development direction of AI should be human-machine collaboration and a technology path centered on computing power. Finally, we have summarized the impact of AI on society from this trend.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）从诞生到现在已有近百年的历史。我们总结了发展趋势，发现了普遍规律，包括成功和失败。我们从技术和哲学两个角度分析其原因，以帮助理解人工智能过去失败和当前成功背后的原因，并为思考和探索未来发展提供基础。具体来说，我们发现人工智能在计算机视觉、自然语言处理、机器学习等不同领域的发展遵循着从规则到统计再到数据驱动方法的模式。面对过去的失败和现在的成功，我们需要系统地思考其背后的原因。鉴于人工智能具有自然科学与社会科学的统一性，需要融入哲学思维来理解和解决人工智能问题，我们认为从马克思的辩证方法出发是一条可行的路径。我们得出的结论是，人工智能的可持续发展方向应该是人机协作、以算力为核心的技术路径。最后，我们从这一趋势中总结了人工智能对社会的影响。

AI.tldr: 总结人工智能70年发展历程，分析技术与哲学视角下的成败原因，并探讨未来可持续发展方向。
AI.motivation: 通过回顾AI发展历史，系统理解过去失败与当前成功的原因，为未来技术探索提供理论基础与哲学指导。
AI.method: 从技术演进规律与哲学思辨（特别是马克思主义辩证法）双重视角，分析计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域的模式变迁。
AI.result: 发现AI发展遵循从规则到统计再到数据驱动的模式，提出需以哲学思维解决AI问题，并确定人机协作与计算力为核心的可持续路径。
AI.conclusion: AI未来应注重人机协同与算力驱动，其社会影响需在技术发展与哲学思考的统一框架下进行系统性评估。

authors_text: Yiran Li,Junpeng Wang,Takanori Fujiwara,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: Visual Analytics of Neuron Vulnerability to Adversarial Attacks on Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 卷积神经网络对抗性攻击神经元脆弱性的可视化分析
comment: Accepted by the Special Issue on Human-Centered Explainable AI, ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems
comments: Accepted by the Special Issue on Human-Centered Explainable AI, ACM Transactions on Interactive Intelligent Systems
abstract: Adversarial attacks on a convolutional neural network (CNN) -- injecting human-imperceptible perturbations into an input image -- could fool a high-performance CNN into making incorrect predictions. The success of adversarial attacks raises serious concerns about the robustness of CNNs, and prevents them from being used in safety-critical applications, such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving. Our work introduces a visual analytics approach to understanding adversarial attacks by answering two questions: (1) which neurons are more vulnerable to attacks and (2) which image features do these vulnerable neurons capture during the prediction? For the first question, we introduce multiple perturbation-based measures to break down the attacking magnitude into individual CNN neurons and rank the neurons by their vulnerability levels. For the second, we identify image features (e.g., cat ears) that highly stimulate a user-selected neuron to augment and validate the neuron's responsibility. Furthermore, we support an interactive exploration of a large number of neurons by aiding with hierarchical clustering based on the neurons' roles in the prediction. To this end, a visual analytics system is designed to incorporate visual reasoning for interpreting adversarial attacks. We validate the effectiveness of our system through multiple case studies as well as feedback from domain experts.
summary: Adversarial attacks on a convolutional neural network (CNN) -- injecting human-imperceptible perturbations into an input image -- could fool a high-performance CNN into making incorrect predictions. The success of adversarial attacks raises serious concerns about the robustness of CNNs, and prevents them from being used in safety-critical applications, such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving. Our work introduces a visual analytics approach to understanding adversarial attacks by answering two questions: (1) which neurons are more vulnerable to attacks and (2) which image features do these vulnerable neurons capture during the prediction? For the first question, we introduce multiple perturbation-based measures to break down the attacking magnitude into individual CNN neurons and rank the neurons by their vulnerability levels. For the second, we identify image features (e.g., cat ears) that highly stimulate a user-selected neuron to augment and validate the neuron's responsibility. Furthermore, we support an interactive exploration of a large number of neurons by aiding with hierarchical clustering based on the neurons' roles in the prediction. To this end, a visual analytics system is designed to incorporate visual reasoning for interpreting adversarial attacks. We validate the effectiveness of our system through multiple case studies as well as feedback from domain experts.
abstract_zh: 对卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对抗性攻击——将人类无法察觉的扰动注入输入图像中——可能会欺骗高性能 CNN 做出错误的预测。对抗性攻击的成功引发了人们对 CNN 鲁棒性的严重担忧，并阻止它们用于医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键应用。我们的工作引入了一种视觉分析方法，通过回答两个问题来理解对抗性攻击：（1）哪些神经元更容易受到攻击；（2）这些脆弱的神经元在预测过程中捕获哪些图像特征？对于第一个问题，我们引入了多种基于扰动的措施，将攻击强度分解为单个 CNN 神经元，并根据神经元的脆弱性级别对神经元进行排名。对于第二个，我们识别高度刺激用户选择的神经元的图像特征（例如猫耳朵），以增强和验证神经元的责任。此外，我们通过基于神经元在预测中的角色来辅助分层聚类，支持对大量神经元的交互式探索。为此，视觉分析系统被设计为结合视觉推理来解释对抗性攻击。我们通过多个案例研究以及领域专家的反馈来验证我们系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可视化分析方法，用于研究卷积神经网络中神经元对对抗攻击的脆弱性，通过分析脆弱神经元及其捕捉的图像特征来提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击通过微小扰动欺骗CNN导致错误预测，威胁其在医疗诊断等安全关键领域的应用，亟需理解神经元脆弱性以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于扰动度量分解攻击影响至单个神经元并排序脆弱性；通过特征激活分析定位神经元响应的图像特征（如猫耳）；结合层次聚类实现大规模神经元交互式探索。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和领域专家验证，系统有效揭示了神经元脆弱性机制及特征关联，为对抗攻击分析提供可视化支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解CNN对抗脆弱性提供了可视化分析框架，有助于指导模型优化和提升安全性能。

search_text: Visual Analytics of Neuron Vulnerability to Adversarial Attacks on Convolutional Neural Networks 卷积神经网络对抗性攻击神经元脆弱性的可视化分析 Adversarial attacks on a convolutional neural network (CNN) -- injecting human-imperceptible perturbations into an input image -- could fool a high-performance CNN into making incorrect predictions. The success of adversarial attacks raises serious concerns about the robustness of CNNs, and prevents them from being used in safety-critical applications, such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving. Our work introduces a visual analytics approach to understanding adversarial attacks by answering two questions: (1) which neurons are more vulnerable to attacks and (2) which image features do these vulnerable neurons capture during the prediction? For the first question, we introduce multiple perturbation-based measures to break down the attacking magnitude into individual CNN neurons and rank the neurons by their vulnerability levels. For the second, we identify image features (e.g., cat ears) that highly stimulate a user-selected neuron to augment and validate the neuron's responsibility. Furthermore, we support an interactive exploration of a large number of neurons by aiding with hierarchical clustering based on the neurons' roles in the prediction. To this end, a visual analytics system is designed to incorporate visual reasoning for interpreting adversarial attacks. We validate the effectiveness of our system through multiple case studies as well as feedback from domain experts. 对卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对抗性攻击——将人类无法察觉的扰动注入输入图像中——可能会欺骗高性能 CNN 做出错误的预测。对抗性攻击的成功引发了人们对 CNN 鲁棒性的严重担忧，并阻止它们用于医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键应用。我们的工作引入了一种视觉分析方法，通过回答两个问题来理解对抗性攻击：（1）哪些神经元更容易受到攻击；（2）这些脆弱的神经元在预测过程中捕获哪些图像特征？对于第一个问题，我们引入了多种基于扰动的措施，将攻击强度分解为单个 CNN 神经元，并根据神经元的脆弱性级别对神经元进行排名。对于第二个，我们识别高度刺激用户选择的神经元的图像特征（例如猫耳朵），以增强和验证神经元的责任。此外，我们通过基于神经元在预测中的角色来辅助分层聚类，支持对大量神经元的交互式探索。为此，视觉分析系统被设计为结合视觉推理来解释对抗性攻击。我们通过多个案例研究以及领域专家的反馈来验证我们系统的有效性。 本文提出一种可视化分析方法，用于研究卷积神经网络中神经元对对抗攻击的脆弱性，通过分析脆弱神经元及其捕捉的图像特征来提升模型鲁棒性。 Yiran Li,Junpeng Wang,Takanori Fujiwara,Kwan-Liu Ma cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Ehsan Emamirad,Pouya Ghiasnezhad Omran,Armin Haller,Shirley Gregor
title: A System's Approach Taxonomy for User-Centred XAI: A Survey
title_zh: 以用户为中心的 XAI 的系统方法分类：一项调查
abstract: Recent advancements in AI have coincided with ever-increasing efforts in the research community to investigate, classify and evaluate various methods aimed at making AI models explainable. However, most of existing attempts present a method-centric view of eXplainable AI (XAI) which is typically meaningful only for domain experts. There is an apparent lack of a robust qualitative and quantitative performance framework that evaluates the suitability of explanations for different types of users. We survey relevant efforts, and then, propose a unified, inclusive and user-centred taxonomy for XAI based on the principles of General System's Theory, which serves us as a basis for evaluating the appropriateness of XAI approaches for all user types, including both developers and end users.
summary: Recent advancements in AI have coincided with ever-increasing efforts in the research community to investigate, classify and evaluate various methods aimed at making AI models explainable. However, most of existing attempts present a method-centric view of eXplainable AI (XAI) which is typically meaningful only for domain experts. There is an apparent lack of a robust qualitative and quantitative performance framework that evaluates the suitability of explanations for different types of users. We survey relevant efforts, and then, propose a unified, inclusive and user-centred taxonomy for XAI based on the principles of General System's Theory, which serves us as a basis for evaluating the appropriateness of XAI approaches for all user types, including both developers and end users.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最新进展与研究界不断努力调查、分类和评估旨在使人工智能模型可解释的各种方法相一致。然而，大多数现有尝试都提出了以方法为中心的可解释人工智能（XAI）视图，这通常仅对领域专家有意义。显然缺乏一个强大的定性和定量性能框架来评估解释对不同类型用户的适用性。我们调查了相关工作，然后基于通用系统理论的原则提出了一个统一的、包容性的、以用户为中心的 XAI 分类法，它为我们评估 XAI 方法对所有用户类型（包括开发人员和最终用户）的适用性提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于一般系统理论的用户中心XAI分类法，用于评估不同用户类型的适用性
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法多以方法为中心，缺乏评估不同用户类型适用性的框架，需更全面的评估体系
AI.method: 通过文献综述和一般系统理论构建用户中心的XAI分类框架
AI.result: 提出包含解释类型、用户需求和评估标准的分类框架，适用于开发者和最终用户
AI.conclusion: 该框架弥补了现有研究的不足，为XAI方法的用户适配性评估提供理论基础

authors_text: Xiaodan Xi,Ge Li,Ye Wang,Yeonsoo Jeon,Michael Orshansky
title: A Provably Secure Strong PUF based on LWE: Construction and Implementation
title_zh: 基于 LWE 的可证明安全的强 PUF：构建和实施
abstract: We construct a strong PUF with provable security against ML attacks on both classical and quantum computers. The security is guaranteed by the cryptographic hardness of learning decryption functions of public-key cryptosystems, and the hardness of the learning-with-errors (LWE) problem defined on integer lattices. We call our construction the lattice PUF. We construct lattice PUF with a physically obfuscated key and an LWE decryption function block. To allow deployments in different scenarios, we demonstrate designs with different latency-area trade-offs. A compact design uses a highly serialized LFSR and LWE decryption function, while a latency-optimized design uses an unrolled LFSR and a parallel datapath. We prototype lattice PUF designs with $2^{136}$ challenge-response pairs (CRPs) on a Spartan 6 FPGA. In addition to theoretical security guarantee, we evaluate empirical resistance to the various leading ML techniques: the prediction error remains above $49.76\%$ after $1$ million training CRPs. The resource-efficient design requires only $45$ slices for the PUF logic proper, and $351$ slices for a fuzzy extractor. The latency-optimized design achieves a $148X$ reduction in latency, at a $10X$ increase in PUF hardware utilization. The mean uniformity of PUF responses is $49.98\%$, the mean uniqueness is $50.00\%$, and the mean reliability is $1.26\%$.
summary: We construct a strong PUF with provable security against ML attacks on both classical and quantum computers. The security is guaranteed by the cryptographic hardness of learning decryption functions of public-key cryptosystems, and the hardness of the learning-with-errors (LWE) problem defined on integer lattices. We call our construction the lattice PUF. We construct lattice PUF with a physically obfuscated key and an LWE decryption function block. To allow deployments in different scenarios, we demonstrate designs with different latency-area trade-offs. A compact design uses a highly serialized LFSR and LWE decryption function, while a latency-optimized design uses an unrolled LFSR and a parallel datapath. We prototype lattice PUF designs with $2^{136}$ challenge-response pairs (CRPs) on a Spartan 6 FPGA. In addition to theoretical security guarantee, we evaluate empirical resistance to the various leading ML techniques: the prediction error remains above $49.76\%$ after $1$ million training CRPs. The resource-efficient design requires only $45$ slices for the PUF logic proper, and $351$ slices for a fuzzy extractor. The latency-optimized design achieves a $148X$ reduction in latency, at a $10X$ increase in PUF hardware utilization. The mean uniformity of PUF responses is $49.98\%$, the mean uniqueness is $50.00\%$, and the mean reliability is $1.26\%$.
abstract_zh: 我们构建了一个强大的 PUF，其安全性已得到证明，可以抵御经典计算机和量子计算机上的 ML 攻击。安全性由公钥密码系统的学习解密函数的密码学硬度和整数格上定义的错误学习（LWE）问题的硬度来保证。我们将我们的结构称为格子 PUF。我们使用物理混淆密钥和 LWE 解密功能块构建格子 PUF。为了允许在不同场景中进行部署，我们演示了具有不同延迟区域权衡的设计。紧凑设计使用高度串行化的 LFSR 和 LWE 解密功能，而延迟优化设计则使用展开的 LFSR 和并行数据路径。我们在 Spartan 6 FPGA 上使用 2^{136}$ 挑战响应对 (CRP) 制作了晶格 PUF 设计原型。除了理论安全保证之外，我们还评估了对各种领先 ML 技术的实证阻力：在 100 万美元的训练 CRP 后，预测误差仍然高于 49.76\%$。资源节约型设计仅需要 45 美元的 PUF 逻辑切片，以及 351 美元的模糊提取器切片。延迟优化设计可将延迟减少 148 倍，同时 PUF 硬件利用率提高 10 倍。 PUF 响应的平均一致性为 $49.98\%$，平均唯一性为 $50.00\%$，平均可靠性为 $1.26\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LWE问题的可证明安全强PUF（物理不可克隆函数）构造与实现方法，旨在抵御经典和量子计算机上的机器学习攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统PUF存在被机器学习攻击破解的风险，需设计具有理论安全保证且抗量子计算攻击的强PUF以保障硬件安全。
AI.method: 结合格上LWE问题的密码学硬度与物理混淆密钥，构建包含LWE解密模块的晶格PUF，通过FPGA实现不同面积-时延权衡的电路设计。
AI.result: 原型设计支持2^136个挑战-响应对，机器学习预测误差保持49.76%以上，资源高效版仅需45个FPGA切片，时延优化版实现148倍时延降低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的晶格PUF在理论安全性和工程实现性上均表现优异，为后量子时代硬件安全认证提供了新方案。

authors_text: Roberto Santana,Ivan Hidalgo-Cenalmor,Unai Garciarena,Alexander Mendiburu,Jose Antonio Lozano
title: Neuroevolutionary algorithms driven by neuron coverage metrics for semi-supervised classification
title_zh: 由神经元覆盖指标驱动的神经进化算法用于半监督分类
abstract: In some machine learning applications the availability of labeled instances for supervised classification is limited while unlabeled instances are abundant. Semi-supervised learning algorithms deal with these scenarios and attempt to exploit the information contained in the unlabeled examples. In this paper, we address the question of how to evolve neural networks for semi-supervised problems. We introduce neuroevolutionary approaches that exploit unlabeled instances by using neuron coverage metrics computed on the neural network architecture encoded by each candidate solution. Neuron coverage metrics resemble code coverage metrics used to test software, but are oriented to quantify how the different neural network components are covered by test instances. In our neuroevolutionary approach, we define fitness functions that combine classification accuracy computed on labeled examples and neuron coverage metrics evaluated using unlabeled examples. We assess the impact of these functions on semi-supervised problems with a varying amount of labeled instances. Our results show that the use of neuron coverage metrics helps neuroevolution to become less sensitive to the scarcity of labeled data, and can lead in some cases to a more robust generalization of the learned classifiers.
summary: In some machine learning applications the availability of labeled instances for supervised classification is limited while unlabeled instances are abundant. Semi-supervised learning algorithms deal with these scenarios and attempt to exploit the information contained in the unlabeled examples. In this paper, we address the question of how to evolve neural networks for semi-supervised problems. We introduce neuroevolutionary approaches that exploit unlabeled instances by using neuron coverage metrics computed on the neural network architecture encoded by each candidate solution. Neuron coverage metrics resemble code coverage metrics used to test software, but are oriented to quantify how the different neural network components are covered by test instances. In our neuroevolutionary approach, we define fitness functions that combine classification accuracy computed on labeled examples and neuron coverage metrics evaluated using unlabeled examples. We assess the impact of these functions on semi-supervised problems with a varying amount of labeled instances. Our results show that the use of neuron coverage metrics helps neuroevolution to become less sensitive to the scarcity of labeled data, and can lead in some cases to a more robust generalization of the learned classifiers.
abstract_zh: 在一些机器学习应用中，用于监督分类的标记实例的可用性是有限的，而未标记实例是丰富的。半监督学习算法处理这些场景并尝试利用未标记示例中包含的信息。在本文中，我们解决了如何针对半监督问题进化神经网络的问题。我们引入了神经进化方法，通过使用在每个候选解决方案编码的神经网络架构上计算的神经元覆盖度量来利用未标记的实例。神经元覆盖率指标类似于用于测试软件的代码覆盖率指标，但旨在量化测试实例如何覆盖不同的神经网络组件。在我们的神经进化方法中，我们定义了适应度函数，该函数结合了在标记示例上计算的分类精度和使用未标记示例评估的神经元覆盖度量。我们评估这些函数对具有不同数量标记实例的半监督问题的影响。我们的结果表明，神经元覆盖指标的使用有助于神经进化对标记数据的稀缺性变得不那么敏感，并且在某些情况下可以导致所学习的分类器的更稳健的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经元覆盖度指标的神经进化算法，用于半监督分类任务，以解决标签数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 在实际机器学习场景中，标签数据通常稀缺而未标签数据丰富，传统半监督方法难以有效利用未标签数据，需探索新方法提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计结合标签数据分类准确率与未标签数据神经元覆盖度的适应度函数，通过神经进化算法优化网络结构，利用覆盖度指标量化网络组件的激活情况。
AI.result: 实验表明，神经元覆盖度指标能降低对标签数据量的敏感性，在部分场景下提升分类器的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 神经元覆盖度指标可有效指导神经进化过程，使半监督学习在标签数据有限时仍能获得更稳健的模型表现。

authors_text: Yu-Neng Chuang,Guanchu Wang,Fan Yang,Quan Zhou,Pushkar Tripathi,Xuanting Cai,Xia Hu
title: CoRTX: Contrastive Framework for Real-time Explanation
title_zh: CoRTX：实时解释的对比框架
abstract: Recent advancements in explainable machine learning provide effective and faithful solutions for interpreting model behaviors. However, many explanation methods encounter efficiency issues, which largely limit their deployments in practical scenarios. Real-time explainer (RTX) frameworks have thus been proposed to accelerate the model explanation process by learning a one-feed-forward explainer. Existing RTX frameworks typically build the explainer under the supervised learning paradigm, which requires large amounts of explanation labels as the ground truth. Considering that accurate explanation labels are usually hard to obtain due to constrained computational resources and limited human efforts, effective explainer training is still challenging in practice. In this work, we propose a COntrastive Real-Time eXplanation (CoRTX) framework to learn the explanation-oriented representation and relieve the intensive dependence of explainer training on explanation labels. Specifically, we design a synthetic strategy to select positive and negative instances for the learning of explanation. Theoretical analysis show that our selection strategy can benefit the contrastive learning process on explanation tasks. Experimental results on three real-world datasets further demonstrate the efficiency and efficacy of our proposed CoRTX framework.
summary: Recent advancements in explainable machine learning provide effective and faithful solutions for interpreting model behaviors. However, many explanation methods encounter efficiency issues, which largely limit their deployments in practical scenarios. Real-time explainer (RTX) frameworks have thus been proposed to accelerate the model explanation process by learning a one-feed-forward explainer. Existing RTX frameworks typically build the explainer under the supervised learning paradigm, which requires large amounts of explanation labels as the ground truth. Considering that accurate explanation labels are usually hard to obtain due to constrained computational resources and limited human efforts, effective explainer training is still challenging in practice. In this work, we propose a COntrastive Real-Time eXplanation (CoRTX) framework to learn the explanation-oriented representation and relieve the intensive dependence of explainer training on explanation labels. Specifically, we design a synthetic strategy to select positive and negative instances for the learning of explanation. Theoretical analysis show that our selection strategy can benefit the contrastive learning process on explanation tasks. Experimental results on three real-world datasets further demonstrate the efficiency and efficacy of our proposed CoRTX framework.
abstract_zh: 可解释机器学习的最新进展为解释模型行为提供了有效且可靠的解决方案。然而，许多解释方法遇到效率问题，这在很大程度上限制了它们在实际场景中的部署。因此，提出了实时解释器（RTX）框架，通过学习单前馈解释器来加速模型解释过程。现有的 RTX 框架通常在监督学习范式下构建解释器，这需要大量的解释标签作为基本事实。考虑到由于计算资源有限和人力有限，通常很难获得准确的解释标签，有效的解释器训练在实践中仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对比实时解释（CoRTX）框架来学习面向解释的表示并减轻解释器训练对解释标签的强烈依赖。具体来说，我们设计了一种综合策略来选择正面和负面实例来学习解释。理论分析表明，我们的选择策略有利于解释任务的对比学习过程。三个真实世界数据集的实验结果进一步证明了我们提出的 CoRTX 框架的效率和功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoRTX框架，通过对比学习解决实时模型解释中的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有实时解释框架依赖大量人工标注的解释标签，但获取准确标签成本高且受限于计算资源。
AI.method: 设计合成策略生成正负样本，利用对比学习构建解释导向的表示，减少对标签的依赖。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上验证了CoRTX在效率和解释效果上的优势。
AI.conclusion: CoRTX通过对比学习有效缓解了标签依赖问题，提升了实时解释的可行性。

authors_text: Zaiyan Xu,Kishan Panaganti,Dileep Kalathil
title: Improved Sample Complexity Bounds for Distributionally Robust Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 改进了分布式鲁棒强化学习的样本复杂性界限
abstract: We consider the problem of learning a control policy that is robust against the parameter mismatches between the training environment and testing environment. We formulate this as a distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DR-RL) problem where the objective is to learn the policy which maximizes the value function against the worst possible stochastic model of the environment in an uncertainty set. We focus on the tabular episodic learning setting where the algorithm has access to a generative model of the nominal (training) environment around which the uncertainty set is defined. We propose the Robust Phased Value Learning (RPVL) algorithm to solve this problem for the uncertainty sets specified by four different divergences: total variation, chi-square, Kullback-Leibler, and Wasserstein. We show that our algorithm achieves $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$ sample complexity, which is uniformly better than the existing results by a factor of $|\mathcal{S}|$, where $|\mathcal{S}|$ is number of states, $|\mathcal{A}|$ is the number of actions, and $H$ is the horizon length. We also provide the first-ever sample complexity result for the Wasserstein uncertainty set. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of our algorithm using simulation experiments.
summary: We consider the problem of learning a control policy that is robust against the parameter mismatches between the training environment and testing environment. We formulate this as a distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DR-RL) problem where the objective is to learn the policy which maximizes the value function against the worst possible stochastic model of the environment in an uncertainty set. We focus on the tabular episodic learning setting where the algorithm has access to a generative model of the nominal (training) environment around which the uncertainty set is defined. We propose the Robust Phased Value Learning (RPVL) algorithm to solve this problem for the uncertainty sets specified by four different divergences: total variation, chi-square, Kullback-Leibler, and Wasserstein. We show that our algorithm achieves $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$ sample complexity, which is uniformly better than the existing results by a factor of $|\mathcal{S}|$, where $|\mathcal{S}|$ is number of states, $|\mathcal{A}|$ is the number of actions, and $H$ is the horizon length. We also provide the first-ever sample complexity result for the Wasserstein uncertainty set. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of our algorithm using simulation experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑学习一个控制策略的问题，该控制策略对于训练环境和测试环境之间的参数不匹配具有鲁棒性。我们将其表述为一个分布式鲁棒强化学习（DR-RL）问题，其目标是学习在不确定性集中针对最坏可能的环境随机模型最大化价值函数的策略。我们专注于表格情景学习设置，其中算法可以访问定义不确定性集的标称（训练）环境的生成模型。我们提出了鲁棒相控值学习 (RPVL) 算法来解决由四种不同散度指定的不确定性集的问题：全变分、卡方、Kullback-Leibler 和 Wasserstein。我们表明，我们的算法实现了 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$ 样本复杂度，比现有结果统一好 $|\mathcal{S}|$ 倍，其中 $|\mathcal{S}|$ 是状态数，$|\mathcal{A}|$ 是动作数，$H$ 是地平线长度。我们还提供了 Wasserstein 不确定性集的第一个样本复杂性结果。最后，我们通过模拟实验展示了我们算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分布鲁棒强化学习（DR-RL）框架下，针对训练环境与测试环境参数不匹配问题，提出了一种改进的样本复杂度上界方法。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习策略在训练环境与测试环境存在参数差异时表现不佳，需设计对环境不确定性鲁棒的控制策略以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Robust Phased Value Learning（RPVL）算法，针对总变分、卡方、KL散度和Wasserstein四种不确定性集，结合生成模型进行值函数学习。
AI.result: 样本复杂度达到$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(|\\mathcal{S}||\\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$，较现有结果提升$|\\mathcal{S}|$倍，并首次给出Wasserstein不确定性集的样本复杂度分析。
AI.conclusion: RPVL算法在理论保证和实验验证中均表现出对环境不确定性的强鲁棒性，为分布鲁棒强化学习提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Improved Sample Complexity Bounds for Distributionally Robust Reinforcement Learning 改进了分布式鲁棒强化学习的样本复杂性界限 We consider the problem of learning a control policy that is robust against the parameter mismatches between the training environment and testing environment. We formulate this as a distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DR-RL) problem where the objective is to learn the policy which maximizes the value function against the worst possible stochastic model of the environment in an uncertainty set. We focus on the tabular episodic learning setting where the algorithm has access to a generative model of the nominal (training) environment around which the uncertainty set is defined. We propose the Robust Phased Value Learning (RPVL) algorithm to solve this problem for the uncertainty sets specified by four different divergences: total variation, chi-square, Kullback-Leibler, and Wasserstein. We show that our algorithm achieves $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$ sample complexity, which is uniformly better than the existing results by a factor of $|\mathcal{S}|$, where $|\mathcal{S}|$ is number of states, $|\mathcal{A}|$ is the number of actions, and $H$ is the horizon length. We also provide the first-ever sample complexity result for the Wasserstein uncertainty set. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of our algorithm using simulation experiments. 我们考虑学习一个控制策略的问题，该控制策略对于训练环境和测试环境之间的参数不匹配具有鲁棒性。我们将其表述为一个分布式鲁棒强化学习（DR-RL）问题，其目标是学习在不确定性集中针对最坏可能的环境随机模型最大化价值函数的策略。我们专注于表格情景学习设置，其中算法可以访问定义不确定性集的标称（训练）环境的生成模型。我们提出了鲁棒相控值学习 (RPVL) 算法来解决由四种不同散度指定的不确定性集的问题：全变分、卡方、Kullback-Leibler 和 Wasserstein。我们表明，我们的算法实现了 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}| H^{5})$ 样本复杂度，比现有结果统一好 $|\mathcal{S}|$ 倍，其中 $|\mathcal{S}|$ 是状态数，$|\mathcal{A}|$ 是动作数，$H$ 是地平线长度。我们还提供了 Wasserstein 不确定性集的第一个样本复杂性结果。最后，我们通过模拟实验展示了我们算法的性能。 本文研究了在分布鲁棒强化学习（DR-RL）框架下，针对训练环境与测试环境参数不匹配问题，提出了一种改进的样本复杂度上界方法。 Zaiyan Xu,Kishan Panaganti,Dileep Kalathil cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Vihari Piratla
title: Robustness, Evaluation and Adaptation of Machine Learning Models in the Wild
title_zh: 机器学习模型的鲁棒性、评估和适应
comment: PhD Thesis; 191 pages; Dept of Computer Science, IIT Bombay
comments: PhD Thesis; 191 pages; Dept of Computer Science, IIT Bombay
abstract: Our goal is to improve reliability of Machine Learning (ML) systems deployed in the wild. ML models perform exceedingly well when test examples are similar to train examples. However, real-world applications are required to perform on any distribution of test examples. Current ML systems can fail silently on test examples with distribution shifts. In order to improve reliability of ML models due to covariate or domain shift, we propose algorithms that enable models to: (a) generalize to a larger family of test distributions, (b) evaluate accuracy under distribution shifts, (c) adapt to a target distribution. We study causes of impaired robustness to domain shifts and present algorithms for training domain robust models. A key source of model brittleness is due to domain overfitting, which our new training algorithms suppress and instead encourage domain-general hypotheses. While we improve robustness over standard training methods for certain problem settings, performance of ML systems can still vary drastically with domain shifts. It is crucial for developers and stakeholders to understand model vulnerabilities and operational ranges of input, which could be assessed on the fly during the deployment, albeit at a great cost. Instead, we advocate for proactively estimating accuracy surfaces over any combination of prespecified and interpretable domain shifts for performance forecasting. We present a label-efficient estimation to address estimation over a combinatorial space of domain shifts. Further, when a model's performance on a target domain is found to be poor, traditional approaches adapt the model using the target domain's resources. Standard adaptation methods assume access to sufficient labeled resources, which may be impractical for deployed models. We initiate a study of lightweight adaptation techniques with only unlabeled data resources with a focus on language applications.

A key source of model brittleness is due to domain overfitting, which our new training algorithms suppress and instead encourage domain-general hypotheses. While we improve robustness over standard training methods for certain problem settings, performance of ML systems can still vary drastically with domain shifts. It is crucial for developers and stakeholders to understand model vulnerabilities and operational ranges of input, which could be assessed on the fly during the deployment, albeit at a great cost. Instead, we advocate for proactively estimating accuracy surfaces over any combination of prespecified and interpretable domain shifts for performance forecasting. We present a label-efficient estimation to address estimation over a combinatorial space of domain shifts. Further, when a model's performance on a target domain is found to be poor, traditional approaches adapt the model using the target domain's resources. Standard adaptation methods assume access to sufficient labeled resources, which may be impractical for deployed models. We initiate a study of lightweight adaptation techniques with only unlabeled data resources with a focus on language applications.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是提高野外部署的机器学习 (ML) 系统的可靠性。当测试示例与训练示例相似时，ML 模型的表现非常好。然而，现实世界的应用程序需要在任何分布的测试示例上执行。当前的机器学习系统可能会在具有分布变化的测试示例上默默地失败。为了提高由于协变量或域转移而导致的 ML 模型的可靠性，我们提出了使模型能够：（a）泛化到更大的测试分布族，（b）评估分布转移下的准确性，（c）适应目标分布的算法。我们研究了域转移鲁棒性受损的原因，并提出了用于训练域鲁棒模型的算法。模型脆弱性的一个关键根源是领域过度拟合，而我们的新训练算法会抑制领域过度拟合，而是鼓励领域通用假设。虽然我们针对某些问题设置提高了标准训练方法的鲁棒性，但机器学习系统的性能仍然会随着领域的变化而发生巨大变化。对于开发人员和利益相关者来说，了解模型漏洞和输入的操作范围至关重要，这些可以在部署过程中动态评估，尽管成本很高。相反，我们主张在性能预测的预先指定和可解释的域转换的任意组合上主动估计准确性表面。我们提出了一种标签有效的估计来解决域移位组合空间上的估计问题。此外，当发现模型在目标域上的性能较差时，传统方法会使用目标域的资源来调整模型。标准适应方法假设可以访问足够的标记资源，这对于已部署的模型可能不切实际。我们发起了一项仅使用未标记数据资源的轻量级适应技术的研究，重点是语言应用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过算法提升机器学习模型在真实世界中的鲁棒性、评估能力和适应性，以应对分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中机器学习模型可能因测试数据分布与训练数据不匹配而失效，现有系统难以检测和适应此类分布偏移，需改进模型可靠性。
AI.method: 提出三种算法：(a) 使模型泛化到更广的测试分布家族，(b) 评估分布偏移下的准确性，(c) 通过无标签数据进行轻量级适应；并引入标签高效估计方法预测性能。
AI.result: 算法在特定场景下提升模型鲁棒性，但域偏移仍可能导致性能波动；通过主动估计准确性表面和轻量适应技术部分缓解问题。
AI.conclusion: 需通过主动评估模型脆弱性及预设域偏移的性能预测，结合轻量适应方法，以提升部署模型的可靠性与实用性。

authors_text: Brett T. Lopez
title: A Contracting Hierarchical Observer for Pose-Inertial Fusion
title_zh: 位姿惯性融合的契约分层观察器
abstract: This work presents a contracting hierarchical observer that fuses position and orientation measurements with an IMU to generate smooth position, linear velocity, orientation, and IMU bias estimates that are guaranteed to converge to their true values. The proposed approach is composed of two contracting observers. The first is a quaternion-based orientation observer that also estimates gyroscope bias. The output of the orientation observer serves as an input for another contracting observer that estimates position, linear velocity, and accelerometer bias thus forming a hierarchy. We show that the proposed observer guarantees all state estimates converge to their true values. Simulation results confirm the theoretical performance guarantees.
summary: This work presents a contracting hierarchical observer that fuses position and orientation measurements with an IMU to generate smooth position, linear velocity, orientation, and IMU bias estimates that are guaranteed to converge to their true values. The proposed approach is composed of two contracting observers. The first is a quaternion-based orientation observer that also estimates gyroscope bias. The output of the orientation observer serves as an input for another contracting observer that estimates position, linear velocity, and accelerometer bias thus forming a hierarchy. We show that the proposed observer guarantees all state estimates converge to their true values. Simulation results confirm the theoretical performance guarantees.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种契约分层观察器，它将位置和方向测量与 IMU 融合，以生成平滑的位置、线速度、方向和 IMU 偏差估计，并保证收敛到其真实值。拟议的方法由两名签约观察员组成。第一个是基于四元数的方向观测器，它还可以估计陀螺仪偏差。方向观测器的输出用作另一个收缩观测器的输入，该观测器估计位置、线速度和加速度计偏差，从而形成层次结构。我们表明，所提出的观察者保证所有状态估计都收敛到其真实值。仿真结果证实了理论性能保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种收缩分层观测器，用于融合位置和方向测量与IMU，以生成平滑的位置、线速度、方向和IMU偏差估计。
AI.motivation: 在惯性导航系统中，如何准确融合IMU数据与位置和方向测量是一个重要问题，而现有的方法可能无法保证状态估计的收敛性。
AI.method: 该方法由两个收缩观测器组成，第一个是基于四元数的方向观测器，用于估计陀螺仪偏差；第二个观测器利用方向观测器的输出，估计位置、线速度和加速度计偏差，从而形成分层结构。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提观测器能够保证所有状态估计收敛到真实值，符合理论性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种可靠的方式，能够融合IMU数据与位置和方向测量，确保状态估计的收敛性。

motivation: 在惯性导航系统中，如何准确融合IMU数据与位置和方向测量是一个重要问题，而现有的方法可能无法保证状态估计的收敛性。
method: 该方法由两个收缩观测器组成，第一个是基于四元数的方向观测器，用于估计陀螺仪偏差；第二个观测器利用方向观测器的输出，估计位置、线速度和加速度计偏差，从而形成分层结构。
result: 仿真结果验证了所提观测器能够保证所有状态估计收敛到真实值，符合理论性能保证。
conclusion: 该方法提供了一种可靠的方式，能够融合IMU数据与位置和方向测量，确保状态估计的收敛性。
search_text: A Contracting Hierarchical Observer for Pose-Inertial Fusion 位姿惯性融合的契约分层观察器 This work presents a contracting hierarchical observer that fuses position and orientation measurements with an IMU to generate smooth position, linear velocity, orientation, and IMU bias estimates that are guaranteed to converge to their true values. The proposed approach is composed of two contracting observers. The first is a quaternion-based orientation observer that also estimates gyroscope bias. The output of the orientation observer serves as an input for another contracting observer that estimates position, linear velocity, and accelerometer bias thus forming a hierarchy. We show that the proposed observer guarantees all state estimates converge to their true values. Simulation results confirm the theoretical performance guarantees. 这项工作提出了一种契约分层观察器，它将位置和方向测量与 IMU 融合，以生成平滑的位置、线速度、方向和 IMU 偏差估计，并保证收敛到其真实值。拟议的方法由两名签约观察员组成。第一个是基于四元数的方向观测器，它还可以估计陀螺仪偏差。方向观测器的输出用作另一个收缩观测器的输入，该观测器估计位置、线速度和加速度计偏差，从而形成层次结构。我们表明，所提出的观察者保证所有状态估计都收敛到其真实值。仿真结果证实了理论性能保证。 本文提出了一种收缩分层观测器，用于融合位置和方向测量与IMU，以生成平滑的位置、线速度、方向和IMU偏差估计。 Brett T. Lopez cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ava Tan Bhowmik
title: A Low-Cost Portable Apparatus to Analyze Oral Fluid Droplets and Quantify the Efficacy of Masks
title_zh: 一种低成本便携式设备，用于分析口腔液滴并量化口罩的功效
comment: 13 pages, 15 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.03993
comments: 13 pages, 15 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.03993
abstract: Every year, about 4 million people die from upper respiratory infections. Mask-wearing is crucial in preventing the spread of pathogen-containing droplets, which is the primary cause of these illnesses. However, most techniques for mask efficacy evaluation are expensive to set up and complex to operate. In this work, a novel, low-cost, and quantitative metrology to visualize, track, and analyze orally-generated fluid droplets is developed. The project has four stages: setup optimization, data collection, data analysis, and application development. The metrology was initially developed in a dark closet as a proof of concept using common household materials and was subsequently implemented into a portable apparatus. Tonic water and UV darklight tube lights are selected to visualize fluorescent droplet and aerosol propagation with automated analysis developed using open-source software. The dependencies of oral fluid droplet generation and propagation on various factors are studied in detail and established using this metrology. Additionally, the smallest detectable droplet size was mathematically correlated to height and airborne time. The efficacy of different types of masks is evaluated and associated with fabric microstructures. It is found that masks with smaller-sized pores and thicker material are more effective. This technique can easily be constructed at home using materials that total to a cost of below \$60, thereby enabling a low-cost and accurate metrology.

The dependencies of oral fluid droplet generation and propagation on various factors are studied in detail and established using this metrology. Additionally, the smallest detectable droplet size was mathematically correlated to height and airborne time. abstract_zh: 每年约有 400 万人死于上呼吸道感染。戴口罩对于防止含有病原体的飞沫传播至关重要，而飞沫是这些疾病的主要原因。然而，大多数面膜功效评估技术的建立成本高昂且操作复杂。在这项工作中，开发了一种新颖的、低成本的定量计量学，用于可视化、跟踪和分析口腔产生的液滴。该项目分为四个阶段：设置优化、数据收集、数据分析和应用程序开发。该计量最初是在黑暗的壁橱中开发的，作为使用普通家用材料的概念证明，随后被实施到便携式设备中。选择汤力水和紫外线暗光管灯，通过使用开源软件开发的自动分析来可视化荧光液滴和气溶胶传播。使用这种计量学详细研究并建立了口腔液滴的产生和传播对各种因素的依赖性。此外，可检测的最小液滴尺寸在数学上与高度和空气传播时间相关。评估不同类型口罩的功效并将其与织物微观结构相关联。研究发现，孔径较小、材质较厚的口罩效果更佳。这项技术可以很容易地在家中使用总成本低于 60 美元的材料构建，从而实现低成本和精确的计量。

AI.tldr: 开发一种低成本便携设备分析口腔液滴并量化口罩效能
AI.motivation: 每年有400万人死于呼吸道感染，现有口罩效能评估技术昂贵且复杂，亟需低成本解决方案
AI.method: 利用 tonic 水和UV灯可视化液滴传播，结合开源软件进行自动化分析，通过优化装置结构实现便携化
AI.result: 建立液滴生成与传播的数学关系，发现口罩效能与纤维孔径和厚度呈负相关，装置总成本低于60美元
AI.conclusion: 该技术可实现家庭级口罩效能检测，为公共卫生防护提供经济有效的评估手段

authors_text: Raphaela Heil,Eva Breznik
title: A Study of Augmentation Methods for Handwritten Stenography Recognition
title_zh: 手写速记识别增强方法的研究
abstract: One of the factors limiting the performance of handwritten text recognition (HTR) for stenography is the small amount of annotated training data. To alleviate the problem of data scarcity, modern HTR methods often employ data augmentation. However, due to specifics of the stenographic script, such settings may not be directly applicable for stenography recognition. In this work, we study 22 classical augmentation techniques, most of which are commonly used for HTR of other scripts, such as Latin handwriting. Through extensive experiments, we identify a group of augmentations, including for example contained ranges of random rotation, shifts and scaling, that are beneficial to the use case of stenography recognition. Furthermore, a number of augmentation approaches, leading to a decrease in recognition performance, are identified. Our results are supported by statistical hypothesis testing. Links to the publicly available dataset and codebase are provided.
summary: One of the factors limiting the performance of handwritten text recognition (HTR) for stenography is the small amount of annotated training data. To alleviate the problem of data scarcity, modern HTR methods often employ data augmentation. However, due to specifics of the stenographic script, such settings may not be directly applicable for stenography recognition. In this work, we study 22 classical augmentation techniques, most of which are commonly used for HTR of other scripts, such as Latin handwriting. Through extensive experiments, we identify a group of augmentations, including for example contained ranges of random rotation, shifts and scaling, that are beneficial to the use case of stenography recognition. Furthermore, a number of augmentation approaches, leading to a decrease in recognition performance, are identified. Our results are supported by statistical hypothesis testing. Links to the publicly available dataset and codebase are provided.
abstract_zh: 限制速记手写文本识别 (HTR) 性能的因素之一是带注释的训练数据量较少。为了缓解数据稀缺的问题，现代 HTR 方法经常采用数据增强。但是，由于速记脚本的特殊性，此类设置可能无法直接应用于速记识别。在这项工作中，我们研究了 22 种经典增强技术，其中大多数常用于其他文字的 HTR，例如拉丁手写体。通过广泛的实验，我们确定了一组增强，包括例如包含的随机旋转、移位和缩放范围，这有利于速记识别的用例。此外，还发现了许多导致识别性能下降的增强方法。我们的结果得到了统计假设检验的支持。提供了公开可用的数据集和代码库的链接。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了用于手写速记识别的数据增强方法，以解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 手写速记识别因标注数据稀缺而性能受限，传统数据增强方法可能不适用于速记脚本的特殊性。
AI.method: 测试了22种经典数据增强技术（如旋转、位移、缩放），通过实验筛选出对速记识别有效的增强方法，并进行统计假设检验。
AI.result: 确定了随机旋转、位移和缩放等有益增强方法，同时识别出导致性能下降的无效方法，结果通过统计检验验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出适用于速记识别的增强方法组合，为后续研究提供参考，并公开了数据集和代码资源。

authors_text: Xuan Ju,Ailing Zeng,Jianan Wang,Qiang Xu,Lei Zhang
title: Human-Art: A Versatile Human-Centric Dataset Bridging Natural and Artificial Scenes
title_zh: 人类艺术：一个以人类为中心的多功能数据集，连接自然和人造场景
abstract: Humans have long been recorded in a variety of forms since antiquity. For example, sculptures and paintings were the primary media for depicting human beings before the invention of cameras. However, most current human-centric computer vision tasks like human pose estimation and human image generation focus exclusively on natural images in the real world. Artificial humans, such as those in sculptures, paintings, and cartoons, are commonly neglected, making existing models fail in these scenarios. As an abstraction of life, art incorporates humans in both natural and artificial scenes. We take advantage of it and introduce the Human-Art dataset to bridge related tasks in natural and artificial scenarios. Specifically, Human-Art contains 50k high-quality images with over 123k person instances from 5 natural and 15 artificial scenarios, which are annotated with bounding boxes, keypoints, self-contact points, and text information for humans represented in both 2D and 3D. It is, therefore, comprehensive and versatile for various downstream tasks. We also provide a rich set of baseline results and detailed analyses for related tasks, including human detection, 2D and 3D human pose estimation, image generation, and motion transfer. As a challenging dataset, we hope Human-Art can provide insights for relevant research and open up new research questions.
summary: Humans have long been recorded in a variety of forms since antiquity. For example, sculptures and paintings were the primary media for depicting human beings before the invention of cameras. However, most current human-centric computer vision tasks like human pose estimation and human image generation focus exclusively on natural images in the real world. Artificial humans, such as those in sculptures, paintings, and cartoons, are commonly neglected, making existing models fail in these scenarios. As an abstraction of life, art incorporates humans in both natural and artificial scenes. We take advantage of it and introduce the Human-Art dataset to bridge related tasks in natural and artificial scenarios. Specifically, Human-Art contains 50k high-quality images with over 123k person instances from 5 natural and 15 artificial scenarios, which are annotated with bounding boxes, keypoints, self-contact points, and text information for humans represented in both 2D and 3D. It is, therefore, comprehensive and versatile for various downstream tasks. We also provide a rich set of baseline results and detailed analyses for related tasks, including human detection, 2D and 3D human pose estimation, image generation, and motion transfer. As a challenging dataset, we hope Human-Art can provide insights for relevant research and open up new research questions.
abstract_zh: 自古以来，人类就以多种形式被记录下来。例如，在相机发明之前，雕塑和绘画是描绘人类的主要媒介。然而，当前大多数以人为中心的计算机视觉任务（例如人体姿势估计和人体图像生成）仅关注现实世界中的自然图像。雕塑、绘画和卡通中的人造人通常被忽视，导致现有模型在这些场景中失败。作为生活的抽象，艺术将人类融入自然和人造场景中。我们利用它并引入 Human-Art 数据集来桥接自然和人工场景中的相关任务。具体来说，Human-Art 包含 5 万张高质量图像，其中包含来自 5 个自然场景和 15 个人工场景的超过 12.3 万个人物实例，这些图像用 2D 和 3D 表示的人类的边界框、关键点、自接触点和文本信息进行注释。因此，它对于各种下游任务来说是全面且通用的。我们还为相关任务提供了丰富的基线结果和详细分析，包括人体检测、2D 和 3D 人体姿势估计、图像生成和运动传输。作为一个具有挑战性的数据集，我们希望 Human-Art 能为相关研究提供见解并提出新的研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Human-Art的通用人类中心数据集，旨在弥合自然场景与人工艺术场景中的人类视觉任务差距。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉模型主要针对真实世界自然图像，忽视了雕塑、绘画等人工艺术场景中的人类表现，导致模型在艺术场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建包含50k张高质量图像的数据集，涵盖5种自然场景和15种人工艺术场景，标注边界框、关键点、自接触点及文本信息，并提供2D/3D标注。
AI.result: 数据集支持人体检测、2D/3D姿态估计、图像生成等任务的基线实验，验证其在跨场景任务中的有效性与多样性。
AI.conclusion: Human-Art数据集为艺术与现实场景的人类视觉研究提供新方向，推动模型在艺术场景中的泛化能力，并启发跨领域研究问题。

search_text: Human-Art: A Versatile Human-Centric Dataset Bridging Natural and Artificial Scenes 人类艺术：一个以人类为中心的多功能数据集，连接自然和人造场景 Humans have long been recorded in a variety of forms since antiquity. For example, sculptures and paintings were the primary media for depicting human beings before the invention of cameras. However, most current human-centric computer vision tasks like human pose estimation and human image generation focus exclusively on natural images in the real world. Artificial humans, such as those in sculptures, paintings, and cartoons, are commonly neglected, making existing models fail in these scenarios. As an abstraction of life, art incorporates humans in both natural and artificial scenes. We take advantage of it and introduce the Human-Art dataset to bridge related tasks in natural and artificial scenarios. Specifically, Human-Art contains 50k high-quality images with over 123k person instances from 5 natural and 15 artificial scenarios, which are annotated with bounding boxes, keypoints, self-contact points, and text information for humans represented in both 2D and 3D. It is, therefore, comprehensive and versatile for various downstream tasks. We also provide a rich set of baseline results and detailed analyses for related tasks, including human detection, 2D and 3D human pose estimation, image generation, and motion transfer. As a challenging dataset, we hope Human-Art can provide insights for relevant research and open up new research questions. 自古以来，人类就以多种形式被记录下来。例如，在相机发明之前，雕塑和绘画是描绘人类的主要媒介。然而，当前大多数以人为中心的计算机视觉任务（例如人体姿势估计和人体图像生成）仅关注现实世界中的自然图像。雕塑、绘画和卡通中的人造人通常被忽视，导致现有模型在这些场景中失败。作为生活的抽象，艺术将人类融入自然和人造场景中。我们利用它并引入 Human-Art 数据集来桥接自然和人工场景中的相关任务。具体来说，Human-Art 包含 5 万张高质量图像，其中包含来自 5 个自然场景和 15 个人工场景的超过 12.3 万个人物实例，这些图像用 2D 和 3D 表示的人类的边界框、关键点、自接触点和文本信息进行注释。因此，它对于各种下游任务来说是全面且通用的。我们还为相关任务提供了丰富的基线结果和详细分析，包括人体检测、2D 和 3D 人体姿势估计、图像生成和运动传输。作为一个具有挑战性的数据集，我们希望 Human-Art 能为相关研究提供见解并提出新的研究问题。 本文提出一个名为Human-Art的通用人类中心数据集，旨在弥合自然场景与人工艺术场景中的人类视觉任务差距。 Xuan Ju,Ailing Zeng,Jianan Wang,Qiang Xu,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Maryam Viqar,Athar A. Moinuddin,Ekram Khan,M. Ghanbari
title: Frequency-domain Blind Quality Assessment of Blurred and Blocking-artefact Images using Gaussian Process Regression model
title_zh: 使用高斯过程回归模型对模糊和块伪影图像进行频域盲质量评估
abstract: Most of the standard image and video codecs are block-based and depending upon the compression ratio the compressed images/videos suffer from different distortions. At low ratios, blurriness is observed and as compression increases blocking artifacts occur. Generally, in order to reduce blockiness, images are low-pass filtered which leads to more blurriness. Also, in bokeh mode images they are commonly seen: blurriness as a result of intentional blurred background while blocking artifact and global blurriness arising due to compression. Therefore, such visual media suffer from both blockiness and blurriness distortions. Along with this, noise is also commonly encountered distortion. Most of the existing works on quality assessment quantify these distortions individually. This paper proposes a methodology to blindly measure overall quality of an image suffering from these distortions, individually as well as jointly. This is achieved by considering the sum of absolute values of low and high-frequency Discrete Frequency Transform (DFT) coefficients defined as sum magnitudes. The number of blocks lying in specific ranges of sum magnitudes including zero-valued AC coefficients and mean of 100 maximum and 100 minimum values of these sum magnitudes are used as feature vectors. These features are then fed to the Machine Learning (ML) based Gaussian Process Regression (GPR) model, which quantifies the image quality. The simulation results show that the proposed method can estimate the quality of images distorted with the blockiness, blurriness, noise and their combinations. It is relatively fast compared to many state-of-art methods, and therefore is suitable for real-time quality monitoring applications.
summary: Most of the standard image and video codecs are block-based and depending upon the compression ratio the compressed images/videos suffer from different distortions. At low ratios, blurriness is observed and as compression increases blocking artifacts occur. Generally, in order to reduce blockiness, images are low-pass filtered which leads to more blurriness. Also, in bokeh mode images they are commonly seen: blurriness as a result of intentional blurred background while blocking artifact and global blurriness arising due to compression. Therefore, such visual media suffer from both blockiness and blurriness distortions. Along with this, noise is also commonly encountered distortion. Most of the existing works on quality assessment quantify these distortions individually. This paper proposes a methodology to blindly measure overall quality of an image suffering from these distortions, individually as well as jointly. This is achieved by considering the sum of absolute values of low and high-frequency Discrete Frequency Transform (DFT) coefficients defined as sum magnitudes. The number of blocks lying in specific ranges of sum magnitudes including zero-valued AC coefficients and mean of 100 maximum and 100 minimum values of these sum magnitudes are used as feature vectors. These features are then fed to the Machine Learning (ML) based Gaussian Process Regression (GPR) model, which quantifies the image quality. The simulation results show that the proposed method can estimate the quality of images distorted with the blockiness, blurriness, noise and their combinations. It is relatively fast compared to many state-of-art methods, and therefore is suitable for real-time quality monitoring applications.
abstract_zh: 大多数标准图像和视频编解码器都是基于块的，并且根据压缩比，压缩图像/视频会遭受不同的失真。在低比率下，会观察到模糊现象，并且随着压缩的增加，会出现块伪影。通常，为了减少块效应，会对图像进行低通滤波，这会导致更加模糊。此外，在散景模式图像中，它们也很常见：由于故意模糊背景而导致的模糊，同时由于压缩而产生块伪影和全局模糊。因此，此类视觉媒体会遭受块效应和模糊失真的影响。除此之外，噪声也是常见的失真现象。大多数现有的质量评估工作都单独量化了这些扭曲。本文提出了一种方法来盲目地单独或联合地测量遭受这些失真的图像的整体质量。这是通过考虑定义为总和幅度的低频和高频离散频率变换 (DFT) 系数的绝对值之和来实现的。位于特定总和幅度范围内的块的数量，包括零值AC系数以及这些总和幅度的100个最大值和100个最小值的平均值，被用作特征向量。然后将这些特征输入到基于机器学习 (ML) 的高斯过程回归 (GPR) 模型，该模型可量化图像质量。仿真结果表明，该方法可以估计块状、模糊、噪声及其组合失真图像的质量。与许多最先进的方法相比，它相对较快，因此适合实时质量监控应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率域的盲图像质量评估方法，利用高斯过程回归模型同时评估图像中的模糊、块状伪影和噪声等多类型失真。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法多单独处理块状伪影或模糊失真，而实际压缩图像常同时存在多种失真，需联合评估以提高准确性。
AI.method: 通过计算离散傅里叶变换（DFT）系数的绝对值和，提取块状区域特征及高低频能量分布，结合零值AC系数与极值均值作为特征向量，输入高斯过程回归模型进行质量预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可有效评估单一或组合失真图像质量，且计算速度优于现有主流方法，适用于实时监测场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过频率域特征融合与高斯过程回归，实现了多失真联合评估，具有较高的准确性和实时性，为图像质量分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Zhengming Ding,Jason M. Gregory,Lantao Liu
title: IDA: Informed Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: IDA：知情域自适应语义分割
abstract: Mixup-based data augmentation has been validated to be a critical stage in the self-training framework for unsupervised domain adaptive semantic segmentation (UDA-SS), which aims to transfer knowledge from a well-annotated (source) domain to an unlabeled (target) domain. Existing self-training methods usually adopt the popular region-based mixup techniques with a random sampling strategy, which unfortunately ignores the dynamic evolution of different semantics across various domains as training proceeds. To improve the UDA-SS performance, we propose an Informed Domain Adaptation (IDA) model, a self-training framework that mixes the data based on class-level segmentation performance, which aims to emphasize small-region semantics during mixup. In our IDA model, the class-level performance is tracked by an expected confidence score (ECS). We then use a dynamic schedule to determine the mixing ratio for data in different domains. Extensive experimental results reveal that our proposed method is able to outperform the state-of-the-art UDA-SS method by a margin of 1.1 mIoU in the adaptation of GTA-V to Cityscapes and of 0.9 mIoU in the adaptation of SYNTHIA to Cityscapes.
summary: Mixup-based data augmentation has been validated to be a critical stage in the self-training framework for unsupervised domain adaptive semantic segmentation (UDA-SS), which aims to transfer knowledge from a well-annotated (source) domain to an unlabeled (target) domain. Existing self-training methods usually adopt the popular region-based mixup techniques with a random sampling strategy, which unfortunately ignores the dynamic evolution of different semantics across various domains as training proceeds. To improve the UDA-SS performance, we propose an Informed Domain Adaptation (IDA) model, a self-training framework that mixes the data based on class-level segmentation performance, which aims to emphasize small-region semantics during mixup. In our IDA model, the class-level performance is tracked by an expected confidence score (ECS). We then use a dynamic schedule to determine the mixing ratio for data in different domains. Extensive experimental results reveal that our proposed method is able to outperform the state-of-the-art UDA-SS method by a margin of 1.1 mIoU in the adaptation of GTA-V to Cityscapes and of 0.9 mIoU in the adaptation of SYNTHIA to Cityscapes.
abstract_zh: 基于混合的数据增强已被验证为无监督域自适应语义分割（UDA-SS）自训练框架的关键阶段，该框架旨在将知识从注释良好的（源）域转移到未标记的（目标）域。现有的自训练方法通常采用流行的基于区域的混合技术和随机采样策略，不幸的是，随着训练的进行，这种方法忽略了跨不同领域的不同语义的动态演变。为了提高 UDA-SS 性能，我们提出了一种知情域适应（IDA）模型，这是一种基于类级分割性能混合数据的自训练框架，旨在在混合过程中强调小区域语义。在我们的 IDA 模型中，班级级别的表现是通过预期置信度得分 (ECS) 来跟踪的。然后，我们使用动态计划来确定不同域中数据的混合比率。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 GTA-V 适应城市景观方面能够比最先进的 UDA-SS 方法高 1.1 mIoU，在 SYNTHIA 适应城市景观方面比最先进的 UDA-SS 方法高 0.9 mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IDA的自训练框架，通过基于类别级分割性能的混合策略，提升无监督域适应语义分割（UDA-SS）的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法采用随机采样的区域混合技术，忽略了不同域间语义在训练过程中的动态演变，导致小区域语义未能被充分强调。
AI.method: IDA模型通过跟踪类别级性能的期望置信度得分（ECS），结合动态调度策略确定不同域数据的混合比例，实现基于分割性能的混合数据生成。
AI.result: 在GTA-V到Cityscapes的适应中，IDA方法比现有最佳方法提升1.1 mIoU；在SYNTHIA到Cityscapes的适应中提升0.9 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: IDA通过动态调整混合策略以强调小区域语义，有效提升了无监督域适应语义分割的性能，验证了基于类别级性能的混合方法的优越性。

search_text: IDA: Informed Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation IDA：知情域自适应语义分割 Mixup-based data augmentation has been validated to be a critical stage in the self-training framework for unsupervised domain adaptive semantic segmentation (UDA-SS), which aims to transfer knowledge from a well-annotated (source) domain to an unlabeled (target) domain. Existing self-training methods usually adopt the popular region-based mixup techniques with a random sampling strategy, which unfortunately ignores the dynamic evolution of different semantics across various domains as training proceeds. To improve the UDA-SS performance, we propose an Informed Domain Adaptation (IDA) model, a self-training framework that mixes the data based on class-level segmentation performance, which aims to emphasize small-region semantics during mixup. In our IDA model, the class-level performance is tracked by an expected confidence score (ECS). We then use a dynamic schedule to determine the mixing ratio for data in different domains. Extensive experimental results reveal that our proposed method is able to outperform the state-of-the-art UDA-SS method by a margin of 1.1 mIoU in the adaptation of GTA-V to Cityscapes and of 0.9 mIoU in the adaptation of SYNTHIA to Cityscapes. 基于混合的数据增强已被验证为无监督域自适应语义分割（UDA-SS）自训练框架的关键阶段，该框架旨在将知识从注释良好的（源）域转移到未标记的（目标）域。现有的自训练方法通常采用流行的基于区域的混合技术和随机采样策略，不幸的是，随着训练的进行，这种方法忽略了跨不同领域的不同语义的动态演变。为了提高 UDA-SS 性能，我们提出了一种知情域适应（IDA）模型，这是一种基于类级分割性能混合数据的自训练框架，旨在在混合过程中强调小区域语义。在我们的 IDA 模型中，班级级别的表现是通过预期置信度得分 (ECS) 来跟踪的。然后，我们使用动态计划来确定不同域中数据的混合比率。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 GTA-V 适应城市景观方面能够比最先进的 UDA-SS 方法高 1.1 mIoU，在 SYNTHIA 适应城市景观方面比最先进的 UDA-SS 方法高 0.9 mIoU。 本文提出了一种名为IDA的自训练框架，通过基于类别级分割性能的混合策略，提升无监督域适应语义分割（UDA-SS）的效果。 Zheng Chen,Zhengming Ding,Jason M. Gregory,Lantao Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Deepak Duggirala,David Crandall,Lei Jiang,Lantao Liu
title: SePaint: Semantic Map Inpainting via Multinomial Diffusion
title_zh: SePaint：通过多项扩散进行语义地图修复
abstract: Prediction beyond partial observations is crucial for robots to navigate in unknown environments because it can provide extra information regarding the surroundings beyond the current sensing range or resolution. In this work, we consider the inpainting of semantic Bird's-Eye-View maps. We propose SePaint, an inpainting model for semantic data based on generative multinomial diffusion. To maintain semantic consistency, we need to condition the prediction for the missing regions on the known regions. We propose a novel and efficient condition strategy, Look-Back Condition (LB-Con), which performs one-step look-back operations during the reverse diffusion process. By doing so, we are able to strengthen the harmonization between unknown and known parts, leading to better completion performance. We have conducted extensive experiments on different datasets, showing our proposed model outperforms commonly used interpolation methods in various robotic applications.
summary: Prediction beyond partial observations is crucial for robots to navigate in unknown environments because it can provide extra information regarding the surroundings beyond the current sensing range or resolution. In this work, we consider the inpainting of semantic Bird's-Eye-View maps. We propose SePaint, an inpainting model for semantic data based on generative multinomial diffusion. To maintain semantic consistency, we need to condition the prediction for the missing regions on the known regions. We propose a novel and efficient condition strategy, Look-Back Condition (LB-Con), which performs one-step look-back operations during the reverse diffusion process. By doing so, we are able to strengthen the harmonization between unknown and known parts, leading to better completion performance. We have conducted extensive experiments on different datasets, showing our proposed model outperforms commonly used interpolation methods in various robotic applications.
abstract_zh: 超越部分观察的预测对于机器人在未知环境中导航至关重要，因为它可以提供超出当前传感范围或分辨率的有关周围环境的额外信息。在这项工作中，我们考虑语义鸟瞰图的修复。我们提出了 SePaint，一种基于生成多项式扩散的语义数据修复模型。为了保持语义一致性，我们需要在已知区域上调整缺失区域的预测。我们提出了一种新颖且有效的条件策略，即回溯条件（LB-Con），它在反向扩散过程中执行一步回溯操作。通过这样做，我们能够加强未知和已知部分之间的协调，从而实现更好的完成性能。我们对不同的数据集进行了广泛的实验，表明我们提出的模型优于各种机器人应用中常用的插值方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SePaint模型，利用多项式扩散方法进行语义地图修复，通过Look-Back Condition策略提升未知区域与已知区域的语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要预测未知环境信息以辅助导航，传统插值方法难以有效完成语义地图的缺失区域修复。
AI.method: 基于生成式多项式扩散框架，设计Look-Back Condition策略，在反向扩散过程中进行单步回溯操作，强化已知区域对未知区域的语义引导。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，SePaint模型在语义地图修复任务中优于常用插值方法，适用于多种机器人应用场景。
AI.conclusion: SePaint通过创新的条件策略显著提升了语义地图修复效果，为机器人环境感知提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Dohyun Ham,Jaeyeop Jeong,June-Kyoo Park,Raehyeon Jeong,Seungmin Jeon,Hyeongjun Jeon,Yewon Lim
title: Scalable Object Detection on Embedded Devices Using Weight Pruning and Singular Value Decomposition
title_zh: 使用权重修剪和奇异值分解的嵌入式设备上的可扩展对象检测
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures. A report of the project done as part of the Yonsei-Roboin project for the 2nd semester, 2022
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures. A report of the project done as part of the Yonsei-Roboin project for the 2nd semester, 2022
abstract: This paper presents a method for optimizing object detection models by combining weight pruning and singular value decomposition (SVD). The proposed method was evaluated on a custom dataset of street work images obtained from https://universe.roboflow.com/roboflow-100/street-work. The dataset consists of 611 training images, 175 validation images, and 87 test images with 7 classes. We compared the performance of the optimized models with the original unoptimized model in terms of frame rate, mean average precision (mAP@50), and weight size. The results show that the weight pruning + SVD model achieved a 0.724 mAP@50 with a frame rate of 1.48 FPS and a weight size of 12.1 MB, outperforming the original model (0.717 mAP@50, 1.50 FPS, and 12.3 MB). Precision-recall curves were also plotted for all models. Our work demonstrates that the proposed method can effectively optimize object detection models while balancing accuracy, speed, and model size.
summary: This paper presents a method for optimizing object detection models by combining weight pruning and singular value decomposition (SVD). The proposed method was evaluated on a custom dataset of street work images obtained from https://universe.roboflow.com/roboflow-100/street-work. The dataset consists of 611 training images, 175 validation images, and 87 test images with 7 classes. We compared the performance of the optimized models with the original unoptimized model in terms of frame rate, mean average precision (mAP@50), and weight size. The results show that the weight pruning + SVD model achieved a 0.724 mAP@50 with a frame rate of 1.48 FPS and a weight size of 12.1 MB, outperforming the original model (0.717 mAP@50, 1.50 FPS, and 12.3 MB). Precision-recall curves were also plotted for all models. Our work demonstrates that the proposed method can effectively optimize object detection models while balancing accuracy, speed, and model size.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种结合权重剪枝和奇异值分解（SVD）来优化目标检测模型的方法。所提出的方法在从 https://universe.roboflow.com/roboflow-100/street-work 获得的街道工作图像的自定义数据集上进行了评估。该数据集由 611 张训练图像、175 张验证图像和 87 张测试图像组成，分为 7 个类别。我们在帧速率、平均精度 (mAP@50) 和权重大小方面比较了优化模型与原始未优化模型的性能。结果表明，权重剪枝+SVD模型在帧率为1.48 FPS和权重大小为12.1 MB的情况下实现了0.724 mAP@50，优于原始模型（0.717 mAP@50、1.50 FPS和12.3 MB）。还为所有模型绘制了精确率-召回率曲线。我们的工作表明，所提出的方法可以有效优化目标检测模型，同时平衡精度、速度和模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合权重剪枝和奇异值分解（SVD）的方法，用于在嵌入式设备上优化目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式设备资源有限，传统目标检测模型常因参数量大、计算复杂度高而难以部署，需在精度、速度和模型大小间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 通过权重剪枝去除冗余参数，再利用SVD对剩余权重进行分解，降低模型复杂度并压缩模型体积。
AI.result: 优化后模型在街景数据集上达到0.724 mAP@50（原模型0.717），帧率1.48 FPS（原模型1.50 FPS），模型大小12.1 MB（原模型12.3 MB）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了目标检测模型的精度、速度与模型大小，适用于嵌入式设备部署。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合权重剪枝和奇异值分解（SVD）的方法，用于在嵌入式设备上优化目标检测模型。
motivation: 嵌入式设备资源有限，传统目标检测模型常因参数量大、计算复杂度高而难以部署，需在精度、速度和模型大小间寻求平衡。
method: 通过权重剪枝去除冗余参数，再利用SVD对剩余权重进行分解，降低模型复杂度并压缩模型体积。
result: 优化后模型在街景数据集上达到0.724 mAP@50（原模型0.717），帧率1.48 FPS（原模型1.50 FPS），模型大小12.1 MB（原模型12.3 MB）。
conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了目标检测模型的精度、速度与模型大小，适用于嵌入式设备部署。
search_text: Scalable Object Detection on Embedded Devices Using Weight Pruning and Singular Value Decomposition 使用权重修剪和奇异值分解的嵌入式设备上的可扩展对象检测 This paper presents a method for optimizing object detection models by combining weight pruning and singular value decomposition (SVD). The proposed method was evaluated on a custom dataset of street work images obtained from https://universe.roboflow.com/roboflow-100/street-work. The dataset consists of 611 training images, 175 validation images, and 87 test images with 7 classes. We compared the performance of the optimized models with the original unoptimized model in terms of frame rate, mean average precision (mAP@50), and weight size. The results show that the weight pruning + SVD model achieved a 0.724 mAP@50 with a frame rate of 1.48 FPS and a weight size of 12.1 MB, outperforming the original model (0.717 mAP@50, 1.50 FPS, and 12.3 MB). Precision-recall curves were also plotted for all models. Our work demonstrates that the proposed method can effectively optimize object detection models while balancing accuracy, speed, and model size. 本文提出了一种结合权重剪枝和奇异值分解（SVD）来优化目标检测模型的方法。所提出的方法在从 https://universe.roboflow.com/roboflow-100/street-work 获得的街道工作图像的自定义数据集上进行了评估。该数据集由 611 张训练图像、175 张验证图像和 87 张测试图像组成，分为 7 个类别。我们在帧速率、平均精度 (mAP@50) 和权重大小方面比较了优化模型与原始未优化模型的性能。结果表明，权重剪枝+SVD模型在帧率为1.48 FPS和权重大小为12.1 MB的情况下实现了0.724 mAP@50，优于原始模型（0.717 mAP@50、1.50 FPS和12.3 MB）。还为所有模型绘制了精确率-召回率曲线。我们的工作表明，所提出的方法可以有效优化目标检测模型，同时平衡精度、速度和模型大小。 本文提出一种结合权重剪枝和奇异值分解（SVD）的方法，用于在嵌入式设备上优化目标检测模型。 Dohyun Ham,Jaeyeop Jeong,June-Kyoo Park,Raehyeon Jeong,Seungmin Jeon,Hyeongjun Jeon,Yewon Lim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexander Detkov,Mohammad Salameh,Muhammad Fetrat Qharabagh,Jialin Zhang,Wei Lui,Shangling Jui,Di Niu
title: Reparameterization through Spatial Gradient Scaling
title_zh: 通过空间梯度缩放重新参数化
comment: Published at ICLR 2023. Code available at https://github.com/Ascend-Research/Reparameterization
comments: Published at ICLR 2023. Code available at https://github.com/Ascend-Research/Reparameterization
abstract: Reparameterization aims to improve the generalization of deep neural networks by transforming convolutional layers into equivalent multi-branched structures during training. However, there exists a gap in understanding how reparameterization may change and benefit the learning process of neural networks. In this paper, we present a novel spatial gradient scaling method to redistribute learning focus among weights in convolutional networks. We prove that spatial gradient scaling achieves the same learning dynamics as a branched reparameterization yet without introducing structural changes into the network. We further propose an analytical approach that dynamically learns scalings for each convolutional layer based on the spatial characteristics of its input feature map gauged by mutual information. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet show that without searching for reparameterized structures, our proposed scaling method outperforms the state-of-the-art reparameterization strategies at a lower computational cost.
summary: Reparameterization aims to improve the generalization of deep neural networks by transforming convolutional layers into equivalent multi-branched structures during training. However, there exists a gap in understanding how reparameterization may change and benefit the learning process of neural networks. In this paper, we present a novel spatial gradient scaling method to redistribute learning focus among weights in convolutional networks. We prove that spatial gradient scaling achieves the same learning dynamics as a branched reparameterization yet without introducing structural changes into the network. We further propose an analytical approach that dynamically learns scalings for each convolutional layer based on the spatial characteristics of its input feature map gauged by mutual information. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet show that without searching for reparameterized structures, our proposed scaling method outperforms the state-of-the-art reparameterization strategies at a lower computational cost.
abstract_zh: 重新参数化旨在通过在训练过程中将卷积层转换为等效的多分支结构来提高深度神经网络的泛化能力。然而，在理解重新参数化如何改变并有利于神经网络的学习过程方面存在差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的空间梯度缩放方法，用于在卷积网络中的权重之间重新分配学习焦点。我们证明，空间梯度缩放实现了与分支重新参数化相同的学习动态，但没有向网络引入结构变化。我们进一步提出了一种分析方法，该方法根据互信息测量的输入特征图的空间特征动态学习每个卷积层的缩放。 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验表明，在不搜索重新参数化结构的情况下，我们提出的缩放方法以较低的计算成本优于最先进的重新参数化策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需改变网络结构的空间梯度缩放方法，通过动态调整卷积层权重学习焦点以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有重参数化方法通过结构变换提升性能但存在计算开销大、机制理解不足的问题，需探索更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于互信息理论设计空间梯度缩放机制，动态学习各卷积层的特征图空间特性并调整梯度分布，实现等效于多分支结构的重参数化效果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet数据集上，该方法以低于现有重参数化方案的计算成本取得更优性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 空间梯度缩放提供了一种无需结构改造的高效重参数化途径，通过动态特征感知机制优化了卷积网络的学习动态。

authors_text: Hsuan-Kung Yang,Tsung-Chih Chiang,Jou-Min Liu,Ting-Ru Liu,Chun-Wei Huang,Tsu-Ching Hsiao,Chun-Yi Lee
title: Virtual Guidance as a Mid-level Representation for Navigation with Augmented Reality
title_zh: 虚拟引导作为增强现实导航的中层表示
comment: Tsung-Chih Chiang, Jou-Min Liu, Ting-Ru Liu, and Chun-Wei Huang contributed equally to this work; This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: Tsung-Chih Chiang, Jou-Min Liu, Ting-Ru Liu, and Chun-Wei Huang contributed equally to this work; This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: In the context of autonomous navigation, effectively conveying abstract navigational cues to agents in dynamic environments presents significant challenges, particularly when navigation information is derived from diverse modalities such as both vision and high-level language descriptions. To address this issue, we introduce a novel technique termed `Virtual Guidance,' which is designed to visually represent non-visual instructional signals. These visual cues are overlaid onto the agent's camera view and served as comprehensible navigational guidance signals. To validate the concept of virtual guidance, we propose a sim-to-real framework that enables the transfer of the trained policy from simulated environments to real world, ensuring the adaptability of virtual guidance in practical scenarios. We evaluate and compare the proposed method against a non-visual guidance baseline through detailed experiments in simulation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed virtual guidance approach outperforms the baseline methods across multiple scenarios and offers clear evidence of its effectiveness in autonomous navigation tasks.
summary: In the context of autonomous navigation, effectively conveying abstract navigational cues to agents in dynamic environments presents significant challenges, particularly when navigation information is derived from diverse modalities such as both vision and high-level language descriptions. To address this issue, we introduce a novel technique termed `Virtual Guidance,' which is designed to visually represent non-visual instructional signals. These visual cues are overlaid onto the agent's camera view and served as comprehensible navigational guidance signals. To validate the concept of virtual guidance, we propose a sim-to-real framework that enables the transfer of the trained policy from simulated environments to real world, ensuring the adaptability of virtual guidance in practical scenarios. We evaluate and compare the proposed method against a non-visual guidance baseline through detailed experiments in simulation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed virtual guidance approach outperforms the baseline methods across multiple scenarios and offers clear evidence of its effectiveness in autonomous navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在自主导航的背景下，在动态环境中向代理有效地传达抽象导航线索提出了重大挑战，特别是当导航信息来自多种模式（例如视觉和高级语言描述）时。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种称为“虚拟指导”的新技术，该技术旨在直观地表示非视觉教学信号。这些视觉提示叠加在代理的摄像机视图上，并用作可理解的导航引导信号。为了验证虚拟引导的概念，我们提出了一个从模拟到真实的框架，可以将训练好的策略从模拟环境转移到现实世界，确保虚拟引导在实际场景中的适应性。我们通过详细的模拟实验来评估和比较所提出的方法与非视觉引导基线。实验结果表明，所提出的虚拟引导方法在多个场景中优于基线方法，并提供了其在自主导航任务中的有效性的明确证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'虚拟引导'的新技术，通过增强现实将非视觉导航指令转化为视觉提示，用于自主导航任务。
AI.motivation: 在动态环境中，如何有效传递抽象导航指令给智能体存在挑战，尤其当导航信息来源于视觉和语言等多种模态时，传统方法难以高效整合。
AI.method: 设计虚拟引导技术，将非视觉指令转化为叠加在摄像头视角上的视觉提示，并构建模拟到现实的框架实现策略迁移。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，该方法在多场景下均优于非视觉引导基线，验证了虚拟引导在自主导航任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟引导作为中间表示形式，通过视觉化非视觉指令并结合模拟到现实迁移，显著提升了自主导航系统的适应性与性能。

authors_text: Siyang Wang,Gustav Eje Henter,Joakim Gustafson,Éva Székely
title: A Comparative Study of Self-Supervised Speech Representations in Read and Spontaneous TTS
title_zh: 阅读和自发 TTS 中自监督语音表示的比较研究
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures. ICASSP Workshop SASB (Self-Supervision in Audio, Speech and Beyond)2023
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures. ICASSP Workshop SASB (Self-Supervision in Audio, Speech and Beyond)2023
abstract: Recent work has explored using self-supervised learning (SSL) speech representations such as wav2vec2.0 as the representation medium in standard two-stage TTS, in place of conventionally used mel-spectrograms. It is however unclear which speech SSL is the better fit for TTS, and whether or not the performance differs between read and spontaneous TTS, the later of which is arguably more challenging. This study aims at addressing these questions by testing several speech SSLs, including different layers of the same SSL, in two-stage TTS on both read and spontaneous corpora, while maintaining constant TTS model architecture and training settings. Results from listening tests show that the 9th layer of 12-layer wav2vec2.0 (ASR finetuned) outperforms other tested SSLs and mel-spectrogram, in both read and spontaneous TTS. Our work sheds light on both how speech SSL can readily improve current TTS systems, and how SSLs compare in the challenging generative task of TTS. Audio examples can be found at https://www.speech.kth.se/tts-demos/ssr_tts
summary: Recent work has explored using self-supervised learning (SSL) speech representations such as wav2vec2.0 as the representation medium in standard two-stage TTS, in place of conventionally used mel-spectrograms. It is however unclear which speech SSL is the better fit for TTS, and whether or not the performance differs between read and spontaneous TTS, the later of which is arguably more challenging. This study aims at addressing these questions by testing several speech SSLs, including different layers of the same SSL, in two-stage TTS on both read and spontaneous corpora, while maintaining constant TTS model architecture and training settings. Results from listening tests show that the 9th layer of 12-layer wav2vec2.0 (ASR finetuned) outperforms other tested SSLs and mel-spectrogram, in both read and spontaneous TTS. Our work sheds light on both how speech SSL can readily improve current TTS systems, and how SSLs compare in the challenging generative task of TTS. Audio examples can be found at https://www.speech.kth.se/tts-demos/ssr_tts
abstract_zh: 最近的工作探索了使用自监督学习 (SSL) 语音表示（例如 wav2vec2.0）作为标准两阶段 TTS 中的表示媒介，代替传统使用的梅尔谱图。然而，目前尚不清楚哪种语音 SSL 更适合 TTS，以及阅读和自发 TTS 之间的性能是否有所不同，后者可以说更具挑战性。本研究旨在通过在阅读语料库和自发语料库上的两阶段 TTS 中测试多个语音 SSL（包括同一 SSL 的不同层）来解决这些问题，同时保持恒定的 TTS 模型架构和训练设置。听力测试结果表明，12 层 wav2vec2.0（ASR 微调）的第 9 层在读取和自发 TTS 方面均优于其他测试的 SSL 和梅尔频谱图。我们的工作揭示了语音 SSL 如何轻松改进当前的 TTS 系统，以及 SSL 在具有挑战性的 TTS 生成任务中的比较。音频示例可以在 https://www.speech.kth.se/tts-demos/ssr_tts 找到
