authors_text: Ofer Idan,Yoli Shavit,Yosi Keller
title: Learning to Localize in Unseen Scenes with Relative Pose Regressors
title_zh: 学习使用相对姿势回归器定位看不见的场景
abstract: Relative pose regressors (RPRs) localize a camera by estimating its relative translation and rotation to a pose-labelled reference. Unlike scene coordinate regression and absolute pose regression methods, which learn absolute scene parameters, RPRs can (theoretically) localize in unseen environments, since they only learn the residual pose between camera pairs. In practice, however, the performance of RPRs is significantly degraded in unseen scenes. In this work, we propose to aggregate paired feature maps into latent codes, instead of operating on global image descriptors, in order to improve the generalization of RPRs. We implement aggregation with concatenation, projection, and attention operations (Transformer Encoders) and learn to regress the relative pose parameters from the resulting latent codes. We further make use of a recently proposed continuous representation of rotation matrices, which alleviates the limitations of the commonly used quaternions. Compared to state-of-the-art RPRs, our model is shown to localize significantly better in unseen environments, across both indoor and outdoor benchmarks, while maintaining competitive performance in seen scenes. We validate our findings and architecture design through multiple ablations. Our code and pretrained models is publicly available.
summary: Relative pose regressors (RPRs) localize a camera by estimating its relative translation and rotation to a pose-labelled reference. Unlike scene coordinate regression and absolute pose regression methods, which learn absolute scene parameters, RPRs can (theoretically) localize in unseen environments, since they only learn the residual pose between camera pairs. In practice, however, the performance of RPRs is significantly degraded in unseen scenes. In this work, we propose to aggregate paired feature maps into latent codes, instead of operating on global image descriptors, in order to improve the generalization of RPRs. We implement aggregation with concatenation, projection, and attention operations (Transformer Encoders) and learn to regress the relative pose parameters from the resulting latent codes. We further make use of a recently proposed continuous representation of rotation matrices, which alleviates the limitations of the commonly used quaternions. Compared to state-of-the-art RPRs, our model is shown to localize significantly better in unseen environments, across both indoor and outdoor benchmarks, while maintaining competitive performance in seen scenes. We validate our findings and architecture design through multiple ablations. Our code and pretrained models is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 相对姿势回归器 (RPR) 通过估计相机与姿势标记参考的相对平移和旋转来定位相机。与学习绝对场景参数的场景坐标回归和绝对姿态回归方法不同，RPR 可以（理论上）在不可见的环境中进行定位，因为它们只学习相机对之间的残余姿态。然而，在实践中，RPR 的性能在未见过的场景中会显着下降。在这项工作中，我们建议将成对的特征图聚合成潜在代码，而不是对全局图像描述符进行操作，以提高 RPR 的泛化能力。我们通过连接、投影和注意力操作（Transformer Encoders）实现聚合，并学习从生成的潜在代码中回归相对姿态参数。我们进一步利用最近提出的旋转矩阵的连续表示，这减轻了常用四元数的限制。与最先进的 RPR 相比，我们的模型在室内和室外基准测试中，在不可见的环境中定位明显更好，同时在可见的场景中保持有竞争力的性能。我们通过多次消融来验证我们的发现和架构设计。我们的代码和预训练模型是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的相对位姿回归器（RPR），通过聚合特征图生成潜在代码以提升在未见过场景中的定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RPR方法在未见过场景中表现不佳，因其依赖全局描述符导致泛化能力不足，需改进特征表示以增强适应性。
AI.method: 采用特征图聚合生成潜在代码，结合拼接、投影和Transformer编码器操作，并引入连续旋转矩阵表示替代四元数进行位姿回归。
AI.result: 在室内外基准测试中，模型在未见过场景中显著优于现有RPR方法，且在已知场景中保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征聚合与连续旋转表示改进了RPR泛化能力，实验验证了方法有效性，代码和预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Christian Rathgeb,Jascha Kolberg,Andreas Uhl,Christoph Busch
title: Deep Learning in the Field of Biometric Template Protection: An Overview
title_zh: 生物识别模板保护领域的深度学习：概述
abstract: Today, deep learning represents the most popular and successful form of machine learning. Deep learning has revolutionised the field of pattern recognition, including biometric recognition. Biometric systems utilising deep learning have been shown to achieve auspicious recognition accuracy, surpassing human performance. Apart from said breakthrough advances in terms of biometric performance, the use of deep learning was reported to impact different covariates of biometrics such as algorithmic fairness, vulnerability to attacks, or template protection. Technologies of biometric template protection are designed to enable a secure and privacy-preserving deployment of biometrics. In the recent past, deep learning techniques have been frequently applied in biometric template protection systems for various purposes. This work provides an overview of how advances in deep learning take influence on the field of biometric template protection. The interrelation between improved biometric performance rates and security in biometric template protection is elaborated. Further, the use of deep learning for obtaining feature representations that are suitable for biometric template protection is discussed. Novel methods that apply deep learning to achieve various goals of biometric template protection are surveyed along with deep learning-based attacks.
summary: Today, deep learning represents the most popular and successful form of machine learning. Deep learning has revolutionised the field of pattern recognition, including biometric recognition. Biometric systems utilising deep learning have been shown to achieve auspicious recognition accuracy, surpassing human performance. Apart from said breakthrough advances in terms of biometric performance, the use of deep learning was reported to impact different covariates of biometrics such as algorithmic fairness, vulnerability to attacks, or template protection. Technologies of biometric template protection are designed to enable a secure and privacy-preserving deployment of biometrics. In the recent past, deep learning techniques have been frequently applied in biometric template protection systems for various purposes. This work provides an overview of how advances in deep learning take influence on the field of biometric template protection. The interrelation between improved biometric performance rates and security in biometric template protection is elaborated. Further, the use of deep learning for obtaining feature representations that are suitable for biometric template protection is discussed. Novel methods that apply deep learning to achieve various goals of biometric template protection are surveyed along with deep learning-based attacks.
abstract_zh: 如今，深度学习代表了最流行和最成功的机器学习形式。深度学习彻底改变了模式识别领域，包括生物特征识别。利用深度学习的生物识别系统已被证明可以实现吉祥识别的准确性，超越人类的表现。除了生物识别性能方面的突破性进展外，据报道深度学习的使用还会影响生物识别的不同协变量，例如算法公平性、攻击脆弱性或模板保护。生物识别模板保护技术旨在实现生物识别技术的安全和隐私保护部署。近年来，深度学习技术已频繁应用于生物特征模板保护系统中，用于各种目的。这项工作概述了深度学习的进步如何影响生物识别模板保护领域。详细阐述了提高的生物识别性能与生物识别模板保护的安全性之间的相互关系。此外，还讨论了使用深度学习来获取适合生物特征模板保护的特征表示。人们对应用深度学习来实现生物识别模板保护的各种目标的新方法以及基于深度学习的攻击进行了调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在生物特征模板保护领域的应用及其影响。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽提升了生物特征识别性能，但带来了安全与隐私问题，需探讨其在模板保护中的应用与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析深度学习在生物特征模板保护中的应用方法、特征表示技术及基于深度学习的攻击手段。
AI.result: 阐明了深度学习提升生物特征性能与安全性的关联，讨论了适用于模板保护的特征表示，并综述了新方法及攻击技术。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为生物特征模板保护提供新方法，但需平衡性能与安全，未来需关注鲁棒算法与隐私保护技术。

search_text: Deep Learning in the Field of Biometric Template Protection: An Overview 生物识别模板保护领域的深度学习：概述 Today, deep learning represents the most popular and successful form of machine learning. Deep learning has revolutionised the field of pattern recognition, including biometric recognition. Biometric systems utilising deep learning have been shown to achieve auspicious recognition accuracy, surpassing human performance. Apart from said breakthrough advances in terms of biometric performance, the use of deep learning was reported to impact different covariates of biometrics such as algorithmic fairness, vulnerability to attacks, or template protection. Technologies of biometric template protection are designed to enable a secure and privacy-preserving deployment of biometrics. In the recent past, deep learning techniques have been frequently applied in biometric template protection systems for various purposes. This work provides an overview of how advances in deep learning take influence on the field of biometric template protection. The interrelation between improved biometric performance rates and security in biometric template protection is elaborated. Further, the use of deep learning for obtaining feature representations that are suitable for biometric template protection is discussed. Novel methods that apply deep learning to achieve various goals of biometric template protection are surveyed along with deep learning-based attacks. 如今，深度学习代表了最流行和最成功的机器学习形式。深度学习彻底改变了模式识别领域，包括生物特征识别。利用深度学习的生物识别系统已被证明可以实现吉祥识别的准确性，超越人类的表现。除了生物识别性能方面的突破性进展外，据报道深度学习的使用还会影响生物识别的不同协变量，例如算法公平性、攻击脆弱性或模板保护。生物识别模板保护技术旨在实现生物识别技术的安全和隐私保护部署。近年来，深度学习技术已频繁应用于生物特征模板保护系统中，用于各种目的。这项工作概述了深度学习的进步如何影响生物识别模板保护领域。详细阐述了提高的生物识别性能与生物识别模板保护的安全性之间的相互关系。此外，还讨论了使用深度学习来获取适合生物特征模板保护的特征表示。人们对应用深度学习来实现生物识别模板保护的各种目标的新方法以及基于深度学习的攻击进行了调查。 本文综述了深度学习在生物特征模板保护领域的应用及其影响。 Christian Rathgeb,Jascha Kolberg,Andreas Uhl,Christoph Busch cs.CV

authors_text: Wen Fan,Max Yang,Yifan Xing,Nathan F. Lepora,Dandan Zhang
title: Tac-VGNN: A Voronoi Graph Neural Network for Pose-Based Tactile Servoing
title_zh: Tac-VGNN：用于基于姿势的触觉伺服的 Voronoi 图神经网络
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Tactile pose estimation and tactile servoing are fundamental capabilities of robot touch. Reliable and precise pose estimation can be provided by applying deep learning models to high-resolution optical tactile sensors. Given the recent successes of Graph Neural Network (GNN) and the effectiveness of Voronoi features, we developed a Tactile Voronoi Graph Neural Network (Tac-VGNN) to achieve reliable pose-based tactile servoing relying on a biomimetic optical tactile sensor (TacTip). The GNN is well suited to modeling the distribution relationship between shear motions of the tactile markers, while the Voronoi diagram supplements this with area-based tactile features related to contact depth. The experiment results showed that the Tac-VGNN model can help enhance data interpretability during graph generation and model training efficiency significantly than CNN-based methods. It also improved pose estimation accuracy along vertical depth by 28.57% over vanilla GNN without Voronoi features and achieved better performance on the real surface following tasks with smoother robot control trajectories. For more project details, please view our website: https://sites.google.com/view/tac-vgnn/home
summary: Tactile pose estimation and tactile servoing are fundamental capabilities of robot touch. Reliable and precise pose estimation can be provided by applying deep learning models to high-resolution optical tactile sensors. Given the recent successes of Graph Neural Network (GNN) and the effectiveness of Voronoi features, we developed a Tactile Voronoi Graph Neural Network (Tac-VGNN) to achieve reliable pose-based tactile servoing relying on a biomimetic optical tactile sensor (TacTip). The GNN is well suited to modeling the distribution relationship between shear motions of the tactile markers, while the Voronoi diagram supplements this with area-based tactile features related to contact depth. The experiment results showed that the Tac-VGNN model can help enhance data interpretability during graph generation and model training efficiency significantly than CNN-based methods. It also improved pose estimation accuracy along vertical depth by 28.57% over vanilla GNN without Voronoi features and achieved better performance on the real surface following tasks with smoother robot control trajectories. For more project details, please view our website: https://sites.google.com/view/tac-vgnn/home
abstract_zh: 触觉姿态估计和触觉伺服是机器人触摸的基本功能。通过将深度学习模型应用于高分辨率光学触觉传感器，可以提供可靠且精确的姿态估计。鉴于图神经网络 (GNN) 最近的成功和 Voronoi 特征的有效性，我们开发了触觉 Voronoi 图神经网络 (Tac-VGNN)，以依靠仿生光学触觉传感器 (TacTip) 实现可靠的基于姿势的触觉伺服。 GNN 非常适合对触觉标记的剪切运动之间的分布关系进行建模，而 Voronoi 图则通过与接触深度相关的基于区域的触觉特征来补充这一点。实验结果表明，与基于 CNN 的方法相比，Tac-VGNN 模型可以显着提高图生成过程中的数据可解释性和模型训练效率。与不带 Voronoi 特征的普通 GNN 相比，它还将沿垂直深度的位姿估计精度提高了 28.57%，并在执行任务时通过更平滑的机器人控制轨迹在真实表面上实现了更好的性能。更多项目详情请查看我们的网站：https://sites.google.com/view/tac-vgnn/home

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tac-VGNN模型，结合Voronoi图与图神经网络，实现基于触觉姿态估计的机器人触觉伺服控制。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉伺服方法在数据可解释性与训练效率上存在不足，需提升触觉姿态估计精度与实际表面跟随任务的控制平滑性。
AI.method: 融合图神经网络（GNN）与Voronoi图特征，GNN建模触觉标记的剪切运动关系，Voronoi图补充接触深度相关的区域特征。
AI.result: 相较传统GNN模型，垂直深度姿态估计精度提升28.57%，实际表面跟随任务中机器人控制轨迹更平滑。
AI.conclusion: Tac-VGNN通过结合Voronoi特征显著提升了触觉伺服的数据可解释性与训练效率，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

search_text: Tac-VGNN: A Voronoi Graph Neural Network for Pose-Based Tactile Servoing Tac-VGNN：用于基于姿势的触觉伺服的 Voronoi 图神经网络 Tactile pose estimation and tactile servoing are fundamental capabilities of robot touch. Reliable and precise pose estimation can be provided by applying deep learning models to high-resolution optical tactile sensors. Given the recent successes of Graph Neural Network (GNN) and the effectiveness of Voronoi features, we developed a Tactile Voronoi Graph Neural Network (Tac-VGNN) to achieve reliable pose-based tactile servoing relying on a biomimetic optical tactile sensor (TacTip). The GNN is well suited to modeling the distribution relationship between shear motions of the tactile markers, while the Voronoi diagram supplements this with area-based tactile features related to contact depth. The experiment results showed that the Tac-VGNN model can help enhance data interpretability during graph generation and model training efficiency significantly than CNN-based methods. It also improved pose estimation accuracy along vertical depth by 28.57% over vanilla GNN without Voronoi features and achieved better performance on the real surface following tasks with smoother robot control trajectories. authors_text: Yujian Zheng,Zirong Jin,Moran Li,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Shuguang Cui,Xiaoguang Han
title: HairStep: Transfer Synthetic to Real Using Strand and Depth Maps for Single-View 3D Hair Modeling
title_zh: HairStep：使用股线和深度图将合成转化为真实，进行单视图 3D 头发建模
abstract: In this work, we tackle the challenging problem of learning-based single-view 3D hair modeling. Due to the great difficulty of collecting paired real image and 3D hair data, using synthetic data to provide prior knowledge for real domain becomes a leading solution. This unfortunately introduces the challenge of domain gap. Due to the inherent difficulty of realistic hair rendering, existing methods typically use orientation maps instead of hair images as input to bridge the gap. We firmly think an intermediate representation is essential, but we argue that orientation map using the dominant filtering-based methods is sensitive to uncertain noise and far from a competent representation. Thus, we first raise this issue up and propose a novel intermediate representation, termed as HairStep, which consists of a strand map and a depth map. It is found that HairStep not only provides sufficient information for accurate 3D hair modeling, but also is feasible to be inferred from real images. Specifically, we collect a dataset of 1,250 portrait images with two types of annotations. A learning framework is further designed to transfer real images to the strand map and depth map. It is noted that, an extra bonus of our new dataset is the first quantitative metric for 3D hair modeling. Our experiments show that HairStep narrows the domain gap between synthetic and real and achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-view 3D hair reconstruction.
summary: In this work, we tackle the challenging problem of learning-based single-view 3D hair modeling. Due to the great difficulty of collecting paired real image and 3D hair data, using synthetic data to provide prior knowledge for real domain becomes a leading solution. This unfortunately introduces the challenge of domain gap. Due to the inherent difficulty of realistic hair rendering, existing methods typically use orientation maps instead of hair images as input to bridge the gap. We firmly think an intermediate representation is essential, but we argue that orientation map using the dominant filtering-based methods is sensitive to uncertain noise and far from a competent representation. Thus, we first raise this issue up and propose a novel intermediate representation, termed as HairStep, which consists of a strand map and a depth map. It is found that HairStep not only provides sufficient information for accurate 3D hair modeling, but also is feasible to be inferred from real images. Specifically, we collect a dataset of 1,250 portrait images with two types of annotations. A learning framework is further designed to transfer real images to the strand map and depth map. It is noted that, an extra bonus of our new dataset is the first quantitative metric for 3D hair modeling. Our experiments show that HairStep narrows the domain gap between synthetic and real and achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-view 3D hair reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了基于学习的单视图 3D 头发建模这一具有挑战性的问题。由于收集配对的真实图像和 3D 头发数据非常困难，使用合成数据为真实领域提供先验知识成为领先的解决方案。不幸的是，这引入了域差距的挑战。由于真实头发渲染的固有困难，现有方法通常使用方向图而不是头发图像作为输入来弥合间隙。我们坚信中间表示是必不可少的，但我们认为使用主要的基于过滤的方法的方向图对不确定的噪声敏感，并且远非有效的表示。因此，我们首先提出这个问题并提出一种新颖的中间表示，称为 HairStep，它由链图和深度图组成。研究发现HairStep不仅为精确的3D头发建模提供了足够的信息，而且从真实图像中推断也是可行的。具体来说，我们收集了 1,250 张肖像图像的数据集，并带有两种类型的注释。进一步设计了一个学习框架，将真实图像传输到链图和深度图。值得注意的是，我们的新数据集的额外好处是 3D 头发建模的第一个定量指标。我们的实验表明，HairStep 缩小了合成与真实之间的域差距，并在单视图 3D 头发重建方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于发丝和深度图的中间表示（HairStep），用于解决单视角3D发型建模中合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 由于真实图像与3D发型数据配对采集困难，现有方法依赖合成数据但面临领域差异挑战。传统方向图表示易受噪声干扰，缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计HairStep中间表示（发丝图+深度图），构建包含1250张标注图像的数据集，并开发学习框架实现从真实图像到HairStep的转换。
AI.result: HairStep有效缩小了合成与真实数据的领域差距，在单视角3D发型重建任务中达到SOTA性能，并提供了首个定量评估指标。
AI.conclusion: HairStep通过创新的中间表示和高质量数据集，为单视角3D发型建模提供了更鲁棒的跨领域迁移解决方案。

search_text: HairStep: Transfer Synthetic to Real Using Strand and Depth Maps for Single-View 3D Hair Modeling HairStep：使用股线和深度图将合成转化为真实，进行单视图 3D 头发建模 In this work, we tackle the challenging problem of learning-based single-view 3D hair modeling. Due to the great difficulty of collecting paired real image and 3D hair data, using synthetic data to provide prior knowledge for real domain becomes a leading solution. This unfortunately introduces the challenge of domain gap. Due to the inherent difficulty of realistic hair rendering, existing methods typically use orientation maps instead of hair images as input to bridge the gap. We firmly think an intermediate representation is essential, but we argue that orientation map using the dominant filtering-based methods is sensitive to uncertain noise and far from a competent representation. Thus, we first raise this issue up and propose a novel intermediate representation, termed as HairStep, which consists of a strand map and a depth map. It is found that HairStep not only provides sufficient information for accurate 3D hair modeling, but also is feasible to be inferred from real images. Specifically, we collect a dataset of 1,250 portrait images with two types of annotations. A learning framework is further designed to transfer real images to the strand map and depth map. It is noted that, an extra bonus of our new dataset is the first quantitative metric for 3D hair modeling. Our experiments show that HairStep narrows the domain gap between synthetic and real and achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-view 3D hair reconstruction. 在这项工作中，我们解决了基于学习的单视图 3D 头发建模这一具有挑战性的问题。由于收集配对的真实图像和 3D 头发数据非常困难，使用合成数据为真实领域提供先验知识成为领先的解决方案。不幸的是，这引入了域差距的挑战。由于真实头发渲染的固有困难，现有方法通常使用方向图而不是头发图像作为输入来弥合间隙。我们坚信中间表示是必不可少的，但我们认为使用主要的基于过滤的方法的方向图对不确定的噪声敏感，并且远非有效的表示。因此，我们首先提出这个问题并提出一种新颖的中间表示，称为 HairStep，它由链图和深度图组成。研究发现HairStep不仅为精确的3D头发建模提供了足够的信息，而且从真实图像中推断也是可行的。具体来说，我们收集了 1,250 张肖像图像的数据集，并带有两种类型的注释。进一步设计了一个学习框架，将真实图像传输到链图和深度图。值得注意的是，我们的新数据集的额外好处是 3D 头发建模的第一个定量指标。我们的实验表明，HairStep 缩小了合成与真实之间的域差距，并在单视图 3D 头发重建方面实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于发丝和深度图的中间表示（HairStep），用于解决单视角3D发型建模中合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距问题。 Yujian Zheng,Zirong Jin,Moran Li,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Shuguang Cui,Xiaoguang Han cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Kolpakov,Michael Werman
title: Robust affine point matching via quadratic assignment on Grassmannians
title_zh: 通过格拉斯曼函数的二次分配实现鲁棒仿射点匹配
comment: 9 pages, 23 figures ; GitHub repository at https://github.com/sashakolpakov/roam ; added comparison to GrassGraph (https://doi.org/10.1109/TIP.2019.2959722); notably, GrassGraph quickly loses accuracy on our test examples with noise and occlusion ; to appear in Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: 9 pages, 23 figures ; GitHub repository at https://github.com/sashakolpakov/roam ; added comparison to GrassGraph (https://doi.org/10.1109/TIP.2019.2959722); notably, GrassGraph quickly loses accuracy on our test examples with noise and occlusion ; to appear in Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: Robust Affine Matching with Grassmannians (RoAM) is a new algorithm to perform affine registration of point clouds. The algorithm is based on minimizing the Frobenius distance between two elements of the Grassmannian. For this purpose, an indefinite relaxation of the Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP) is used, and several approaches to affine feature matching are studied and compared. Experiments demonstrate that RoAM is more robust to noise and point discrepancy than previous methods.
summary: Robust Affine Matching with Grassmannians (RoAM) is a new algorithm to perform affine registration of point clouds. The algorithm is based on minimizing the Frobenius distance between two elements of the Grassmannian. For this purpose, an indefinite relaxation of the Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP) is used, and several approaches to affine feature matching are studied and compared. Experiments demonstrate that RoAM is more robust to noise and point discrepancy than previous methods.
abstract_zh: 格拉斯曼稳健仿射匹配 (RoAM) 是一种执行点云仿射配准的新算法。该算法基于最小化格拉斯曼函数两个元素之间的弗罗贝尼乌斯距离。为此，使用了二次分配问题（QAP）的无限松弛，并研究和比较了几种仿射特征匹配方法。实验表明，RoAM 比以前的方法对噪声和点差异具有更强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Grassmannian上二次指派问题的鲁棒仿射点云配准算法RoAM，通过最小化Frobenius距离实现点云对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有点云配准方法在噪声干扰和点集差异场景下鲁棒性不足，亟需更稳定的仿射匹配算法。
AI.method: 将二次指派问题(QAP)进行不定松弛，通过Grassmannian流形上Frobenius距离最小化实现点集对齐，并对比多种仿射特征匹配策略。
AI.result: 实验验证RoAM在噪声环境和点集差异情况下相较传统方法具有更优的配准鲁棒性与精度。
AI.conclusion: RoAM算法通过QAP松弛与Grassmannian几何建模，有效提升了仿射点匹配在复杂场景下的稳定性与可靠性。

authors_text: Junyan Wang,Zhenhong Sun,Yichen Qian,Dong Gong,Xiuyu Sun,Ming Lin,Maurice Pagnucco,Yang Song
title: Maximizing Spatio-Temporal Entropy of Deep 3D CNNs for Efficient Video Recognition
title_zh: 最大化深度 3D CNN 的时空熵以实现高效视频识别
comment: This manuscript has been accepted at ICLR 2023
comments: This manuscript has been accepted at ICLR 2023
abstract: 3D convolution neural networks (CNNs) have been the prevailing option for video recognition. To capture the temporal information, 3D convolutions are computed along the sequences, leading to cubically growing and expensive computations. To reduce the computational cost, previous methods resort to manually designed 3D/2D CNN structures with approximations or automatic search, which sacrifice the modeling ability or make training time-consuming. In this work, we propose to automatically design efficient 3D CNN architectures via a novel training-free neural architecture search approach tailored for 3D CNNs considering the model complexity. To measure the expressiveness of 3D CNNs efficiently, we formulate a 3D CNN as an information system and derive an analytic entropy score, based on the Maximum Entropy Principle. Specifically, we propose a spatio-temporal entropy score (STEntr-Score) with a refinement factor to handle the discrepancy of visual information in spatial and temporal dimensions, through dynamically leveraging the correlation between the feature map size and kernel size depth-wisely. Highly efficient and expressive 3D CNN architectures, \ie entropy-based 3D CNNs (E3D family), can then be efficiently searched by maximizing the STEntr-Score under a given computational budget, via an evolutionary algorithm without training the network parameters. Extensive experiments on Something-Something V1\&V2 and Kinetics400 demonstrate that the E3D family achieves state-of-the-art performance with higher computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/alibaba/lightweight-neural-architecture-search.
summary: 3D convolution neural networks (CNNs) have been the prevailing option for video recognition. To capture the temporal information, 3D convolutions are computed along the sequences, leading to cubically growing and expensive computations. To reduce the computational cost, previous methods resort to manually designed 3D/2D CNN structures with approximations or automatic search, which sacrifice the modeling ability or make training time-consuming. In this work, we propose to automatically design efficient 3D CNN architectures via a novel training-free neural architecture search approach tailored for 3D CNNs considering the model complexity. To measure the expressiveness of 3D CNNs efficiently, we formulate a 3D CNN as an information system and derive an analytic entropy score, based on the Maximum Entropy Principle. Specifically, we propose a spatio-temporal entropy score (STEntr-Score) with a refinement factor to handle the discrepancy of visual information in spatial and temporal dimensions, through dynamically leveraging the correlation between the feature map size and kernel size depth-wisely. Highly efficient and expressive 3D CNN architectures, \ie entropy-based 3D CNNs (E3D family), can then be efficiently searched by maximizing the STEntr-Score under a given computational budget, via an evolutionary algorithm without training the network parameters. Extensive experiments on Something-Something V1\&V2 and Kinetics400 demonstrate that the E3D family achieves state-of-the-art performance with higher computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/alibaba/lightweight-neural-architecture-search.
abstract_zh: 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成为视频识别的主流选择。为了捕获时间信息，沿着序列计算 3D 卷积，导致立方体增长且昂贵的计算。为了降低计算成本，以前的方法采用手动设计的 3D/2D CNN 结构并进行近似或自动搜索，这会牺牲建模能力或使训练耗时。在这项工作中，我们建议通过一种新颖的免训练神经架构搜索方法来自动设计高效的 3D CNN 架构，该方法专为 3D CNN 量身定制，考虑到模型的复杂性。为了有效地测量 3D CNN 的表达能力，我们将 3D CNN 制定为信息系统，并根据最大熵原理得出分析熵分数。具体来说，我们提出了一种具有细化因子的时空熵评分（STEntr-Score），通过动态地利用特征图大小和内核大小深度之间的相关性来处理空间和时间维度上视觉信息的差异。然后，可以通过进化算法在给定的计算预算下最大化 STEntr-Score，从而有效地搜索高效且富有表现力的 3D CNN 架构，即基于熵的 3D CNN（E3D 系列），而无需训练网络参数。在 Something-Something V1\&V2 和 Kinetics400 上进行的大量实验表明，E3D 系列以更高的计算效率实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/alibaba/lightweight-neural-architecture-search 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大熵原理的训练-free神经架构搜索方法，用于设计高效的3D卷积神经网络以提升视频识别效率。
AI.motivation: 传统3D CNN计算成本高且手动设计结构会牺牲建模能力或增加训练耗时，需自动搜索高效架构以平衡性能与计算开销。
AI.method: 将3D CNN建模为信息系统，提出时空熵评分（STEntr-Score）并通过进化算法在计算预算下搜索最优架构。
AI.result: E3D系列模型在Something-Something V1/V2和Kinetics400数据集上达到SOTA性能，计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于熵的架构搜索方法能有效兼顾视频识别的表达能力与计算效率，为轻量级3D CNN设计提供新思路。

search_text: Maximizing Spatio-Temporal Entropy of Deep 3D CNNs for Efficient Video Recognition 最大化深度 3D CNN 的时空熵以实现高效视频识别 3D convolution neural networks (CNNs) have been the prevailing option for video recognition. To capture the temporal information, 3D convolutions are computed along the sequences, leading to cubically growing and expensive computations. To reduce the computational cost, previous methods resort to manually designed 3D/2D CNN structures with approximations or automatic search, which sacrifice the modeling ability or make training time-consuming. In this work, we propose to automatically design efficient 3D CNN architectures via a novel training-free neural architecture search approach tailored for 3D CNNs considering the model complexity. To measure the expressiveness of 3D CNNs efficiently, we formulate a 3D CNN as an information system and derive an analytic entropy score, based on the Maximum Entropy Principle. Specifically, we propose a spatio-temporal entropy score (STEntr-Score) with a refinement factor to handle the discrepancy of visual information in spatial and temporal dimensions, through dynamically leveraging the correlation between the feature map size and kernel size depth-wisely. Highly efficient and expressive 3D CNN architectures, \ie entropy-based 3D CNNs (E3D family), can then be efficiently searched by maximizing the STEntr-Score under a given computational budget, via an evolutionary algorithm without training the network parameters. Extensive experiments on Something-Something V1\&V2 and Kinetics400 demonstrate that the E3D family achieves state-of-the-art performance with higher computational efficiency. authors_text: Will Rowan,Patrik Huber,Nick Pears,Andrew Keeling
title: Text2Face: A Multi-Modal 3D Face Model
title_zh: Text2Face：多模态 3D 面部模型
abstract: We present the first 3D morphable modelling approach, whereby 3D face shape can be directly and completely defined using a textual prompt. Building on work in multi-modal learning, we extend the FLAME head model to a common image-and-text latent space. This allows for direct 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) parameter generation and therefore shape manipulation from textual descriptions. Our method, Text2Face, has many applications; for example: generating police photofits where the input is already in natural language. It further enables multi-modal 3DMM image fitting to sketches and sculptures, as well as images.
summary: We present the first 3D morphable modelling approach, whereby 3D face shape can be directly and completely defined using a textual prompt. Building on work in multi-modal learning, we extend the FLAME head model to a common image-and-text latent space. This allows for direct 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) parameter generation and therefore shape manipulation from textual descriptions. Our method, Text2Face, has many applications; for example: generating police photofits where the input is already in natural language. It further enables multi-modal 3DMM image fitting to sketches and sculptures, as well as images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个 3D 变形建模方法，可以使用文本提示直接完整地定义 3D 脸部形状。在多模态学习工作的基础上，我们将 FLAME 头部模型扩展到公共图像和文本潜在空间。这允许直接生成 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 参数，从而根据文本描述进行形状操作。我们的方法 Text2Face 有很多应用；例如：生成警察照片，其中输入已经是自然语言。它还可以进一步实现对草图、雕塑以及图像的多模式 3DMM 图像拟合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Text2Face的多模态3D面部模型，能够直接根据文本提示生成完整的3D面部形状。
AI.motivation: 传统3D面部建模依赖图像输入，而Text2Face通过自然语言描述直接生成模型，解决了文本到3D形态转换的难题，尤其适用于警用素描等场景。
AI.method: 基于多模态学习，将FLAME头模型扩展至图像与文本的联合潜在空间，实现从文本描述直接生成3D形态参数。
AI.result: 成功实现文本到3D面部模型的生成，并支持多模态拟合至草图、雕塑及图像，验证了方法的灵活性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: Text2Face为文本驱动的3D面部生成提供了有效方案，拓宽了3DMM在多模态场景中的应用边界。

search_text: Text2Face: A Multi-Modal 3D Face Model Text2Face：多模态 3D 面部模型 We present the first 3D morphable modelling approach, whereby 3D face shape can be directly and completely defined using a textual prompt. Building on work in multi-modal learning, we extend the FLAME head model to a common image-and-text latent space. This allows for direct 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) parameter generation and therefore shape manipulation from textual descriptions. Our method, Text2Face, has many applications; for example: generating police photofits where the input is already in natural language. It further enables multi-modal 3DMM image fitting to sketches and sculptures, as well as images. 我们提出了第一个 3D 变形建模方法，可以使用文本提示直接完整地定义 3D 脸部形状。在多模态学习工作的基础上，我们将 FLAME 头部模型扩展到公共图像和文本潜在空间。这允许直接生成 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 参数，从而根据文本描述进行形状操作。我们的方法 Text2Face 有很多应用；例如：生成警察照片，其中输入已经是自然语言。它还可以进一步实现对草图、雕塑以及图像的多模式 3DMM 图像拟合。 本文提出了一种名为Text2Face的多模态3D面部模型，能够直接根据文本提示生成完整的3D面部形状。 Will Rowan,Patrik Huber,Nick Pears,Andrew Keeling cs.CV

authors_text: Ashwin Jacob,Diptapriyo Majumdar,Venkatesh Raman
title: Expansion Lemma -- Variations and Applications to Polynomial-Time Preprocessing
title_zh: 展开引理——多项式时间预处理的变体和应用
comment: Accepted to Algorithms - Special Issue "Surveys in Algorithm Analysis and Complexity Theory"
comments: Accepted to Algorithms - Special Issue "Surveys in Algorithm Analysis and Complexity Theory"
abstract: In parameterized complexity, it is well-known that a parameterized problem is fixed-parameter tractable if and only if it has a kernel - an instance equivalent to the input instance, whose size is just a function of the parameter. The size of the kernel can be exponential or worse, resulting in a quest for fixed-parameter tractable problems with a polynomial-sized kernel. The developments in machinery to show lower bounds for the sizes of the kernel gave rise to the question of the asymptotically optimum size for the kernel of fixed-parameter tractable problems. In this article, we survey a tool called expansion lemma that helps in reducing the size of the kernel. Its early origin is in the form of Crown Decomposition for obtaining linear kernel for the Vertex Cover problem and the specific lemma was identified as the tool behind an optimal kernel with O(k^2) vertices and edges for the UNDIRECTED FEEDBACK VERTEX SET problem. Since then, several variations and extensions of the tool have been discovered. We survey them along with their applications in this article.
summary: In parameterized complexity, it is well-known that a parameterized problem is fixed-parameter tractable if and only if it has a kernel - an instance equivalent to the input instance, whose size is just a function of the parameter. The size of the kernel can be exponential or worse, resulting in a quest for fixed-parameter tractable problems with a polynomial-sized kernel. The developments in machinery to show lower bounds for the sizes of the kernel gave rise to the question of the asymptotically optimum size for the kernel of fixed-parameter tractable problems. In this article, we survey a tool called expansion lemma that helps in reducing the size of the kernel. Its early origin is in the form of Crown Decomposition for obtaining linear kernel for the Vertex Cover problem and the specific lemma was identified as the tool behind an optimal kernel with O(k^2) vertices and edges for the UNDIRECTED FEEDBACK VERTEX SET problem. Since then, several variations and extensions of the tool have been discovered. We survey them along with their applications in this article.
abstract_zh: 在参数化复杂性中，众所周知，参数化问题是固定参数可处理的，当且仅当它有一个内核——一个相当于输入实例的实例，其大小只是参数的函数。内核的大小可能是指数级或更糟，导致需要使用多项式大小的内核来寻求固定参数的可处理问题。显示核大小下限的机器发展引起了固定参数可处理问题的核渐近最佳大小的问题。在本文中，我们研究了一种称为扩展引理的工具，它有助于减小内核的大小。它的早期起源是冠分解的形式，用于获得顶点覆盖问题的线性内核，并且特定引理被确定为用于无向反馈顶点集问题的具有 O(k^2) 个顶点和边的最佳内核背后的工具。从那时起，人们发现了该工具的几种变体和扩展。我们在本文中对它们及其应用进行了调查。

AI.tldr: 综述扩展引理的变体及其在多项式时间预处理中的应用，以优化固定参数可解问题的内核大小。
AI.motivation: 为固定参数可解问题寻找更小的多项式大小内核，以提高算法效率。
AI.method: 通过回顾扩展引理的起源、变体及在不同问题中的应用，如顶点覆盖和无向反馈顶点集问题，展示其在减少内核大小中的作用。
AI.result: 总结了扩展引理的多种变体，并展示了其在多个问题中实现更优内核的实例，如O(k²)大小的无向反馈顶点集内核。
AI.conclusion: 扩展引理是优化内核大小的关键工具，未来需进一步探索其在更多问题中的应用。

authors_text: Li Qingqing,Yu Xianjia,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Robust Multi-Modal Multi-LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and Mapping for Indoor Environments
title_zh: 适用于室内环境的稳健多模态多 LiDAR 惯性里程计和测绘
abstract: Integrating multiple LiDAR sensors can significantly enhance a robot's perception of the environment, enabling it to capture adequate measurements for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Indeed, solid-state LiDARs can bring in high resolution at a low cost to traditional spinning LiDARs in robotic applications. However, their reduced field of view (FoV) limits performance, particularly indoors. In this paper, we propose a tightly-coupled multi-modal multi-LiDAR-inertial SLAM system for surveying and mapping tasks. By taking advantage of both solid-state and spinnings LiDARs, and built-in inertial measurement units (IMU), we achieve both robust and low-drift ego-estimation as well as high-resolution maps in diverse challenging indoor environments (e.g., small, featureless rooms). First, we use spatial-temporal calibration modules to align the timestamp and calibrate extrinsic parameters between sensors. Then, we extract two groups of feature points including edge and plane points, from LiDAR data. Next, with pre-integrated IMU data, an undistortion module is applied to the LiDAR point cloud data. Finally, the undistorted point clouds are merged into one point cloud and processed with a sliding window based optimization module. From extensive experiment results, our method shows competitive performance with state-of-the-art spinning-LiDAR-only or solid-state-LiDAR-only SLAM systems in diverse environments. More results, code, and dataset can be found at \href{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}.
summary: Integrating multiple LiDAR sensors can significantly enhance a robot's perception of the environment, enabling it to capture adequate measurements for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Indeed, solid-state LiDARs can bring in high resolution at a low cost to traditional spinning LiDARs in robotic applications. However, their reduced field of view (FoV) limits performance, particularly indoors. In this paper, we propose a tightly-coupled multi-modal multi-LiDAR-inertial SLAM system for surveying and mapping tasks. By taking advantage of both solid-state and spinnings LiDARs, and built-in inertial measurement units (IMU), we achieve both robust and low-drift ego-estimation as well as high-resolution maps in diverse challenging indoor environments (e.g., small, featureless rooms). First, we use spatial-temporal calibration modules to align the timestamp and calibrate extrinsic parameters between sensors. Then, we extract two groups of feature points including edge and plane points, from LiDAR data. Next, with pre-integrated IMU data, an undistortion module is applied to the LiDAR point cloud data. Finally, the undistorted point clouds are merged into one point cloud and processed with a sliding window based optimization module. From extensive experiment results, our method shows competitive performance with state-of-the-art spinning-LiDAR-only or solid-state-LiDAR-only SLAM systems in diverse environments. More results, code, and dataset can be found at \href{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}.
abstract_zh: 集成多个 LiDAR 传感器可以显着增强机器人对环境的感知，使其能够捕获足够的测量数据以实现同步定位和建图 (SLAM)。事实上，固态激光雷达可以以低成本为机器人应用中的传统旋转激光雷达带来高分辨率。然而，它们的视野 (FoV) 减小限制了性能，尤其是在室内。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于测绘任务的紧耦合多模态多激光雷达惯性 SLAM 系统。通过利用固态和旋转激光雷达以及内置惯性测量单元 (IMU)，我们在各种具有挑战性的室内环境（例如，狭小、无特色的房间）中实现了稳健且低漂移的自我估计以及高分辨率地图。首先，我们使用时空校准模块来对齐时间戳并校准传感器之间的外部参数。然后，我们从激光雷达数据中提取两组特征点，包括边缘点和平面点。接下来，利用预先集成的 IMU 数据，将去畸变模块应用于 LiDAR 点云数据。最后，将未失真的点云合并为一个点云，并使用基于滑动窗口的优化模块进行处理。从大量的实验结果来看，我们的方法在不同环境中显示出与最先进的仅旋转激光雷达或仅固态激光雷达 SLAM 系统相比具有竞争力的性能。更多结果、代码和数据集可以在 \href{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多模态多LiDAR和惯性测量单元（IMU）的室内环境SLAM系统，以提高定位和建图的鲁棒性与精度。
AI.motivation: 固态LiDAR成本低但视场角有限，传统旋转LiDAR虽视场广但成本高，需融合两者优势并结合IMU以提升室内复杂环境下的SLAM性能。
AI.method: 通过时空校准模块对齐传感器时间戳与外参，提取LiDAR点云的边缘与平面特征，利用预积分IMU数据进行点云去畸变，合并后采用滑动窗口优化模块处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种室内场景下性能优于现有纯固态或纯旋转LiDAR的SLAM系统，且提供了开源代码与数据集。
AI.conclusion: 多模态LiDAR与IMU的紧耦合方法能有效提升复杂室内环境下的SLAM鲁棒性与地图分辨率，为低成本高精度建图提供新方案。

search_text: Robust Multi-Modal Multi-LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and Mapping for Indoor Environments 适用于室内环境的稳健多模态多 LiDAR 惯性里程计和测绘 Integrating multiple LiDAR sensors can significantly enhance a robot's perception of the environment, enabling it to capture adequate measurements for simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). Indeed, solid-state LiDARs can bring in high resolution at a low cost to traditional spinning LiDARs in robotic applications. However, their reduced field of view (FoV) limits performance, particularly indoors. In this paper, we propose a tightly-coupled multi-modal multi-LiDAR-inertial SLAM system for surveying and mapping tasks. By taking advantage of both solid-state and spinnings LiDARs, and built-in inertial measurement units (IMU), we achieve both robust and low-drift ego-estimation as well as high-resolution maps in diverse challenging indoor environments (e.g., small, featureless rooms). First, we use spatial-temporal calibration modules to align the timestamp and calibrate extrinsic parameters between sensors. Then, we extract two groups of feature points including edge and plane points, from LiDAR data. Next, with pre-integrated IMU data, an undistortion module is applied to the LiDAR point cloud data. Finally, the undistorted point clouds are merged into one point cloud and processed with a sliding window based optimization module. From extensive experiment results, our method shows competitive performance with state-of-the-art spinning-LiDAR-only or solid-state-LiDAR-only SLAM systems in diverse environments. More results, code, and dataset can be found at \href{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}. 集成多个 LiDAR 传感器可以显着增强机器人对环境的感知，使其能够捕获足够的测量数据以实现同步定位和建图 (SLAM)。事实上，固态激光雷达可以以低成本为机器人应用中的传统旋转激光雷达带来高分辨率。然而，它们的视野 (FoV) 减小限制了性能，尤其是在室内。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于测绘任务的紧耦合多模态多激光雷达惯性 SLAM 系统。通过利用固态和旋转激光雷达以及内置惯性测量单元 (IMU)，我们在各种具有挑战性的室内环境（例如，狭小、无特色的房间）中实现了稳健且低漂移的自我估计以及高分辨率地图。首先，我们使用时空校准模块来对齐时间戳并校准传感器之间的外部参数。然后，我们从激光雷达数据中提取两组特征点，包括边缘点和平面点。接下来，利用预先集成的 IMU 数据，将去畸变模块应用于 LiDAR 点云数据。最后，将未失真的点云合并为一个点云，并使用基于滑动窗口的优化模块进行处理。从大量的实验结果来看，我们的方法在不同环境中显示出与最先进的仅旋转激光雷达或仅固态激光雷达 SLAM 系统相比具有竞争力的性能。更多结果、代码和数据集可以在 \href{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam}{https://github.com/TIERS/multi-modal-loam} 找到。 本文提出了一种结合多模态多LiDAR和惯性测量单元（IMU）的室内环境SLAM系统，以提高定位和建图的鲁棒性与精度。 Li Qingqing,Yu Xianjia,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund cs.RO

authors_text: Bing Ma
title: Mining both Commonality and Specificity from Multiple Documents for Multi-Document Summarization
title_zh: 从多个文档中挖掘共性和特殊性以进行多文档摘要
abstract: The multi-document summarization task requires the designed summarizer to generate a short text that covers the important information of original documents and satisfies content diversity. This paper proposes a multi-document summarization approach based on hierarchical clustering of documents. It utilizes the constructed class tree of documents to extract both the sentences reflecting the commonality of all documents and the sentences reflecting the specificity of some subclasses of these documents for generating a summary, so as to satisfy the coverage and diversity requirements of multi-document summarization. Comparative experiments with different variant approaches on DUC'2002-2004 datasets prove the effectiveness of mining both the commonality and specificity of documents for multi-document summarization. Experiments on DUC'2004 and Multi-News datasets show that our approach achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art unsupervised and supervised approaches.
summary: The multi-document summarization task requires the designed summarizer to generate a short text that covers the important information of original documents and satisfies content diversity. This paper proposes a multi-document summarization approach based on hierarchical clustering of documents. It utilizes the constructed class tree of documents to extract both the sentences reflecting the commonality of all documents and the sentences reflecting the specificity of some subclasses of these documents for generating a summary, so as to satisfy the coverage and diversity requirements of multi-document summarization. Comparative experiments with different variant approaches on DUC'2002-2004 datasets prove the effectiveness of mining both the commonality and specificity of documents for multi-document summarization. Experiments on DUC'2004 and Multi-News datasets show that our approach achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art unsupervised and supervised approaches.
abstract_zh: 多文档摘要任务要求设计的摘要器生成覆盖原始文档重要信息并满足内容多样性的短文本。本文提出了一种基于文档层次聚类的多文档摘要方法。它利用构建的文档类树，提取反映所有文档共性的句子和反映这些文档某些子类特殊性的句子来生成摘要，从而满足多文档摘要的覆盖性和多样性要求。在 DUC'2002-2004 数据集上使用不同变体方法进行的比较实验证明了挖掘文档的共性和特异性以进行多文档摘要的有效性。 DUC'2004 和 Multi-News 数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的无监督和监督方法相比，我们的方法实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次聚类的多文档摘要方法，通过挖掘文档的共性与特性来生成涵盖重要信息且满足多样性的摘要。
AI.motivation: 多文档摘要需兼顾信息覆盖与内容多样性，传统方法常忽略文档间的共性与子类特性，导致摘要不够全面。
AI.method: 构建文档类树进行层次聚类，提取反映全局共性的句子和子类特性的句子，结合生成摘要。
AI.result: 在DUC'2002-2004数据集上验证有效性，在DUC'2004和Multi-News数据集上表现与先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 融合共性与特异性可提升多文档摘要质量，该方法在覆盖性和多样性上具有竞争力。

authors_text: Jiguo Li,Tianzi Zhang,Xiaobin Liu,Lirong Zheng
title: Time-frequency Network for Robust Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 用于鲁棒说话人识别的时频网络
abstract: The wide deployment of speech-based biometric systems usually demands high-performance speaker recognition algorithms. However, most of the prior works for speaker recognition either process the speech in the frequency domain or time domain, which may produce suboptimal results because both time and frequency domains are important for speaker recognition. In this paper, we attempt to analyze the speech signal in both time and frequency domains and propose the time-frequency network~(TFN) for speaker recognition by extracting and fusing the features in the two domains. Based on the recent advance of deep neural networks, we propose a convolution neural network to encode the raw speech waveform and the frequency spectrum into domain-specific features, which are then fused and transformed into a classification feature space for speaker recognition. Experimental results on the publicly available datasets TIMIT and LibriSpeech show that our framework is effective to combine the information in the two domains and performs better than the state-of-the-art methods for speaker recognition.
summary: The wide deployment of speech-based biometric systems usually demands high-performance speaker recognition algorithms. However, most of the prior works for speaker recognition either process the speech in the frequency domain or time domain, which may produce suboptimal results because both time and frequency domains are important for speaker recognition. In this paper, we attempt to analyze the speech signal in both time and frequency domains and propose the time-frequency network~(TFN) for speaker recognition by extracting and fusing the features in the two domains. Based on the recent advance of deep neural networks, we propose a convolution neural network to encode the raw speech waveform and the frequency spectrum into domain-specific features, which are then fused and transformed into a classification feature space for speaker recognition. Experimental results on the publicly available datasets TIMIT and LibriSpeech show that our framework is effective to combine the information in the two domains and performs better than the state-of-the-art methods for speaker recognition.
abstract_zh: 基于语音的生物识别系统的广泛部署通常需要高性能的说话人识别算法。然而，大多数先前的说话人识别工作要么在频域或时域中处理语音，这可能会产生次优结果，因为时域和频域对于说话人识别都很重要。在本文中，我们尝试分析时域和频域的语音信号，并通过提取和融合两个域的特征提出用于说话人识别的时频网络~（TFN）。基于深度神经网络的最新进展，我们提出了一种卷积神经网络，将原始语音波形和频谱编码为特定领域的特征，然后将其融合并转换为用于说话人识别的分类特征空间。在公开数据集 TIMIT 和 LibriSpeech 上的实验结果表明，我们的框架可以有效地结合两个领域的信息，并且比最先进的说话人识别方法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合时间域和频率域特征的时间-频率网络（TFN），用于提升说话人识别的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人识别方法仅单独处理时间域或频率域信号，可能因忽略另一域的关键信息而表现欠佳。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络，设计卷积神经网络分别提取语音波形和频谱的域特定特征，并通过融合策略生成分类特征空间。
AI.result: 在TIMIT和LibriSpeech数据集上实验表明，该框架有效结合双域信息，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间-频率特征融合能显著提升说话人识别效果，为多域信息联合建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Cedric Le Gentil,Ignacio Alzugaray,Teresa Vidal-Calleja
title: Continuous-Time Gaussian Process Motion-Compensation for Event-vision Pattern Tracking with Distance Fields
title_zh: 用于距离场事件视觉模式跟踪的连续时间高斯过程运动补偿
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: This work addresses the issue of motion compensation and pattern tracking in event camera data. An event camera generates asynchronous streams of events triggered independently by each of the pixels upon changes in the observed intensity. Providing great advantages in low-light and rapid-motion scenarios, such unconventional data present significant research challenges as traditional vision algorithms are not directly applicable to this sensing modality. The proposed method decomposes the tracking problem into a local SE(2) motion-compensation step followed by a homography registration of small motion-compensated event batches. The first component relies on Gaussian Process (GP) theory to model the continuous occupancy field of the events in the image plane and embed the camera trajectory in the covariance kernel function. In doing so, estimating the trajectory is done similarly to GP hyperparameter learning by maximising the log marginal likelihood of the data. The continuous occupancy fields are turned into distance fields and used as templates for homography-based registration. By benchmarking the proposed method against other state-of-the-art techniques, we show that our open-source implementation performs high-accuracy motion compensation and produces high-quality tracks in real-world scenarios.
summary: This work addresses the issue of motion compensation and pattern tracking in event camera data. An event camera generates asynchronous streams of events triggered independently by each of the pixels upon changes in the observed intensity. Providing great advantages in low-light and rapid-motion scenarios, such unconventional data present significant research challenges as traditional vision algorithms are not directly applicable to this sensing modality. The proposed method decomposes the tracking problem into a local SE(2) motion-compensation step followed by a homography registration of small motion-compensated event batches. The first component relies on Gaussian Process (GP) theory to model the continuous occupancy field of the events in the image plane and embed the camera trajectory in the covariance kernel function. In doing so, estimating the trajectory is done similarly to GP hyperparameter learning by maximising the log marginal likelihood of the data. The continuous occupancy fields are turned into distance fields and used as templates for homography-based registration. By benchmarking the proposed method against other state-of-the-art techniques, we show that our open-source implementation performs high-accuracy motion compensation and produces high-quality tracks in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了事件相机数据中的运动补偿和模式跟踪问题。事件相机根据观察到的强度变化生成由每个像素独立触发的异步事件流。这种非常规数据在低光和快速运动场景中具有巨大的优势，但也带来了重大的研究挑战，因为传统的视觉算法不能直接适用于这种传感模式。所提出的方法将跟踪问题分解为局部 SE(2) 运动补偿步骤，然后进行小运动补偿事件批次的单应性配准。第一个组件依靠高斯过程 (GP) 理论对图像平面中事件的连续占用场进行建模，并将相机轨迹嵌入到协方差核函数中。在此过程中，与 GP 超参数学习类似，通过最大化数据的对数边际似然来估计轨迹。连续占用字段转换为距离字段并用作基于单应性配准的模板。通过将所提出的方法与其他最先进的技术进行基准测试，我们表明我们的开源实现可以执行高精度运动补偿并在现实场景中产生高质量的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程和距离场的连续时间运动补偿方法，用于事件相机的模式跟踪。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在低光和高速运动场景中具有优势，但其异步数据特性导致传统视觉算法难以直接应用，需解决运动补偿与模式跟踪难题。
AI.method: 将跟踪问题分解为SE(2)运动补偿和单应性注册两步：利用高斯过程建模事件的连续占用场，嵌入相机轨迹至协方差核函数，并通过最大化对数边缘似然估计轨迹；将占用场转换为距离场作为模板进行单应性匹配。
AI.result: 开源实现相比现有技术在真实场景中实现了高精度运动补偿与高质量轨迹跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为事件视觉中的运动补偿与模式跟踪提供了有效解决方案，验证了连续时间建模与距离场模板的可行性。

search_text: Continuous-Time Gaussian Process Motion-Compensation for Event-vision Pattern Tracking with Distance Fields 用于距离场事件视觉模式跟踪的连续时间高斯过程运动补偿 This work addresses the issue of motion compensation and pattern tracking in event camera data. An event camera generates asynchronous streams of events triggered independently by each of the pixels upon changes in the observed intensity. Providing great advantages in low-light and rapid-motion scenarios, such unconventional data present significant research challenges as traditional vision algorithms are not directly applicable to this sensing modality. The proposed method decomposes the tracking problem into a local SE(2) motion-compensation step followed by a homography registration of small motion-compensated event batches. The first component relies on Gaussian Process (GP) theory to model the continuous occupancy field of the events in the image plane and embed the camera trajectory in the covariance kernel function. In doing so, estimating the trajectory is done similarly to GP hyperparameter learning by maximising the log marginal likelihood of the data. The continuous occupancy fields are turned into distance fields and used as templates for homography-based registration. By benchmarking the proposed method against other state-of-the-art techniques, we show that our open-source implementation performs high-accuracy motion compensation and produces high-quality tracks in real-world scenarios. 这项工作解决了事件相机数据中的运动补偿和模式跟踪问题。事件相机根据观察到的强度变化生成由每个像素独立触发的异步事件流。这种非常规数据在低光和快速运动场景中具有巨大的优势，但也带来了重大的研究挑战，因为传统的视觉算法不能直接适用于这种传感模式。所提出的方法将跟踪问题分解为局部 SE(2) 运动补偿步骤，然后进行小运动补偿事件批次的单应性配准。第一个组件依靠高斯过程 (GP) 理论对图像平面中事件的连续占用场进行建模，并将相机轨迹嵌入到协方差核函数中。在此过程中，与 GP 超参数学习类似，通过最大化数据的对数边际似然来估计轨迹。连续占用字段转换为距离字段并用作基于单应性配准的模板。通过将所提出的方法与其他最先进的技术进行基准测试，我们表明我们的开源实现可以执行高精度运动补偿并在现实场景中产生高质量的轨迹。 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程和距离场的连续时间运动补偿方法，用于事件相机的模式跟踪。 Cedric Le Gentil,Ignacio Alzugaray,Teresa Vidal-Calleja cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiaqi Wang,Shenglai Zeng,Zewei Long,Yaqing Wang,Houping Xiao,Fenglong Ma
title: Knowledge-Enhanced Semi-Supervised Federated Learning for Aggregating Heterogeneous Lightweight Clients in IoT
title_zh: 用于聚合物联网中异构轻量级客户端的知识增强半监督联邦学习
comment: This paper is acceptted by SDM-2023. Jiaqi Wang and Shenglai Zeng are of equal contribution
comments: This paper is acceptted by SDM-2023. Jiaqi Wang and Shenglai Zeng are of equal contribution
abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables multiple clients to train models collaboratively without sharing local data, which has achieved promising results in different areas, including the Internet of Things (IoT). However, end IoT devices do not have abilities to automatically annotate their collected data, which leads to the label shortage issue at the client side. To collaboratively train an FL model, we can only use a small number of labeled data stored on the server. This is a new yet practical scenario in federated learning, i.e., labels-at-server semi-supervised federated learning (SemiFL). Although several SemiFL approaches have been proposed recently, none of them can focus on the personalization issue in their model design. IoT environments make SemiFL more challenging, as we need to take device computational constraints and communication cost into consideration simultaneously. To tackle these new challenges together, we propose a novel SemiFL framework named pFedKnow. pFedKnow generates lightweight personalized client models via neural network pruning techniques to reduce communication cost. Moreover, it incorporates pretrained large models as prior knowledge to guide the aggregation of personalized client models and further enhance the framework performance. Experiment results on both image and text datasets show that the proposed pFedKnow outperforms state-of-the-art baselines as well as reducing considerable communication cost. The source code of the proposed pFedKnow is available at https://github.com/JackqqWang/pfedknow/tree/master.

However, end IoT devices do not have abilities to automatically annotate their collected data, which leads to the label shortage issue at the client side. To collaboratively train an FL model, we can only use a small number of labeled data stored on the server. IoT environments make SemiFL more challenging, as we need to take device computational constraints and communication cost into consideration simultaneously. To tackle these new challenges together, we propose a novel SemiFL framework named pFedKnow. pFedKnow generates lightweight personalized client models via neural network pruning techniques to reduce communication cost. Moreover, it incorporates pretrained large models as prior knowledge to guide the aggregation of personalized client models and further enhance the framework performance. Experiment results on both image and text datasets show that the proposed pFedKnow outperforms state-of-the-art baselines as well as reducing considerable communication cost. The source code of the proposed pFedKnow is available at https://github.com/JackqqWang/pfedknow/tree/master.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）使多个客户端能够在不共享本地数据的情况下协作训练模型，这在包括物联网（IoT）在内的不同领域取得了可喜的成果。然而，终端物联网设备不具备自动注释其收集的数据的能力，这导致了客户端标签短缺的问题。为了协同训练 FL 模型，我们只能使用服务器上存储的少量标记数据。这是联邦学习中一个新的但实用的场景，即服务器标签半监督联邦学习（SemiFL）。尽管最近提出了几种 SemiFL 方法，但它们都不能关注模型设计中的个性化问题。物联网环境使 SemiFL 更具挑战性，因为我们需要同时考虑设备计算限制和通信成本。为了共同应对这些新挑战，我们提出了一个名为 pFedKnow 的新型 SemiFL 框架。 pFedKnow 通过神经网络修剪技术生成轻量级个性化客户端模型，以降低通信成本。此外，它结合了预训练的大型模型作为先验知识，以指导个性化客户端模型的聚合并进一步增强框架性能。图像和文本数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的 pFedKnow 优于最先进的基线，并降低了相当大的通信成本。拟议的 pFedKnow 的源代码可在 https://github.com/JackqqWang/pfedknow/tree/master 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为pFedKnow的知识增强型半监督联邦学习框架，旨在解决物联网环境中异构轻量级客户端在标签短缺和计算通信约束下的个性化模型聚合问题。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备缺乏自动标注能力导致客户端标签稀缺，现有半监督联邦学习方法未考虑设备计算约束和通信成本，且忽视了个性化需求。
AI.method: 通过神经网络剪枝生成轻量级个性化模型以降低通信成本，并引入预训练大模型作为先验知识指导客户端模型聚合。
AI.result: 在图像和文本数据集上优于现有基线方法，显著降低了通信成本且保持较高性能。
AI.conclusion: pFedKnow通过模型剪枝与知识蒸馏结合，有效解决了物联网联邦学习中的标签稀缺、计算约束和个性化需求冲突问题。

authors_text: Jixiang Luo,Shaohui Li,Wenrui Dai,Chenglin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong
title: Learned Lossless Compression for JPEG via Frequency-Domain Prediction
title_zh: 通过频域预测学习 JPEG 无损压缩
abstract: JPEG images can be further compressed to enhance the storage and transmission of large-scale image datasets. Existing learned lossless compressors for RGB images cannot be well transferred to JPEG images due to the distinguishing distribution of DCT coefficients and raw pixels. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for learned lossless compression of JPEG images that achieves end-to-end optimized prediction of the distribution of decoded DCT coefficients. To enable learning in the frequency domain, DCT coefficients are partitioned into groups to utilize implicit local redundancy. An autoencoder-like architecture is designed based on the weight-shared blocks to realize entropy modeling of grouped DCT coefficients and independently compress the priors. We attempt to realize learned lossless compression of JPEG images in the frequency domain. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior or comparable performance in comparison to most recent lossless compressors with handcrafted context modeling for JPEG images.
summary: JPEG images can be further compressed to enhance the storage and transmission of large-scale image datasets. Existing learned lossless compressors for RGB images cannot be well transferred to JPEG images due to the distinguishing distribution of DCT coefficients and raw pixels. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for learned lossless compression of JPEG images that achieves end-to-end optimized prediction of the distribution of decoded DCT coefficients. To enable learning in the frequency domain, DCT coefficients are partitioned into groups to utilize implicit local redundancy. An autoencoder-like architecture is designed based on the weight-shared blocks to realize entropy modeling of grouped DCT coefficients and independently compress the priors. We attempt to realize learned lossless compression of JPEG images in the frequency domain. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior or comparable performance in comparison to most recent lossless compressors with handcrafted context modeling for JPEG images.
abstract_zh: JPEG图像可以进一步压缩，以增强大规模图像数据集的存储和传输。由于 DCT 系数和原始像素的分布不同，现有的 RGB 图像学习无损压缩器无法很好地迁移到 JPEG 图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 JPEG 图像学习无损压缩的新颖框架，该框架实现了解码 DCT 系数分布的端到端优化预测。为了实现频域学习，DCT 系数被分成组以利用隐式局部冗余。基于权重共享块设计了类似自动编码器的架构，以实现分组DCT系数的熵建模并独立压缩先验。我们尝试在频域中实现 JPEG 图像的学习无损压缩。实验结果表明，与最新的采用 JPEG 图像手工上下文建模的无损压缩器相比，所提出的框架实现了卓越或相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率域预测的JPEG图像学习无损压缩框架，通过优化DCT系数分布预测实现端到端压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB图像学习压缩器难以直接应用于JPEG图像，因DCT系数分布与原始像素存在显著差异，需针对性设计压缩方法。
AI.method: 将DCT系数分组利用局部冗余，设计基于共享权重块的自编码器架构，对分组系数进行熵建模并独立压缩先验信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在JPEG图像无损压缩性能上优于或接近大多数基于手工设计上下文建模的最新压缩器。
AI.conclusion: 频率域预测框架有效解决了JPEG图像压缩难题，验证了在频率域进行学习无损压缩的可行性与优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率域预测的JPEG图像学习无损压缩框架，通过优化DCT系数分布预测实现端到端压缩。
ai_content.motivation: 现有RGB图像学习压缩器难以直接应用于JPEG图像，因DCT系数分布与原始像素存在显著差异，需针对性设计压缩方法。
ai_content.method: 将DCT系数分组利用局部冗余，设计基于共享权重块的自编码器架构，对分组系数进行熵建模并独立压缩先验信息。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该框架在JPEG图像无损压缩性能上优于或接近大多数基于手工设计上下文建模的最新压缩器。
ai_content.conclusion: 频率域预测框架有效解决了JPEG图像压缩难题，验证了在频率域进行学习无损压缩的可行性与优势。

search_text: Learned Lossless Compression for JPEG via Frequency-Domain Prediction 通过频域预测学习 JPEG 无损压缩 JPEG images can be further compressed to enhance the storage and transmission of large-scale image datasets. Existing learned lossless compressors for RGB images cannot be well transferred to JPEG images due to the distinguishing distribution of DCT coefficients and raw pixels. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for learned lossless compression of JPEG images that achieves end-to-end optimized prediction of the distribution of decoded DCT coefficients. To enable learning in the frequency domain, DCT coefficients are partitioned into groups to utilize implicit local redundancy. An autoencoder-like architecture is designed based on the weight-shared blocks to realize entropy modeling of grouped DCT coefficients and independently compress the priors. We attempt to realize learned lossless compression of JPEG images in the frequency domain. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior or comparable performance in comparison to most recent lossless compressors with handcrafted context modeling for JPEG images. JPEG图像可以进一步压缩，以增强大规模图像数据集的存储和传输。由于 DCT 系数和原始像素的分布不同，现有的 RGB 图像学习无损压缩器无法很好地迁移到 JPEG 图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 JPEG 图像学习无损压缩的新颖框架，该框架实现了解码 DCT 系数分布的端到端优化预测。为了实现频域学习，DCT 系数被分成组以利用隐式局部冗余。基于权重共享块设计了类似自动编码器的架构，以实现分组DCT系数的熵建模并独立压缩先验。我们尝试在频域中实现 JPEG 图像的学习无损压缩。实验结果表明，与最新的采用 JPEG 图像手工上下文建模的无损压缩器相比，所提出的框架实现了卓越或相当的性能。 本文提出了一种基于频率域预测的JPEG图像学习无损压缩框架，通过优化DCT系数分布预测实现端到端压缩。 Jixiang Luo,Shaohui Li,Wenrui Dai,Chenglin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Amir Shirian,Mona Ahmadian,Krishna Somandepalli,Tanaya Guha
title: Heterogeneous Graph Learning for Acoustic Event Classification
title_zh: 用于声学事件分类的异构图学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.07935
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.07935
abstract: Heterogeneous graphs provide a compact, efficient, and scalable way to model data involving multiple disparate modalities. This makes modeling audiovisual data using heterogeneous graphs an attractive option. However, graph structure does not appear naturally in audiovisual data. Graphs for audiovisual data are constructed manually which is both difficult and sub-optimal. In this work, we address this problem by (i) proposing a parametric graph construction strategy for the intra-modal edges, and (ii) learning the crossmodal edges. To this end, we develop a new model, heterogeneous graph crossmodal network (HGCN) that learns the crossmodal edges. Our proposed model can adapt to various spatial and temporal scales owing to its parametric construction, while the learnable crossmodal edges effectively connect the relevant nodes across modalities. Experiments on a large benchmark dataset (AudioSet) show that our model is state-of-the-art (0.53 mean average precision), outperforming transformer-based models and other graph-based models.
summary: Heterogeneous graphs provide a compact, efficient, and scalable way to model data involving multiple disparate modalities. This makes modeling audiovisual data using heterogeneous graphs an attractive option. However, graph structure does not appear naturally in audiovisual data. Graphs for audiovisual data are constructed manually which is both difficult and sub-optimal. In this work, we address this problem by (i) proposing a parametric graph construction strategy for the intra-modal edges, and (ii) learning the crossmodal edges. To this end, we develop a new model, heterogeneous graph crossmodal network (HGCN) that learns the crossmodal edges. Our proposed model can adapt to various spatial and temporal scales owing to its parametric construction, while the learnable crossmodal edges effectively connect the relevant nodes across modalities. Experiments on a large benchmark dataset (AudioSet) show that our model is state-of-the-art (0.53 mean average precision), outperforming transformer-based models and other graph-based models.
abstract_zh: 异构图提供了一种紧凑、高效且可扩展的方式来对涉及多种不同模式的数据进行建模。这使得使用异构图对视听数据进行建模成为一个有吸引力的选择。然而，图结构并不自然地出现在视听数据中。视听数据的图表是手动构建的，这既困难又次优。在这项工作中，我们通过（i）提出模态内边缘的参数化图构建策略，以及（ii）学习跨模态边缘来解决这个问题。为此，我们开发了一种新模型，异构图跨模态网络（HGCN），用于学习跨模态边缘。我们提出的模型由于其参数化结构可以适应各种空间和时间尺度，而可学习的跨模态边缘有效地跨模态连接相关节点。在大型基准数据集 (AudioSet) 上进行的实验表明，我们的模型是最先进的（平均平均精度为 0.53），优于基于 Transformer 的模型和其他基于图的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异构图学习的声学事件分类方法，通过自动构建图结构并学习跨模态连接来提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 异构图能有效建模多模态数据，但音频视觉数据的图结构需手动构建，存在困难且效果不佳，亟需自动化的图构建方法。
AI.method: 提出参数化图构建策略生成模态内边，并设计异构图跨模态网络（HGCN）学习跨模态边，实现对时空尺度的自适应建模。
AI.result: 在AudioSet数据集上达到0.53的平均精度，优于基于Transformer及其他图模型的方法，成为当前最优方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动图构建与跨模态学习，本文方法有效提升了声学事件分类性能，为多模态图学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amihay Elboher,Ava Bensoussan,Erez Karpas,Wheeler Ruml,Shahaf S. Shperberg,Solomon E. Shimony
title: A Formal Metareasoning Model of Concurrent Planning and Execution
title_zh: 并行计划和执行的正式元推理模型
abstract: Agents that plan and act in the real world must deal with the fact that time passes as they are planning. When timing is tight, there may be insufficient time to complete the search for a plan before it is time to act. By commencing execution before search concludes, one gains time to search by making planning and execution concurrent. However, this incurs the risk of making incorrect action choices, especially if actions are irreversible. This tradeoff between opportunity and risk is the problem addressed in this paper. Our main contribution is to formally define this setting as an abstract metareasoning problem. We find that the abstract problem is intractable. However, we identify special cases that are solvable in polynomial time, develop greedy solution algorithms, and, through tests on instances derived from search problems, find several methods that achieve promising practical performance. This work lays the foundation for a principled time-aware executive that concurrently plans and executes.
summary: Agents that plan and act in the real world must deal with the fact that time passes as they are planning. When timing is tight, there may be insufficient time to complete the search for a plan before it is time to act. By commencing execution before search concludes, one gains time to search by making planning and execution concurrent. However, this incurs the risk of making incorrect action choices, especially if actions are irreversible. This tradeoff between opportunity and risk is the problem addressed in this paper. Our main contribution is to formally define this setting as an abstract metareasoning problem. We find that the abstract problem is intractable. However, we identify special cases that are solvable in polynomial time, develop greedy solution algorithms, and, through tests on instances derived from search problems, find several methods that achieve promising practical performance. This work lays the foundation for a principled time-aware executive that concurrently plans and executes.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中计划和行动的智能体必须应对计划中时间流逝的事实。当时间紧迫时，在采取行动之前可能没有足够的时间来完成计划的搜索。通过在搜索结束之前开始执行，可以使计划和执行同时进行，从而赢得搜索时间。然而，这会带来做出错误操作选择的风险，尤其是在操作不可逆转的情况下。机会和风险之间的权衡是本文要解决的问题。我们的主要贡献是将这种设置正式定义为抽象元推理问题。我们发现抽象问题很难解决。然而，我们确定了可以在多项式时间内解决的特殊情况，开发贪婪解决算法，并通过对搜索问题派生的实例进行测试，找到几种可以实现有希望的实际性能的方法。这项工作为同时规划和执行的有原则、有时间意识的高管奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个形式化元推理模型，研究在时间紧迫情况下如何同时进行规划与执行的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实中的智能体在规划时需应对时间限制，若等待规划完成再执行可能错失机会，但提前执行可能因不可逆动作导致错误，需权衡风险与收益。
AI.method: 将问题抽象为元推理模型，证明其一般情况下难以处理，但识别出多项式时间可解的特殊情形，并开发贪心算法进行验证。
AI.result: 理论证明抽象问题具有计算复杂性，但针对特定场景的算法在实际测试中表现出良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为构建兼顾时间感知的并发规划与执行系统提供了理论基础与实践方法。

authors_text: Meiling Fang,Marco Huber,Naser Damer
title: SynthASpoof: Developing Face Presentation Attack Detection Based on Privacy-friendly Synthetic Data
title_zh: SynthASpoof：基于隐私友好的合成数据开发人脸呈现攻击检测
abstract: Recently, significant progress has been made in face presentation attack detection (PAD), which aims to secure face recognition systems against presentation attacks, owing to the availability of several face PAD datasets. However, all available datasets are based on privacy and legally-sensitive authentic biometric data with a limited number of subjects. To target these legal and technical challenges, this work presents the first synthetic-based face PAD dataset, named SynthASpoof, as a large-scale PAD development dataset. The bona fide samples in SynthASpoof are synthetically generated and the attack samples are collected by presenting such synthetic data to capture systems in a real attack scenario. The experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of using SynthASpoof for the development of face PAD. Moreover, we boost the performance of such a solution by incorporating the domain generalization tool MixStyle into the PAD solutions. Additionally, we showed the viability of using synthetic data as a supplement to enrich the diversity of limited authentic training data and consistently enhance PAD performances. The SynthASpoof dataset, containing 25,000 bona fide and 78,800 attack samples, the implementation, and the pre-trained weights are made publicly available.
summary: Recently, significant progress has been made in face presentation attack detection (PAD), which aims to secure face recognition systems against presentation attacks, owing to the availability of several face PAD datasets. However, all available datasets are based on privacy and legally-sensitive authentic biometric data with a limited number of subjects. To target these legal and technical challenges, this work presents the first synthetic-based face PAD dataset, named SynthASpoof, as a large-scale PAD development dataset. The bona fide samples in SynthASpoof are synthetically generated and the attack samples are collected by presenting such synthetic data to capture systems in a real attack scenario. The experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of using SynthASpoof for the development of face PAD. Moreover, we boost the performance of such a solution by incorporating the domain generalization tool MixStyle into the PAD solutions. Additionally, we showed the viability of using synthetic data as a supplement to enrich the diversity of limited authentic training data and consistently enhance PAD performances. The SynthASpoof dataset, containing 25,000 bona fide and 78,800 attack samples, the implementation, and the pre-trained weights are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于多个人脸 PAD 数据集的可用性，人脸呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 方面取得了重大进展，旨在保护人脸识别系统免受呈现攻击。然而，所有可用的数据集均基于隐私和法律敏感的真实生物识别数据，且受试者数量有限。为了应对这些法律和技术挑战，这项工作提出了第一个基于合成的人脸 PAD 数据集，名为 SynthASpoof，作为大规模 PAD 开发数据集。 SynthASpoof 中的真实样本是综合生成的，并通过呈现此类合成数据来收集攻击样本，以捕获真实攻击场景中的系统。实验结果证明了使用SynthASpoof开发人脸PAD的可行性。此外，我们通过将域泛化工具 MixStyle 合并到 PAD 解决方案中来提高此类解决方案的性能。此外，我们还展示了使用合成数据作为补充来丰富有限真实训练数据的多样性并持续增强 PAD 性能的可行性。 SynthASpoof 数据集包含 25,000 个善意样本和 78,800 个攻击样本，其实现和预训练权重均已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SynthASpoof，一个基于隐私友好的合成数据的人脸呈现攻击检测（PAD）数据集，并验证其在提升检测性能中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有PAD数据集依赖隐私敏感的真实生物特征数据且受试者数量有限，难以满足大规模开发需求并存在法律风险。
AI.method: 通过合成生成真实样本并模拟攻击场景采集攻击样本构建数据集，结合域泛化工具MixStyle优化检测模型。
AI.result: 实验表明SynthASpoof可有效用于PAD开发，补充合成数据显著提升模型性能，数据集包含25,000个真实样本和78,800个攻击样本。
AI.conclusion: SynthASpoof作为首个合成PAD数据集，解决了隐私与数据多样性矛盾，为提升检测性能提供新方案并公开了数据与模型。

authors_text: Xiao Tang,Sicong Liu,Xiaojiang Du,Mohsen Guizani
title: Sparsity-Aware Intelligent Massive Random Access Control in Open RAN: A Reinforcement Learning Based Approach
title_zh: 开放 RAN 中的稀疏感知智能大规模随机接入控制：基于强化学习的方法
comment: This paper has been submitted to IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
comments: This paper has been submitted to IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
abstract: Massive random access of devices in the emerging Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) brings great challenge to the access control and management. Exploiting the bursting nature of the access requests, sparse active user detection (SAUD) is an efficient enabler towards efficient access management, but the sparsity might be deteriorated in case of uncoordinated massive access requests. To dynamically preserve the sparsity of access requests, a reinforcement-learning (RL)-assisted scheme of closed-loop access control utilizing the access class barring technique is proposed, where the RL policy is determined through continuous interaction between the RL agent, i.e., a next generation node base (gNB), and the environment. The proposed scheme can be implemented by the near-real-time RAN intelligent controller (near-RT RIC) in O-RAN, supporting rapid switching between heterogeneous vertical applications, such as mMTC and uRLLC services. Moreover, a data-driven scheme of deep-RL-assisted SAUD is proposed to resolve highly complex environments with continuous and high-dimensional state and action spaces, where a replay buffer is applied for automatic large-scale data collection. An actor-critic framework is formulated to incorporate the strategy-learning modules into the near-RT RIC. Simulation results show that the proposed schemes can achieve superior performance in both access efficiency and user detection accuracy over the benchmark scheme for different heterogeneous services with massive access requests.
summary: Massive random access of devices in the emerging Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) brings great challenge to the access control and management. Exploiting the bursting nature of the access requests, sparse active user detection (SAUD) is an efficient enabler towards efficient access management, but the sparsity might be deteriorated in case of uncoordinated massive access requests. To dynamically preserve the sparsity of access requests, a reinforcement-learning (RL)-assisted scheme of closed-loop access control utilizing the access class barring technique is proposed, where the RL policy is determined through continuous interaction between the RL agent, i.e., a next generation node base (gNB), and the environment. The proposed scheme can be implemented by the near-real-time RAN intelligent controller (near-RT RIC) in O-RAN, supporting rapid switching between heterogeneous vertical applications, such as mMTC and uRLLC services. Moreover, a data-driven scheme of deep-RL-assisted SAUD is proposed to resolve highly complex environments with continuous and high-dimensional state and action spaces, where a replay buffer is applied for automatic large-scale data collection. An actor-critic framework is formulated to incorporate the strategy-learning modules into the near-RT RIC. Simulation results show that the proposed schemes can achieve superior performance in both access efficiency and user detection accuracy over the benchmark scheme for different heterogeneous services with massive access requests.
abstract_zh: 新兴的开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）中设备的海量随机接入给接入控制和管理带来了巨大的挑战。利用访问请求的突发性，稀疏活动用户检测（SAUD）是实现高效访问管理的有效推动者，但在不协调的大量访问请求的情况下，稀疏性可能会恶化。为了动态保持访问请求的稀疏性，提出了一种利用访问类别限制技术的强化学习（RL）辅助闭环访问控制方案，其中通过 RL 代理（即下一代节点库（gNB））与环境之间的持续交互来确定 RL 策略。该方案可以通过O-RAN中的近实时RAN智能控制器（near-RT RIC）来实现，支持异构垂直应用（例如mMTC和uRLLC服务）之间的快速切换。此外，提出了一种深度强化学习辅助 SAUD 的数据驱动方案，以解决具有连续、高维状态和动作空间的高度复杂环境，其中重播缓冲区用于自动大规模数据收集。制定了演员批评家框架，将策略学习模块纳入近 RT RIC 中。仿真结果表明，对于海量访问请求的不同异构服务，所提方案在访问效率和用户检测精度方面均优于基准方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的稀疏性感知智能大规模随机接入控制方案，以应对开放无线接入网（O-RAN）中设备随机接入的挑战。
AI.motivation: O-RAN中设备的大规模随机接入导致接入控制困难，传统方法难以维持请求稀疏性，需动态优化以提升效率和检测精度。
AI.method: 设计强化学习辅助的闭环接入控制机制，结合接入类限制技术，并通过近实时RAN智能控制器（near-RT RIC）实现；提出深度强化学习驱动的稀疏用户检测（SAUD）方案，采用回放缓冲区和Actor-Critic框架处理高维状态空间。
AI.result: 仿真表明，所提方案在不同异构服务（如mMTC和uRLLC）中均优于基准方案，显著提升接入效率和用户检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习动态维持接入请求稀疏性，有效支持O-RAN中大规模异构服务的高效接入管理。

authors_text: Manuel de Sousa Ribeiro,João Leite
title: On Modifying a Neural Network's Perception
title_zh: 关于修改神经网络的感知
abstract: Artificial neural networks have proven to be extremely useful models that have allowed for multiple recent breakthroughs in the field of Artificial Intelligence and many others. However, they are typically regarded as black boxes, given how difficult it is for humans to interpret how these models reach their results. In this work, we propose a method which allows one to modify what an artificial neural network is perceiving regarding specific human-defined concepts, enabling the generation of hypothetical scenarios that could help understand and even debug the neural network model. Through empirical evaluation, in a synthetic dataset and in the ImageNet dataset, we test the proposed method on different models, assessing whether the performed manipulations are well interpreted by the models, and analyzing how they react to them.
summary: Artificial neural networks have proven to be extremely useful models that have allowed for multiple recent breakthroughs in the field of Artificial Intelligence and many others. However, they are typically regarded as black boxes, given how difficult it is for humans to interpret how these models reach their results. In this work, we propose a method which allows one to modify what an artificial neural network is perceiving regarding specific human-defined concepts, enabling the generation of hypothetical scenarios that could help understand and even debug the neural network model. Through empirical evaluation, in a synthetic dataset and in the ImageNet dataset, we test the proposed method on different models, assessing whether the performed manipulations are well interpreted by the models, and analyzing how they react to them.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络已被证明是非常有用的模型，最近在人工智能和许多其他领域取得了多项突破。然而，考虑到人类很难解释这些模型如何得出结果，它们通常被视为黑匣子。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，允许人们修改人工神经网络对特定人类定义概念的感知，从而生成有助于理解甚至调试神经网络模型的假设场景。通过实证评估，在合成数据集和 ImageNet 数据集中，我们在不同模型上测试了所提出的方法，评估模型是否可以很好地解释所执行的操作，并分析模型对此的反应。

AI.tldr: 提出一种方法，通过修改神经网络对特定人类定义概念的感知，生成假设场景以辅助模型理解和调试。
AI.motivation: 神经网络通常被视为黑箱，难以解释其决策过程，因此需要方法提高模型的可解释性并辅助调试。
AI.method: 通过修改神经网络对特定概念的感知，生成假设场景，从而评估模型对这些修改的反应。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和ImageNet上验证了方法的有效性，评估了不同模型对修改的反应，证明了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效修改了神经网络的感知，有助于理解模型决策过程，为模型调试和解释提供了新途径。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种方法，通过修改神经网络对特定人类定义概念的感知，生成假设场景以辅助模型理解和调试。
ai_content.motivation: 神经网络通常被视为黑箱，难以解释其决策过程，因此需要方法提高模型的可解释性并辅助调试。
