search_text: On Modifying a Neural Network's Perception 关于修改神经网络的感知 Artificial neural networks have proven to be extremely useful models that have allowed for multiple recent breakthroughs in the field of Artificial Intelligence and many others. However, they are typically regarded as black boxes, given how difficult it is for humans to interpret how these models reach their results. In this work, we propose a method which allows one to modify what an artificial neural network is perceiving regarding specific human-defined concepts, enabling the generation of hypothetical scenarios that could help understand and even debug the neural network model. Through empirical evaluation, in a synthetic dataset and in the ImageNet dataset, we test the proposed method on different models, assessing whether the performed manipulations are well interpreted by the models, and analyzing how they react to them. 人工神经网络已被证明是非常有用的模型，最近在人工智能和许多其他领域取得了多项突破。然而，考虑到人类很难解释这些模型如何得出结果，它们通常被视为黑匣子。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，允许人们修改人工神经网络对特定人类定义概念的感知，从而生成有助于理解甚至调试神经网络模型的假设场景。通过实证评估，在合成数据集和 ImageNet 数据集中，我们在不同模型上测试了所提出的方法，评估模型是否可以很好地解释所执行的操作，并分析模型对此的反应。 提出一种方法，通过修改神经网络对特定人类定义概念的感知，生成假设场景以辅助模型理解和调试。 Manuel de Sousa Ribeiro,João Leite cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Jianrong Zhou,Kun He,Jiongzhi Zheng,Chu-Min Li
title: Geometric Batch Optimization for the Packing Equal Circles in a Circle Problem on Large Scale
title_zh: 大规模等圆填充圆问题的几何批量优化
comment: 26 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables, submitted to a journal
comments: 26 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables, submitted to a journal
abstract: The problem of packing equal circles in a circle is a classic and famous packing problem, which is well-studied in academia and has a variety of applications in industry. This problem is computationally challenging, and researchers mainly focus on small-scale instances with the number of circular items n less than 320 in the literature. In this work, we aim to solve this problem on large scale. Specifically, we propose a novel geometric batch optimization method that not only can significantly speed up the convergence process of continuous optimization but also reduce the memory requirement during the program's runtime. Then we propose a heuristic search method, called solution-space exploring and descent, that can discover a feasible solution efficiently on large scale. Besides, we propose an adaptive neighbor object maintenance method to maintain the neighbor structure applied in the continuous optimization process. In this way, we can find high-quality solutions on large scale instances within reasonable computational times. Extensive experiments on the benchmark instances sampled from n = 300 to 1,000 show that our proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms and performs excellently on large scale instances. In particular, our algorithm found 10 improved solutions out of the 21 well-studied moderate scale instances and 95 improved solutions out of the 101 sampled large scale instances. Furthermore, our geometric batch optimization, heuristic search, and adaptive maintenance methods are general and can be adapted to other packing and continuous optimization problems.

This problem is computationally challenging, and researchers mainly focus on small-scale instances with the number of circular items n less than 320 in the literature. In this work, we aim to solve this problem on large scale. Specifically, we propose a novel geometric batch optimization method that not only can significantly speed up the convergence process of continuous optimization but also reduce the memory requirement during the program's runtime. Then we propose a heuristic search method, called solution-space exploring and descent, that can discover a feasible solution efficiently on large scale. Besides, we propose an adaptive neighbor object maintenance method to maintain the neighbor structure applied in the continuous optimization process. In this way, we can find high-quality solutions on large scale instances within reasonable computational times. Extensive experiments on the benchmark instances sampled from n = 300 to 1,000 show that our proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms and performs excellently on large scale instances. In particular, our algorithm found 10 improved solutions out of the 21 well-studied moderate scale instances and 95 improved solutions out of the 101 sampled large scale instances. Furthermore, our geometric batch optimization, heuristic search, and adaptive maintenance methods are general and can be adapted to other packing and continuous optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 将相等的圆排列在一个圆中的问题是一个经典且著名的排列问题，在学术界得到了广泛的研究，并且在工业界也有多种应用。这个问题在计算上具有挑战性，研究人员主要关注文献中循环项数量 n 小于 320 的小规模实例。在这项工作中，我们的目标是大规模解决这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的几何批量优化方法，不仅可以显着加快连续优化的收敛过程，而且可以减少程序运行时的内存需求。然后，我们提出了一种启发式搜索方法，称为解决方案空间探索和下降，可以有效地大规模发现可行的解决方案。此外，我们提出了一种自适应邻居对象维护方法来维护连续优化过程中应用的邻居结构。通过这种方式，我们可以在合理的计算时间内找到大规模实例的高质量解决方案。对从 n = 300 到 1,000 采样的基准实例进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的算法优于最先进的算法，并且在大规模实例上表现出色。特别是，我们的算法在 21 个经过充分研究的中等规模实例中发现了 10 个改进的解决方案，在 101 个采样的大规模实例中发现了 95 个改进的解决方案。此外，我们的几何批量优化、启发式搜索和自适应维护方法是通用的，可以适应其他包装和连续优化问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何批量优化方法，用于解决大规模等圆在圆内装箱问题，旨在提高计算效率和解决方案质量。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对小规模实例（n<320），而大规模实例（n≥300）的计算复杂度高，传统方法难以有效求解。
AI.method: 提出几何批量优化、解空间探索与下降启发式搜索方法，以及自适应邻域结构维护策略，结合连续优化过程提升效率。
AI.result: 在n=300至1000的基准实例上，算法优于现有方法，发现10个中等规模实例和95个大规模实例的改进解。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在大规模装箱问题中表现优异，且可推广至其他 packing 和连续优化问题。

authors_text: Pranav Dandwate,Chaitanya Shahane,Vandana Jagtap,Shridevi C. Karande
title: Comparative study of Transformer and LSTM Network with attention mechanism on Image Captioning
title_zh: 带有注意力机制的 Transformer 和 LSTM 网络在图像字幕上的比较研究
abstract: In a globalized world at the present epoch of generative intelligence, most of the manual labour tasks are automated with increased efficiency. This can support businesses to save time and money. A crucial component of generative intelligence is the integration of vision and language. Consequently, image captioning become an intriguing area of research. There have been multiple attempts by the researchers to solve this problem with different deep learning architectures, although the accuracy has increased, but the results are still not up to standard. This study buckles down to the comparison of Transformer and LSTM with attention block model on MS-COCO dataset, which is a standard dataset for image captioning. For both the models we have used pretrained Inception-V3 CNN encoder for feature extraction of the images. The Bilingual Evaluation Understudy score (BLEU) is used to checked the accuracy of caption generated by both models. Along with the transformer and LSTM with attention block models,CLIP-diffusion model, M2-Transformer model and the X-Linear Attention model have been discussed with state of the art accuracy.
summary: In a globalized world at the present epoch of generative intelligence, most of the manual labour tasks are automated with increased efficiency. This can support businesses to save time and money. A crucial component of generative intelligence is the integration of vision and language. Consequently, image captioning become an intriguing area of research. There have been multiple attempts by the researchers to solve this problem with different deep learning architectures, although the accuracy has increased, but the results are still not up to standard. This study buckles down to the comparison of Transformer and LSTM with attention block model on MS-COCO dataset, which is a standard dataset for image captioning. For both the models we have used pretrained Inception-V3 CNN encoder for feature extraction of the images. The Bilingual Evaluation Understudy score (BLEU) is used to checked the accuracy of caption generated by both models. Along with the transformer and LSTM with attention block models,CLIP-diffusion model, M2-Transformer model and the X-Linear Attention model have been discussed with state of the art accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在当今生成智能时代的全球化世界中，大多数体力劳动任务都实现了自动化，效率也提高了。这可以支持企业节省时间和金钱。生成智能的一个重要组成部分是视觉和语言的整合。因此，图像字幕成为一个有趣的研究领域。研究人员多次尝试用不同的深度学习架构来解决这个问题，虽然精度有所提高，但结果仍然达不到标准。本研究重点在 MS-COCO 数据集（图像字幕的标准数据集）上对 Transformer 和 LSTM 与注意力块模型进行比较。对于这两个模型，我们都使用预训练的 Inception-V3 CNN 编码器来提取图像的特征。双语评估学生分数 (BLEU) 用于检查两个模型生成的字幕的准确性。除了带有注意力块模型的 Transformer 和 LSTM 之外，还以最先进的精度讨论了 CLIP-扩散模型、M2-Transformer 模型和 X-Linear Attention 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了Transformer和LSTM网络在图像字幕生成任务中的性能，使用MS-COCO数据集并采用BLEU分数评估模型效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究提升了图像字幕生成的准确性，但结果仍不理想，需探索更优的深度学习架构以提高生成质量。
AI.method: 采用预训练Inception-V3 CNN编码器提取图像特征，对比Transformer、LSTM（含注意力机制）及CLIP-diffusion、M2-Transformer、X-Linear Attention等模型，通过BLEU分数评估生成字幕的准确性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Transformer和LSTM（含注意力机制）在BLEU指标上表现优于其他模型，但具体数值未明确说明。
AI.conclusion: Transformer和LSTM结合注意力机制在图像字幕生成中具有优势，未来可进一步探索模型融合或优化注意力机制以提升效果。

Along with the transformer and LSTM with attention block models,CLIP-diffusion model, M2-Transformer model and the X-Linear Attention model have been discussed with state of the art accuracy. 在当今生成智能时代的全球化世界中，大多数体力劳动任务都实现了自动化，效率也提高了。这可以支持企业节省时间和金钱。生成智能的一个重要组成部分是视觉和语言的整合。因此，图像字幕成为一个有趣的研究领域。研究人员多次尝试用不同的深度学习架构来解决这个问题，虽然精度有所提高，但结果仍然达不到标准。本研究重点在 MS-COCO 数据集（图像字幕的标准数据集）上对 Transformer 和 LSTM 与注意力块模型进行比较。对于这两个模型，我们都使用预训练的 Inception-V3 CNN 编码器来提取图像的特征。双语评估学生分数 (BLEU) 用于检查两个模型生成的字幕的准确性。除了带有注意力块模型的 Transformer 和 LSTM 之外，还以最先进的精度讨论了 CLIP-扩散模型、M2-Transformer 模型和 X-Linear Attention 模型。 本文比较了Transformer和LSTM网络在图像字幕生成任务中的性能，使用MS-COCO数据集并采用BLEU分数评估模型效果。 Pranav Dandwate,Chaitanya Shahane,Vandana Jagtap,Shridevi C. Karande cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenyan Yang,Alexandre Angleraud,Roel S. Pieters,Joni Pajarinen,Joni-Kristian Kämäräinen
title: Seq2Seq Imitation Learning for Tactile Feedback-based Manipulation
title_zh: 基于触觉反馈的 Seq2Seq 模仿学习
abstract: Robot control for tactile feedback-based manipulation can be difficult due to the modeling of physical contacts, partial observability of the environment, and noise in perception and control. This work focuses on solving partial observability of contact-rich manipulation tasks as a Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq)} Imitation Learning (IL) problem. The proposed Seq2Seq model produces a robot-environment interaction sequence to estimate the partially observable environment state variables. Then, the observed interaction sequence is transformed to a control sequence for the task itself. The proposed Seq2Seq IL for tactile feedback-based manipulation is experimentally validated on a door-open task in a simulated environment and a snap-on insertion task with a real robot. The model is able to learn both tasks from only 50 expert demonstrations, while state-of-the-art reinforcement learning and imitation learning methods fail.
summary: Robot control for tactile feedback-based manipulation can be difficult due to the modeling of physical contacts, partial observability of the environment, and noise in perception and control. This work focuses on solving partial observability of contact-rich manipulation tasks as a Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq)} Imitation Learning (IL) problem. The proposed Seq2Seq model produces a robot-environment interaction sequence to estimate the partially observable environment state variables. Then, the observed interaction sequence is transformed to a control sequence for the task itself. The proposed Seq2Seq IL for tactile feedback-based manipulation is experimentally validated on a door-open task in a simulated environment and a snap-on insertion task with a real robot. The model is able to learn both tasks from only 50 expert demonstrations, while state-of-the-art reinforcement learning and imitation learning methods fail.
abstract_zh: 由于物理接触的建模、环境的部分可观察性以及感知和控制中的噪声，基于触觉反馈的机器人控制可能很困难。这项工作的重点是解决富含接触的操作任务的部分可观察性，作为序列到序列（Seq2Seq）}模仿学习（IL）问题。所提出的 Seq2Seq 模型产生机器人-环境交互序列来估计部分可观察的环境状态变量。然后，观察到的交互序列被转换为任务本身的控制序列。所提出的用于基于触觉反馈的操作的 Seq2Seq IL 在模拟环境中的开门任务和真实机器人的卡扣插入任务上进行了实验验证。该模型仅通过 50 个专家演示就能学习这两项任务，而最先进的强化学习和模仿学习方法却失败了。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序列到序列（Seq2Seq）模仿学习的方法，用于解决触觉反馈操作中的部分可观测性问题，通过生成交互序列估计环境状态并转化为控制指令。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理触觉反馈操作中的物理接触建模、环境部分可观测性及感知控制噪声问题，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用序列到序列（Seq2Seq）模仿学习框架，通过生成机器人-环境交互序列估计部分可观测状态变量，并将其转换为任务控制序列。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，该模型在模拟环境和真实机器人任务中仅需50个专家示范即可完成学习，而现有强化学习和模仿学习方法未能成功。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在少量专家示范下有效解决触觉反馈操作难题，为部分可观测环境下的机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Varun Gupta,Anbumani Subramanian,C. V. Jawahar,Rohit Saluja
title: CueCAn: Cue Driven Contextual Attention For Identifying Missing Traffic Signs on Unconstrained Roads
title_zh: CueCAn：提示驱动的上下文注意力，用于识别不受约束的道路上丢失的交通标志
comment: International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23)
comments: International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23)
abstract: Unconstrained Asian roads often involve poor infrastructure, affecting overall road safety. Missing traffic signs are a regular part of such roads. Missing or non-existing object detection has been studied for locating missing curbs and estimating reasonable regions for pedestrians on road scene images. Such methods involve analyzing task-specific single object cues. In this paper, we present the first and most challenging video dataset for missing objects, with multiple types of traffic signs for which the cues are visible without the signs in the scenes. We refer to it as the Missing Traffic Signs Video Dataset (MTSVD). MTSVD is challenging compared to the previous works in two aspects i) The traffic signs are generally not present in the vicinity of their cues, ii) The traffic signs cues are diverse and unique. Also, MTSVD is the first publicly available missing object dataset. To train the models for identifying missing signs, we complement our dataset with 10K traffic sign tracks, with 40 percent of the traffic signs having cues visible in the scenes. For identifying missing signs, we propose the Cue-driven Contextual Attention units (CueCAn), which we incorporate in our model encoder. We first train the encoder to classify the presence of traffic sign cues and then train the entire segmentation model end-to-end to localize missing traffic signs. Quantitative and qualitative analysis shows that CueCAn significantly improves the performance of base models.
summary: Unconstrained Asian roads often involve poor infrastructure, affecting overall road safety. Missing traffic signs are a regular part of such roads. Missing or non-existing object detection has been studied for locating missing curbs and estimating reasonable regions for pedestrians on road scene images. Such methods involve analyzing task-specific single object cues. In this paper, we present the first and most challenging video dataset for missing objects, with multiple types of traffic signs for which the cues are visible without the signs in the scenes. We refer to it as the Missing Traffic Signs Video Dataset (MTSVD). MTSVD is challenging compared to the previous works in two aspects i) The traffic signs are generally not present in the vicinity of their cues, ii) The traffic signs cues are diverse and unique. Also, MTSVD is the first publicly available missing object dataset. To train the models for identifying missing signs, we complement our dataset with 10K traffic sign tracks, with 40 percent of the traffic signs having cues visible in the scenes. For identifying missing signs, we propose the Cue-driven Contextual Attention units (CueCAn), which we incorporate in our model encoder. We first train the encoder to classify the presence of traffic sign cues and then train the entire segmentation model end-to-end to localize missing traffic signs. Quantitative and qualitative analysis shows that CueCAn significantly improves the performance of base models.
abstract_zh: 不受约束的亚洲道路往往基础设施薄弱，影响整体道路安全。缺少交通标志是此类道路的常见现象。人们已经研究了丢失或不存在的物体检测，以定位丢失的路缘并估计道路场景图像上行人的合理区域。此类方法涉及分析特定于任务的单个对象线索。在本文中，我们提出了第一个也是最具挑战性的丢失对象视频数据集，其中包含多种类型的交通标志，在场景中没有标志的情况下，线索也是可见的。我们将其称为缺失交通标志视频数据集 (MTSVD)。与之前的作品相比，MTSVD 在两个方面具有挑战性：i）交通标志通常不存在于其提示附近，ii）交通标志提示是多样且独特的。此外，MTSVD 是第一个公开可用的缺失对象数据集。为了训练识别缺失标志的模型，我们用 10K 交通标志轨迹补充了我们的数据集，其中 40% 的交通标志在场景中具有可见的提示。为了识别缺失的标志，我们提出了线索驱动的上下文注意单元（CueCAn），我们将其合并到我们的模型编码器中。我们首先训练编码器对交通标志提示的存在进行分类，然后端到端地训练整个分割模型以定位丢失的交通标志。定量和定性分析表明，CueCAn 显着提高了基础模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CueCAn方法及MTSVD数据集，解决无约束道路上缺失交通标志检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖单一对象线索，难以应对交通标志缺失场景的复杂性，且缺乏公开数据集。
AI.method: 设计Cue驱动的上下文注意力模块（CueCAn），分阶段训练模型识别线索并定位缺失标志，构建含10K轨迹的MTSVD数据集。
AI.result: CueCAn显著提升基线模型性能，定量与定性分析验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: CueCAn有效识别缺失交通标志，MTSVD为未来研究提供基础，推动道路安全技术发展。

authors_text: Maryam Abdool,Tony Dear
title: Swim: A General-Purpose, High-Performing, and Efficient Activation Function for Locomotion Control Tasks
title_zh: Swim：用于运动控制任务的通用、高性能、高效激活函数
abstract: Activation functions play a significant role in the performance of deep learning algorithms. In particular, the Swish activation function tends to outperform ReLU on deeper models, including deep reinforcement learning models, across challenging tasks. Despite this progress, ReLU is the preferred function partly because it is more efficient than Swish. Furthermore, in contrast to the fields of computer vision and natural language processing, the deep reinforcement learning and robotics domains have seen less inclination to adopt new activation functions, such as Swish, and instead continue to use more traditional functions, like ReLU. To tackle those issues, we propose Swim, a general-purpose, efficient, and high-performing alternative to Swish, and then provide an analysis of its properties as well as an explanation for its high-performance relative to Swish, in terms of both reward-achievement and efficiency. We focus on testing Swim on MuJoCo's locomotion continuous control tasks since they exhibit more complex dynamics and would therefore benefit most from a high-performing and efficient activation function. We also use the TD3 algorithm in conjunction with Swim and explain this choice in the context of the robot locomotion domain. We then conclude that Swim is a state-of-the-art activation function for continuous control locomotion tasks and recommend using it with TD3 as a working framework.
summary: Activation functions play a significant role in the performance of deep learning algorithms. In particular, the Swish activation function tends to outperform ReLU on deeper models, including deep reinforcement learning models, across challenging tasks. Despite this progress, ReLU is the preferred function partly because it is more efficient than Swish. Furthermore, in contrast to the fields of computer vision and natural language processing, the deep reinforcement learning and robotics domains have seen less inclination to adopt new activation functions, such as Swish, and instead continue to use more traditional functions, like ReLU. To tackle those issues, we propose Swim, a general-purpose, efficient, and high-performing alternative to Swish, and then provide an analysis of its properties as well as an explanation for its high-performance relative to Swish, in terms of both reward-achievement and efficiency. We focus on testing Swim on MuJoCo's locomotion continuous control tasks since they exhibit more complex dynamics and would therefore benefit most from a high-performing and efficient activation function. We also use the TD3 algorithm in conjunction with Swim and explain this choice in the context of the robot locomotion domain. We then conclude that Swim is a state-of-the-art activation function for continuous control locomotion tasks and recommend using it with TD3 as a working framework.
abstract_zh: 激活函数在深度学习算法的性能中发挥着重要作用。特别是，在具有挑战性的任务中，Swish 激活函数在更深层的模型（包括深度强化学习模型）上往往优于 ReLU。尽管取得了这些进展，ReLU 仍然是首选函数，部分原因是它比 Swish 更高效。此外，与计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域相比，深度强化学习和机器人领域不太愿意采用新的激活函数（例如 Swish），而是继续使用更传统的函数（例如 ReLU）。为了解决这些问题，我们提出 Swim，一种通用、高效、高性能的 Swish 替代品，然后分析其属性，并解释其在奖励成就和效率方面相对于 Swish 的高性能。我们专注于在 MuJoCo 的运动连续控制任务上测试 Swim，因为它们表现出更复杂的动力学，因此将从高性能和高效的激活函数中受益最多。我们还将 TD3 算法与 Swim 结合使用，并在机器人运动领域的背景下解释这种选择。然后我们得出结论，Swim 是用于连续控制运动任务的最先进的激活函数，并建议将其与 TD3 作为工作框架一起使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Swim的通用、高效且高性能的激活函数，专门用于腿部运动控制任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管Swish激活函数在深度模型中表现优于ReLU，但其效率较低且在机器人和强化学习领域应用较少，而ReLU虽高效但性能不足。
AI.method: 设计Swim激活函数并分析其特性，结合TD3算法在MuJoCo的腿部运动控制任务中进行测试。
AI.result: Swim在奖励达成和效率方面均优于Swish，成为连续控制腿部运动任务的最先进激活函数。
AI.conclusion: 推荐将Swim与TD3算法结合，作为腿部运动控制任务的首选框架。

search_text: Swim: A General-Purpose, High-Performing, and Efficient Activation Function for Locomotion Control Tasks Swim：用于运动控制任务的通用、高性能、高效激活函数 Activation functions play a significant role in the performance of deep learning algorithms. In particular, the Swish activation function tends to outperform ReLU on deeper models, including deep reinforcement learning models, across challenging tasks. Despite this progress, ReLU is the preferred function partly because it is more efficient than Swish. Furthermore, in contrast to the fields of computer vision and natural language processing, the deep reinforcement learning and robotics domains have seen less inclination to adopt new activation functions, such as Swish, and instead continue to use more traditional functions, like ReLU. To tackle those issues, we propose Swim, a general-purpose, efficient, and high-performing alternative to Swish, and then provide an analysis of its properties as well as an explanation for its high-performance relative to Swish, in terms of both reward-achievement and efficiency. We focus on testing Swim on MuJoCo's locomotion continuous control tasks since they exhibit more complex dynamics and would therefore benefit most from a high-performing and efficient activation function. We also use the TD3 algorithm in conjunction with Swim and explain this choice in the context of the robot locomotion domain. We then conclude that Swim is a state-of-the-art activation function for continuous control locomotion tasks and recommend using it with TD3 as a working framework. 激活函数在深度学习算法的性能中发挥着重要作用。特别是，在具有挑战性的任务中，Swish 激活函数在更深层的模型（包括深度强化学习模型）上往往优于 ReLU。尽管取得了这些进展，ReLU 仍然是首选函数，部分原因是它比 Swish 更高效。此外，与计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域相比，深度强化学习和机器人领域不太愿意采用新的激活函数（例如 Swish），而是继续使用更传统的函数（例如 ReLU）。为了解决这些问题，我们提出 Swim，一种通用、高效、高性能的 Swish 替代品，然后分析其属性，并解释其在奖励成就和效率方面相对于 Swish 的高性能。我们专注于在 MuJoCo 的运动连续控制任务上测试 Swim，因为它们表现出更复杂的动力学，因此将从高性能和高效的激活函数中受益最多。我们还将 TD3 算法与 Swim 结合使用，并在机器人运动领域的背景下解释这种选择。然后我们得出结论，Swim 是用于连续控制运动任务的最先进的激活函数，并建议将其与 TD3 作为工作框架一起使用。 本文提出了一种名为Swim的通用、高效且高性能的激活函数，专门用于腿部运动控制任务。 Maryam Abdool,Tony Dear cs.LG,cs.NE,cs.RO

authors_text: Kang Chen,Xiangqian Wu
title: VTQA: Visual Text Question Answering via Entity Alignment and Cross-Media Reasoning
title_zh: VTQA：通过实体对齐和跨媒体推理进行视觉文本问答
abstract: The ideal form of Visual Question Answering requires understanding, grounding and reasoning in the joint space of vision and language and serves as a proxy for the AI task of scene understanding. However, most existing VQA benchmarks are limited to just picking the answer from a pre-defined set of options and lack attention to text. We present a new challenge with a dataset that contains 23,781 questions based on 10124 image-text pairs. Specifically, the task requires the model to align multimedia representations of the same entity to implement multi-hop reasoning between image and text and finally use natural language to answer the question. The aim of this challenge is to develop and benchmark models that are capable of multimedia entity alignment, multi-step reasoning and open-ended answer generation.
summary: The ideal form of Visual Question Answering requires understanding, grounding and reasoning in the joint space of vision and language and serves as a proxy for the AI task of scene understanding. However, most existing VQA benchmarks are limited to just picking the answer from a pre-defined set of options and lack attention to text. We present a new challenge with a dataset that contains 23,781 questions based on 10124 image-text pairs. Specifically, the task requires the model to align multimedia representations of the same entity to implement multi-hop reasoning between image and text and finally use natural language to answer the question. The aim of this challenge is to develop and benchmark models that are capable of multimedia entity alignment, multi-step reasoning and open-ended answer generation.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答的理想形式需要在视觉和语言的联合空间中进行理解、基础和推理，并作为场景理解的人工智能任务的代理。然而，大多数现有的 VQA 基准仅限于从预定义的选项集中选择答案，而缺乏对文本的关注。我们提出了一个新的挑战，数据集包含基于 10124 个图像文本对的 23,781 个问题。具体来说，该任务要求模型对齐同一实体的多媒体表示，以实现图像和文本之间的多跳推理，并最终使用自然语言来回答问题。本次挑战的目的是开发能够进行多媒体实体对齐、多步推理和开放式答案生成的模型并对其进行基准测试。

AI.tldr: 提出VTQA任务，通过实体对齐和跨媒体推理实现基于图像和文本的开放问答。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA任务答案选择受限，缺乏文本关注，需推动多模态对齐与多步推理能力。
AI.method: 通过实体对齐实现多模态表示对齐，结合跨媒体多跳推理，生成自然语言答案。
AI.result: 构建包含23,781个问题的数据集，验证模型在多模态对齐和多步推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出VTQA挑战和数据集，促进多模态对齐与多步推理模型的研究。

authors_text: Guy Farjon,Liu Huijun,Yael Edan
title: Deep-Learning-based Counting Methods, Datasets, and Applications in Agriculture -- A Review
title_zh: 基于深度学习的计数方法、数据集及其在农业中的应用——综述
abstract: The number of objects is considered an important factor in a variety of tasks in the agricultural domain. Automated counting can improve farmers decisions regarding yield estimation, stress detection, disease prevention, and more. In recent years, deep learning has been increasingly applied to many agriculture-related applications, complementing conventional computer-vision algorithms for counting agricultural objects. This article reviews progress in the past decade and the state of the art for counting methods in agriculture, focusing on deep-learning methods. It presents an overview of counting algorithms, metrics, platforms, and sensors, a list of all publicly available datasets, and an in-depth discussion of various deep-learning methods used for counting. Finally, it discusses open challenges in object counting using deep learning and gives a glimpse into new directions and future perspectives for counting research. The review reveals a major leap forward in object counting in agriculture in the past decade, led by the penetration of deep learning methods into counting platforms.
summary: The number of objects is considered an important factor in a variety of tasks in the agricultural domain. Automated counting can improve farmers decisions regarding yield estimation, stress detection, disease prevention, and more. In recent years, deep learning has been increasingly applied to many agriculture-related applications, complementing conventional computer-vision algorithms for counting agricultural objects. This article reviews progress in the past decade and the state of the art for counting methods in agriculture, focusing on deep-learning methods. It presents an overview of counting algorithms, metrics, platforms, and sensors, a list of all publicly available datasets, and an in-depth discussion of various deep-learning methods used for counting. Finally, it discusses open challenges in object counting using deep learning and gives a glimpse into new directions and future perspectives for counting research. The review reveals a major leap forward in object counting in agriculture in the past decade, led by the penetration of deep learning methods into counting platforms.
abstract_zh: 对象的数量被认为是农业领域各种任务的重要因素。自动计数可以改善农民在产量估算、胁迫检测、疾病预防等方面的决策。近年来，深度学习越来越多地应用于许多农业相关应用，补充了用于计​​数农业物体的传统计算机视觉算法。本文回顾了过去十年的进展和农业计数方法的最新技术，重点关注深度学习方法。它概述了计数算法、指标、平台和传感器，列出了所有公开可用的数据集，并深入讨论了用于计数的各种深度学习方法。最后，它讨论了使用深度学习进行对象计数的开放挑战，并概述了计数研究的新方向和未来前景。该评论揭示了过去十年来，在深度学习方法渗透到计数平台的带动下，农业领域的物体计数取得了重大飞跃。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去十年农业领域基于深度学习的对象计数方法、数据集及应用，分析了现有技术并探讨未来方向。
AI.motivation: 农业中对象数量的自动化计数对产量预测、病害防治等决策至关重要，传统方法存在局限，需借助深度学习提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 系统梳理计数算法、评估指标及硬件平台，汇总公开数据集，分类讨论深度学习方法，并分析技术挑战与未来趋势。
AI.result: 深度学习显著推动农业计数技术发展，现有方法在精度和适用性上取得突破，但复杂场景下的鲁棒性仍需提升。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为农业计数带来革命性进展，但需解决动态环境适应性、小样本学习等挑战，跨学科合作将推动技术落地。

The review reveals a major leap forward in object counting in agriculture in the past decade, led by the penetration of deep learning methods into counting platforms. 对象的数量被认为是农业领域各种任务的重要因素。自动计数可以改善农民在产量估算、胁迫检测、疾病预防等方面的决策。近年来，深度学习越来越多地应用于许多农业相关应用，补充了用于计​​数农业物体的传统计算机视觉算法。本文回顾了过去十年的进展和农业计数方法的最新技术，重点关注深度学习方法。它概述了计数算法、指标、平台和传感器，列出了所有公开可用的数据集，并深入讨论了用于计数的各种深度学习方法。最后，它讨论了使用深度学习进行对象计数的开放挑战，并概述了计数研究的新方向和未来前景。该评论揭示了过去十年来，在深度学习方法渗透到计数平台的带动下，农业领域的物体计数取得了重大飞跃。 本文综述了过去十年农业领域基于深度学习的对象计数方法、数据集及应用，分析了现有技术并探讨未来方向。 Guy Farjon,Liu Huijun,Yael Edan cs.CV

authors_text: Yanjie Song,P. N. Suganthan,Witold Pedrycz,Junwei Ou,Yongming He,Yingwu Chen,Yutong Wu
title: Ensemble Reinforcement Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 集成强化学习：一项调查
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a highly effective technique for addressing various scientific and applied problems. Despite its success, certain complex tasks remain challenging to be addressed solely with a single model and algorithm. In response, ensemble reinforcement learning (ERL), a promising approach that combines the benefits of both RL and ensemble learning (EL), has gained widespread popularity. ERL leverages multiple models or training algorithms to comprehensively explore the problem space and possesses strong generalization capabilities. In this study, we present a comprehensive survey on ERL to provide readers with an overview of recent advances and challenges in the field. Firstly, we provide an introduction to the background and motivation for ERL. Secondly, we conduct a detailed analysis of strategies such as model selection and combination that have been successfully implemented in ERL. Subsequently, we explore the application of ERL, summarize the datasets, and analyze the algorithms employed. Finally, we outline several open questions and discuss future research directions of ERL. By offering guidance for future scientific research and engineering applications, this survey significantly contributes to the advancement of ERL.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a highly effective technique for addressing various scientific and applied problems. Despite its success, certain complex tasks remain challenging to be addressed solely with a single model and algorithm. In response, ensemble reinforcement learning (ERL), a promising approach that combines the benefits of both RL and ensemble learning (EL), has gained widespread popularity. ERL leverages multiple models or training algorithms to comprehensively explore the problem space and possesses strong generalization capabilities. In this study, we present a comprehensive survey on ERL to provide readers with an overview of recent advances and challenges in the field. Firstly, we provide an introduction to the background and motivation for ERL. Secondly, we conduct a detailed analysis of strategies such as model selection and combination that have been successfully implemented in ERL. Subsequently, we explore the application of ERL, summarize the datasets, and analyze the algorithms employed. Finally, we outline several open questions and discuss future research directions of ERL. By offering guidance for future scientific research and engineering applications, this survey significantly contributes to the advancement of ERL.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为解决各种科学和应用问题的高效技术。尽管取得了成功，但某些复杂的任务仍然难以仅用单一模型和算法来解决。为此，集成强化学习 (ERL) 这种结合了 RL 和集成学习 (EL) 优点的有前途的方法已经获得了广泛的欢迎。 ERL利用多种模型或训练算法来全面探索问题空间，具有很强的泛化能力。在这项研究中，我们对 ERL 进行了全面的调查，为读者提供该领域最新进展和挑战的概述。首先，我们介绍 ERL 的背景和动机。其次，我们对ERL中已成功实施的模型选择和组合等策略进行了详细分析。随后，我们探索 ERL 的应用，总结数据集，并分析所使用的算法。最后，我们概述了几个开放性问题并讨论了 ERL 的未来研究方向。通过为未来的科学研究和工程应用提供指导，这项调查对 ERL 的进步做出了重大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文对集成强化学习（ERL）进行了全面综述，总结了其最新进展、挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 单一强化学习模型难以应对复杂任务，而ERL通过结合多个模型或算法的优势，能更全面探索问题空间并提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过分析ERL中的模型选择与组合策略，梳理其应用场景、数据集及算法，并总结开放性问题与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 系统总结了ERL的核心方法与应用案例，明确了当前技术瓶颈与未解决的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: ERL作为强化学习的重要方向，需在算法多样性、效率优化及理论分析上进一步突破，以推动其在更多领域的应用。

authors_text: Shay Dekel,Yosi Keller,Martin Cadik
title: Estimating Extreme 3D Image Rotation with Transformer Cross-Attention
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 交叉注意力估计极端 3D 图像旋转
abstract: The estimation of large and extreme image rotation plays a key role in multiple computer vision domains, where the rotated images are related by a limited or a non-overlapping field of view. Contemporary approaches apply convolutional neural networks to compute a 4D correlation volume to estimate the relative rotation between image pairs. In this work, we propose a cross-attention-based approach that utilizes CNN feature maps and a Transformer-Encoder, to compute the cross-attention between the activation maps of the image pairs, which is shown to be an improved equivalent of the 4D correlation volume, used in previous works. In the suggested approach, higher attention scores are associated with image regions that encode visual cues of rotation. Our approach is end-to-end trainable and optimizes a simple regression loss. It is experimentally shown to outperform contemporary state-of-the-art schemes when applied to commonly used image rotation datasets and benchmarks, and establishes a new state-of-the-art accuracy on these datasets. We make our code publicly available.
summary: The estimation of large and extreme image rotation plays a key role in multiple computer vision domains, where the rotated images are related by a limited or a non-overlapping field of view. Contemporary approaches apply convolutional neural networks to compute a 4D correlation volume to estimate the relative rotation between image pairs. In this work, we propose a cross-attention-based approach that utilizes CNN feature maps and a Transformer-Encoder, to compute the cross-attention between the activation maps of the image pairs, which is shown to be an improved equivalent of the 4D correlation volume, used in previous works. In the suggested approach, higher attention scores are associated with image regions that encode visual cues of rotation. Our approach is end-to-end trainable and optimizes a simple regression loss. It is experimentally shown to outperform contemporary state-of-the-art schemes when applied to commonly used image rotation datasets and benchmarks, and establishes a new state-of-the-art accuracy on these datasets. We make our code publicly available.
abstract_zh: 大且极端图像旋转的估计在多个计算机视觉领域中起着关键作用，其中旋转图像通过有限或不重叠的视场相关。现代方法应用卷积神经网络来计算 4D 相关体积，以估计图像对之间的相对旋转。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于交叉注意力的方法，利用 CNN 特征图和 Transformer-Encoder 来计算图像对的激活图之间的交叉注意力，这被证明是先前工作中使用的 4D 相关体积的改进等价物。在建议的方法中，较高的注意力分数与编码旋转视觉线索的图像区域相关。我们的方法是端到端可训练的，并优化了简单的回归损失。实验表明，当应用于常用的图像旋转数据集和基准时，它的性能优于当代最先进的方案，并在这些数据集上建立了新的最先进的精度。我们公开我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer交叉注意力机制的3D图像极端旋转估计方法，用于解决图像对之间存在有限或非重叠视野时的旋转估计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖卷积神经网络计算4D相关体积来估计图像旋转，但存在计算复杂度高、精度受限等问题。本文旨在通过引入Transformer的交叉注意力机制，提升旋转估计的效率和准确性。
AI.method: 结合CNN特征图与Transformer-Encoder，通过计算图像对激活图的交叉注意力，替代传统4D相关体积。该方法端到端训练，优化简单回归损失函数。
AI.result: 在常用图像旋转数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的方案，并在多个基准测试中建立了新的最高精度记录。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的交叉注意力方法在图像旋转估计任务中展现出更高的效率和精度，为相关领域提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Ron Ferens,Yosi Keller
title: HyperPose: Hypernetwork-Infused Camera Pose Localization and an Extended Cambridge Landmarks Dataset
title_zh: HyperPose：注入超网络的相机姿势定位和扩展的剑桥地标数据集
comment: Accepted to The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2025
comments: Accepted to The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2025
abstract: In this work, we propose HyperPose, which utilizes hyper-networks in absolute camera pose regressors. The inherent appearance variations in natural scenes, attributable to environmental conditions, perspective, and lighting, induce a significant domain disparity between the training and test datasets. This disparity degrades the precision of contemporary localization networks. To mitigate this, we advocate for incorporating hypernetworks into single-scene and multiscene camera pose regression models. During inference, the hypernetwork dynamically computes adaptive weights for the localization regression heads based on the particular input image, effectively narrowing the domain gap. Using indoor and outdoor datasets, we evaluate the HyperPose methodology across multiple established absolute pose regression architectures. We also introduce and share the Extended Cambridge Landmarks (ECL), a novel localization dataset, based on the Cambridge Landmarks dataset, showing it in multiple seasons with significantly varying appearance conditions. Our empirical experiments demonstrate that HyperPose yields notable performance enhancements for single- and multi-scene architectures. We have made our source code, pre-trained models, and the ECL dataset openly available.
summary: In this work, we propose HyperPose, which utilizes hyper-networks in absolute camera pose regressors. The inherent appearance variations in natural scenes, attributable to environmental conditions, perspective, and lighting, induce a significant domain disparity between the training and test datasets. This disparity degrades the precision of contemporary localization networks. To mitigate this, we advocate for incorporating hypernetworks into single-scene and multiscene camera pose regression models. During inference, the hypernetwork dynamically computes adaptive weights for the localization regression heads based on the particular input image, effectively narrowing the domain gap. Using indoor and outdoor datasets, we evaluate the HyperPose methodology across multiple established absolute pose regression architectures. We also introduce and share the Extended Cambridge Landmarks (ECL), a novel localization dataset, based on the Cambridge Landmarks dataset, showing it in multiple seasons with significantly varying appearance conditions. Our empirical experiments demonstrate that HyperPose yields notable performance enhancements for single- and multi-scene architectures. We have made our source code, pre-trained models, and the ECL dataset openly available.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 HyperPose，它在绝对相机姿势回归器中利用超网络。由于环境条件、视角和照明的原因，自然场景中固有的外观变化会导致训练数据集和测试数据集之间存在显着的域差异。这种差异降低了当代定位网络的精度。为了缓解这一问题，我们主张将超网络纳入单场景和多场景相机姿态回归模型中。在推理过程中，超网络根据特定的输入图像动态计算定位回归头的自适应权重，有效缩小域差距。使用室内和室外数据集，我们跨多个已建立的绝对姿势回归架构评估 HyperPose 方法。我们还介绍并分享了扩展剑桥地标（ECL），这是一个基于剑桥地标数据集的新颖的本地化数据集，显示了它在多个季节中具有显着变化的外观条件。我们的实证实验表明，HyperPose 为单场景和多场景架构带来了显着的性能增强。我们公开了我们的源代码、预训练模型和 ECL 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperPose方法，通过引入超网络动态调整相机位姿回归模型参数，并扩展剑桥地标数据集以提升定位鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 自然场景中光照、视角等变化导致训练与测试数据域差异，现有定位模型在跨域场景下精度下降。
AI.method: 在单/多场景位姿回归模型中嵌入超网络，推理时根据输入图像生成自适应权重，同时构建包含多季节场景的扩展剑桥地标数据集（ECL）。
AI.result: HyperPose在室内外数据集上显著优于基线方法，ECL数据集验证了模型在复杂外观条件下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 超网络机制有效缩小域差距，提升定位精度，公开的ECL数据集为跨域定位研究提供新基准。

search_text: HyperPose: Hypernetwork-Infused Camera Pose Localization and an Extended Cambridge Landmarks Dataset HyperPose：注入超网络的相机姿势定位和扩展的剑桥地标数据集 In this work, we propose HyperPose, which utilizes hyper-networks in absolute camera pose regressors. The inherent appearance variations in natural scenes, attributable to environmental conditions, perspective, and lighting, induce a significant domain disparity between the training and test datasets. This disparity degrades the precision of contemporary localization networks. To mitigate this, we advocate for incorporating hypernetworks into single-scene and multiscene camera pose regression models. During inference, the hypernetwork dynamically computes adaptive weights for the localization regression heads based on the particular input image, effectively narrowing the domain gap. Using indoor and outdoor datasets, we evaluate the HyperPose methodology across multiple established absolute pose regression architectures. We also introduce and share the Extended Cambridge Landmarks (ECL), a novel localization dataset, based on the Cambridge Landmarks dataset, showing it in multiple seasons with significantly varying appearance conditions. Our empirical experiments demonstrate that HyperPose yields notable performance enhancements for single- and multi-scene architectures. We have made our source code, pre-trained models, and the ECL dataset openly available. 在这项工作中，我们提出了 HyperPose，它在绝对相机姿势回归器中利用超网络。由于环境条件、视角和照明的原因，自然场景中固有的外观变化会导致训练数据集和测试数据集之间存在显着的域差异。这种差异降低了当代定位网络的精度。为了缓解这一问题，我们主张将超网络纳入单场景和多场景相机姿态回归模型中。在推理过程中，超网络根据特定的输入图像动态计算定位回归头的自适应权重，有效缩小域差距。使用室内和室外数据集，我们跨多个已建立的绝对姿势回归架构评估 HyperPose 方法。我们还介绍并分享了扩展剑桥地标（ECL），这是一个基于剑桥地标数据集的新颖的本地化数据集，显示了它在多个季节中具有显着变化的外观条件。我们的实证实验表明，HyperPose 为单场景和多场景架构带来了显着的性能增强。我们公开了我们的源代码、预训练模型和 ECL 数据集。 本文提出HyperPose方法，通过引入超网络动态调整相机位姿回归模型参数，并扩展剑桥地标数据集以提升定位鲁棒性。 Ron Ferens,Yosi Keller cs.CV

authors_text: Shashank Yadav
title: Socialbots and the Challenges of Cyberspace Awareness
title_zh: 社交机器人和网络空间意识的挑战
abstract: As security communities brace for the emerging social automation based threats, we examine the mechanisms of developing situation awareness in cyberspace and the governance issues that socialbots bring into this existing paradigm of cyber situation awareness. We point out that an organisation's situation awareness in cyberspace is a phenomena fundamentally distinct from the original conception of situation awareness, requiring continuous data exchange and knowledge management where the standard implementation mechanisms require significant policy attention in light of threats like malicious social automation. We conceptualise Cyberspace Awareness as a socio-technical phenomena with Syntactic, Semantic, and Operatic dimensions - each subject to a number of stressors which are exacerbated under social automation based threats. The paper contributes to the ideas of situational awareness in cyberspace, and characterises the challenges therein around tackling the increasingly social and often pervasive, automation in cyber threat environments.
summary: As security communities brace for the emerging social automation based threats, we examine the mechanisms of developing situation awareness in cyberspace and the governance issues that socialbots bring into this existing paradigm of cyber situation awareness. We point out that an organisation's situation awareness in cyberspace is a phenomena fundamentally distinct from the original conception of situation awareness, requiring continuous data exchange and knowledge management where the standard implementation mechanisms require significant policy attention in light of threats like malicious social automation. We conceptualise Cyberspace Awareness as a socio-technical phenomena with Syntactic, Semantic, and Operatic dimensions - each subject to a number of stressors which are exacerbated under social automation based threats. The paper contributes to the ideas of situational awareness in cyberspace, and characterises the challenges therein around tackling the increasingly social and often pervasive, automation in cyber threat environments.
abstract_zh: 当安全社区为新兴的基于社会自动化的威胁做好准备时，我们研究了网络空间中态势感知的发展机制以及社交机器人带入现有网络态势感知范式的治理问题。我们指出，组织在网络空间中的态势感知是一种与最初的态势感知概念根本不同的现象，需要持续的数据交换和知识管理，其中标准实施机制需要针对恶意社会自动化等威胁进行重大政策关注。我们将网络空间意识概念化为一种具有句法、语义和歌剧维度的社会技术现象——每个维度都会受到许多压力源的影响，而这些压力源在基于社会自动化的威胁下会加剧。该论文提出了网络空间态势感知的理念，并描述了应对网络威胁环境中日益社会化且普遍存在的自动化所面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了社交机器人（Socialbots）对网络空间态势感知带来的挑战，分析了现有治理框架在应对自动化威胁时的不足，并提出了新的理论模型。
AI.motivation: 随着社交自动化威胁的兴起，传统网络态势感知模型难以应对社交机器人带来的复杂挑战，需重新审视其治理机制与技术框架。
AI.method: 通过概念化分析，提出网络空间态势感知的三维度模型（句法、语义、操作层面），并结合社交自动化威胁的特性进行压力测试与理论推导。
AI.result: 明确了社交自动化威胁对网络态势感知的多维影响，揭示了现有治理机制在数据交换、知识管理及政策制定方面的关键缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 传统态势感知理论需向社会技术系统转型，未来研究应聚焦跨维度协同治理机制与动态适应性政策框架的构建。

authors_text: Yuta Tsuji,Tatsuya Yatagawa,Hiroyuki Kubo,Shigeo Morishima
title: Event-based Camera Simulation using Monte Carlo Path Tracing with Adaptive Denoising
title_zh: 使用蒙特卡罗路径追踪和自适应降噪进行基于事件的相机模拟
abstract: This paper presents an algorithm to obtain an event-based video from noisy frames given by physics-based Monte Carlo path tracing over a synthetic 3D scene. Given the nature of dynamic vision sensor (DVS), rendering event-based video can be viewed as a process of detecting the changes from noisy brightness values. We extend a denoising method based on a weighted local regression (WLR) to detect the brightness changes rather than applying denoising to every pixel. Specifically, we derive a threshold to determine the likelihood of event occurrence and reduce the number of times to perform the regression. Our method is robust to noisy video frames obtained from a few path-traced samples. Despite its efficiency, our method performs comparably to or even better than an approach that exhaustively denoises every frame.
summary: This paper presents an algorithm to obtain an event-based video from noisy frames given by physics-based Monte Carlo path tracing over a synthetic 3D scene. Given the nature of dynamic vision sensor (DVS), rendering event-based video can be viewed as a process of detecting the changes from noisy brightness values. We extend a denoising method based on a weighted local regression (WLR) to detect the brightness changes rather than applying denoising to every pixel. Specifically, we derive a threshold to determine the likelihood of event occurrence and reduce the number of times to perform the regression. Our method is robust to noisy video frames obtained from a few path-traced samples. Despite its efficiency, our method performs comparably to or even better than an approach that exhaustively denoises every frame.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种算法，可从合成 3D 场景上基于物理的蒙特卡罗路径追踪给出的噪声帧中获取基于事件的视频。鉴于动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 的性质，渲染基于事件的视频可以被视为检测噪声亮度值变化的过程。我们扩展了基于加权局部回归（WLR）的去噪方法来检测亮度变化，而不是对每个像素应用去噪。具体来说，我们推导出一个阈值来确定事件发生的可能性并减少执行回归的次数。我们的方法对于从一些路径跟踪样本获得的噪声视频帧具有鲁棒性。尽管效率很高，但我们的方法的性能与对每帧进行彻底去噪的方法相当甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛路径追踪与自适应降噪算法的事件相机模拟方法，用于从噪声帧生成事件视频。
AI.motivation: 传统帧间降噪方法计算成本高，而事件相机（DVS）需高效检测亮度变化，因此需开发更高效的事件视频生成方案。
AI.method: 扩展加权局部回归（WLR）方法以检测亮度变化，通过设定阈值减少回归计算次数，实现自适应降噪。
AI.result: 该方法在少量路径追踪样本下仍能生成高质量事件视频，效率优于逐帧降噪方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应降噪算法有效平衡了计算效率与事件视频质量，适用于噪声较大的合成场景。

search_text: Event-based Camera Simulation using Monte Carlo Path Tracing with Adaptive Denoising 使用蒙特卡罗路径追踪和自适应降噪进行基于事件的相机模拟 This paper presents an algorithm to obtain an event-based video from noisy frames given by physics-based Monte Carlo path tracing over a synthetic 3D scene. Given the nature of dynamic vision sensor (DVS), rendering event-based video can be viewed as a process of detecting the changes from noisy brightness values. We extend a denoising method based on a weighted local regression (WLR) to detect the brightness changes rather than applying denoising to every pixel. Specifically, we derive a threshold to determine the likelihood of event occurrence and reduce the number of times to perform the regression. Our method is robust to noisy video frames obtained from a few path-traced samples. Despite its efficiency, our method performs comparably to or even better than an approach that exhaustively denoises every frame. 本文提出了一种算法，可从合成 3D 场景上基于物理的蒙特卡罗路径追踪给出的噪声帧中获取基于事件的视频。鉴于动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 的性质，渲染基于事件的视频可以被视为检测噪声亮度值变化的过程。我们扩展了基于加权局部回归（WLR）的去噪方法来检测亮度变化，而不是对每个像素应用去噪。具体来说，我们推导出一个阈值来确定事件发生的可能性并减少执行回归的次数。我们的方法对于从一些路径跟踪样本获得的噪声视频帧具有鲁棒性。尽管效率很高，但我们的方法的性能与对每帧进行彻底去噪的方法相当甚至更好。 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛路径追踪与自适应降噪算法的事件相机模拟方法，用于从噪声帧生成事件视频。 Yuta Tsuji,Tatsuya Yatagawa,Hiroyuki Kubo,Shigeo Morishima cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Tianyu Liu,Fu Zhang,Fei Gao,Jia Pan
title: Tight Collision Probability for UAV Motion Planning in Uncertain Environment
title_zh: 不确定环境下无人机运动规划的紧碰撞概率
abstract: Operating unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in complex environments that feature dynamic obstacles and external disturbances poses significant challenges, primarily due to the inherent uncertainty in such scenarios. Additionally, inaccurate robot localization and modeling errors further exacerbate these challenges. Recent research on UAV motion planning in static environments has been unable to cope with the rapidly changing surroundings, resulting in trajectories that may not be feasible. Moreover, previous approaches that have addressed dynamic obstacles or external disturbances in isolation are insufficient to handle the complexities of such environments. This paper proposes a reliable motion planning framework for UAVs, integrating various uncertainties into a chance constraint that characterizes the uncertainty in a probabilistic manner. The chance constraint provides a probabilistic safety certificate by calculating the collision probability between the robot's Gaussian-distributed forward reachable set and states of obstacles. To reduce the conservatism of the planned trajectory, we propose a tight upper bound of the collision probability and evaluate it both exactly and approximately. The approximated solution is used to generate motion primitives as a reference trajectory, while the exact solution is leveraged to iteratively optimize the trajectory for better results. Our method is thoroughly tested in simulation and real-world experiments, verifying its reliability and effectiveness in uncertain environments.
summary: Operating unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in complex environments that feature dynamic obstacles and external disturbances poses significant challenges, primarily due to the inherent uncertainty in such scenarios. Additionally, inaccurate robot localization and modeling errors further exacerbate these challenges. Recent research on UAV motion planning in static environments has been unable to cope with the rapidly changing surroundings, resulting in trajectories that may not be feasible. Moreover, previous approaches that have addressed dynamic obstacles or external disturbances in isolation are insufficient to handle the complexities of such environments. This paper proposes a reliable motion planning framework for UAVs, integrating various uncertainties into a chance constraint that characterizes the uncertainty in a probabilistic manner. The chance constraint provides a probabilistic safety certificate by calculating the collision probability between the robot's Gaussian-distributed forward reachable set and states of obstacles. To reduce the conservatism of the planned trajectory, we propose a tight upper bound of the collision probability and evaluate it both exactly and approximately. The approximated solution is used to generate motion primitives as a reference trajectory, while the exact solution is leveraged to iteratively optimize the trajectory for better results. Our method is thoroughly tested in simulation and real-world experiments, verifying its reliability and effectiveness in uncertain environments.
abstract_zh: 在具有动态障碍和外部干扰的复杂环境中操作无人机（UAV）带来了巨大的挑战，这主要是由于此类场景中固有的不确定性。此外，不准确的机器人定位和建模错误进一步加剧了这些挑战。最近对静态环境中无人机运动规划的研究无法应对快速变化的环境，导致轨迹可能不可行。此外，以前孤立地解决动态障碍或外部干扰的方法不足以处理此类环境的复杂性。本文提出了一种可靠的无人机运动规划框架，将各种不确定性整合到机会约束中，以概率的方式表征不确定性。机会约束通过计算机器人的高斯分布前向可达集与障碍物状态之间的碰撞概率来提供概率安全证书。为了减少计划轨迹的保守性，我们提出了碰撞概率的严格上限，并对其进行精确和近似评估。近似解用于生成运动基元作为参考轨迹，而精确解用于迭代优化轨迹以获得更好的结果。我们的方法在模拟和现实实验中经过了彻底的测试，验证了其在不确定环境中的可靠性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对不确定环境的无人机运动规划框架，通过概率约束计算碰撞概率，以提高轨迹规划的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机运动规划方法难以应对动态障碍物、外部干扰及定位误差等多重不确定性，导致轨迹不可行或过于保守。
AI.method: 将多种不确定性整合为概率约束，通过高斯分布的可达集与障碍物状态计算碰撞概率，并提出紧致上界进行精确与近似求解，结合运动原语生成与迭代优化提升轨迹质量。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验验证了该方法在不确定环境中的可靠性与有效性，能够生成安全且平滑的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架通过概率安全证书和紧致碰撞概率上界，为复杂动态环境下的无人机运动规划提供了兼顾安全性与轨迹质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Hanwen Cao,Jianshu Zhou,Junda Huang,Yichuan Li,Ng Cheng Meng,Rui Cao,Qi Dou,Yunhui Liu
title: Two-Stage Grasping: A New Bin Picking Framework for Small Objects
title_zh: 两阶段抓取：一种新的小物体分拣框架
abstract: This paper proposes a novel bin picking framework, two-stage grasping, aiming at precise grasping of cluttered small objects. Object density estimation and rough grasping are conducted in the first stage. Fine segmentation, detection, grasping, and pushing are performed in the second stage. A small object bin picking system has been realized to exhibit the concept of two-stage grasping. Experiments have shown the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Unlike traditional bin picking methods focusing on vision-based grasping planning using classic frameworks, the challenges of picking cluttered small objects can be solved by the proposed new framework with simple vision detection and planning.
summary: This paper proposes a novel bin picking framework, two-stage grasping, aiming at precise grasping of cluttered small objects. Object density estimation and rough grasping are conducted in the first stage. Fine segmentation, detection, grasping, and pushing are performed in the second stage. A small object bin picking system has been realized to exhibit the concept of two-stage grasping. Experiments have shown the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Unlike traditional bin picking methods focusing on vision-based grasping planning using classic frameworks, the challenges of picking cluttered small objects can be solved by the proposed new framework with simple vision detection and planning.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的垃圾箱拾取框架，两阶段抓取，旨在精确抓取杂乱的小物体。第一阶段进行物体密度估计和粗略抓取。第二阶段进行精细分割、检测、抓取、推送。一个小物体箱拾取系统已经实现，以展示两阶段抓取的概念。实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。与使用经典框架的基于视觉的抓取规划的传统箱子拾取方法不同，所提出的具有简单视觉检测和规划的新框架可以解决拾取杂乱小物体的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段抓取框架，用于解决杂乱环境中小物体的精确料箱拣选问题。
AI.motivation: 传统料箱拣选方法依赖复杂视觉系统，难以高效处理杂乱小物体抓取的挑战。
AI.method: 分两阶段实现：第一阶段进行物体密度估计与粗略抓取，第二阶段通过精细分割、检测、抓取和推动完成精确操作。
AI.result: 实验验证了该框架在小物体抓取任务中的有效性，展示了其相较于传统方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段抓取框架通过简化视觉检测与规划流程，成功解决了杂乱小物体抓取难题，为相关应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhongyi Shui,Sunyi Zheng,Chenglu Zhu,Shichuan Zhang,Xiaoxuan Yu,Honglin Li,Jingxiong Li,Pingyi Chen,Lin Yang
title: DPA-P2PNet: Deformable Proposal-aware P2PNet for Accurate Point-based Cell Detection
title_zh: DPA-P2PNet：可变形提案感知 P2PNet，用于精确的基于点的细胞检测
abstract: Point-based cell detection (PCD), which pursues high-performance cell sensing under low-cost data annotation, has garnered increased attention in computational pathology community. Unlike mainstream PCD methods that rely on intermediate density map representations, the Point-to-Point network (P2PNet) has recently emerged as an end-to-end solution for PCD, demonstrating impressive cell detection accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, P2PNet is limited to decoding from a single-level feature map due to the scale-agnostic property of point proposals, which is insufficient to leverage multi-scale information. Moreover, the spatial distribution of pre-set point proposals is biased from that of cells, leading to inaccurate cell localization. To lift these limitations, we present DPA-P2PNet in this work. The proposed method directly extracts multi-scale features for decoding according to the coordinates of point proposals on hierarchical feature maps. On this basis, we further devise deformable point proposals to mitigate the positional bias between proposals and potential cells to promote cell localization. Inspired by practical pathological diagnosis that usually combines high-level tissue structure and low-level cell morphology for accurate cell classification, we propose a multi-field-of-view (mFoV) variant of DPA-P2PNet to accommodate additional large FoV images with tissue information as model input. Finally, we execute the first self-supervised pre-training on immunohistochemistry histopathology image data and evaluate the suitability of four representative self-supervised methods on the PCD task. Experimental results on three benchmarks and a large-scale and real-world interval dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed models over the state-of-the-art counterparts. Codes and pre-trained weights will be available.
summary: Point-based cell detection (PCD), which pursues high-performance cell sensing under low-cost data annotation, has garnered increased attention in computational pathology community. Unlike mainstream PCD methods that rely on intermediate density map representations, the Point-to-Point network (P2PNet) has recently emerged as an end-to-end solution for PCD, demonstrating impressive cell detection accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, P2PNet is limited to decoding from a single-level feature map due to the scale-agnostic property of point proposals, which is insufficient to leverage multi-scale information. Moreover, the spatial distribution of pre-set point proposals is biased from that of cells, leading to inaccurate cell localization. To lift these limitations, we present DPA-P2PNet in this work. The proposed method directly extracts multi-scale features for decoding according to the coordinates of point proposals on hierarchical feature maps. On this basis, we further devise deformable point proposals to mitigate the positional bias between proposals and potential cells to promote cell localization. Inspired by practical pathological diagnosis that usually combines high-level tissue structure and low-level cell morphology for accurate cell classification, we propose a multi-field-of-view (mFoV) variant of DPA-P2PNet to accommodate additional large FoV images with tissue information as model input. Finally, we execute the first self-supervised pre-training on immunohistochemistry histopathology image data and evaluate the suitability of four representative self-supervised methods on the PCD task. Experimental results on three benchmarks and a large-scale and real-world interval dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed models over the state-of-the-art counterparts. Codes and pre-trained weights will be available.
abstract_zh: 基于点的细胞检测（PCD）追求低成本数据注释下的高性能细胞传感，在计算病理学界引起了越来越多的关注。与依赖中间密度图表示的主流 PCD 方法不同，点对点网络 (P2PNet) 最近作为 PCD 的端到端解决方案出现，展示了令人印象深刻的细胞检测精度和效率。然而，由于点提案的尺度不可知特性，P2PNet 仅限于从单级特征图进行解码，这不足以利用多尺度信息。此外，预设点提案的空间分布与小区的空间分布存在偏差，导致小区定位不准确。为了解除这些限制，我们在这项工作中提出了 DPA-P2PNet。该方法根据分层特征图上点建议的坐标直接提取多尺度特征进行解码。在此基础上，我们进一步设计可变形点提案，以减轻提案和潜在细胞之间的位置偏差，以促进细胞定位。受到实际病理诊断的启发，通常将高级组织结构和低级细胞形态结合起来以进行准确的细胞分类，我们提出了 DPA-P2PNet 的多视场（mFoV）变体，以容纳额外的大 FoV 图像和组织信息作为模型输入。最后，我们对免疫组织化学组织病理学图像数据执行第一次自监督预训练，并评估四种代表性自监督方法在 PCD 任务上的适用性。三个基准和大规模真实世界间隔数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的模型相对于最先进模型的优越性。代码和预训练权重将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPA-P2PNet，通过改进点提议机制和多尺度特征提取，提升点基细胞检测的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有P2PNet方法因单尺度特征提取和点提议分布偏差导致细胞定位不准确，需提升多尺度信息利用和定位精度。
AI.method: 基于层次化特征图提取多尺度特征，设计可变形点提议减少位置偏差，并引入多视野变体结合组织信息，配合自监督预训练优化模型。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集和真实大规模数据集上，DPA-P2PNet模型性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DPA-P2PNet通过多尺度特征融合与可变形提议机制，显著提升了点基细胞检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: DPA-P2PNet: Deformable Proposal-aware P2PNet for Accurate Point-based Cell Detection DPA-P2PNet：可变形提案感知 P2PNet，用于精确的基于点的细胞检测 Point-based cell detection (PCD), which pursues high-performance cell sensing under low-cost data annotation, has garnered increased attention in computational pathology community. Unlike mainstream PCD methods that rely on intermediate density map representations, the Point-to-Point network (P2PNet) has recently emerged as an end-to-end solution for PCD, demonstrating impressive cell detection accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, P2PNet is limited to decoding from a single-level feature map due to the scale-agnostic property of point proposals, which is insufficient to leverage multi-scale information. Moreover, the spatial distribution of pre-set point proposals is biased from that of cells, leading to inaccurate cell localization. To lift these limitations, we present DPA-P2PNet in this work. The proposed method directly extracts multi-scale features for decoding according to the coordinates of point proposals on hierarchical feature maps. On this basis, we further devise deformable point proposals to mitigate the positional bias between proposals and potential cells to promote cell localization. Inspired by practical pathological diagnosis that usually combines high-level tissue structure and low-level cell morphology for accurate cell classification, we propose a multi-field-of-view (mFoV) variant of DPA-P2PNet to accommodate additional large FoV images with tissue information as model input. Finally, we execute the first self-supervised pre-training on immunohistochemistry histopathology image data and evaluate the suitability of four representative self-supervised methods on the PCD task. Experimental results on three benchmarks and a large-scale and real-world interval dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed models over the state-of-the-art counterparts. Codes and pre-trained weights will be available. 基于点的细胞检测（PCD）追求低成本数据注释下的高性能细胞传感，在计算病理学界引起了越来越多的关注。与依赖中间密度图表示的主流 PCD 方法不同，点对点网络 (P2PNet) 最近作为 PCD 的端到端解决方案出现，展示了令人印象深刻的细胞检测精度和效率。然而，由于点提案的尺度不可知特性，P2PNet 仅限于从单级特征图进行解码，这不足以利用多尺度信息。此外，预设点提案的空间分布与小区的空间分布存在偏差，导致小区定位不准确。为了解除这些限制，我们在这项工作中提出了 DPA-P2PNet。该方法根据分层特征图上点建议的坐标直接提取多尺度特征进行解码。在此基础上，我们进一步设计可变形点提案，以减轻提案和潜在细胞之间的位置偏差，以促进细胞定位。受到实际病理诊断的启发，通常将高级组织结构和低级细胞形态结合起来以进行准确的细胞分类，我们提出了 DPA-P2PNet 的多视场（mFoV）变体，以容纳额外的大 FoV 图像和组织信息作为模型输入。最后，我们对免疫组织化学组织病理学图像数据执行第一次自监督预训练，并评估四种代表性自监督方法在 PCD 任务上的适用性。三个基准和大规模真实世界间隔数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的模型相对于最先进模型的优越性。代码和预训练权重将可用。 本文提出DPA-P2PNet，通过改进点提议机制和多尺度特征提取，提升点基细胞检测的精度。 Zhongyi Shui,Sunyi Zheng,Chenglu Zhu,Shichuan Zhang,Xiaoxuan Yu,Honglin Li,Jingxiong Li,Pingyi Chen,Lin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Rashen Fernando,Pamudu Ranasinghe,Udula Ranasinghe,Janaka Wijayakulasooriya,Pantaleon Perera
title: Hybrid Y-Net Architecture for Singing Voice Separation
title_zh: 用于歌声分离的混合 Y-Net 架构
abstract: This research paper presents a novel deep learning-based neural network architecture, named Y-Net, for achieving music source separation. The proposed architecture performs end-to-end hybrid source separation by extracting features from both spectrogram and waveform domains. Inspired by the U-Net architecture, Y-Net predicts a spectrogram mask to separate vocal sources from a mixture signal. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed architecture for music source separation with fewer parameters. Overall, our work presents a promising approach for improving the accuracy and efficiency of music source separation.
summary: This research paper presents a novel deep learning-based neural network architecture, named Y-Net, for achieving music source separation. The proposed architecture performs end-to-end hybrid source separation by extracting features from both spectrogram and waveform domains. Inspired by the U-Net architecture, Y-Net predicts a spectrogram mask to separate vocal sources from a mixture signal. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed architecture for music source separation with fewer parameters. Overall, our work presents a promising approach for improving the accuracy and efficiency of music source separation.
abstract_zh: 本研究论文提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的神经网络架构，称为 Y-Net，用于实现音乐源分离。所提出的架构通过从频谱图和波形域中提取特征来执行端到端混合源分离。受 U-Net 架构的启发，Y-Net 预测了一个频谱图掩模，以将声音源与混合信号分开。我们的结果证明了所提出的架构在使用较少参数的音乐源分离方面的有效性。总的来说，我们的工作为提高音乐源分离的准确性和效率提供了一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Y-Net的混合神经网络架构，用于实现更高效的音乐人声分离。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐源分离方法普遍存在参数量大或分离精度不足的问题，需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构设计Y-Net，同时提取频谱图和波形域特征，并通过预测频谱掩码实现人声分离。
AI.result: 实验表明Y-Net在参数量更少的情况下实现了有效的音乐源分离，验证了方法的高效性。
AI.conclusion: Y-Net为提升音乐源分离的准确率和计算效率提供了可行的新型网络架构方案。

authors_text: Jiarui Lei,Xiaobo Hu,Yue Wang,Dong Liu
title: PyramidFlow: High-Resolution Defect Contrastive Localization using Pyramid Normalizing Flow
title_zh: PyramidFlow：使用金字塔归一化流进行高分辨率缺陷对比定位
abstract: During industrial processing, unforeseen defects may arise in products due to uncontrollable factors. Although unsupervised methods have been successful in defect localization, the usual use of pre-trained models results in low-resolution outputs, which damages visual performance. To address this issue, we propose PyramidFlow, the first fully normalizing flow method without pre-trained models that enables high-resolution defect localization. Specifically, we propose a latent template-based defect contrastive localization paradigm to reduce intra-class variance, as the pre-trained models do. In addition, PyramidFlow utilizes pyramid-like normalizing flows for multi-scale fusing and volume normalization to help generalization. Our comprehensive studies on MVTecAD demonstrate the proposed method outperforms the comparable algorithms that do not use external priors, even achieving state-of-the-art performance in more challenging BTAD scenarios.
summary: During industrial processing, unforeseen defects may arise in products due to uncontrollable factors. Although unsupervised methods have been successful in defect localization, the usual use of pre-trained models results in low-resolution outputs, which damages visual performance. To address this issue, we propose PyramidFlow, the first fully normalizing flow method without pre-trained models that enables high-resolution defect localization. Specifically, we propose a latent template-based defect contrastive localization paradigm to reduce intra-class variance, as the pre-trained models do. In addition, PyramidFlow utilizes pyramid-like normalizing flows for multi-scale fusing and volume normalization to help generalization. Our comprehensive studies on MVTecAD demonstrate the proposed method outperforms the comparable algorithms that do not use external priors, even achieving state-of-the-art performance in more challenging BTAD scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在工业加工过程中，由于不可控因素，产品可能会出现不可预见的缺陷。尽管无监督方法在缺陷定位方面取得了成功，但通常使用预训练模型会导致低分辨率输出，从而损害视觉性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 PyramidFlow，这是第一个完全标准化的流方法，无需预先训练的模型，可以实现高分辨率缺陷定位。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于潜在模板的缺陷对比定位范例，以减少类内方差，就像预训练模型一样。此外，PyramidFlow 利用类似金字塔的归一化流进行多尺度融合和体积归一化，以帮助泛化。我们对 MVTecAD 的全面研究表明，所提出的方法优于不使用外部先验的同类算法，甚至在更具挑战性的 BTAD 场景中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出PyramidFlow方法实现高分辨率缺陷定位
AI.motivation: 现有方法因使用预训练模型导致低分辨率输出，影响视觉效果，需改进
AI.method: 基于潜在模板的对比定位范式，结合金字塔归一化流和体积归一化
AI.result: 在MVTecAD数据集上优于其他方法，BTAD场景下达到SOTA性能
AI.conclusion: PyramidFlow有效解决高分辨率缺陷定位问题，验证方法有效性

authors_text: Min Wei,Xuesong Zhang
title: Super-Resolution Neural Operator
title_zh: 超分辨率神经算子
abstract: We propose Super-resolution Neural Operator (SRNO), a deep operator learning framework that can resolve high-resolution (HR) images at arbitrary scales from the low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Treating the LR-HR image pairs as continuous functions approximated with different grid sizes, SRNO learns the mapping between the corresponding function spaces. From the perspective of approximation theory, SRNO first embeds the LR input into a higher-dimensional latent representation space, trying to capture sufficient basis functions, and then iteratively approximates the implicit image function with a kernel integral mechanism, followed by a final dimensionality reduction step to generate the RGB representation at the target coordinates. The key characteristics distinguishing SRNO from prior continuous SR works are: 1) the kernel integral in each layer is efficiently implemented via the Galerkin-type attention, which possesses non-local properties in the spatial domain and therefore benefits the grid-free continuum; and 2) the multilayer attention architecture allows for the dynamic latent basis update, which is crucial for SR problems to "hallucinate" high-frequency information from the LR image. Experiments show that SRNO outperforms existing continuous SR methods in terms of both accuracy and running time. Our code is at https://github.com/2y7c3/Super-Resolution-Neural-Operator
summary: We propose Super-resolution Neural Operator (SRNO), a deep operator learning framework that can resolve high-resolution (HR) images at arbitrary scales from the low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Treating the LR-HR image pairs as continuous functions approximated with different grid sizes, SRNO learns the mapping between the corresponding function spaces. From the perspective of approximation theory, SRNO first embeds the LR input into a higher-dimensional latent representation space, trying to capture sufficient basis functions, and then iteratively approximates the implicit image function with a kernel integral mechanism, followed by a final dimensionality reduction step to generate the RGB representation at the target coordinates. The key characteristics distinguishing SRNO from prior continuous SR works are: 1) the kernel integral in each layer is efficiently implemented via the Galerkin-type attention, which possesses non-local properties in the spatial domain and therefore benefits the grid-free continuum; and 2) the multilayer attention architecture allows for the dynamic latent basis update, which is crucial for SR problems to "hallucinate" high-frequency information from the LR image. Experiments show that SRNO outperforms existing continuous SR methods in terms of both accuracy and running time. Our code is at https://github.com/2y7c3/Super-Resolution-Neural-Operator
abstract_zh: 我们提出了超分辨率神经算子（SRNO），这是一种深度算子学习框架，可以从低分辨率（LR）图像中解析出任意尺度的高分辨率（HR）图像。将 LR-HR 图像对视为具有不同网格大小的近似连续函数，SRNO 学习相应函数空间之间的映射。从近似理论的角度来看，SRNO首先将LR输入嵌入到更高维的潜在表示空间中，试图捕获足够的基函数，然后利用核积分机制迭代地近似隐式图像函数，最后进行降维步骤以生成目标坐标处的RGB表示。 SRNO 与之前的连续 SR 工作区别的关键特征是：1）每层的核积分都是通过伽辽金型注意力机制有效实现的，它在空间域中具有非局部属性，因此有利于无网格连续体； 2）多层注意力架构允许动态潜在基础更新，这对于 SR 问题“幻觉”来自 LR 图像的高频信息至关重要。实验表明，SRNO 在准确性和运行时间方面均优于现有的连续 SR 方法。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/2y7c3/Super-Resolution-Neural-Operator

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SRNO的深度算子学习框架，能够从低分辨率图像中生成任意尺度的高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 现有连续超分辨率方法在处理任意尺度图像时存在效率与精度不足的问题，难以有效捕捉高频细节信息。
AI.method: SRNO通过将低分辨率图像嵌入高维潜在空间，利用核积分机制迭代逼近隐式图像函数，并结合Galerkin型注意力实现非局部空间建模，动态更新潜在基函数以生成目标坐标下的RGB表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，SRNO在精度和运行时间上均优于现有连续超分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: SRNO通过非局部注意力机制与动态基函数更新，有效解决了连续超分辨率中的尺度适应性与高频信息重建问题。

authors_text: Lv He
title: Multi-vehicle Platoon Overtaking Using NoisyNet Multi-Agent Deep Q-Learning Network
title_zh: 使用 NoisyNet 多智能体深度 Q 学习网络进行多车排超车
abstract: With the recent advancements in Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication technology, autonomous vehicles are able to connect and collaborate in platoon, minimizing accident risks, costs, and energy consumption. The significant benefits of vehicle platooning have gained increasing attention from the automation and artificial intelligence areas. However, few studies have focused on platoon with overtaking. To address this problem, the NoisyNet multi-agent deep Q-learning algorithm is developed in this paper, which the NoisyNet is employed to improve the exploration of the environment. By considering the factors of overtake, speed, collision, time headway and following vehicles, a domain-tailored reward function is proposed to accomplish safe platoon overtaking with high speed. Finally, simulation results show that the proposed method achieves successfully overtake in various traffic density situations.
summary: With the recent advancements in Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication technology, autonomous vehicles are able to connect and collaborate in platoon, minimizing accident risks, costs, and energy consumption. The significant benefits of vehicle platooning have gained increasing attention from the automation and artificial intelligence areas. However, few studies have focused on platoon with overtaking. To address this problem, the NoisyNet multi-agent deep Q-learning algorithm is developed in this paper, which the NoisyNet is employed to improve the exploration of the environment. By considering the factors of overtake, speed, collision, time headway and following vehicles, a domain-tailored reward function is proposed to accomplish safe platoon overtaking with high speed. Finally, simulation results show that the proposed method achieves successfully overtake in various traffic density situations.
abstract_zh: 随着车对车通信技术的最新进展，自动驾驶车辆能够按队列进行连接和协作，从而最大限度地降低事故风险、成本和能源消耗。车辆编队行驶的显着优势越来越受到自动化和人工智能领域的关注。然而，很少有研究关注超车排。为了解决这个问题，本文开发了NoisyNet多智能体深度Q学习算法，利用NoisyNet来改进对环境的探索。通过考虑超车、速度、碰撞、车头时距和跟车等因素，提出了域定制的奖励函数来实现高速安全排队超车。最后仿真结果表明，该方法在各种交通密度情况下均能成功实现超车。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于NoisyNet多智能体深度Q学习算法，解决多车辆编队超车中的安全与效率问题。
AI.motivation: 车辆编队可降低风险与能耗，但现有研究缺乏对编队超车场景的探索，需开发新方法实现安全高效超车。
AI.method: 采用NoisyNet增强多智能体深度Q学习的环境探索能力，并设计融合超车、速度、碰撞等因子的定制奖励函数。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，该方法在多种交通密度下均能成功完成编队超车任务。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了超车安全性与效率，为自动驾驶编队控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Fanxing Meng,Jing Xiao
title: From Rolling Over to Walking: Enabling Humanoid Robots to Develop Complex Motor Skills
title_zh: 从翻身到行走：使人形机器人能够发展复杂的运动技能
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Video available at https://youtu.be/d0RqrW1EzjQ
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Video available at https://youtu.be/d0RqrW1EzjQ
abstract: This paper presents an innovative method for humanoid robots to acquire a comprehensive set of motor skills through reinforcement learning. The approach utilizes an achievement-triggered multi-path reward function rooted in developmental robotics principles, facilitating the robot to learn gross motor skills typically mastered by human infants within a single training phase. The proposed method outperforms standard reinforcement learning techniques in success rates and learning speed within a simulation environment. By leveraging the principles of self-discovery and exploration integral to infant learning, this method holds the potential to significantly advance humanoid robot motor skill acquisition.
summary: This paper presents an innovative method for humanoid robots to acquire a comprehensive set of motor skills through reinforcement learning. The approach utilizes an achievement-triggered multi-path reward function rooted in developmental robotics principles, facilitating the robot to learn gross motor skills typically mastered by human infants within a single training phase. The proposed method outperforms standard reinforcement learning techniques in success rates and learning speed within a simulation environment. By leveraging the principles of self-discovery and exploration integral to infant learning, this method holds the potential to significantly advance humanoid robot motor skill acquisition.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种创新方法，让仿人机器人通过强化学习获得一套全面的运动技能。该方法利用基于发育机器人原理的成就触发多路径奖励函数，促进机器人在单个训练阶段学习通常由人类婴儿掌握的粗大运动技能。所提出的方法在模拟环境中的成功率和学习速度方面优于标准强化学习技术。通过利用婴儿学习中自我发现和探索的原则，该方法具有显着促进人形机器人运动技能习得的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，使类人机器人能够通过单次训练阶段习得复杂的运动技能。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在机器人运动技能学习效率和成功率上存在不足，需借鉴人类婴儿发育过程中的自我探索机制。
AI.method: 设计基于发展机器人学原理的成就触发多路径奖励函数，模拟婴儿运动技能发育的阶段性特征。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中，该方法在运动技能成功率和学习速度上均优于传统强化学习技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模拟人类婴儿的自我发现机制，为类人机器人复杂运动技能的学习提供了新范式。

By leveraging the principles of self-discovery and exploration integral to infant learning, this method holds the potential to significantly advance humanoid robot motor skill acquisition. 本文提出了一种创新方法，让仿人机器人通过强化学习获得一套全面的运动技能。该方法利用基于发育机器人原理的成就触发多路径奖励函数，促进机器人在单个训练阶段学习通常由人类婴儿掌握的粗大运动技能。所提出的方法在模拟环境中的成功率和学习速度方面优于标准强化学习技术。通过利用婴儿学习中自我发现和探索的原则，该方法具有显着促进人形机器人运动技能习得的潜力。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，使类人机器人能够通过单次训练阶段习得复杂的运动技能。 Fanxing Meng,Jing Xiao cs.RO

authors_text: Casey Duckering
title: New Abstractions for Quantum Computing
title_zh: 量子计算的新抽象
comment: Dissertation for PhD at The University of Chicago department of Computer Science. Comprised of arXiv:1905.10481, arXiv:2002.10592, arXiv:2009.01982, and arXiv:2102.08451
comments: Dissertation for PhD at The University of Chicago department of Computer Science. Comprised of arXiv:1905.10481, arXiv:2002.10592, arXiv:2009.01982, and arXiv:2102.08451
abstract: The field of quantum computing is at an exciting time where we are constructing novel hardware, evaluating algorithms, and finding out what works best. As qubit technology grows and matures, we need to be ready to design and program larger quantum computer systems. An important aspect of systems design is layered abstractions to reduce complexity and guide intuition. Classical computer systems have built up many abstractions over their history including the layers of the hardware stack and programming abstractions like loops. Researchers initially ported these abstractions with little modification when designing quantum computer systems and only in recent years have some of those abstractions been broken in the name of optimization and efficiency. We argue that new or quantum-tailored abstractions are needed to get the most benefit out of quantum computer systems. We keep the benefits gained through breaking old abstraction by finding abstractions aligned with quantum physics and the technology. This dissertation is supported by three examples of abstractions that could become a core part of how we design and program quantum computers: third-level logical state as scratch space, memory as a third spacial dimension for quantum data, and hierarchical program structure.
summary: The field of quantum computing is at an exciting time where we are constructing novel hardware, evaluating algorithms, and finding out what works best. As qubit technology grows and matures, we need to be ready to design and program larger quantum computer systems. An important aspect of systems design is layered abstractions to reduce complexity and guide intuition. Classical computer systems have built up many abstractions over their history including the layers of the hardware stack and programming abstractions like loops. Researchers initially ported these abstractions with little modification when designing quantum computer systems and only in recent years have some of those abstractions been broken in the name of optimization and efficiency. We argue that new or quantum-tailored abstractions are needed to get the most benefit out of quantum computer systems. We keep the benefits gained through breaking old abstraction by finding abstractions aligned with quantum physics and the technology. This dissertation is supported by three examples of abstractions that could become a core part of how we design and program quantum computers: third-level logical state as scratch space, memory as a third spacial dimension for quantum data, and hierarchical program structure.
abstract_zh: 量子计算领域正处于一个激动人心的时刻，我们正在构建新颖的硬件、评估算法并找出最有效的方法。随着量子位技术的发展和成熟，我们需要准备好设计和编程更大的量子计算机系统。系统设计的一个重要方面是分层抽象，以降低复杂性并指导直觉。经典计算机系统在其历史上建立了许多抽象，包括硬件堆栈层和循环等编程抽象。研究人员最初在设计量子计算机系统时几乎不加修改地移植了这些抽象概念，直到最近几年，其中一些抽象概念才以优化和效率的名义被打破。我们认为，需要新的或量子定制的抽象来从量子计算机系统中获得最大的好处。我们通过寻找与量子物理和技术相一致的抽象来保留通过打破旧抽象所获得的好处。本论文得到了三个抽象示例的支持，这些抽象示例可能成为我们设计和编程量子计算机的核心部分：作为暂存空间的第三级逻辑状态、作为量子数据的第三个空间维度的内存以及分层程序结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出新的量子计算抽象方法，以优化量子计算机系统设计和编程。
AI.motivation: 经典计算机抽象在量子领域存在局限性，需通过量子特性定制化抽象以提高系统效率。
AI.method: 通过分析量子物理特性及硬件限制，提出三种新型抽象模型：逻辑状态临时存储、三维量子内存空间及分层程序结构。
AI.result: 构建了三个可能成为量子计算核心设计范式的抽象模型，为后续系统开发提供理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 量子定制化抽象能更有效发挥量子计算机潜力，需进一步验证其实际应用价值。
