Subsequently, a coarse mesh is extracted, and an iterative surface refining algorithm is developed to adaptively adjust both vertex positions and face density based on re-projected rendering errors. We jointly refine the appearance with geometry and bake it into texture images for real-time rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior mesh quality and competitive rendering quality. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 在基于图像的 3D 重建领域取得了重大突破。然而，它们的隐式体积表示与广泛采用的多边形网格有很大不同，并且缺乏常见 3D 软件和硬件的支持，导致它们的渲染和操作效率低下。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以从图像生成纹理表面网格。我们的方法首先使用 NeRF 有效地初始化几何结构和视图依赖性分解外观。随后，提取粗网格，并开发迭代表面细化算法，以根据重新投影的渲染误差自适应调整顶点位置和面密度。我们与几何体共同细化外观，并将其烘焙成纹理图像以进行实时渲染。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的网格质量和有竞争力的渲染质量。 本文提出一种从NeRF中恢复精细纹理网格的新方法，通过自适应表面优化解决隐式体积表示与传统3D软件不兼容的问题。 Jiaxiang Tang,Hang Zhou,Xiaokang Chen,Tianshu Hu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Gang Zeng cs.CV

authors_text: Vojtech Molek,Petr Hurtik,Pavel Vlasanek,David Adamczyk
title: Unproportional mosaicing
title_zh: 不成比例的马赛克
abstract: Data shift is a gap between data distribution used for training and data distribution encountered in the real-world. Data augmentations help narrow the gap by generating new data samples, increasing data variability, and data space coverage. We present a new data augmentation: Unproportional mosaicing (Unprop). Our augmentation randomly splits an image into various-sized blocks and swaps its content (pixels) while maintaining block sizes. Our method achieves a lower error rate when combined with other state-of-the-art augmentations.
summary: Data shift is a gap between data distribution used for training and data distribution encountered in the real-world. Data augmentations help narrow the gap by generating new data samples, increasing data variability, and data space coverage. We present a new data augmentation: Unproportional mosaicing (Unprop). Our augmentation randomly splits an image into various-sized blocks and swaps its content (pixels) while maintaining block sizes. Our method achieves a lower error rate when combined with other state-of-the-art augmentations.
abstract_zh: 数据转移是用于训练的数据分布与现实世界中遇到的数据分布之间的差距。数据增强通过生成新的数据样本、增加数据可变性和数据空间覆盖范围来帮助缩小差距。我们提出了一种新的数据增强：不成比例的镶嵌（Unprop）。我们的增强将图像随机分割成各种大小的块并交换其内容（像素），同时保持块大小。当与其他最先进的增强技术相结合时，我们的方法可以实现较低的错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的数据增强方法Unproportional mosaicing（Unprop），通过随机分割图像块并交换内容来缓解数据分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中训练数据与实际数据分布存在差异（数据偏移），传统数据增强方法难以充分提升模型泛化能力，需探索更有效的数据多样性增强手段。
AI.method: 将输入图像随机分割为不同尺寸的块，保持各块尺寸不变的前提下进行像素级内容交换，生成新的训练样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法与其他先进增强技术结合使用时，能有效降低模型错误率，提升在真实场景下的表现。
AI.conclusion: Unprop通过非对称块重组机制增强了数据多样性，为解决数据分布偏移问题提供了新的有效数据增强范式。

authors_text: Muhammad Shaheer,Jose Andres Millan-Romera,Hriday Bavle,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Javier Civera,Holger Voos
title: Graph-based Global Robot Localization Informing Situational Graphs with Architectural Graphs
title_zh: 基于图的全局机器人定位通过架构图提供情境图
abstract: In this paper, we propose a solution for legged robot localization using architectural plans. Our specific contributions towards this goal are several. Firstly, we develop a method for converting the plan of a building into what we denote as an architectural graph (A-Graph). When the robot starts moving in an environment, we assume it has no knowledge about it, and it estimates an online situational graph representation (S-Graph) of its surroundings. We develop a novel graph-to-graph matching method, in order to relate the S-Graph estimated online from the robot sensors and the A-Graph extracted from the building plans. Note the challenge in this, as the S-Graph may show a partial view of the full A-Graph, their nodes are heterogeneous and their reference frames are different. After the matching, both graphs are aligned and merged, resulting in what we denote as an informed Situational Graph (iS-Graph), with which we achieve global robot localization and exploitation of prior knowledge from the building plans. Our experiments show that our pipeline shows a higher robustness and a significantly lower pose error than several LiDAR localization baselines.
summary: In this paper, we propose a solution for legged robot localization using architectural plans. Our specific contributions towards this goal are several. Firstly, we develop a method for converting the plan of a building into what we denote as an architectural graph (A-Graph). When the robot starts moving in an environment, we assume it has no knowledge about it, and it estimates an online situational graph representation (S-Graph) of its surroundings. We develop a novel graph-to-graph matching method, in order to relate the S-Graph estimated online from the robot sensors and the A-Graph extracted from the building plans. Note the challenge in this, as the S-Graph may show a partial view of the full A-Graph, their nodes are heterogeneous and their reference frames are different. After the matching, both graphs are aligned and merged, resulting in what we denote as an informed Situational Graph (iS-Graph), with which we achieve global robot localization and exploitation of prior knowledge from the building plans. Our experiments show that our pipeline shows a higher robustness and a significantly lower pose error than several LiDAR localization baselines.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用建筑计划进行腿式机器人定位的解决方案。我们对这一目标的具体贡献有几个。首先，我们开发了一种将建筑物平面图转换为我们所说的建筑图（A-Graph）的方法。当机器人开始在某个环境中移动时，我们假设它对此一无所知，并且它会估计其周围环境的在线情景图表示（S-Graph）。我们开发了一种新颖的图对图匹配方法，以便将从机器人传感器在线估计的 S 图与从建筑平面图中提取的 A 图联系起来。请注意其中的挑战，因为 S 图可能显示完整 A 图的部分视图，它们的节点是异构的，并且它们的参考框架是不同的。匹配后，两个图被对齐和合并，产生我们所说的知情情景图（iS-Graph），通过它我们实现了机器人的全局定位和对建筑计划中先验知识的利用。我们的实验表明，与几个 LiDAR 定位基线相比，我们的流程具有更高的鲁棒性和显着更低的姿态误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于建筑平面图信息的足式机器人全局定位方法，通过构建和匹配场景图与建筑图实现精准定位。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人定位方法在复杂环境中鲁棒性不足，需利用建筑先验信息提升定位精度与可靠性。
AI.method: 将建筑平面图转换为建筑图（A-Graph），机器人在线构建场景图（S-Graph），通过图匹配算法对齐异构图结构并生成融合图（iS-Graph）实现定位。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在鲁棒性和定位精度上优于多种LiDAR定位基线，显著降低位姿误差。
AI.conclusion: 融合建筑先验信息与在线感知的图匹配方法可有效提升机器人全局定位性能，适用于复杂环境。

authors_text: Ruslan Shaydulin,Marco Pistoia
title: QAOA with $N\cdot p\geq 200$
title_zh: QAOA 与 $N\cdot p\geq 200$
comment: Experiments on H2 processor with $N\cdot p = 320$ added in v2
comments: Experiments on H2 processor with $N\cdot p = 320$ added in v2
abstract: One of the central goals of the DARPA Optimization with Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (ONISQ) program is to implement a hybrid quantum/classical optimization algorithm with high $N\cdot p$, where $N$ is the number of qubits and $p$ is the number of alternating applications of parameterized quantum operators in the protocol. In this note, we demonstrate the execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to the MaxCut problem on non-planar 3-regular graphs with $N\cdot p$ of up to $320$ on the Quantinuum H1-1 and H2 trapped-ion quantum processors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the highest $N\cdot p$ demonstrated on hardware to date. Our demonstration highlights the rapid progress of quantum hardware.
summary: One of the central goals of the DARPA Optimization with Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (ONISQ) program is to implement a hybrid quantum/classical optimization algorithm with high $N\cdot p$, where $N$ is the number of qubits and $p$ is the number of alternating applications of parameterized quantum operators in the protocol. In this note, we demonstrate the execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to the MaxCut problem on non-planar 3-regular graphs with $N\cdot p$ of up to $320$ on the Quantinuum H1-1 and H2 trapped-ion quantum processors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the highest $N\cdot p$ demonstrated on hardware to date. Our demonstration highlights the rapid progress of quantum hardware.
abstract_zh: DARPA 噪声中尺度量子优化 (ONISQ) 计划的中心目标之一是实现具有高 $N\cdot p$ 的混合量子/经典优化算法，其中 $N$ 是量子位的数量，$p$ 是协议中参数化量子算子的交替应用数量。在本文中，我们演示了在 Quantinuum H1-1 和 H2 俘获离子量子处理器上执行量子近似优化算法 (QAOA)，该算法应用于非平面 3-正则图上的 MaxCut 问题，$N\cdot p$ 高达 320$。据我们所知，这是迄今为止在硬件上展示的最高$N\cdot p$。我们的演示凸显了量子硬件的快速进步。

AI.tldr: 本文演示了在量子处理器上实现QAOA算法解决MaxCut问题，并达到较高的N·p值。
AI.motivation: DARPA ONISQ计划旨在开发高N·p的混合量子/经典优化算法，以推动量子计算实用化。
AI.method: 在Quantinuum H1-1和H2离子阱量子处理器上运行QAOA算法，针对非平面3-正则图求解MaxCut问题。
AI.result: 实现了N·p最高达320的QAOA执行，创下了当前量子硬件的记录。
AI.conclusion: 实验展示了量子硬件在实现复杂量子算法上的快速进步。

ai_content.conclusion: 实验展示了量子硬件在实现复杂量子算法上的快速进步。

In this note, we demonstrate the execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to the MaxCut problem on non-planar 3-regular graphs with $N\cdot p$ of up to $320$ on the Quantinuum H1-1 and H2 trapped-ion quantum processors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the highest $N\cdot p$ demonstrated on hardware to date. Our demonstration highlights the rapid progress of quantum hardware. DARPA 噪声中尺度量子优化 (ONISQ) 计划的中心目标之一是实现具有高 $N\cdot p$ 的混合量子/经典优化算法，其中 $N$ 是量子位的数量，$p$ 是协议中参数化量子算子的交替应用数量。在本文中，我们演示了在 Quantinuum H1-1 和 H2 俘获离子量子处理器上执行量子近似优化算法 (QAOA)，该算法应用于非平面 3-正则图上的 MaxCut 问题，$N\cdot p$ 高达 320$。据我们所知，这是迄今为止在硬件上展示的最高$N\cdot p$。我们的演示凸显了量子硬件的快速进步。 本文演示了在量子处理器上实现QAOA算法解决MaxCut问题，并达到较高的N·p值。 Ruslan Shaydulin,Marco Pistoia quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Vincent Gaudillière,Leo Pauly,Arunkumar Rathinam,Albert Garcia Sanchez,Mohamed Adel Musallam,Djamila Aouada
title: 3D-Aware Object Localization using Gaussian Implicit Occupancy Function
title_zh: 使用高斯隐式占用函数进行 3D 感知对象定位
abstract: To automatically localize a target object in an image is crucial for many computer vision applications. To represent the 2D object, ellipse labels have recently been identified as a promising alternative to axis-aligned bounding boxes. This paper further considers 3D-aware ellipse labels, \textit{i.e.}, ellipses which are projections of a 3D ellipsoidal approximation of the object, for 2D target localization. Indeed, projected ellipses carry more geometric information about the object geometry and pose (3D awareness) than traditional 3D-agnostic bounding box labels. Moreover, such a generic 3D ellipsoidal model allows for approximating known to coarsely known targets. We then propose to have a new look at ellipse regression and replace the discontinuous geometric ellipse parameters with the parameters of an implicit Gaussian distribution encoding object occupancy in the image. The models are trained to regress the values of this bivariate Gaussian distribution over the image pixels using a statistical loss function. We introduce a novel non-trainable differentiable layer, E-DSNT, to extract the distribution parameters. Also, we describe how to readily generate consistent 3D-aware Gaussian occupancy parameters using only coarse dimensions of the target and relative pose labels. We extend three existing spacecraft pose estimation datasets with 3D-aware Gaussian occupancy labels to validate our hypothesis. Labels and source code are publicly accessible here: https://cvi2.uni.lu/3d-aware-obj-loc/.

To represent the 2D object, ellipse labels have recently been identified as a promising alternative to axis-aligned bounding boxes. Moreover, such a generic 3D ellipsoidal model allows for approximating known to coarsely known targets. We then propose to have a new look at ellipse regression and replace the discontinuous geometric ellipse parameters with the parameters of an implicit Gaussian distribution encoding object occupancy in the image. The models are trained to regress the values of this bivariate Gaussian distribution over the image pixels using a statistical loss function. We introduce a novel non-trainable differentiable layer, E-DSNT, to extract the distribution parameters. Also, we describe how to readily generate consistent 3D-aware Gaussian occupancy parameters using only coarse dimensions of the target and relative pose labels. We extend three existing spacecraft pose estimation datasets with 3D-aware Gaussian occupancy labels to validate our hypothesis. Labels and source code are publicly accessible here: https://cvi2.uni.lu/3d-aware-obj-loc/.
abstract_zh: 自动定位图像中的目标对象对于许多计算机视觉应用至关重要。为了表示 2D 对象，椭圆标签最近被认为是轴对齐边界框的有前途的替代方案。本文进一步考虑了 3D 感知椭圆标签，\textit{i.e.}，椭圆是物体的 3D 椭圆体近似的投影，用于 2D 目标定位。事实上，与传统的 3D 无关边界框标签相比，投影椭圆携带了更多有关对象几何和姿势（3D 感知）的几何信息。此外，这样的通用 3D 椭球模型允许近似已知到粗略已知的目标。然后，我们建议重新审视椭圆回归，并将不连续的几何椭圆参数替换为隐式高斯分布编码图像中对象占用的参数。模型经过训练，使用统计损失函数对图像像素上的二元高斯分布的值进行回归。我们引入了一种新颖的不可训练可微层 E-DSNT 来提取分布参数。此外，我们还描述了如何仅使用目标的粗略尺寸和相对姿势标签轻松生成一致的 3D 感知高斯占用参数。我们使用 3D 感知高斯占用标签扩展了三个现有的航天器姿态估计数据集，以验证我们的假设。标签和源代码可在此处公开访问：https://cvi2.uni.lu/3d-aware-obj-loc/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯隐含占用函数的3D感知目标定位方法，通过将3D椭球体投影为2D椭圆标签，提升目标定位的几何信息表达能力。
AI.motivation: 传统轴对齐边界框缺乏3D几何信息，而椭圆标签能更准确反映目标姿态和形状，但需解决参数不连续性问题并实现3D感知。
AI.method: 用隐含高斯分布参数替代离散椭圆参数，设计可微分层E-DSNT提取分布参数，并基于统计损失函数训练模型，结合粗略尺寸和相对姿态生成3D感知标签。
AI.result: 在扩展的航天器姿态数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了更精确的2D目标定位，代码和标签公开可用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高斯隐含占用函数有效融合3D先验信息，为2D目标定位提供了新的几何感知解决方案。

authors_text: Ziwang Xu,Lanqing Guo,Shuyan Zhang,Alex C. Kot,Bihan Wen
title: Unsupervised Deep Digital Staining For Microscopic Cell Images Via Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过知识蒸馏对显微细胞图像进行无监督深度数字染色
abstract: Staining is critical to cell imaging and medical diagnosis, which is expensive, time-consuming, labor-intensive, and causes irreversible changes to cell tissues. Recent advances in deep learning enabled digital staining via supervised model training. However, it is difficult to obtain large-scale stained/unstained cell image pairs in practice, which need to be perfectly aligned with the supervision. In this work, we propose a novel unsupervised deep learning framework for the digital staining of cell images using knowledge distillation and generative adversarial networks (GANs). A teacher model is first trained mainly for the colorization of bright-field images. After that,a student GAN for staining is obtained by knowledge distillation with hybrid non-reference losses. We show that the proposed unsupervised deep staining method can generate stained images with more accurate positions and shapes of the cell targets. Compared with other unsupervised deep generative models for staining, our method achieves much more promising results both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Staining is critical to cell imaging and medical diagnosis, which is expensive, time-consuming, labor-intensive, and causes irreversible changes to cell tissues. Recent advances in deep learning enabled digital staining via supervised model training. However, it is difficult to obtain large-scale stained/unstained cell image pairs in practice, which need to be perfectly aligned with the supervision. In this work, we propose a novel unsupervised deep learning framework for the digital staining of cell images using knowledge distillation and generative adversarial networks (GANs). A teacher model is first trained mainly for the colorization of bright-field images. After that,a student GAN for staining is obtained by knowledge distillation with hybrid non-reference losses. We show that the proposed unsupervised deep staining method can generate stained images with more accurate positions and shapes of the cell targets. Compared with other unsupervised deep generative models for staining, our method achieves much more promising results both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 染色对于细胞成像和医学诊断至关重要，其成本昂贵、耗时、劳动强度大，并且会导致细胞组织发生不可逆的变化。深度学习的最新进展通过监督模型训练实现了数字染色。然而，在实践中很难获得大规模的染色/未染色细胞图像对，需要与监督完美对齐。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督深度学习框架，用于使用知识蒸馏和生成对抗网络（GAN）对细胞图像进行数字染色。首先训练教师模型主要用于明场图像的着色。之后，通过混合非参考损失的知识蒸馏获得用于染色的学生 GAN。我们表明，所提出的无监督深度染色方法可以生成具有更准确的细胞目标位置和形状的染色图像。与其他无监督深度生成染色模型相比，我们的方法在定性和定量上都取得了更有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏和生成对抗网络的无监督深度学习框架，用于显微细胞图像的数字染色。
AI.motivation: 传统染色方法成本高且破坏性大，而现有监督学习方法依赖难以获取的大量染色/未染色图像对，存在数据获取困难的问题。
AI.method: 首先训练一个用于明场图像着色的教师模型，再通过混合非参考损失的知识蒸馏方法，获得用于染色的学生生成对抗网络（GAN）。
AI.result: 该方法生成的染色图像在细胞目标的位置和形状上更准确，且在定性和定量评估中均优于其他无监督生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督数字染色方法无需依赖标注数据对，有效解决了染色图像生成中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Shmuel Horowitz,Dima Kagan,Galit Fuhrmann Alpert,Michael Fire
title: Interruptions detection in video conferences
title_zh: 视频会议中的中断检测
abstract: In recent years, video conferencing (VC) popularity has skyrocketed for a wide range of activities. As a result, the number of VC users surged sharply. The sharp increase in VC usage has been accompanied by various newly emerging privacy and security challenges. VC meetings became a target for various security attacks, such as Zoombombing. Other VC-related challenges also emerged. For example, during COVID lockdowns, educators had to teach in online environments struggling with keeping students engaged for extended periods. In parallel, the amount of available VC videos has grown exponentially. Thus, users and companies are limited in finding abnormal segments in VC meetings within the converging volumes of data. Such abnormal events that affect most meeting participants may be indicators of interesting points in time, including security attacks or other changes in meeting climate, like someone joining a meeting or sharing a dramatic content. Here, we present a novel algorithm for detecting abnormal events in VC data. We curated VC publicly available recordings, including meetings with interruptions. We analyzed the videos using our algorithm, extracting time windows where abnormal occurrences were detected. Our algorithm is a pipeline that combines multiple methods in several steps to detect users' faces in each video frame, track face locations during the meeting and generate vector representations of a facial expression for each face in each frame. Vector representations are used to monitor changes in facial expressions throughout the meeting for each participant. The overall change in meeting climate is quantified using those parameters across all participants, and translating them into event anomaly detection. This is the first open pipeline for automatically detecting anomaly events in VC meetings. Our model detects abnormal events with 92.3% precision over the collected dataset.
summary: In recent years, video conferencing (VC) popularity has skyrocketed for a wide range of activities. As a result, the number of VC users surged sharply. The sharp increase in VC usage has been accompanied by various newly emerging privacy and security challenges. VC meetings became a target for various security attacks, such as Zoombombing. Other VC-related challenges also emerged. For example, during COVID lockdowns, educators had to teach in online environments struggling with keeping students engaged for extended periods. In parallel, the amount of available VC videos has grown exponentially. Thus, users and companies are limited in finding abnormal segments in VC meetings within the converging volumes of data. Such abnormal events that affect most meeting participants may be indicators of interesting points in time, including security attacks or other changes in meeting climate, like someone joining a meeting or sharing a dramatic content. Here, we present a novel algorithm for detecting abnormal events in VC data. We curated VC publicly available recordings, including meetings with interruptions. We analyzed the videos using our algorithm, extracting time windows where abnormal occurrences were detected. Our algorithm is a pipeline that combines multiple methods in several steps to detect users' faces in each video frame, track face locations during the meeting and generate vector representations of a facial expression for each face in each frame. Vector representations are used to monitor changes in facial expressions throughout the meeting for each participant. The overall change in meeting climate is quantified using those parameters across all participants, and translating them into event anomaly detection. This is the first open pipeline for automatically detecting anomaly events in VC meetings. Our model detects abnormal events with 92.3% precision over the collected dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视频会议 (VC) 在各种活动中的普及率飙升。结果，VC用户数量急剧增加。风险投资使用量的急剧增加伴随着各种新出现的隐私和安全挑战。 VC 会议成为各种安全攻击的目标，例如 Zoombombing。其他与风险投资相关的挑战也出现了。例如，在新冠疫情封锁期间，教育工作者不得不在在线环境中教学，努力让学生长时间参与。与此同时，可用的风险投资视频数量呈指数级增长。因此，用户和公司在汇聚的数据量中发现 VC 会议中的异常片段受到限制。影响大多数会议参与者的此类异常事件可能是有趣时间点的指标，包括安全攻击或会议气氛的其他变化，例如有人加入会议或共享戏剧性内容。在这里，我们提出了一种新的算法来检测 VC 数据中的异常事件。我们整理了 VC 公开的录音，包括有中断的会议。我们使用我们的算法分析视频，提取检测到异常情况的时间窗口。我们的算法是一个管道，它在多个步骤中结合了多种方法，以检测每个视频帧中的用户面部、在会议期间跟踪面部位置并为每个帧中的每个面部生成面部表情的矢量表示。矢量表示用于监控每个参与者在整个会议期间面部表情的变化。使用所有参与者的这些参数来量化会议氛围的整体变化，并将其转化为事件异常检测。这是第一个用于自动检测 VC 会议中异常事件的开放管道。我们的模型在收集的数据集上以 92.3% 的精度检测异常事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种检测视频会议中异常事件的新型算法，用于识别如安全攻击或会议氛围变化等异常情况。
AI.motivation: 随着视频会议使用量激增，隐私安全问题和异常事件检测需求凸显，传统方法难以高效处理大规模数据中的异常片段。
AI.method: 算法通过多步骤流水线结合多种方法：检测视频帧中人脸、跟踪位置、生成面部表情向量表示，并量化全体参与者的表情变化以识别异常事件。
AI.result: 该模型在收集的数据集上实现了92.3%的检测精度，是首个开放的视频会议异常事件自动检测框架。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为视频会议中的异常检测提供了首个自动化解决方案，有效提升了大规模会议数据中异常事件的识别能力。

search_text: Interruptions detection in video conferences 视频会议中的中断检测 In recent years, video conferencing (VC) popularity has skyrocketed for a wide range of activities. As a result, the number of VC users surged sharply. The sharp increase in VC usage has been accompanied by various newly emerging privacy and security challenges. VC meetings became a target for various security attacks, such as Zoombombing. Other VC-related challenges also emerged. For example, during COVID lockdowns, educators had to teach in online environments struggling with keeping students engaged for extended periods. In parallel, the amount of available VC videos has grown exponentially. Thus, users and companies are limited in finding abnormal segments in VC meetings within the converging volumes of data. Such abnormal events that affect most meeting participants may be indicators of interesting points in time, including security attacks or other changes in meeting climate, like someone joining a meeting or sharing a dramatic content. Here, we present a novel algorithm for detecting abnormal events in VC data. We curated VC publicly available recordings, including meetings with interruptions. We analyzed the videos using our algorithm, extracting time windows where abnormal occurrences were detected. Our algorithm is a pipeline that combines multiple methods in several steps to detect users' faces in each video frame, track face locations during the meeting and generate vector representations of a facial expression for each face in each frame. Vector representations are used to monitor changes in facial expressions throughout the meeting for each participant. The overall change in meeting climate is quantified using those parameters across all participants, and translating them into event anomaly detection. This is the first open pipeline for automatically detecting anomaly events in VC meetings. Our model detects abnormal events with 92.3% precision over the collected dataset. 近年来，视频会议 (VC) 在各种活动中的普及率飙升。结果，VC用户数量急剧增加。风险投资使用量的急剧增加伴随着各种新出现的隐私和安全挑战。 VC 会议成为各种安全攻击的目标，例如 Zoombombing。其他与风险投资相关的挑战也出现了。例如，在新冠疫情封锁期间，教育工作者不得不在在线环境中教学，努力让学生长时间参与。与此同时，可用的风险投资视频数量呈指数级增长。因此，用户和公司在汇聚的数据量中发现 VC 会议中的异常片段受到限制。影响大多数会议参与者的此类异常事件可能是有趣时间点的指标，包括安全攻击或会议气氛的其他变化，例如有人加入会议或共享戏剧性内容。在这里，我们提出了一种新的算法来检测 VC 数据中的异常事件。我们整理了 VC 公开的录音，包括有中断的会议。我们使用我们的算法分析视频，提取检测到异常情况的时间窗口。我们的算法是一个管道，它在多个步骤中结合了多种方法，以检测每个视频帧中的用户面部、在会议期间跟踪面部位置并为每个帧中的每个面部生成面部表情的矢量表示。矢量表示用于监控每个参与者在整个会议期间面部表情的变化。使用所有参与者的这些参数来量化会议氛围的整体变化，并将其转化为事件异常检测。这是第一个用于自动检测 VC 会议中异常事件的开放管道。我们的模型在收集的数据集上以 92.3% 的精度检测异常事件。 本文提出了一种检测视频会议中异常事件的新型算法，用于识别如安全攻击或会议氛围变化等异常情况。 Shmuel Horowitz,Dima Kagan,Galit Fuhrmann Alpert,Michael Fire cs.CV,cs.SI

authors_text: Danruo Deng,Guangyong Chen,Yang Yu,Furui Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Uncertainty Estimation by Fisher Information-based Evidential Deep Learning
title_zh: Fisher 基于信息的证据深度学习的不确定性估计
abstract: Uncertainty estimation is a key factor that makes deep learning reliable in practical applications. Recently proposed evidential neural networks explicitly account for different uncertainties by treating the network's outputs as evidence to parameterize the Dirichlet distribution, and achieve impressive performance in uncertainty estimation. However, for high data uncertainty samples but annotated with the one-hot label, the evidence-learning process for those mislabeled classes is over-penalized and remains hindered. To address this problem, we propose a novel method, Fisher Information-based Evidential Deep Learning ($\mathcal{I}$-EDL). In particular, we introduce Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) to measure the informativeness of evidence carried by each sample, according to which we can dynamically reweight the objective loss terms to make the network more focused on the representation learning of uncertain classes. The generalization ability of our network is further improved by optimizing the PAC-Bayesian bound. As demonstrated empirically, our proposed method consistently outperforms traditional EDL-related algorithms in multiple uncertainty estimation tasks, especially in the more challenging few-shot classification settings.
summary: Uncertainty estimation is a key factor that makes deep learning reliable in practical applications. Recently proposed evidential neural networks explicitly account for different uncertainties by treating the network's outputs as evidence to parameterize the Dirichlet distribution, and achieve impressive performance in uncertainty estimation. However, for high data uncertainty samples but annotated with the one-hot label, the evidence-learning process for those mislabeled classes is over-penalized and remains hindered. To address this problem, we propose a novel method, Fisher Information-based Evidential Deep Learning ($\mathcal{I}$-EDL). In particular, we introduce Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) to measure the informativeness of evidence carried by each sample, according to which we can dynamically reweight the objective loss terms to make the network more focused on the representation learning of uncertain classes. The generalization ability of our network is further improved by optimizing the PAC-Bayesian bound. As demonstrated empirically, our proposed method consistently outperforms traditional EDL-related algorithms in multiple uncertainty estimation tasks, especially in the more challenging few-shot classification settings.
abstract_zh: 不确定性估计是深度学习在实际应用中可靠的关键因素。最近提出的证据神经网络通过将网络的输出视为参数化狄利克雷分布的证据来明确地解释不同的不确定性，并在不确定性估计中取得令人印象深刻的性能。然而，对于高数据不确定性样本但用单热标签注释的情况，这些错误标记类的证据学习过程会受到过度惩罚并且仍然受到阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，基于费舍尔信息的证据深度学习（$\mathcal{I}$-EDL）。特别是，我们引入了费舍尔信息矩阵（FIM）来衡量每个样本所携带的证据的信息量，根据该矩阵我们可以动态地重新加权客观损失项，使网络更加专注于不确定类的表示学习。通过优化 PAC-贝叶斯界限，我们网络的泛化能力得到进一步提高。根据经验证明，我们提出的方法在多个不确定性估计任务中始终优于传统的 EDL 相关算法，特别是在更具挑战性的少样本分类设置中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于费舍尔信息的证据深度学习方法（$\\mathcal{I}$-EDL），用于改进深度学习中的不确定性估计，特别是在处理标注不准确的高不确定性样本时。
AI.motivation: 现有证据神经网络在处理标注为one-hot但实际存在高不确定性的样本时，会对误标签类别进行过度惩罚，导致学习过程受阻。需解决此问题以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入费舍尔信息矩阵（FIM）量化样本证据的可 informative 性，动态调整损失函数权重，聚焦于不确定类别的表示学习，并通过优化PAC-Bayesian界提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，$\\mathcal{I}$-EDL在多个不确定性估计任务中均优于传统EDL方法，尤其在小样本分类等更具挑战性的场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合费舍尔信息与证据学习，本文方法有效缓解了误标签样本的过度惩罚问题，显著提升了不确定性估计性能，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

authors: D. M. K. K. Venkateswara Rao
authors_json: D. M. K. K. Venkateswara Rao
authors_text: D. M. K. K. Venkateswara Rao,Hamed Habibi,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos
title: An Integrated Real-time UAV Trajectory Optimization with Potential Field Approach for Dynamic Collision Avoidance
title_zh: 一种集成的实时无人机轨迹优化与势场方法的动态避碰
abstract: This paper presents an integrated approach that combines trajectory optimization and Artificial Potential Field (APF) method for real-time optimal Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) trajectory planning and dynamic collision avoidance. A minimum-time trajectory optimization problem is formulated with initial and final positions as boundary conditions and collision avoidance as constraints. It is transcribed into a nonlinear programming problem using Chebyshev pseudospectral method. The state and control histories are approximated by using Lagrange polynomials and the collocation points are used to satisfy constraints. A novel sigmoid-type collision avoidance constraint is proposed to overcome the drawbacks of Lagrange polynomial approximation in pseudospectral methods that only guarantees inequality constraint satisfaction only at nodal points. Automatic differentiation of cost function and constraints is used to quickly determine their gradient and Jacobian, respectively. An APF method is used to update the optimal control inputs for guaranteeing collision avoidance. The trajectory optimization and APF method are implemented in a closed-loop fashion continuously, but in parallel at moderate and high frequencies, respectively. The initial guess for the optimization is provided based on the previous solution. The proposed approach is tested and validated through indoor experiments.
summary: This paper presents an integrated approach that combines trajectory optimization and Artificial Potential Field (APF) method for real-time optimal Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) trajectory planning and dynamic collision avoidance. A minimum-time trajectory optimization problem is formulated with initial and final positions as boundary conditions and collision avoidance as constraints. It is transcribed into a nonlinear programming problem using Chebyshev pseudospectral method. The state and control histories are approximated by using Lagrange polynomials and the collocation points are used to satisfy constraints. A novel sigmoid-type collision avoidance constraint is proposed to overcome the drawbacks of Lagrange polynomial approximation in pseudospectral methods that only guarantees inequality constraint satisfaction only at nodal points. Automatic differentiation of cost function and constraints is used to quickly determine their gradient and Jacobian, respectively. An APF method is used to update the optimal control inputs for guaranteeing collision avoidance. The trajectory optimization and APF method are implemented in a closed-loop fashion continuously, but in parallel at moderate and high frequencies, respectively. The initial guess for the optimization is provided based on the previous solution. The proposed approach is tested and validated through indoor experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种结合轨迹优化和人工势场（APF）方法的集成方法，用于实时优化无人机（UAV）轨迹规划和动态避免碰撞。以初始位置和最终位置为边界条件，以碰撞避免为约束，制定最短时间轨迹优化问题。使用切比雪夫伪谱方法将其转化为非线性规划问题。使用拉格朗日多项式来近似状态和控制历史，并使用配置点来满足约束。提出了一种新颖的sigmoid型防撞约束，以克服伪谱方法中拉格朗日多项式逼近仅保证节点处不等式约束满足的缺点。成本函数和约束的自动微分用于分别快速确定它们的梯度和雅可比行列式。 APF 方法用于更新最优控制输入以保证避免碰撞。轨迹优化和 APF 方法以闭环方式连续实施，但分别在中频和高频下并行实施。根据之前的解决方案提供了优化的初步猜测。所提出的方法通过室内实验进行了测试和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合轨迹优化与人工势场法的实时无人机轨迹规划方法，用于动态避障。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在实时避障和轨迹优化中存在计算效率低、动态障碍物处理不足的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用切比雪夫伪谱法将轨迹优化转为非线性规划问题，引入sigmoid型碰撞约束提升精度，并通过人工势场法实时调整控制输入，优化与避障并行闭环运行。
AI.result: 通过室内实验验证了方法的有效性，实现了实时最优轨迹规划与动态避障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证计算效率的同时提升了无人机在复杂动态环境中的避障能力。

search_text: An Integrated Real-time UAV Trajectory Optimization with Potential Field Approach for Dynamic Collision Avoidance 一种集成的实时无人机轨迹优化与势场方法的动态避碰 This paper presents an integrated approach that combines trajectory optimization and Artificial Potential Field (APF) method for real-time optimal Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) trajectory planning and dynamic collision avoidance. A minimum-time trajectory optimization problem is formulated with initial and final positions as boundary conditions and collision avoidance as constraints. It is transcribed into a nonlinear programming problem using Chebyshev pseudospectral method. The state and control histories are approximated by using Lagrange polynomials and the collocation points are used to satisfy constraints. A novel sigmoid-type collision avoidance constraint is proposed to overcome the drawbacks of Lagrange polynomial approximation in pseudospectral methods that only guarantees inequality constraint satisfaction only at nodal points. Automatic differentiation of cost function and constraints is used to quickly determine their gradient and Jacobian, respectively. An APF method is used to update the optimal control inputs for guaranteeing collision avoidance. The trajectory optimization and APF method are implemented in a closed-loop fashion continuously, but in parallel at moderate and high frequencies, respectively. The initial guess for the optimization is provided based on the previous solution. The proposed approach is tested and validated through indoor experiments. 本文提出了一种结合轨迹优化和人工势场（APF）方法的集成方法，用于实时优化无人机（UAV）轨迹规划和动态避免碰撞。以初始位置和最终位置为边界条件，以碰撞避免为约束，制定最短时间轨迹优化问题。使用切比雪夫伪谱方法将其转化为非线性规划问题。使用拉格朗日多项式来近似状态和控制历史，并使用配置点来满足约束。提出了一种新颖的sigmoid型防撞约束，以克服伪谱方法中拉格朗日多项式逼近仅保证节点处不等式约束满足的缺点。成本函数和约束的自动微分用于分别快速确定它们的梯度和雅可比行列式。 APF 方法用于更新最优控制输入以保证避免碰撞。轨迹优化和 APF 方法以闭环方式连续实施，但分别在中频和高频下并行实施。根据之前的解决方案提供了优化的初步猜测。所提出的方法通过室内实验进行了测试和验证。 本文提出了一种结合轨迹优化与人工势场法的实时无人机轨迹规划方法，用于动态避障。 D. M. K. K. Venkateswara Rao,Hamed Habibi,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Hannah Pinson,Joeri Lenaerts,Vincent Ginis
title: Linear CNNs Discover the Statistical Structure of the Dataset Using Only the Most Dominant Frequencies
title_zh: 线性 CNN 仅使用最主要的频率来发现数据集的统计结构
abstract: We here present a stepping stone towards a deeper understanding of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in the form of a theory of learning in linear CNNs. Through analyzing the gradient descent equations, we discover that the evolution of the network during training is determined by the interplay between the dataset structure and the convolutional network structure. We show that linear CNNs discover the statistical structure of the dataset with non-linear, ordered, stage-like transitions, and that the speed of discovery changes depending on the relationship between the dataset and the convolutional network structure. Moreover, we find that this interplay lies at the heart of what we call the ``dominant frequency bias'', where linear CNNs arrive at these discoveries using only the dominant frequencies of the different structural parts present in the dataset. We furthermore provide experiments that show how our theory relates to deep, non-linear CNNs used in practice. Our findings shed new light on the inner working of CNNs, and can help explain their shortcut learning and their tendency to rely on texture instead of shape.
summary: We here present a stepping stone towards a deeper understanding of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in the form of a theory of learning in linear CNNs. Through analyzing the gradient descent equations, we discover that the evolution of the network during training is determined by the interplay between the dataset structure and the convolutional network structure. We show that linear CNNs discover the statistical structure of the dataset with non-linear, ordered, stage-like transitions, and that the speed of discovery changes depending on the relationship between the dataset and the convolutional network structure. Moreover, we find that this interplay lies at the heart of what we call the ``dominant frequency bias'', where linear CNNs arrive at these discoveries using only the dominant frequencies of the different structural parts present in the dataset. We furthermore provide experiments that show how our theory relates to deep, non-linear CNNs used in practice. Our findings shed new light on the inner working of CNNs, and can help explain their shortcut learning and their tendency to rely on texture instead of shape.
abstract_zh: 我们在这里以线性 CNN 学习理论的形式提出了更深入理解卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的垫脚石。通过分析梯度下降方程，我们发现训练期间网络的演化是由数据集结构和卷积网络结构之间的相互作用决定的。我们证明，线性 CNN 通过非线性、有序、阶段式转换来发现数据集的统计结构，并且发现的速度根据数据集和卷积网络结构之间的关系而变化。此外，我们发现这种相互作用是我们所说的“主频偏差”的核心，线性 CNN 仅使用数据集中存在的不同结构部分的主频来得出这些发现。我们还提供了实验来展示我们的理论如何与实践中使用的深度非线性 CNN 相关。我们的发现为 CNN 的内部工作原理提供了新的线索，并有助于解释它们的捷径学习以及它们依赖纹理而不是形状的倾向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性卷积神经网络（CNNs）如何通过数据集中的主导频率发现其统计结构，并探讨该理论与实际非线性CNNs的关联。
AI.motivation: 为了深入理解CNNs的学习机制，尤其是其对数据统计结构的捕捉能力及依赖纹理而非形状的特性。
AI.method: 通过分析梯度下降方程，研究线性CNNs训练过程中的动态变化，并设计实验验证理论在非线性CNNs中的适用性。
AI.result: 发现线性CNNs以阶段式非线性过渡捕捉数据统计结构，速度受数据与网络结构关系影响，并存在仅依赖主导频率的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该理论揭示了CNNs内部工作机制，解释了其快捷学习现象及对纹理的依赖性，为优化模型设计提供新视角。

authors_text: Yiwei Chen,Chen Jiang,Yu Pan
title: Single-photon Image Super-resolution via Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 通过自监督学习实现单光子图像超分辨率
abstract: Single-Photon Image Super-Resolution (SPISR) aims to recover a high-resolution volumetric photon counting cube from a noisy low-resolution one by computational imaging algorithms. In real-world scenarios, pairs of training samples are often expensive or impossible to obtain. By extending Equivariant Imaging (EI) to volumetric single-photon data, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for the SPISR task. Particularly, using the Poisson unbiased Kullback-Leibler risk estimator and equivariance, our method is able to learn from noisy measurements without ground truths. Comprehensive experiments on simulated and real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable performance with supervised learning and outperforms interpolation-based methods.
summary: Single-Photon Image Super-Resolution (SPISR) aims to recover a high-resolution volumetric photon counting cube from a noisy low-resolution one by computational imaging algorithms. In real-world scenarios, pairs of training samples are often expensive or impossible to obtain. By extending Equivariant Imaging (EI) to volumetric single-photon data, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for the SPISR task. Particularly, using the Poisson unbiased Kullback-Leibler risk estimator and equivariance, our method is able to learn from noisy measurements without ground truths. Comprehensive experiments on simulated and real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable performance with supervised learning and outperforms interpolation-based methods.
abstract_zh: 单光子图像超分辨率（SPISR）旨在通过计算成像算法从嘈杂的低分辨率立方体中恢复高分辨率体积光子计数立方体。在现实场景中，成对的训练样本通常很昂贵或不可能获得。通过将等变成像（EI）扩展到体积单光子数据，我们为 SPISR 任务提出了一个自监督学习框架。特别是，使用泊松无偏 Kullback-Leibler 风险估计器和等方差，我们的方法能够在没有基本事实的情况下从噪声测量中学习。对模拟和真实数据集的综合实验表明，所提出的方法实现了与监督学习相当的性能，并且优于基于插值的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单光子图像超分辨率方法，旨在从低分辨率噪声数据中恢复高分辨率光子计数立方体。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中单光子图像超分辨率任务缺乏成对训练样本，传统监督学习方法难以应用，需探索无需真实标签的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 扩展等变成像(EI)至体积数据，结合泊松无偏KL风险估计器与等变性约束，构建无需真实标签的自监督学习模型。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实数据集上表现与监督学习相当，显著优于插值方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督框架有效解决了单光子图像超分辨率中数据稀缺问题，为相关领域提供了新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 该自监督框架有效解决了单光子图像超分辨率中数据稀缺问题，为相关领域提供了新思路。

In real-world scenarios, pairs of training samples are often expensive or impossible to obtain. By extending Equivariant Imaging (EI) to volumetric single-photon data, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for the SPISR task. Particularly, using the Poisson unbiased Kullback-Leibler risk estimator and equivariance, our method is able to learn from noisy measurements without ground truths. Comprehensive experiments on simulated and real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable performance with supervised learning and outperforms interpolation-based methods. 单光子图像超分辨率（SPISR）旨在通过计算成像算法从嘈杂的低分辨率立方体中恢复高分辨率体积光子计数立方体。在现实场景中，成对的训练样本通常很昂贵或不可能获得。通过将等变成像（EI）扩展到体积单光子数据，我们为 SPISR 任务提出了一个自监督学习框架。特别是，使用泊松无偏 Kullback-Leibler 风险估计器和等方差，我们的方法能够在没有基本事实的情况下从噪声测量中学习。对模拟和真实数据集的综合实验表明，所提出的方法实现了与监督学习相当的性能，并且优于基于插值的方法。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单光子图像超分辨率方法，旨在从低分辨率噪声数据中恢复高分辨率光子计数立方体。 Yiwei Chen,Chen Jiang,Yu Pan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Aos Mulahuwaish,Matthew Loucks,Basheer Qolomany,Ala Al-Fuqaha
title: Topic Modeling Based on Two-Step Flow Theory: Application to Tweets about Bitcoin
title_zh: 基于两步流理论的主题建模：在比特币推文中的应用
abstract: Digital cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin have exploded in recent years in both popularity and value. By their novelty, cryptocurrencies tend to be both volatile and highly speculative. The capricious nature of these coins is helped facilitated by social media networks such as Twitter. However, not everyone's opinion matters equally, with most posts garnering little to no attention. Additionally, the majority of tweets are retweeted from popular posts. We must determine whose opinion matters and the difference between influential and non-influential users. This study separates these two groups and analyzes the differences between them. It uses Hypertext-induced Topic Selection (HITS) algorithm, which segregates the dataset based on influence. Topic modeling is then employed to uncover differences in each group's speech types and what group may best represent the entire community. We found differences in language and interest between these two groups regarding Bitcoin and that the opinion leaders of Twitter are not aligned with the majority of users. There were 2559 opinion leaders (0.72% of users) who accounted for 80% of the authority and the majority (99.28%) users for the remaining 20% out of a total of 355,139 users.
summary: Digital cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin have exploded in recent years in both popularity and value. By their novelty, cryptocurrencies tend to be both volatile and highly speculative. The capricious nature of these coins is helped facilitated by social media networks such as Twitter. However, not everyone's opinion matters equally, with most posts garnering little to no attention. Additionally, the majority of tweets are retweeted from popular posts. We must determine whose opinion matters and the difference between influential and non-influential users. This study separates these two groups and analyzes the differences between them. It uses Hypertext-induced Topic Selection (HITS) algorithm, which segregates the dataset based on influence. Topic modeling is then employed to uncover differences in each group's speech types and what group may best represent the entire community. We found differences in language and interest between these two groups regarding Bitcoin and that the opinion leaders of Twitter are not aligned with the majority of users. There were 2559 opinion leaders (0.72% of users) who accounted for 80% of the authority and the majority (99.28%) users for the remaining 20% out of a total of 355,139 users.
abstract_zh: 近年来，比特币等数字加密货币的受欢迎程度和价值都呈爆炸式增长。由于其新颖性，加密货币往往具有波动性和高度投机性。 Twitter 等社交媒体网络助长了这些代币反复无常的本质。然而，并不是每个人的意见都同等重要，大多数帖子几乎没有引起关注。此外，大多数推文都是从热门帖子中转发的。我们必须确定谁的意见重要以及有影响力和无影响力用户之间的区别。本研究将这两组分开并分析它们之间的差异。它使用超文本引发的主题选择（HITS）算法，根据影响力分离数据集。然后采用主题建模来揭示每个群体的语音类型的差异以及哪个群体最能代表整个社区。我们发现这两个群体在比特币方面的语言和兴趣存在差异，并且 Twitter 的意见领袖与大多数用户不一致。 355,139名用户中，意见领袖2559人（占用户的0.72%），占80%的权威，占剩余20%的多数（99.28%）用户。

AI.tldr: 基于两级传播理论，通过HITS算法和主题建模分析比特币相关推文，区分影响力用户与普通用户的观点差异。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中并非所有用户观点具有同等影响力，多数推文为重复内容，需识别关键意见领袖并分析其与普通用户的观点差异。
AI.method: 采用HITS算法划分影响力用户群体，结合主题建模技术对比两组用户的语言特征与兴趣差异。
AI.result: 发现影响力用户（0.72%）占据80%权威度，其语言风格和比特币关注点与普通用户存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 比特币讨论中存在明显的意见领袖群体，其观点与多数用户不一致，凸显社交媒体中影响力分层现象。

authors_text: T. Kovalenko,S. Vincent,V. I. Yukalov,D. Sornette
title: Calibration of Quantum Decision Theory: Aversion to Large Losses and Predictability of Probabilistic Choices
title_zh: 量子决策理论的校准：对大损失的厌恶和概率选择的可预测性
abstract: We present the first calibration of quantum decision theory (QDT) to a dataset of binary risky choice. We quantitatively account for the fraction of choice reversals between two repetitions of the experiment, using a probabilistic choice formulation in the simplest form without model assumption or adjustable parameters. The prediction of choice reversal is then refined by introducing heterogeneity between decision makers through their differentiation into two groups: ``majoritarian'' and ``contrarian'' (in proportion 3:1). This supports the first fundamental tenet of QDT, which models choice as an inherent probabilistic process, where the probability of a prospect can be expressed as the sum of its utility and attraction factors. We propose to parameterise the utility factor with a stochastic version of cumulative prospect theory (logit-CPT), and the attraction factor with a constant absolute risk aversion (CARA) function. For this dataset, and penalising the larger number of QDT parameters via the Wilks test of nested hypotheses, the QDT model is found to perform significantly better than logit-CPT at both the aggregate and individual levels, and for all considered fit criteria for the first experiment iteration and for predictions (second ``out-of-sample'' iteration). The distinctive QDT effect captured by the attraction factor is mostly appreciable (i.e., most relevant and strongest in amplitude) for prospects with big losses. Our quantitative analysis of the experimental results supports the existence of an intrinsic limit of predictability, which is associated with the inherent probabilistic nature of choice. The results of the paper can find applications both in the prediction of choice of human decision makers as well as for organizing the operation of artificial intelligence.
summary: We present the first calibration of quantum decision theory (QDT) to a dataset of binary risky choice. We quantitatively account for the fraction of choice reversals between two repetitions of the experiment, using a probabilistic choice formulation in the simplest form without model assumption or adjustable parameters. The prediction of choice reversal is then refined by introducing heterogeneity between decision makers through their differentiation into two groups: ``majoritarian'' and ``contrarian'' (in proportion 3:1). This supports the first fundamental tenet of QDT, which models choice as an inherent probabilistic process, where the probability of a prospect can be expressed as the sum of its utility and attraction factors. We propose to parameterise the utility factor with a stochastic version of cumulative prospect theory (logit-CPT), and the attraction factor with a constant absolute risk aversion (CARA) function. For this dataset, and penalising the larger number of QDT parameters via the Wilks test of nested hypotheses, the QDT model is found to perform significantly better than logit-CPT at both the aggregate and individual levels, and for all considered fit criteria for the first experiment iteration and for predictions (second ``out-of-sample'' iteration). The distinctive QDT effect captured by the attraction factor is mostly appreciable (i.e., most relevant and strongest in amplitude) for prospects with big losses. Our quantitative analysis of the experimental results supports the existence of an intrinsic limit of predictability, which is associated with the inherent probabilistic nature of choice. The results of the paper can find applications both in the prediction of choice of human decision makers as well as for organizing the operation of artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了量子决策理论（QDT）对二元风险选择数据集的首次校准。我们使用最简单形式的概率选择公式，无需模型假设或可调整参数，定量地解释了两次实验重复之间的选择逆转的比例。然后，通过将决策者分为两组：“多数派”和“逆向派”（比例为 3:1），从而引入决策者之间的异质性，从而完善选择逆转的预测。这支持了 QDT 的第一个基本原则，即将选择建模为固有的概率过程，其中前景的概率可以表示为其效用因素和吸引力因素的总和。我们建议使用累积前景理论（logit-CPT）的随机版本来参数化效用因子，并使用恒定的绝对风险厌恶（CARA）函数来参数化吸引力因子。对于该数据集，并通过嵌套假设的 Wilks 检验惩罚大量 QDT 参数，发现 QDT 模型在总体和个体水平上以及对于第一次实验迭代和预测（第二次“样本外”迭代）的所有考虑的拟合标准都明显优于 logit-CPT。吸引力因子捕获的独特 QDT 效应对于损失惨重的潜在客户来说大多是明显的（即最相关且幅度最强）。我们对实验结果的定量分析支持可预测性的内在限制的存在，这与选择的固有概率性质相关。论文的结果既可以用于预测人类决策者的选择，也可以用于组织人工智能的运行。

AI.tldr: 该论文首次将量子决策理论（QDT）校准至二元风险选择数据集，通过引入决策者群体异质性及参数化效用与吸引力因素，验证其对选择反转和大损失厌恶的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以充分解释人类决策中的概率过程与不可预测性，需通过QDT框架量化选择反转并验证其对大损失厌恶及预测限制的解释力。
AI.method: 采用概率选择公式，将决策者分为3:1的多数派与少数派，结合logit-CPT参数化效用及CARA函数建模吸引力，通过Wilks检验比较QDT与logit-CPT模型性能。
AI.result: QDT在聚合与个体层面均显著优于logit-CPT，尤其在大损失场景中吸引力因素效果显著，支持选择的内在不可预测性存在。
AI.conclusion: QDT能有效预测人类决策行为，其结果可应用于AI决策优化，并揭示选择过程的固有概率性限制。

Kovalenko,S. Vincent,V. I. Yukalov,D. Sornette cs.AI,quant-ph

authors_text: Ahmet Akman,Onur Selim Kılıç,A. Aydın Alatan
title: MAEVI: Motion Aware Event-Based Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: MAEVI：基于事件的运动感知视频帧插值
comment: Submitted to International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
comments: Submitted to International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
abstract: Utilization of event-based cameras is expected to improve the visual quality of video frame interpolation solutions. We introduce a learning-based method to exploit moving region boundaries in a video sequence to increase the overall interpolation quality.Event cameras allow us to determine moving areas precisely; and hence, better video frame interpolation quality can be achieved by emphasizing these regions using an appropriate loss function. The results show a notable average \textit{PSNR} improvement of $1.3$ dB for the tested data sets, as well as subjectively more pleasing visual results with less ghosting and blurry artifacts.
summary: Utilization of event-based cameras is expected to improve the visual quality of video frame interpolation solutions. We introduce a learning-based method to exploit moving region boundaries in a video sequence to increase the overall interpolation quality.Event cameras allow us to determine moving areas precisely; and hence, better video frame interpolation quality can be achieved by emphasizing these regions using an appropriate loss function. The results show a notable average \textit{PSNR} improvement of $1.3$ dB for the tested data sets, as well as subjectively more pleasing visual results with less ghosting and blurry artifacts.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机的利用有望提高视频帧插值解决方案的视觉质量。我们引入了一种基于学习的方法来利用视频序列中的移动区域边界来提高整体插值质量。事件摄像机使我们能够精确地确定移动区域；因此，通过使用适当的损失函数强调这些区域可以实现更好的视频帧插值质量。结果显示，测试数据集的平均 \textit{PSNR} 显着提高了 $1.3$ dB，并且主观上更令人愉悦的视觉结果，重影和模糊伪影更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的运动感知视频帧插值方法MAEVI，通过利用运动区域边界提升插值质量。
AI.motivation: 事件相机能精确捕捉运动区域，传统插值方法未充分挖掘该特性，导致存在鬼影和模糊伪影。
AI.method: 设计学习型方法，结合事件相机数据与运动区域边界信息，通过定制化损失函数强化关键区域插值。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上平均PSNR提升1.3dB，视觉效果更清晰，显著减少鬼影和模糊伪影。
AI.conclusion: 验证了事件相机与运动感知机制在视频插值中的有效性，为高动态场景插值提供新思路。

authors_text: Birgitta Dresp-Langley
title: The Grossberg Code: Universal Neural Network Signatures of Perceptual Experience
title_zh: 格罗斯伯格代码：感知体验的通用神经网络签名
abstract: Two universal functional principles of Adaptive Resonance Theory simulate the brain code of all biological learning and adaptive intelligence. Low level representations of multisensory stimuli in their immediate environmental context are formed on the basis of bottom up activation and under the control of top down matching rules that integrate high level long term traces of contextual configuration. These universal coding principles lead to the establishment of lasting brain signatures of perceptual experience in all living species, from aplysiae to primates. They are revisited in this paper here on the basis of examples drawn from the original code and from some of the most recent related empirical findings on contextual modulation in the brain, highlighting the potential of Grossberg's pioneering insights and groundbreaking theoretical work for intelligent solutions in the domain of developmental and cognitive robotics.
summary: Two universal functional principles of Adaptive Resonance Theory simulate the brain code of all biological learning and adaptive intelligence. Low level representations of multisensory stimuli in their immediate environmental context are formed on the basis of bottom up activation and under the control of top down matching rules that integrate high level long term traces of contextual configuration. These universal coding principles lead to the establishment of lasting brain signatures of perceptual experience in all living species, from aplysiae to primates. They are revisited in this paper here on the basis of examples drawn from the original code and from some of the most recent related empirical findings on contextual modulation in the brain, highlighting the potential of Grossberg's pioneering insights and groundbreaking theoretical work for intelligent solutions in the domain of developmental and cognitive robotics.
abstract_zh: 自适应共振理论的两个通用功能原理模拟了所有生物学习和自适应智能的大脑代码。多感官刺激在其直接环境上下文中的低级表示是在自下而上激活的基础上形成的，并在自上而下匹配规则的控制下形成，这些匹配规则集成了上下文配置的高级长期痕迹。这些通用编码原则导致在从海兔到灵长类动物的所有生物物种中建立持久的感知体验大脑特征。本文根据原始代码中的示例以及有关大脑上下文调制的一些最新相关实证研究结果对它们进行了重新审视，强调了格罗斯伯格在发育和认知机器人领域智能解决方案的开创性见解和突破性理论工作的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Grossberg编码的普遍神经网络特征，揭示感知经验在生物体大脑中形成的持久签名机制。
AI.motivation: 验证自适应共振理论在跨物种学习与智能中的普适性，并探索其在认知机器人领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 结合原始理论模型与最新脑科学实证研究，分析上下文调制机制对感知编码的影响。
AI.result: 确认了自适应共振理论中上下文驱动的编码原则在从低级到高级感知处理中的普适性。
AI.conclusion: Grossberg的理论框架为开发具备环境适应能力的智能机器人系统提供了关键神经机制启示。

authors_text: Jingyi Xu,Hieu Le,Vu Nguyen,Viresh Ranjan,Dimitris Samaras
title: Zero-shot Object Counting
title_zh: 零样本对象计数
abstract: Class-agnostic object counting aims to count object instances of an arbitrary class at test time. It is challenging but also enables many potential applications. Current methods require human-annotated exemplars as inputs which are often unavailable for novel categories, especially for autonomous systems. Thus, we propose zero-shot object counting (ZSC), a new setting where only the class name is available during test time. Such a counting system does not require human annotators in the loop and can operate automatically. Starting from a class name, we propose a method that can accurately identify the optimal patches which can then be used as counting exemplars. Specifically, we first construct a class prototype to select the patches that are likely to contain the objects of interest, namely class-relevant patches. Furthermore, we introduce a model that can quantitatively measure how suitable an arbitrary patch is as a counting exemplar. By applying this model to all the candidate patches, we can select the most suitable patches as exemplars for counting. Experimental results on a recent class-agnostic counting dataset, FSC-147, validate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/zero-shot-counting
summary: Class-agnostic object counting aims to count object instances of an arbitrary class at test time. It is challenging but also enables many potential applications. Current methods require human-annotated exemplars as inputs which are often unavailable for novel categories, especially for autonomous systems. Thus, we propose zero-shot object counting (ZSC), a new setting where only the class name is available during test time. Such a counting system does not require human annotators in the loop and can operate automatically. Starting from a class name, we propose a method that can accurately identify the optimal patches which can then be used as counting exemplars. Specifically, we first construct a class prototype to select the patches that are likely to contain the objects of interest, namely class-relevant patches. Furthermore, we introduce a model that can quantitatively measure how suitable an arbitrary patch is as a counting exemplar. By applying this model to all the candidate patches, we can select the most suitable patches as exemplars for counting. Experimental results on a recent class-agnostic counting dataset, FSC-147, validate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/zero-shot-counting
abstract_zh: 与类无关的对象计数旨在在测试时对任意类的对象实例进行计数。它具有挑战性，但也实现了许多潜在的应用。当前的方法需要人工注释的样本作为输入，这通常不适用于新类别，特别是对于自治系统。因此，我们提出了零样本对象计数（ZSC），这是一种新设置，在测试期间只有类名称可用。这样的计数系统不需要循环中的人工注释，并且可以自动运行。从类名开始，我们提出了一种可以准确识别最佳补丁的方法，然后将其用作计数样本。具体来说，我们首先构造一个类原型来选择可能包含感兴趣对象的补丁，即类相关补丁。此外，我们引入了一个模型，可以定量测量任意补丁作为计数样本的合适程度。通过将该模型应用于所有候选补丁，我们可以选择最合适的补丁作为计数的样本。最近的类别无关计数数据集 FSC-147 的实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/zero-shot-counting 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注示例的零样本目标计数方法（ZSC），仅通过类别名称即可自动完成目标实例计数。
AI.motivation: 现有目标计数方法依赖人工标注的示例，难以应对新型类别尤其是自主系统中缺乏标注数据的场景，需开发无需人工干预的自动计数方案。
AI.method: 构建类别原型筛选潜在目标区域（类相关区域），并设计量化模型评估任意图像块作为计数示例的适用性，最终选择最优块进行计数。
AI.result: 在FSC-147数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了基于类别名称的零样本目标计数，为自主系统提供了无需人工标注的自动计数解决方案。

search_text: Zero-shot Object Counting 零样本对象计数 Class-agnostic object counting aims to count object instances of an arbitrary class at test time. It is challenging but also enables many potential applications. Current methods require human-annotated exemplars as inputs which are often unavailable for novel categories, especially for autonomous systems. Thus, we propose zero-shot object counting (ZSC), a new setting where only the class name is available during test time. Such a counting system does not require human annotators in the loop and can operate automatically. Starting from a class name, we propose a method that can accurately identify the optimal patches which can then be used as counting exemplars. Specifically, we first construct a class prototype to select the patches that are likely to contain the objects of interest, namely class-relevant patches. Furthermore, we introduce a model that can quantitatively measure how suitable an arbitrary patch is as a counting exemplar. By applying this model to all the candidate patches, we can select the most suitable patches as exemplars for counting. Experimental results on a recent class-agnostic counting dataset, FSC-147, validate the effectiveness of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/zero-shot-counting 与类无关的对象计数旨在在测试时对任意类的对象实例进行计数。它具有挑战性，但也实现了许多潜在的应用。当前的方法需要人工注释的样本作为输入，这通常不适用于新类别，特别是对于自治系统。因此，我们提出了零样本对象计数（ZSC），这是一种新设置，在测试期间只有类名称可用。这样的计数系统不需要循环中的人工注释，并且可以自动运行。从类名开始，我们提出了一种可以准确识别最佳补丁的方法，然后将其用作计数样本。具体来说，我们首先构造一个类原型来选择可能包含感兴趣对象的补丁，即类相关补丁。此外，我们引入了一个模型，可以定量测量任意补丁作为计数样本的合适程度。通过将该模型应用于所有候选补丁，我们可以选择最合适的补丁作为计数的样本。最近的类别无关计数数据集 FSC-147 的实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/zero-shot-counting 获取 本文提出了一种无需人工标注示例的零样本目标计数方法（ZSC），仅通过类别名称即可自动完成目标实例计数。 Jingyi Xu,Hieu Le,Vu Nguyen,Viresh Ranjan,Dimitris Samaras cs.CV

authors_text: You Shen,Yunzhou Zhang,Yanmin Wu,Zhenyu Wang,Linghao Yang,Sonya Coleman,Dermot Kerr
title: BSH-Det3D: Improving 3D Object Detection with BEV Shape Heatmap
title_zh: BSH-Det3D：利用 BEV 形状热图改进 3D 物体检测
abstract: The progress of LiDAR-based 3D object detection has significantly enhanced developments in autonomous driving and robotics. However, due to the limitations of LiDAR sensors, object shapes suffer from deterioration in occluded and distant areas, which creates a fundamental challenge to 3D perception. Existing methods estimate specific 3D shapes and achieve remarkable performance. However, these methods rely on extensive computation and memory, causing imbalances between accuracy and real-time performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel LiDAR-based 3D object detection model named BSH-Det3D, which applies an effective way to enhance spatial features by estimating complete shapes from a bird's eye view (BEV). Specifically, we design the Pillar-based Shape Completion (PSC) module to predict the probability of occupancy whether a pillar contains object shapes. The PSC module generates a BEV shape heatmap for each scene. After integrating with heatmaps, BSH-Det3D can provide additional information in shape deterioration areas and generate high-quality 3D proposals. We also design an attention-based densification fusion module (ADF) to adaptively associate the sparse features with heatmaps and raw points. The ADF module integrates the advantages of points and shapes knowledge with negligible overheads. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in terms of accuracy and speed, demonstrating the efficiency and flexibility of BSH-Det3D. The source code is available on https://github.com/mystorm16/BSH-Det3D.
summary: The progress of LiDAR-based 3D object detection has significantly enhanced developments in autonomous driving and robotics. However, due to the limitations of LiDAR sensors, object shapes suffer from deterioration in occluded and distant areas, which creates a fundamental challenge to 3D perception. Existing methods estimate specific 3D shapes and achieve remarkable performance. However, these methods rely on extensive computation and memory, causing imbalances between accuracy and real-time performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel LiDAR-based 3D object detection model named BSH-Det3D, which applies an effective way to enhance spatial features by estimating complete shapes from a bird's eye view (BEV). Specifically, we design the Pillar-based Shape Completion (PSC) module to predict the probability of occupancy whether a pillar contains object shapes. The PSC module generates a BEV shape heatmap for each scene. After integrating with heatmaps, BSH-Det3D can provide additional information in shape deterioration areas and generate high-quality 3D proposals. We also design an attention-based densification fusion module (ADF) to adaptively associate the sparse features with heatmaps and raw points. The ADF module integrates the advantages of points and shapes knowledge with negligible overheads. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in terms of accuracy and speed, demonstrating the efficiency and flexibility of BSH-Det3D. The source code is available on https://github.com/mystorm16/BSH-Det3D.
abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的进展显着促进了自动驾驶和机器人技术的发展。然而，由于激光雷达传感器的局限性，物体形状在遮挡和远处区域会恶化，这对 3D 感知带来了根本性挑战。现有方法可估计特定的 3D 形状并取得显着的性能。然而，这些方法依赖于大量的计算和内存，导致准确性和实时性能之间的不平衡。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种名为 BSH-Det3D 的新型基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测模型，该模型通过从鸟瞰图 (BEV) 估计完整形状来应用一种有效的方法来增强空间特征。具体来说，我们设计了基于柱子的形状完成（PSC）模块来预测柱子是否包含对象形状的占用概率。 PSC 模块为每个场景生成 BEV 形状热图。与热图集成后，BSH-Det3D 可以提供形状恶化区域的附加信息并生成高质量的 3D 建议。我们还设计了一个基于注意力的致密化融合模块（ADF），以自适应地将稀疏特征与热图和原始点相关联。 ADF 模块以可忽略的开销集成了点和形状知识的优点。在 KITTI 基准上进行的大量实验在准确性和速度方面实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，证明了 BSH-Det3D 的效率和灵活性。源代码可在 https://github.com/mystorm16/BSH-Det3D 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BSH-Det3D模型，通过鸟瞰图（BEV）形状热图提升基于LiDAR的3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: LiDAR传感器在遮挡和远距离区域导致目标形状退化，现有方法依赖高计算量且难以平衡实时性与精度。
AI.method: 设计Pillar-based Shape Completion模块生成BEV形状热图，并结合注意力机制的densification fusion模块融合稀疏特征与热图信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中达到精度与速度的最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BSH-Det3D通过形状热图与特征融合有效解决了LiDAR检测中的形状退化问题，兼顾效率与性能。

authors_text: Xianghao Xu,Paul Guerrero,Matthew Fisher,Siddhartha Chaudhuri,Daniel Ritchie
title: Unsupervised 3D Shape Reconstruction by Part Retrieval and Assembly
title_zh: 通过零件检索和组装进行无监督 3D 形状重建
abstract: Representing a 3D shape with a set of primitives can aid perception of structure, improve robotic object manipulation, and enable editing, stylization, and compression of 3D shapes. Existing methods either use simple parametric primitives or learn a generative shape space of parts. Both have limitations: parametric primitives lead to coarse approximations, while learned parts offer too little control over the decomposition. We instead propose to decompose shapes using a library of 3D parts provided by the user, giving full control over the choice of parts. The library can contain parts with high-quality geometry that are suitable for a given category, resulting in meaningful decompositions with clean geometry. The type of decomposition can also be controlled through the choice of parts in the library. Our method works via a self-supervised approach that iteratively retrieves parts from the library and refines their placements. We show that this approach gives higher reconstruction accuracy and more desirable decompositions than existing approaches. Additionally, we show how the decomposition can be controlled through the part library by using different part libraries to reconstruct the same shapes.
summary: Representing a 3D shape with a set of primitives can aid perception of structure, improve robotic object manipulation, and enable editing, stylization, and compression of 3D shapes. Existing methods either use simple parametric primitives or learn a generative shape space of parts. Both have limitations: parametric primitives lead to coarse approximations, while learned parts offer too little control over the decomposition. We instead propose to decompose shapes using a library of 3D parts provided by the user, giving full control over the choice of parts. The library can contain parts with high-quality geometry that are suitable for a given category, resulting in meaningful decompositions with clean geometry. The type of decomposition can also be controlled through the choice of parts in the library. Our method works via a self-supervised approach that iteratively retrieves parts from the library and refines their placements. We show that this approach gives higher reconstruction accuracy and more desirable decompositions than existing approaches. Additionally, we show how the decomposition can be controlled through the part library by using different part libraries to reconstruct the same shapes.
abstract_zh: 使用一组基元表示 3D 形状可以帮助感知结构，改进机器人对象操作，并实现 3D 形状的编辑、风格化和压缩。现有方法要么使用简单的参数基元，要么学习零件的生成形状空间。两者都有局限性：参数基元导致粗略近似，而学习的部分对分解的控制太少。相反，我们建议使用用户提供的 3D 零件库来分解形状，从而完全控制零件的选择。该库可以包含适合给定类别的具有高质量几何形状的零件，从而通过干净的几何形状进行有意义的分解。分解的类型也可以通过库中零件的选择来控制。我们的方法通过自我监督的方法来工作，该方法迭代地从库中检索零件并完善它们的放置。我们表明，与现有方法相比，这种方法提供了更高的重建精度和更理想的分解。此外，我们还展示了如何通过使用不同的零件库重建相同的形状来通过零件库控制分解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户提供的3D部件库的无监督3D形状重建方法，通过部件检索与组装实现形状分解与重构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或使用简单参数化部件导致重建粗糙，或依赖学习的部件空间缺乏分解控制，无法满足对分解结果的精细需求。
AI.method: 采用自监督方法，通过迭代从用户提供的部件库中检索部件并优化其位置，实现形状分解与重构。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，该方法在重建精度和分解质量上表现更优，且可通过不同部件库控制分解方式。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入用户可控的高质量部件库，该方法在保持重建精度的同时提供了更灵活的形状分解能力。

authors_text: Katherine R. Maffey,Kyle Dotterrer,Jennifer Niemann,Iain Cruickshank,Grace A. Lewis,Christian Kästner
title: MLTEing Models: Negotiating, Evaluating, and Documenting Model and System Qualities
title_zh: MLTE 模型：协商、评估和记录模型和系统质量
comment: Accepted to the NIER Track of the 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023)
comments: Accepted to the NIER Track of the 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023)
abstract: Many organizations seek to ensure that machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) systems work as intended in production but currently do not have a cohesive methodology in place to do so. To fill this gap, we propose MLTE (Machine Learning Test and Evaluation, colloquially referred to as "melt"), a framework and implementation to evaluate ML models and systems. The framework compiles state-of-the-art evaluation techniques into an organizational process for interdisciplinary teams, including model developers, software engineers, system owners, and other stakeholders. MLTE tooling supports this process by providing a domain-specific language that teams can use to express model requirements, an infrastructure to define, generate, and collect ML evaluation metrics, and the means to communicate results.
summary: Many organizations seek to ensure that machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) systems work as intended in production but currently do not have a cohesive methodology in place to do so. To fill this gap, we propose MLTE (Machine Learning Test and Evaluation, colloquially referred to as "melt"), a framework and implementation to evaluate ML models and systems. The framework compiles state-of-the-art evaluation techniques into an organizational process for interdisciplinary teams, including model developers, software engineers, system owners, and other stakeholders. MLTE tooling supports this process by providing a domain-specific language that teams can use to express model requirements, an infrastructure to define, generate, and collect ML evaluation metrics, and the means to communicate results.
abstract_zh: 许多组织寻求确保机器学习 (ML) 和人工智能 (AI) 系统在生产中按预期工作，但目前没有一个统一的方法来做到这一点。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 MLTE（机器学习测试和评估，俗称“melt”），这是一个评估 ML 模型和系统的框架和实现。该框架将最先进的评估技术编译成跨学科团队的组织流程，包括模型开发人员、软件工程师、系统所有者和其他利益相关者。 MLTE 工具通过提供团队可用来表达模型需求的特定领域语言、定义、生成和收集 ML 评估指标的基础设施以及传达结果的方式来支持此过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MLTE框架和工具，用于评估和文档化机器学习模型及系统的质量，以填补组织在确保AI系统生产环境性能方面的系统化方法缺失。
AI.motivation: 当前组织缺乏连贯的流程来确保机器学习和AI系统在生产环境中按预期运行，导致模型质量评估和系统性能验证存在盲区。
AI.method: 开发MLTE框架，包含领域特定语言定义模型需求、基础设施生成评估指标，并通过工具支持跨学科团队协作与结果沟通。
AI.result: 实现MLTE工具链，为组织提供系统化评估流程，支持模型开发者、工程师和利益相关方的协作与质量验证。
AI.conclusion: MLTE填补了AI系统质量评估的实践空白，通过框架与工具的结合，为跨学科团队提供了可操作的模型和系统质量验证方法论。

search_text: MLTEing Models: Negotiating, Evaluating, and Documenting Model and System Qualities MLTE 模型：协商、评估和记录模型和系统质量 Many organizations seek to ensure that machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) systems work as intended in production but currently do not have a cohesive methodology in place to do so. To fill this gap, we propose MLTE (Machine Learning Test and Evaluation, colloquially referred to as "melt"), a framework and implementation to evaluate ML models and systems. The framework compiles state-of-the-art evaluation techniques into an organizational process for interdisciplinary teams, including model developers, software engineers, system owners, and other stakeholders. MLTE tooling supports this process by providing a domain-specific language that teams can use to express model requirements, an infrastructure to define, generate, and collect ML evaluation metrics, and the means to communicate results. 许多组织寻求确保机器学习 (ML) 和人工智能 (AI) 系统在生产中按预期工作，但目前没有一个统一的方法来做到这一点。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 MLTE（机器学习测试和评估，俗称“melt”），这是一个评估 ML 模型和系统的框架和实现。该框架将最先进的评估技术编译成跨学科团队的组织流程，包括模型开发人员、软件工程师、系统所有者和其他利益相关者。 MLTE 工具通过提供团队可用来表达模型需求的特定领域语言、定义、生成和收集 ML 评估指标的基础设施以及传达结果的方式来支持此过程。 本文提出MLTE框架和工具，用于评估和文档化机器学习模型及系统的质量，以填补组织在确保AI系统生产环境性能方面的系统化方法缺失。 Katherine R. Maffey,Kyle Dotterrer,Jennifer Niemann,Iain Cruickshank,Grace A. Lewis,Christian Kästner cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Rongrong Liu,John M. Wandeto,Florent Nageotte,Philippe Zanne,Michel de Mathelin,Birgitta Dresp-Langley
title: Spatiotemporal modeling of grip forces captures proficiency in manual robot control
title_zh: 抓握力的时空建模可提高手动机器人控制的熟练程度
abstract: This paper builds on our previous work by exploiting Artificial Intelligence to predict individual grip force variability in manual robot control. Grip forces were recorded from various loci in the dominant and non dominant hands of individuals by means of wearable wireless sensor technology. Statistical analyses bring to the fore skill specific temporal variations in thousands of grip forces of a complete novice and a highly proficient expert in manual robot control. A brain inspired neural network model that uses the output metric of a Self Organizing Map with unsupervised winner take all learning was run on the sensor output from both hands of each user. The neural network metric expresses the difference between an input representation and its model representation at any given moment in time t and reliably captures the differences between novice and expert performance in terms of grip force variability.Functionally motivated spatiotemporal analysis of individual average grip forces, computed for time windows of constant size in the output of a restricted amount of task-relevant sensors in the dominant (preferred) hand, reveal finger-specific synergies reflecting robotic task skill. The analyses lead the way towards grip force monitoring in real time to permit tracking task skill evolution in trainees, or identify individual proficiency levels in human robot interaction in environmental contexts of high sensory uncertainty. Parsimonious Artificial Intelligence (AI) assistance will contribute to the outcome of new types of surgery, in particular single-port approaches such as NOTES (Natural Orifice Transluminal Endoscopic Surgery) and SILS (Single Incision Laparoscopic Surgery).
summary: This paper builds on our previous work by exploiting Artificial Intelligence to predict individual grip force variability in manual robot control. Grip forces were recorded from various loci in the dominant and non dominant hands of individuals by means of wearable wireless sensor technology. Statistical analyses bring to the fore skill specific temporal variations in thousands of grip forces of a complete novice and a highly proficient expert in manual robot control. A brain inspired neural network model that uses the output metric of a Self Organizing Map with unsupervised winner take all learning was run on the sensor output from both hands of each user. The neural network metric expresses the difference between an input representation and its model representation at any given moment in time t and reliably captures the differences between novice and expert performance in terms of grip force variability.Functionally motivated spatiotemporal analysis of individual average grip forces, computed for time windows of constant size in the output of a restricted amount of task-relevant sensors in the dominant (preferred) hand, reveal finger-specific synergies reflecting robotic task skill. The analyses lead the way towards grip force monitoring in real time to permit tracking task skill evolution in trainees, or identify individual proficiency levels in human robot interaction in environmental contexts of high sensory uncertainty. Parsimonious Artificial Intelligence (AI) assistance will contribute to the outcome of new types of surgery, in particular single-port approaches such as NOTES (Natural Orifice Transluminal Endoscopic Surgery) and SILS (Single Incision Laparoscopic Surgery).
abstract_zh: 本文基于我们之前的工作，利用人工智能来预测手动机器人控制中的个体握力变化。通过可穿戴无线传感器技术，记录了个体惯用手和非惯用手的不同位置的握力。统计分析突出了手动机器人控制方面的新手和高度熟练的专家在数千个握力中的技能特定时间变化。受大脑启发的神经网络模型使用自组织映射的输出度量，并在每个用户双手的传感器输出上运行无监督的赢者通吃学习。神经网络度量表达了在任何给定时刻 t 的输入表示与其模型表示之间的差异，并可靠地捕获新手和专家在握力变化方面的表现之间的差异。对个人平均握力的功能驱动时空分析，针对优势（首选）手上有限数量的任务相关传感器的输出中恒定大小的时间窗口进行计算，揭示了反映机器人任务技能的手指特定协同作用。这些分析引领了实时握力监测的方向，以允许跟踪受训者的任务技能演变，或确定在高度感官不确定性的环境背景下人机交互的个人熟练程度。简约的人工智能（AI）辅助将有助于新型手术的结果，特别是单孔手术，例如NOTES（自然孔腔内窥镜手术）和SILS（单切口腹腔镜手术）。

AI.tldr: 本文通过时空建模分析抓握力变化，评估人工机器人控制中的技能熟练度。
AI.motivation: 开发实时监测抓握力的方法，以追踪训练者技能发展并识别人机交互中的个体熟练水平，尤其在高感官不确定性的环境中。
AI.method: 利用可穿戴无线传感器记录主手和非主手的抓握力数据，结合自组织映射神经网络模型，分析技能差异及手指特异性协同效应。
AI.result: 成功区分了新手与专家的抓握力差异，揭示了与机器人任务技能相关的时空特征，并为手术等场景提供AI辅助支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可实时监测技能演变，助力单孔手术等复杂操作，提升人机交互效率与安全性。

authors_text: Kirill Kronhardt,Max Pascher,Jens Gerken
title: Understanding Shared Control for Assistive Robotic Arms
title_zh: 了解辅助机械臂的共享控制
comment: VAT-HRI '23: Workshop on Variable Autonomy for Human-Robot Teaming at the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction
comments: VAT-HRI '23: Workshop on Variable Autonomy for Human-Robot Teaming at the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: Living a self-determined life independent of human caregivers or fully autonomous robots is a crucial factor for human dignity and the preservation of self-worth for people with motor impairments. Assistive robotic solutions - particularly robotic arms - are frequently deployed in domestic care, empowering people with motor impairments in performing ADLs independently. However, while assistive robotic arms can help them perform ADLs, currently available controls are highly complex and time-consuming due to the need to control multiple DoFs at once and necessary mode-switches. This work provides an overview of shared control approaches for assistive robotic arms, which aim to improve their ease of use for people with motor impairments. We identify three main takeaways for future research: Less is More, Pick-and-Place Matters, and Communicating Intent.
summary: Living a self-determined life independent of human caregivers or fully autonomous robots is a crucial factor for human dignity and the preservation of self-worth for people with motor impairments. Assistive robotic solutions - particularly robotic arms - are frequently deployed in domestic care, empowering people with motor impairments in performing ADLs independently. However, while assistive robotic arms can help them perform ADLs, currently available controls are highly complex and time-consuming due to the need to control multiple DoFs at once and necessary mode-switches. This work provides an overview of shared control approaches for assistive robotic arms, which aim to improve their ease of use for people with motor impairments. We identify three main takeaways for future research: Less is More, Pick-and-Place Matters, and Communicating Intent.
abstract_zh: 对于运动障碍患者来说，独立于人类护理人员或完全自主的机器人过上自主的生活是维护人类尊严和自我价值的关键因素。辅助机器人解决方案——尤其是机械臂——经常部署在家庭护理中，帮助有运动障碍的人独立执行日常生活活动。然而，虽然辅助机械臂可以帮助他们执行 ADL，但由于需要同时控制多个自由度和必要的模式切换，目前可用的控制非常复杂且耗时。这项工作概述了辅助机械臂的共享控制方法，旨在提高运动障碍人士的易用性。我们确定了未来研究的三个主要要点：少即是多、拾取和放置很重要以及沟通意图。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了辅助机械臂的共享控制方法，旨在提升残障人士使用的便捷性。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助机械臂控制复杂且耗时，需简化操作以提升残障人士的独立生活能力。
AI.method: 通过综述共享控制方法，识别出未来研究的三个关键方向。
AI.result: 提出三个未来研究方向：Less is More，Pick-and-Place Matters，以及意图沟通的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于简化控制、优化抓取放置操作及提升意图沟通，以增强辅助机械臂的实用性。
