motivation: 现有辅助机械臂控制复杂且耗时，需简化操作以提升残障人士的独立生活能力。
method: 通过综述共享控制方法，识别出未来研究的三个关键方向。
result: 提出三个未来研究方向：Less is More，Pick-and-Place Matters，以及意图沟通的重要性。
conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于简化控制、优化抓取放置操作及提升意图沟通，以增强辅助机械臂的实用性。
search_text: Understanding Shared Control for Assistive Robotic Arms 了解辅助机械臂的共享控制 Living a self-determined life independent of human caregivers or fully autonomous robots is a crucial factor for human dignity and the preservation of self-worth for people with motor impairments. Assistive robotic solutions - particularly robotic arms - are frequently deployed in domestic care, empowering people with motor impairments in performing ADLs independently. However, while assistive robotic arms can help them perform ADLs, currently available controls are highly complex and time-consuming due to the need to control multiple DoFs at once and necessary mode-switches. This work provides an overview of shared control approaches for assistive robotic arms, which aim to improve their ease of use for people with motor impairments. We identify three main takeaways for future research: Less is More, Pick-and-Place Matters, and Communicating Intent. 对于运动障碍患者来说，独立于人类护理人员或完全自主的机器人过上自主的生活是维护人类尊严和自我价值的关键因素。辅助机器人解决方案——尤其是机械臂——经常部署在家庭护理中，帮助有运动障碍的人独立执行日常生活活动。然而，虽然辅助机械臂可以帮助他们执行 ADL，但由于需要同时控制多个自由度和必要的模式切换，目前可用的控制非常复杂且耗时。这项工作概述了辅助机械臂的共享控制方法，旨在提高运动障碍人士的易用性。我们确定了未来研究的三个主要要点：少即是多、拾取和放置很重要以及沟通意图。 本文综述了辅助机械臂的共享控制方法，旨在提升残障人士使用的便捷性。 Kirill Kronhardt,Max Pascher,Jens Gerken cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Kurt Stolle,Gijs Dubbelman
title: Unified Perception: Efficient Depth-Aware Video Panoptic Segmentation with Minimal Annotation Costs
title_zh: 统一感知：高效的深度感知视频全景分割，注释成本最小
abstract: Depth-aware video panoptic segmentation is a promising approach to camera based scene understanding. However, the current state-of-the-art methods require costly video annotations and use a complex training pipeline compared to their image-based equivalents. In this paper, we present a new approach titled Unified Perception that achieves state-of-the-art performance without requiring video-based training. Our method employs a simple two-stage cascaded tracking algorithm that (re)uses object embeddings computed in an image-based network. Experimental results on the Cityscapes-DVPS dataset demonstrate that our method achieves an overall DVPQ of 57.1, surpassing state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we show that our tracking strategies are effective for long-term object association on KITTI-STEP, achieving an STQ of 59.1 which exceeded the performance of state-of-the-art methods that employ the same backbone network. Code is available at: https://tue-mps.github.io/unipercept
summary: Depth-aware video panoptic segmentation is a promising approach to camera based scene understanding. However, the current state-of-the-art methods require costly video annotations and use a complex training pipeline compared to their image-based equivalents. In this paper, we present a new approach titled Unified Perception that achieves state-of-the-art performance without requiring video-based training. Our method employs a simple two-stage cascaded tracking algorithm that (re)uses object embeddings computed in an image-based network. Experimental results on the Cityscapes-DVPS dataset demonstrate that our method achieves an overall DVPQ of 57.1, surpassing state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we show that our tracking strategies are effective for long-term object association on KITTI-STEP, achieving an STQ of 59.1 which exceeded the performance of state-of-the-art methods that employ the same backbone network. Code is available at: https://tue-mps.github.io/unipercept
abstract_zh: 深度感知视频全景分割是基于相机的场景理解的一种很有前途的方法。然而，与基于图像的方法相比，当前最先进的方法需要昂贵的视频注释，并且使用复杂的训练管道。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为“统一感知”的新方法，该方法无需基于视频的培训即可实现最先进的性能。我们的方法采用简单的两阶段级联跟踪算法，该算法（重新）使用在基于图像的网络中计算的对象嵌入。 Cityscapes-DVPS 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法的总体 DVPQ 达到 57.1，超越了最先进的方法。此外，我们表明我们的跟踪策略对于 KITTI-STEP 上的长期对象关联是有效的，实现了 59.1 的 STQ，超过了采用相同骨干网络的最先进方法的性能。代码位于：https://tue-mps.github.io/unipercept

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Unified Perception的方法，用于在最小标注成本下实现高效的深度感知视频全景分割。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度感知视频全景分割方法需要昂贵的视频标注和复杂的训练流程，而图像基方法更高效。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，降低标注成本并简化训练流程。
AI.method: 采用两阶段级联跟踪算法，利用图像网络计算的物体嵌入进行（重）使用，无需视频级训练。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes-DVPS数据集上达到57.1的DVPQ指标，在KITTI-STEP上STQ达59.1，均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过复用图像嵌入实现高效视频分割，在减少标注成本的同时保持先进性能。

authors_text: Xinhang Wan,Xinwang Liu,Jiyuan Liu,Siwei Wang,Yi Wen,Weixuan Liang,En Zhu,Zhe Liu,Lu Zhou
title: Auto-weighted Multi-view Clustering for Large-scale Data
title_zh: 大规模数据的自动加权多视图聚类
abstract: Multi-view clustering has gained broad attention owing to its capacity to exploit complementary information across multiple data views. Although existing methods demonstrate delightful clustering performance, most of them are of high time complexity and cannot handle large-scale data. Matrix factorization-based models are a representative of solving this problem. However, they assume that the views share a dimension-fixed consensus coefficient matrix and view-specific base matrices, limiting their representability. Moreover, a series of large-scale algorithms that bear one or more hyperparameters are impractical in real-world applications. To address the two issues, we propose an auto-weighted multi-view clustering (AWMVC) algorithm. Specifically, AWMVC first learns coefficient matrices from corresponding base matrices of different dimensions, then fuses them to obtain an optimal consensus matrix. By mapping original features into distinctive low-dimensional spaces, we can attain more comprehensive knowledge, thus obtaining better clustering results. Moreover, we design a six-step alternative optimization algorithm proven to be convergent theoretically. Also, AWMVC shows excellent performance on various benchmark datasets compared with existing ones. The code of AWMVC is publicly available at https://github.com/wanxinhang/AAAI-2023-AWMVC.
summary: Multi-view clustering has gained broad attention owing to its capacity to exploit complementary information across multiple data views. Although existing methods demonstrate delightful clustering performance, most of them are of high time complexity and cannot handle large-scale data. Matrix factorization-based models are a representative of solving this problem. However, they assume that the views share a dimension-fixed consensus coefficient matrix and view-specific base matrices, limiting their representability. Moreover, a series of large-scale algorithms that bear one or more hyperparameters are impractical in real-world applications. To address the two issues, we propose an auto-weighted multi-view clustering (AWMVC) algorithm. Specifically, AWMVC first learns coefficient matrices from corresponding base matrices of different dimensions, then fuses them to obtain an optimal consensus matrix. By mapping original features into distinctive low-dimensional spaces, we can attain more comprehensive knowledge, thus obtaining better clustering results. Moreover, we design a six-step alternative optimization algorithm proven to be convergent theoretically. Also, AWMVC shows excellent performance on various benchmark datasets compared with existing ones. The code of AWMVC is publicly available at https://github.com/wanxinhang/AAAI-2023-AWMVC.
abstract_zh: 多视图聚类由于其跨多个数据视图利用互补信息的能力而受到广泛关注。尽管现有方法表现出令人愉悦的聚类性能，但大多数方法时间复杂度较高，无法处理大规模数据。基于矩阵分解的模型是解决该问题的代表。然而，他们假设视图共享一个固定维度的共识系数矩阵和特定于视图的基矩阵，从而限制了它们的可表示性。此外，一系列带有一个或多个超参数的大规模算法在现实应用中是不切实际的。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种自动加权多视图聚类（AWMVC）算法。具体来说，AWMVC首先从不同维度的相应基矩阵中学习系数矩阵，然后将它们融合以获得最优共识矩阵。通过将原始特征映射到独特的低维空间中，我们可以获得更全面的知识，从而获得更好的聚类结果。此外，我们设计了一种六步替代优化算法，理论上证明是收敛的。此外，与现有数据集相比，AWMVC 在各种基准数据集上都表现出了出色的性能。 AWMVC的代码公开于https://github.com/wanxinhang/AAAI-2023-AWMVC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于大规模数据的自动加权多视图聚类算法（AWMVC）。
AI.motivation: 现有的多视图聚类方法在处理大规模数据时时间复杂度高，且假设视图共享固定维度的共识系数矩阵和视图特定的基础矩阵，限制了其表现力。
AI.method: AWMVC首先从不同维度的基础矩阵中学习系数矩阵，然后融合以获得最优共识矩阵。通过将原始特征映射到不同的低维空间，从而获得更全面的知识。
AI.result: AWMVC在多个基准数据集上表现出色，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AWMVC算法在大规模数据的多视图聚类任务中具有较高的性能和实用性。

authors_text: Andriy Sarabakha
title: anafi_ros: from Off-the-Shelf Drones to Research Platforms
title_zh: anafi_ros：从现成的无人机到研究平台
abstract: The off-the-shelf drones are simple to operate and easy to maintain aerial systems. However, due to proprietary flight software, these drones usually do not provide any open-source interface which can enable them for autonomous flight in research or teaching. This work introduces a package for ROS1 and ROS2 for straightforward interfacing with off-the-shelf drones from the Parrot ANAFI family. The developed ROS package is hardware agnostic, allowing connecting seamlessly to all four supported drone models. This framework can connect with the same ease to a single drone or a team of drones from the same ground station. The developed package was intensively tested at the limits of the drones' capabilities and thoughtfully documented to facilitate its use by other research groups worldwide.
summary: The off-the-shelf drones are simple to operate and easy to maintain aerial systems. However, due to proprietary flight software, these drones usually do not provide any open-source interface which can enable them for autonomous flight in research or teaching. This work introduces a package for ROS1 and ROS2 for straightforward interfacing with off-the-shelf drones from the Parrot ANAFI family. The developed ROS package is hardware agnostic, allowing connecting seamlessly to all four supported drone models. This framework can connect with the same ease to a single drone or a team of drones from the same ground station. The developed package was intensively tested at the limits of the drones' capabilities and thoughtfully documented to facilitate its use by other research groups worldwide.
abstract_zh: 现成的无人机操作简单且易于维护空中系统。然而，由于专有的飞行软件，这些无人机通常不提供任何开源接口，使它们能够在研究或教学中进行自主飞行。这项工作引入了 ROS1 和 ROS2 软件包，用于与 Parrot ANAFI 系列的现成无人机直接连接。开发的 ROS 包与硬件无关，可以无缝连接到所有四种受支持的无人机型号。该框架可以同样轻松地连接来自同一地面站的单个无人机或一组无人机。开发的软件包在无人机能力的极限下进行了深入测试，并进行了周密的记录，以方便全球其他研究小组使用。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个ROS1和ROS2接口包，将Parrot ANAFI系列现成无人机转化为可支持自主飞行的研究平台。
AI.motivation: 现成无人机因专有飞行软件缺乏开源接口，难以用于研究和教学中的自主飞行任务。
AI.method: 开发硬件无关的ROS接口包，支持四种ANAFI无人机型号，并实现单机/多机协同控制功能。
AI.result: 接口包通过极限测试并提供完整文档，成功赋能全球研究团队开展无人机自主飞行研究。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了现成无人机研究接口缺失问题，推动了多无人机系统在学术领域的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文开发了一个ROS1和ROS2接口包，将Parrot ANAFI系列现成无人机转化为可支持自主飞行的研究平台。
ai_content.motivation: 现成无人机因专有飞行软件缺乏开源接口，难以用于研究和教学中的自主飞行任务。
ai_content.method: 开发硬件无关的ROS接口包，支持四种ANAFI无人机型号，并实现单机/多机协同控制功能。
ai_content.result: 接口包通过极限测试并提供完整文档，成功赋能全球研究团队开展无人机自主飞行研究。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了现成无人机研究接口缺失问题，推动了多无人机系统在学术领域的应用。

search_text: anafi_ros: from Off-the-Shelf Drones to Research Platforms anafi_ros：从现成的无人机到研究平台 The off-the-shelf drones are simple to operate and easy to maintain aerial systems. However, due to proprietary flight software, these drones usually do not provide any open-source interface which can enable them for autonomous flight in research or teaching. This work introduces a package for ROS1 and ROS2 for straightforward interfacing with off-the-shelf drones from the Parrot ANAFI family. The developed ROS package is hardware agnostic, allowing connecting seamlessly to all four supported drone models. This framework can connect with the same ease to a single drone or a team of drones from the same ground station. The developed package was intensively tested at the limits of the drones' capabilities and thoughtfully documented to facilitate its use by other research groups worldwide. 现成的无人机操作简单且易于维护空中系统。然而，由于专有的飞行软件，这些无人机通常不提供任何开源接口，使它们能够在研究或教学中进行自主飞行。这项工作引入了 ROS1 和 ROS2 软件包，用于与 Parrot ANAFI 系列的现成无人机直接连接。开发的 ROS 包与硬件无关，可以无缝连接到所有四种受支持的无人机型号。该框架可以同样轻松地连接来自同一地面站的单个无人机或一组无人机。开发的软件包在无人机能力的极限下进行了深入测试，并进行了周密的记录，以方便全球其他研究小组使用。 本文开发了一个ROS1和ROS2接口包，将Parrot ANAFI系列现成无人机转化为可支持自主飞行的研究平台。 Andriy Sarabakha cs.RO

authors_text: Heinrich Dinkel,Yongqing Wang,Zhiyong Yan,Junbo Zhang,Yujun Wang
title: Unified Keyword Spotting and Audio Tagging on Mobile Devices with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 在移动设备上进行统一关键字识别和音频标记
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) is a core human-machine-interaction front-end task for most modern intelligent assistants. Recently, a unified (UniKW-AT) framework has been proposed that adds additional capabilities in the form of audio tagging (AT) to a KWS model. However, previous work did not consider the real-world deployment of a UniKW-AT model, where factors such as model size and inference speed are more important than performance alone. This work introduces three mobile-device deployable models named Unified Transformers (UiT). Our best model achieves an mAP of 34.09 on Audioset, and an accuracy of 97.76 on the public Google Speech Commands V1 dataset. Further, we benchmark our proposed approaches on four mobile platforms, revealing that the proposed UiT models can achieve a speedup of 2 - 6 times against a competitive MobileNetV2.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) is a core human-machine-interaction front-end task for most modern intelligent assistants. Recently, a unified (UniKW-AT) framework has been proposed that adds additional capabilities in the form of audio tagging (AT) to a KWS model. However, previous work did not consider the real-world deployment of a UniKW-AT model, where factors such as model size and inference speed are more important than performance alone. This work introduces three mobile-device deployable models named Unified Transformers (UiT). Our best model achieves an mAP of 34.09 on Audioset, and an accuracy of 97.76 on the public Google Speech Commands V1 dataset. Further, we benchmark our proposed approaches on four mobile platforms, revealing that the proposed UiT models can achieve a speedup of 2 - 6 times against a competitive MobileNetV2.
abstract_zh: 关键词识别 (KWS) 是大多数现代智能助手的核心人机交互前端任务。最近，提出了一个统一的 (UniKW-AT) 框架，该框架以音频标记 (AT) 的形式向 KWS 模型添加了附加功能。然而，之前的工作没有考虑 UniKW-AT 模型的实际部署，其中模型大小和推理速度等因素比单独的性能更重要。这项工作介绍了三种名为 Unified Transformers (UiT) 的移动设备可部署模型。我们的最佳模型在 Audioset 上的 mAP 为 34.09，在公共 Google Speech Commands V1 数据集上的准确度为 97.76。此外，我们在四个移动平台上对我们提出的方法进行了基准测试，结果表明，与竞争对手的 MobileNetV2 相比，所提出的 UiT 模型可以实现 2 - 6 倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的统一模型UiT，在移动设备上同时实现关键词识别（KWS）和音频标签（AT）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有统一框架未考虑移动设备部署需求，需在模型大小、推理速度与性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计轻量化Transformer架构，提出三个可部署模型UiT，在保持性能的同时优化计算效率。
AI.result: 最佳模型在Audioset达到34.09 mAP，在Google Speech Commands V1准确率97.76%，较MobileNetV2快2-6倍。
AI.conclusion: UiT模型有效平衡了移动设备部署的效率与性能需求，为端侧多任务音频处理提供新方案。

authors_text: Guillermo Ortiz-Jimenez,Mark Collier,Anant Nawalgaria,Alexander D'Amour,Jesse Berent,Rodolphe Jenatton,Effrosyni Kokiopoulou
title: When does Privileged Information Explain Away Label Noise?
title_zh: 特权信息何时能消除标签噪音？
abstract: Leveraging privileged information (PI), or features available during training but not at test time, has recently been shown to be an effective method for addressing label noise. However, the reasons for its effectiveness are not well understood. In this study, we investigate the role played by different properties of the PI in explaining away label noise. Through experiments on multiple datasets with real PI (CIFAR-N/H) and a new large-scale benchmark ImageNet-PI, we find that PI is most helpful when it allows networks to easily distinguish clean from noisy data, while enabling a learning shortcut to memorize the noisy examples. Interestingly, when PI becomes too predictive of the target label, PI methods often perform worse than their no-PI baselines. Based on these findings, we propose several enhancements to the state-of-the-art PI methods and demonstrate the potential of PI as a means of tackling label noise. Finally, we show how we can easily combine the resulting PI approaches with existing no-PI techniques designed to deal with label noise.
summary: Leveraging privileged information (PI), or features available during training but not at test time, has recently been shown to be an effective method for addressing label noise. However, the reasons for its effectiveness are not well understood. In this study, we investigate the role played by different properties of the PI in explaining away label noise. Through experiments on multiple datasets with real PI (CIFAR-N/H) and a new large-scale benchmark ImageNet-PI, we find that PI is most helpful when it allows networks to easily distinguish clean from noisy data, while enabling a learning shortcut to memorize the noisy examples. Interestingly, when PI becomes too predictive of the target label, PI methods often perform worse than their no-PI baselines. Based on these findings, we propose several enhancements to the state-of-the-art PI methods and demonstrate the potential of PI as a means of tackling label noise. Finally, we show how we can easily combine the resulting PI approaches with existing no-PI techniques designed to deal with label noise.
abstract_zh: 最近证明，利用特权信息（PI）或训练期间可用但测试时不可用的特征是解决标签噪声的有效方法。然而，其有效性的原因尚不清楚。在这项研究中，我们研究了 PI 的不同属性在解释标签噪声方面所发挥的作用。通过对具有真实 PI (CIFAR-N/H) 和新的大规模基准 ImageNet-PI 的多个数据集进行的实验，我们发现当 PI 允许网络轻松区分干净数据和噪声数据，同时提供学习捷径来记住噪声示例时，PI 是最有帮助的。有趣的是，当 PI 过于预测目标标签时，PI 方法的表现通常比无 PI 基线更差。基于这些发现，我们对最先进的 PI 方法提出了一些改进，并证明了 PI 作为解决标签噪声手段的潜力。最后，我们展示了如何轻松地将所得的 PI 方法与旨在处理标签噪声的现有无 PI 技术结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文研究特权信息（PI）在缓解标签噪声中的作用机制，并探讨其有效条件。
AI.motivation: 尽管特权信息被证明能有效应对标签噪声，但其背后的原因尚未明确，需系统分析PI的特性与效果关系。
AI.method: 通过在多个真实PI数据集（如CIFAR-N/H）和新构建的ImageNet-PI基准上实验，分析PI区分干净数据与噪声数据的能力，并提出改进方法。
AI.result: PI在帮助模型区分噪声与干净数据时效果最佳，但当PI过强预测目标标签时，性能可能低于无PI基线；提出改进方法并验证与现有去噪技术的结合潜力。
AI.conclusion: 特权信息在适当条件下可有效缓解标签噪声，但需避免过度预测性，结合传统方法能进一步提升效果。

Finally, we show how we can easily combine the resulting PI approaches with existing no-PI techniques designed to deal with label noise. 最近证明，利用特权信息（PI）或训练期间可用但测试时不可用的特征是解决标签噪声的有效方法。然而，其有效性的原因尚不清楚。在这项研究中，我们研究了 PI 的不同属性在解释标签噪声方面所发挥的作用。通过对具有真实 PI (CIFAR-N/H) 和新的大规模基准 ImageNet-PI 的多个数据集进行的实验，我们发现当 PI 允许网络轻松区分干净数据和噪声数据，同时提供学习捷径来记住噪声示例时，PI 是最有帮助的。有趣的是，当 PI 过于预测目标标签时，PI 方法的表现通常比无 PI 基线更差。基于这些发现，我们对最先进的 PI 方法提出了一些改进，并证明了 PI 作为解决标签噪声手段的潜力。最后，我们展示了如何轻松地将所得的 PI 方法与旨在处理标签噪声的现有无 PI 技术结合起来。 本文研究特权信息（PI）在缓解标签噪声中的作用机制，并探讨其有效条件。 Guillermo Ortiz-Jimenez,Mark Collier,Anant Nawalgaria,Alexander D'Amour,Jesse Berent,Rodolphe Jenatton,Effrosyni Kokiopoulou cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jieqi Shi,Peiliang Li,Xiaozhi Chen,Shaojie Shen
title: Are All Point Clouds Suitable for Completion? Weakly Supervised Quality Evaluation Network for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 所有点云都适合完成吗？点云补全的弱监督质量评估网络
abstract: In the practical application of point cloud completion tasks, real data quality is usually much worse than the CAD datasets used for training. A small amount of noisy data will usually significantly impact the overall system's accuracy. In this paper, we propose a quality evaluation network to score the point clouds and help judge the quality of the point cloud before applying the completion model. We believe our scoring method can help researchers select more appropriate point clouds for subsequent completion and reconstruction and avoid manual parameter adjustment. Moreover, our evaluation model is fast and straightforward and can be directly inserted into any model's training or use process to facilitate the automatic selection and post-processing of point clouds. We propose a complete dataset construction and model evaluation method based on ShapeNet. We verify our network using detection and flow estimation tasks on KITTI, a real-world dataset for autonomous driving. The experimental results show that our model can effectively distinguish the quality of point clouds and help in practical tasks.
summary: In the practical application of point cloud completion tasks, real data quality is usually much worse than the CAD datasets used for training. A small amount of noisy data will usually significantly impact the overall system's accuracy. In this paper, we propose a quality evaluation network to score the point clouds and help judge the quality of the point cloud before applying the completion model. We believe our scoring method can help researchers select more appropriate point clouds for subsequent completion and reconstruction and avoid manual parameter adjustment. Moreover, our evaluation model is fast and straightforward and can be directly inserted into any model's training or use process to facilitate the automatic selection and post-processing of point clouds. We propose a complete dataset construction and model evaluation method based on ShapeNet. We verify our network using detection and flow estimation tasks on KITTI, a real-world dataset for autonomous driving. The experimental results show that our model can effectively distinguish the quality of point clouds and help in practical tasks.
abstract_zh: 在点云补全任务的实际应用中，真实数据质量通常比用于训练的CAD数据集差很多。少量的噪声数据通常会显着影响整个系统的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种质量评估网络来对点云进行评分，并在应用完成模型之前帮助判断点云的质量。我们相信我们的评分方法可以帮助研究人员选择更合适的点云进行后续的完成和重建，并避免手动参数调整。此外，我们的评估模型快速而直接，可以直接插入到任何模型的训练或使用过程中，以方便点云的自动选择和后处理。我们提出了基于ShapeNet的完整数据集构建和模型评估方法。我们使用 KITTI（自动驾驶的真实数据集）上的检测和流量估计任务来验证我们的网络。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以有效区分点云的质量，对实际任务有帮助。

AI.motivation: 实际应用中的点云数据质量远低于训练用的CAD数据集，噪声数据会显著影响系统精度，而手动参数调整效率低下。
AI.method: 构建基于ShapeNet的数据集，设计质量评估网络对点云进行打分，并将其嵌入任意模型的训练或使用流程中；在KITTI数据集上通过检测与流估计任务验证模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能有效区分点云质量，提升实际任务（如自动驾驶）中点云补全的准确性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种快速、自动化的点云质量评估方案，可优化补全流程并减少对人工干预的依赖。

search_text: Are All Point Clouds Suitable for Completion? Weakly Supervised Quality Evaluation Network for Point Cloud Completion 所有点云都适合完成吗？点云补全的弱监督质量评估网络 In the practical application of point cloud completion tasks, real data quality is usually much worse than the CAD datasets used for training. A small amount of noisy data will usually significantly impact the overall system's accuracy. In this paper, we propose a quality evaluation network to score the point clouds and help judge the quality of the point cloud before applying the completion model. We believe our scoring method can help researchers select more appropriate point clouds for subsequent completion and reconstruction and avoid manual parameter adjustment. Moreover, our evaluation model is fast and straightforward and can be directly inserted into any model's training or use process to facilitate the automatic selection and post-processing of point clouds. We propose a complete dataset construction and model evaluation method based on ShapeNet. We verify our network using detection and flow estimation tasks on KITTI, a real-world dataset for autonomous driving. The experimental results show that our model can effectively distinguish the quality of point clouds and help in practical tasks. 在点云补全任务的实际应用中，真实数据质量通常比用于训练的CAD数据集差很多。少量的噪声数据通常会显着影响整个系统的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种质量评估网络来对点云进行评分，并在应用完成模型之前帮助判断点云的质量。我们相信我们的评分方法可以帮助研究人员选择更合适的点云进行后续的完成和重建，并避免手动参数调整。此外，我们的评估模型快速而直接，可以直接插入到任何模型的训练或使用过程中，以方便点云的自动选择和后处理。我们提出了基于ShapeNet的完整数据集构建和模型评估方法。我们使用 KITTI（自动驾驶的真实数据集）上的检测和流量估计任务来验证我们的网络。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以有效区分点云的质量，对实际任务有帮助。 本文提出一种弱监督质量评估网络，用于在点云补全任务中自动评估点云质量，帮助筛选适合补全的点云数据。 Jieqi Shi,Peiliang Li,Xiaozhi Chen,Shaojie Shen cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Huixin Sun,Yanjing Li,Linlin Yang,Xianbin Cao,Baochang Zhang
title: Uncertainty-Aware Gradient Stabilization for Small Object Detection
title_zh: 用于小物体检测的不确定性梯度稳定
abstract: Despite advances in generic object detection, there remains a performance gap in detecting small objects compared to normal-scale objects. We reveal that conventional object localization methods suffer from gradient instability in small objects due to sharper loss curvature, leading to a convergence challenge. To address the issue, we propose Uncertainty-Aware Gradient Stabilization (UGS), a framework that reformulates object localization as a classification task to stabilize gradients. UGS quantizes continuous labels into interval non-uniform discrete representations. Under a classification-based objective, the localization branch generates bounded and confidence-driven gradients, mitigating instability. Furthermore, UGS integrates an uncertainty minimization (UM) loss that reduces prediction variance and an uncertainty-guided refinement (UR) module that identifies and refines high-uncertainty regions via perturbations. Evaluated on four benchmarks, UGS consistently improves anchor-based, anchor-free, and leading small object detectors. Especially, UGS enhances DINO-5scale by 2.6 AP on VisDrone, surpassing previous state-of-the-art results.
summary: Despite advances in generic object detection, there remains a performance gap in detecting small objects compared to normal-scale objects. We reveal that conventional object localization methods suffer from gradient instability in small objects due to sharper loss curvature, leading to a convergence challenge. To address the issue, we propose Uncertainty-Aware Gradient Stabilization (UGS), a framework that reformulates object localization as a classification task to stabilize gradients. UGS quantizes continuous labels into interval non-uniform discrete representations. Under a classification-based objective, the localization branch generates bounded and confidence-driven gradients, mitigating instability. Furthermore, UGS integrates an uncertainty minimization (UM) loss that reduces prediction variance and an uncertainty-guided refinement (UR) module that identifies and refines high-uncertainty regions via perturbations. Evaluated on four benchmarks, UGS consistently improves anchor-based, anchor-free, and leading small object detectors. Especially, UGS enhances DINO-5scale by 2.6 AP on VisDrone, surpassing previous state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 尽管通用目标检测取得了进步，但与正常规模的目标相比，检测小目标仍然存在性能差距。我们发现，传统的目标定位方法由于损失曲率较大而在小目标中存在梯度不稳定的问题，从而导致收敛挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了不确定性感知梯度稳定（UGS），这是一个将对象定位重新表述为稳定梯度的分类任务的框架。 UGS将连续标签量化为区间非均匀离散表示。在基于分类的目标下，定位分支生成有界且置信驱动的梯度，从而减轻不稳定性。此外，UGS 集成了可减少预测方差的不确定性最小化 (UM) 损失和通过扰动识别和细化高不确定性区域的不确定性引导细化 (UR) 模块。根据四个基准进行评估，UGS 持续改进基于锚点、无锚点和领先的小物体检测器。特别是，UGS 在 VisDrone 上将 DINO-5scale 增强了 2.6 AP，超越了之前的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性感知的梯度稳定化框架（UGS），用于解决小目标检测中的梯度不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 传统目标定位方法在小目标检测中因损失曲率更尖锐导致梯度不稳定，影响收敛效果，亟需新的方法提升小目标检测性能。
AI.method: UGS将定位任务重构为分类任务，通过量化连续标签为非均匀离散表示，结合不确定性最小化损失（UM）和不确定性引导的细化模块（UR），稳定梯度并减少预测方差。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试中，UGS显著提升了基于锚点、无锚点及主流小目标检测器的性能，在VisDrone数据集上使DINO-5scale的AP值提升2.6，超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: UGS通过分类任务重构和不确定性机制有效缓解了小目标检测的梯度不稳定问题，验证了其在多种检测框架中的普适性和优越性。

authors_text: Ivan S. Maksymov,Andrey Pototsky
title: Reservoir computing based on solitary-like waves dynamics of film flows: a proof of concept
title_zh: 基于薄膜流的类孤立波动力学的储层计算：概念证明
abstract: Several theoretical works have shown that solitons -- waves that self-maintain constant shape and velocity as they propagate -- can be used as a physical computational reservoir, a concept where machine learning algorithms designed for digital computers are replaced by analog physical systems that exhibit nonlinear dynamical behaviour. Here we propose and experimentally validate a novel reservoir computing (RC) system that for the first time employs solitary-like (SL) waves propagating on the surface of a liquid film flowing over an inclined surface. We demonstrate the ability of the SL wave RC system (SLRC) to forecast chaotic time series and to successfully pass essential benchmark tests, including a memory capacity test and a Mackey-Glass model test.
summary: Several theoretical works have shown that solitons -- waves that self-maintain constant shape and velocity as they propagate -- can be used as a physical computational reservoir, a concept where machine learning algorithms designed for digital computers are replaced by analog physical systems that exhibit nonlinear dynamical behaviour. Here we propose and experimentally validate a novel reservoir computing (RC) system that for the first time employs solitary-like (SL) waves propagating on the surface of a liquid film flowing over an inclined surface. We demonstrate the ability of the SL wave RC system (SLRC) to forecast chaotic time series and to successfully pass essential benchmark tests, including a memory capacity test and a Mackey-Glass model test.
abstract_zh: 一些理论工作表明，孤子（在传播时自我保持恒定形状和速度的波）可以用作物理计算库，在这一概念中，为数字计算机设计的机器学习算法被表现出非线性动态行为的模拟物理系统所取代。在这里，我们提出并通过实验验证了一种新颖的储层计算（RC）系统，该系统首次采用在倾斜表面上流动的液膜表面上传播的类孤立（SL）波。我们展示了 SL 波 RC 系统 (SLRC) 预测混沌时间序列并成功通过基本基准测试的能力，包括内存容量测试和 Mackey-Glass 模型测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于液体薄膜表面孤子样波动力学的新型储层计算系统（SLRC），用于执行混沌时间序列预测和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 传统数字计算机的机器学习算法存在局限性，而孤子波具有保持形状和速度的非线性动力学特性，可作为物理计算储层的潜在替代方案。
AI.method: 设计液体薄膜在倾斜表面流动的实验系统，生成孤子样波并构建储层计算框架，通过混沌时间序列预测、记忆容量测试和Mackey-Glass模型测试验证性能。
AI.result: SLRC系统成功通过记忆容量测试和Mackey-Glass模型测试，证明其能够有效预测混沌时间序列并具备基础计算能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于孤子样波动力学的储层计算系统为物理计算提供了新思路，展示了非线性动力学系统在机器学习任务中的应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于液体薄膜表面孤子样波动力学的新型储层计算系统（SLRC），用于执行混沌时间序列预测和基准测试。
motivation: 传统数字计算机的机器学习算法存在局限性，而孤子波具有保持形状和速度的非线性动力学特性，可作为物理计算储层的潜在替代方案。
method: 设计液体薄膜在倾斜表面流动的实验系统，生成孤子样波并构建储层计算框架，通过混沌时间序列预测、记忆容量测试和Mackey-Glass模型测试验证性能。
result: SLRC系统成功通过记忆容量测试和Mackey-Glass模型测试，证明其能够有效预测混沌时间序列并具备基础计算能力。
conclusion: 基于孤子样波动力学的储层计算系统为物理计算提供了新思路，展示了非线性动力学系统在机器学习任务中的应用潜力。
search_text: Reservoir computing based on solitary-like waves dynamics of film flows: a proof of concept 基于薄膜流的类孤立波动力学的储层计算：概念证明 Several theoretical works have shown that solitons -- waves that self-maintain constant shape and velocity as they propagate -- can be used as a physical computational reservoir, a concept where machine learning algorithms designed for digital computers are replaced by analog physical systems that exhibit nonlinear dynamical behaviour. Here we propose and experimentally validate a novel reservoir computing (RC) system that for the first time employs solitary-like (SL) waves propagating on the surface of a liquid film flowing over an inclined surface. We demonstrate the ability of the SL wave RC system (SLRC) to forecast chaotic time series and to successfully pass essential benchmark tests, including a memory capacity test and a Mackey-Glass model test. 一些理论工作表明，孤子（在传播时自我保持恒定形状和速度的波）可以用作物理计算库，在这一概念中，为数字计算机设计的机器学习算法被表现出非线性动态行为的模拟物理系统所取代。在这里，我们提出并通过实验验证了一种新颖的储层计算（RC）系统，该系统首次采用在倾斜表面上流动的液膜表面上传播的类孤立（SL）波。我们展示了 SL 波 RC 系统 (SLRC) 预测混沌时间序列并成功通过基本基准测试的能力，包括内存容量测试和 Mackey-Glass 模型测试。 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于液体薄膜表面孤子样波动力学的新型储层计算系统（SLRC），用于执行混沌时间序列预测和基准测试。 Ivan S. Maksymov,Andrey Pototsky physics.flu-dyn,cs.LG,cs.NE,nlin.PS

authors_text: Maryam Kouzeghar,Youngbin Song,Malika Meghjani,Roland Bouffanais
title: Multi-Target Pursuit by a Decentralized Heterogeneous UAV Swarm using Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度多智能体强化学习的分散式异构无人机群的多目标追踪
abstract: Multi-agent pursuit-evasion tasks involving intelligent targets are notoriously challenging coordination problems. In this paper, we investigate new ways to learn such coordinated behaviors of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) aimed at keeping track of multiple evasive targets. Within a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework, we specifically propose a variant of the Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (MADDPG) method. Our approach addresses multi-target pursuit-evasion scenarios within non-stationary and unknown environments with random obstacles. In addition, given the critical role played by collective exploration in terms of detecting possible targets, we implement heterogeneous roles for the pursuers for enhanced exploratory actions balanced by exploitation (i.e. tracking) of previously identified targets. Our proposed role-based MADDPG algorithm is not only able to track multiple targets, but also is able to explore for possible targets by means of the proposed Voronoi-based rewarding policy. We implemented, tested and validated our approach in a simulation environment prior to deploying a real-world multi-robot system comprising of Crazyflie drones. Our results demonstrate that a multi-agent pursuit team has the ability to learn highly efficient coordinated control policies in terms of target tracking and exploration even when confronted with multiple fast evasive targets in complex environments.
summary: Multi-agent pursuit-evasion tasks involving intelligent targets are notoriously challenging coordination problems. In this paper, we investigate new ways to learn such coordinated behaviors of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) aimed at keeping track of multiple evasive targets. Within a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework, we specifically propose a variant of the Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (MADDPG) method. Our approach addresses multi-target pursuit-evasion scenarios within non-stationary and unknown environments with random obstacles. In addition, given the critical role played by collective exploration in terms of detecting possible targets, we implement heterogeneous roles for the pursuers for enhanced exploratory actions balanced by exploitation (i.e. tracking) of previously identified targets. Our proposed role-based MADDPG algorithm is not only able to track multiple targets, but also is able to explore for possible targets by means of the proposed Voronoi-based rewarding policy. We implemented, tested and validated our approach in a simulation environment prior to deploying a real-world multi-robot system comprising of Crazyflie drones. Our results demonstrate that a multi-agent pursuit team has the ability to learn highly efficient coordinated control policies in terms of target tracking and exploration even when confronted with multiple fast evasive targets in complex environments.
abstract_zh: 涉及智能目标的多智能体追逃任务是众所周知的具有挑战性的协调问题。在本文中，我们研究了学习无人机（UAV）这种协调行为的新方法，旨在跟踪多个规避目标。在多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架内，我们特别提出了多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（MADDPG）方法的变体。我们的方法解决了具有随机障碍的非静止和未知环境中的多目标追击场景。此外，鉴于集体探索在检测可能目标方面发挥的关键作用，我们为追击者实施异构角色，以通过利用（即跟踪）先前确定的目标来平衡增强的探索行动。我们提出的基于角色的 MADDPG 算法不仅能够跟踪多个目标，而且还能够通过提出的基于 Voronoi 的奖励策略来探索可能的目标。在部署由 Crazyflie 无人机组成的真实多机器人系统之前，我们在模拟环境中实施、测试和验证了我们的方法。我们的结果表明，即使在复杂环境中面临多个快速规避目标，多智能体追踪团队也有能力在目标跟踪和探索方面学习高效的协调控制策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度多智能体强化学习的异构无人机群协同方法，用于在复杂环境中追踪多个逃避目标。
AI.motivation: 多智能体追捕任务在动态未知环境中面临协调困难，传统方法难以平衡探索与利用，需提升无人机群对多目标的追踪效率。
AI.method: 改进MADDPG算法，设计异构无人机角色分工，结合Voronoi奖励策略实现探索与追踪的平衡，并在仿真与真实Crazyflie无人机系统中验证。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明，该方法能有效追踪多目标并探索新目标，即使在存在随机障碍和高速逃避目标的复杂环境中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 角色分工与Voronoi奖励机制的结合，为多无人机协同追踪提供了高效解决方案，适用于动态未知环境下的多目标捕获任务。

authors_text: Yuta Koreeda,Ken-ichi Yokote,Hiroaki Ozaki,Atsuki Yamaguchi,Masaya Tsunokake,Yasuhiro Sogawa
title: Hitachi at SemEval-2023 Task 3: Exploring Cross-lingual Multi-task Strategies for Genre and Framing Detection in Online News
title_zh: Hitachi 在 SemEval-2023 任务 3：探索在线新闻类型和框架检测的跨语言多任务策略
abstract: This paper explains the participation of team Hitachi to SemEval-2023 Task 3 "Detecting the genre, the framing, and the persuasion techniques in online news in a multi-lingual setup.'' Based on the multilingual, multi-task nature of the task and the low-resource setting, we investigated different cross-lingual and multi-task strategies for training the pretrained language models. Through extensive experiments, we found that (a) cross-lingual/multi-task training, and (b) collecting an external balanced dataset, can benefit the genre and framing detection. We constructed ensemble models from the results and achieved the highest macro-averaged F1 scores in Italian and Russian genre categorization subtasks.
summary: This paper explains the participation of team Hitachi to SemEval-2023 Task 3 "Detecting the genre, the framing, and the persuasion techniques in online news in a multi-lingual setup.'' Based on the multilingual, multi-task nature of the task and the low-resource setting, we investigated different cross-lingual and multi-task strategies for training the pretrained language models. Through extensive experiments, we found that (a) cross-lingual/multi-task training, and (b) collecting an external balanced dataset, can benefit the genre and framing detection. We constructed ensemble models from the results and achieved the highest macro-averaged F1 scores in Italian and Russian genre categorization subtasks.
abstract_zh: 本文解释了 Hitachi 团队参与 SemEval-2023 任务 3“在多语言设置中检测在线新闻的类型、框架和说服技巧”。基于任务的多语言、多任务性质和低资源环境，我们研究了用于训练预训练语言模型的不同跨语言和多任务策略。通过大量实验，我们发现（a）跨语言/多任务训练，以及（b）收集外部平衡数据集，可以有利于流派和框架检测，我们根据结果构建了集成模型，并在意大利和俄罗斯流派分类子任务中获得了最高的宏观平均 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在多语言环境下，如何通过跨语言多任务策略提升在线新闻的体裁和框架检测效果。
AI.motivation: 由于任务涉及多语言、多任务且资源有限，需探索有效的跨语言和多任务训练策略以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 采用跨语言多任务训练，结合外部平衡数据集，并构建集成模型进行预测。
AI.result: 在意大利语和俄语体裁分类子任务中取得最高宏平均F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言多任务训练与外部数据集结合能有效提升多语言新闻检测效果，集成模型进一步优化结果。

authors_text: Amit Kumar,Rupjyoti Baruah,Ajay Pratap,Mayank Swarnkar,Anil Kumar Singh
title: Exploiting Language Relatedness in Machine Translation Through Domain Adaptation Techniques
title_zh: 通过领域适应技术利用机器翻译中的语言相关性
abstract: One of the significant challenges of Machine Translation (MT) is the scarcity of large amounts of data, mainly parallel sentence aligned corpora. If the evaluation is as rigorous as resource-rich languages, both Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Statistical Machine Translation (SMT) can produce good results with such large amounts of data. However, it is challenging to improve the quality of MT output for low resource languages, especially in NMT and SMT. In order to tackle the challenges faced by MT, we present a novel approach of using a scaled similarity score of sentences, especially for related languages based on a 5-gram KenLM language model with Kneser-ney smoothing technique for filtering in-domain data from out-of-domain corpora that boost the translation quality of MT. Furthermore, we employ other domain adaptation techniques such as multi-domain, fine-tuning and iterative back-translation approach to compare our novel approach on the Hindi-Nepali language pair for NMT and SMT. Our approach succeeds in increasing ~2 BLEU point on multi-domain approach, ~3 BLEU point on fine-tuning for NMT and ~2 BLEU point on iterative back-translation approach.
summary: One of the significant challenges of Machine Translation (MT) is the scarcity of large amounts of data, mainly parallel sentence aligned corpora. If the evaluation is as rigorous as resource-rich languages, both Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Statistical Machine Translation (SMT) can produce good results with such large amounts of data. However, it is challenging to improve the quality of MT output for low resource languages, especially in NMT and SMT. In order to tackle the challenges faced by MT, we present a novel approach of using a scaled similarity score of sentences, especially for related languages based on a 5-gram KenLM language model with Kneser-ney smoothing technique for filtering in-domain data from out-of-domain corpora that boost the translation quality of MT. Furthermore, we employ other domain adaptation techniques such as multi-domain, fine-tuning and iterative back-translation approach to compare our novel approach on the Hindi-Nepali language pair for NMT and SMT. Our approach succeeds in increasing ~2 BLEU point on multi-domain approach, ~3 BLEU point on fine-tuning for NMT and ~2 BLEU point on iterative back-translation approach.
abstract_zh: 机器翻译（MT）的重大挑战之一是大量数据的稀缺，主要是并行句子对齐的语料库。如果评估像资源丰富的语言一样严格，那么神经机器翻译（NMT）和统计机器翻译（SMT）都可以在如此大的数据量下产生良好的结果。然而，提高低资源语言的机器翻译输出质量具有挑战性，特别是在 NMT 和 SMT 中。为了解决 MT 面临的挑战，我们提出了一种使用句子的缩放相似度得分的新方法，特别是对于基于 5-gram KenLM 语言模型的相关语言，该模型采用 Kneser-ney 平滑技术，用于从域外语料库中过滤域内数据，从而提高 MT 的翻译质量。此外，我们采用其他领域适应技术，例如多领域、微调和迭代反向翻译方法，来比较我们在印地语-尼泊尔语语言对上的 NMT 和 SMT 的新方法。我们的方法成功地在多域方法上增加了约 2 个 BLEU 点，在 NMT 微调上成功增加了约 3 个 BLEU 点，在迭代反向翻译方法上增加了约 2 个 BLEU 点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过领域适应技术解决低资源语言机器翻译中的数据稀缺问题，提出基于语言相关性的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏平行语料导致机器翻译质量难以提升，传统方法在资源匮乏场景下效果有限。
AI.method: 利用5-gram KenLM语言模型结合Kneser-Ney平滑技术过滤领域内数据，并采用多领域、微调及迭代反向翻译等适应技术优化翻译模型。
AI.result: 在印地语-尼泊尔语对实验中，多领域方法提升约2 BLEU点，微调提升3 BLEU点，迭代反向翻译提升2 BLEU点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升低资源语言机器翻译质量，验证了语言相关性与领域适应技术结合的可行性。

search_text: Exploiting Language Relatedness in Machine Translation Through Domain Adaptation Techniques 通过领域适应技术利用机器翻译中的语言相关性 One of the significant challenges of Machine Translation (MT) is the scarcity of large amounts of data, mainly parallel sentence aligned corpora. If the evaluation is as rigorous as resource-rich languages, both Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Statistical Machine Translation (SMT) can produce good results with such large amounts of data. However, it is challenging to improve the quality of MT output for low resource languages, especially in NMT and SMT. In order to tackle the challenges faced by MT, we present a novel approach of using a scaled similarity score of sentences, especially for related languages based on a 5-gram KenLM language model with Kneser-ney smoothing technique for filtering in-domain data from out-of-domain corpora that boost the translation quality of MT. Furthermore, we employ other domain adaptation techniques such as multi-domain, fine-tuning and iterative back-translation approach to compare our novel approach on the Hindi-Nepali language pair for NMT and SMT. Our approach succeeds in increasing ~2 BLEU point on multi-domain approach, ~3 BLEU point on fine-tuning for NMT and ~2 BLEU point on iterative back-translation approach. 机器翻译（MT）的重大挑战之一是大量数据的稀缺，主要是并行句子对齐的语料库。如果评估像资源丰富的语言一样严格，那么神经机器翻译（NMT）和统计机器翻译（SMT）都可以在如此大的数据量下产生良好的结果。然而，提高低资源语言的机器翻译输出质量具有挑战性，特别是在 NMT 和 SMT 中。为了解决 MT 面临的挑战，我们提出了一种使用句子的缩放相似度得分的新方法，特别是对于基于 5-gram KenLM 语言模型的相关语言，该模型采用 Kneser-ney 平滑技术，用于从域外语料库中过滤域内数据，从而提高 MT 的翻译质量。此外，我们采用其他领域适应技术，例如多领域、微调和迭代反向翻译方法，来比较我们在印地语-尼泊尔语语言对上的 NMT 和 SMT 的新方法。我们的方法成功地在多域方法上增加了约 2 个 BLEU 点，在 NMT 微调上成功增加了约 3 个 BLEU 点，在迭代反向翻译方法上增加了约 2 个 BLEU 点。 本文通过领域适应技术解决低资源语言机器翻译中的数据稀缺问题，提出基于语言相关性的改进方法。 Amit Kumar,Rupjyoti Baruah,Ajay Pratap,Mayank Swarnkar,Anil Kumar Singh cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiwen Liang,Minzhe Niu,Jianhua Han,Hang Xu,Chunjing Xu,Xiaodan Liang
title: Visual Exemplar Driven Task-Prompting for Unified Perception in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶中统一感知的视觉范例驱动任务提示
abstract: Multi-task learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm to solve a range of tasks simultaneously with good efficiency in both computation resources and inference time. However, these algorithms are designed for different tasks mostly not within the scope of autonomous driving, thus making it hard to compare multi-task methods in autonomous driving. Aiming to enable the comprehensive evaluation of present multi-task learning methods in autonomous driving, we extensively investigate the performance of popular multi-task methods on the large-scale driving dataset, which covers four common perception tasks, i.e., object detection, semantic segmentation, drivable area segmentation, and lane detection. We provide an in-depth analysis of current multi-task learning methods under different common settings and find out that the existing methods make progress but there is still a large performance gap compared with single-task baselines. To alleviate this dilemma in autonomous driving, we present an effective multi-task framework, VE-Prompt, which introduces visual exemplars via task-specific prompting to guide the model toward learning high-quality task-specific representations. Specifically, we generate visual exemplars based on bounding boxes and color-based markers, which provide accurate visual appearances of target categories and further mitigate the performance gap. Furthermore, we bridge transformer-based encoders and convolutional layers for efficient and accurate unified perception in autonomous driving. Comprehensive experimental results on the diverse self-driving dataset BDD100K show that the VE-Prompt improves the multi-task baseline and further surpasses single-task models.
summary: Multi-task learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm to solve a range of tasks simultaneously with good efficiency in both computation resources and inference time. However, these algorithms are designed for different tasks mostly not within the scope of autonomous driving, thus making it hard to compare multi-task methods in autonomous driving. Aiming to enable the comprehensive evaluation of present multi-task learning methods in autonomous driving, we extensively investigate the performance of popular multi-task methods on the large-scale driving dataset, which covers four common perception tasks, i.e., object detection, semantic segmentation, drivable area segmentation, and lane detection. We provide an in-depth analysis of current multi-task learning methods under different common settings and find out that the existing methods make progress but there is still a large performance gap compared with single-task baselines. To alleviate this dilemma in autonomous driving, we present an effective multi-task framework, VE-Prompt, which introduces visual exemplars via task-specific prompting to guide the model toward learning high-quality task-specific representations. Specifically, we generate visual exemplars based on bounding boxes and color-based markers, which provide accurate visual appearances of target categories and further mitigate the performance gap. Furthermore, we bridge transformer-based encoders and convolutional layers for efficient and accurate unified perception in autonomous driving. Comprehensive experimental results on the diverse self-driving dataset BDD100K show that the VE-Prompt improves the multi-task baseline and further surpasses single-task models.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习已成为一种强大的范例，可以同时解决一系列任务，并且在计算资源和推理时间方面都具有良好的效率。然而，这些算法是针对不同的任务而设计的，大多不属于自动驾驶的范围，因此很难比较自动驾驶中的多任务方法。为了全面评估当前自动驾驶中的多任务学习方法，我们广泛研究了流行的多任务方法在大规模驾驶数据集上的性能，其中涵盖了四种常见的感知任务，即目标检测、语义分割、可行驶区域分割和车道检测。我们对不同常见设置下当前的多任务学习方法进行了深入分析，发现现有方法取得了进步，但与单任务基线相比仍然存在很大的性能差距。为了缓解自动驾驶中的这一困境，我们提出了一种有效的多任务框架 VE-Prompt，它通过特定于任务的提示引入视觉样本，以指导模型学习高质量的特定于任务的表示。具体来说，我们基于边界框和基于颜色的标记生成视觉样本，这提供了目标类别的准确视觉外观并进一步缩小了性能差距。此外，我们桥接基于变压器的编码器和卷积层，以实现自动驾驶中高效、准确的统一感知。在多样化自动驾驶数据集BDD100K上的综合实验结果表明，VE-Prompt改善了多任务基线，并进一步超越了单任务模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉示例的任务提示框架VE-Prompt，以提升自动驾驶中多任务学习的统一感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多任务学习方法在自动驾驶中的感知任务表现不如单任务模型，需更有效的统一框架。
AI.method: 通过任务特定提示引入视觉示例，生成基于边界框和颜色标记的示例，结合Transformer编码器与卷积层实现高效统一感知。
AI.result: 在BDD100K数据集上，VE-Prompt显著提升多任务基线，优于单任务模型。
AI.conclusion: VE-Prompt有效缩小多任务与单任务性能差距，为自动驾驶统一感知提供新方法。

authors_text: Jiawei He,Chunyun Fu,Xiyang Wang
title: 3D Multi-Object Tracking Based on Uncertainty-Guided Data Association
title_zh: 基于不确定性引导数据关联的 3D 多目标跟踪
abstract: In the existing literature, most 3D multi-object tracking algorithms based on the tracking-by-detection framework employed deterministic tracks and detections for similarity calculation in the data association stage. Namely, the inherent uncertainties existing in tracks and detections are overlooked. In this work, we discard the commonly used deterministic tracks and deterministic detections for data association, instead, we propose to model tracks and detections as random vectors in which uncertainties are taken into account. Then, based on the Jensen-Shannon divergence, the similarity between two multidimensional distributions, i.e. track and detection, is evaluated for data association purposes. Lastly, the level of track uncertainty is incorporated in our cost function design to guide the data association process. Comparative experiments have been conducted on two typical datasets, KITTI and nuScenes, and the results indicated that our proposed method outperformed the compared state-of-the-art 3D tracking algorithms. For the benefit of the community, our code has been made available at https://github.com/hejiawei2023/UG3DMOT.
summary: In the existing literature, most 3D multi-object tracking algorithms based on the tracking-by-detection framework employed deterministic tracks and detections for similarity calculation in the data association stage. Namely, the inherent uncertainties existing in tracks and detections are overlooked. In this work, we discard the commonly used deterministic tracks and deterministic detections for data association, instead, we propose to model tracks and detections as random vectors in which uncertainties are taken into account. Then, based on the Jensen-Shannon divergence, the similarity between two multidimensional distributions, i.e. track and detection, is evaluated for data association purposes. Lastly, the level of track uncertainty is incorporated in our cost function design to guide the data association process. Comparative experiments have been conducted on two typical datasets, KITTI and nuScenes, and the results indicated that our proposed method outperformed the compared state-of-the-art 3D tracking algorithms. For the benefit of the community, our code has been made available at https://github.com/hejiawei2023/UG3DMOT.
abstract_zh: 现有文献中，大多数基于检测跟踪框架的3D多目标跟踪算法在数据关联阶段采用确定性跟踪和检测来进行相似度计算。也就是说，忽略了轨迹和检测中存在的固有不确定性。在这项工作中，我们放弃了数据关联中常用的确定性轨迹和确定性检测，而是建议将轨迹和检测建模为考虑不确定性的随机向量。然后，基于 Jensen-Shannon 散度，评估两个多维分布（即跟踪和检测）之间的相似性，以用于数据关联目的。最后，轨道不确定性水平被纳入我们的成本函数设计中，以指导数据关联过程。在两个典型数据集 KITTI 和 nuScenes 上进行了对比实验，结果表明我们提出的方法优于最先进的 3D 跟踪算法。为了社区的利益，我们的代码已在 https://github.com/hejiawei2023/UG3DMOT 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性引导的数据关联方法，用于改进3D多目标跟踪任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检测的3D多目标跟踪算法在数据关联阶段忽略了轨迹和检测中的固有不确定性，导致跟踪性能受限。
AI.method: 将轨迹和检测建模为考虑不确定性的随机向量，利用Jensen-Shannon散度计算多维分布间的相似性，并将轨迹不确定性纳入代价函数设计。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的3D跟踪算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模不确定性并指导数据关联，本文方法有效提升了3D多目标跟踪的准确性与鲁棒性。

ai_content.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的3D跟踪算法，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过显式建模不确定性并指导数据关联，本文方法有效提升了3D多目标跟踪的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: 3D Multi-Object Tracking Based on Uncertainty-Guided Data Association 基于不确定性引导数据关联的 3D 多目标跟踪 In the existing literature, most 3D multi-object tracking algorithms based on the tracking-by-detection framework employed deterministic tracks and detections for similarity calculation in the data association stage. Namely, the inherent uncertainties existing in tracks and detections are overlooked. In this work, we discard the commonly used deterministic tracks and deterministic detections for data association, instead, we propose to model tracks and detections as random vectors in which uncertainties are taken into account. Then, based on the Jensen-Shannon divergence, the similarity between two multidimensional distributions, i.e. track and detection, is evaluated for data association purposes. Lastly, the level of track uncertainty is incorporated in our cost function design to guide the data association process. Comparative experiments have been conducted on two typical datasets, KITTI and nuScenes, and the results indicated that our proposed method outperformed the compared state-of-the-art 3D tracking algorithms. For the benefit of the community, our code has been made available at https://github.com/hejiawei2023/UG3DMOT. 现有文献中，大多数基于检测跟踪框架的3D多目标跟踪算法在数据关联阶段采用确定性跟踪和检测来进行相似度计算。也就是说，忽略了轨迹和检测中存在的固有不确定性。在这项工作中，我们放弃了数据关联中常用的确定性轨迹和确定性检测，而是建议将轨迹和检测建模为考虑不确定性的随机向量。然后，基于 Jensen-Shannon 散度，评估两个多维分布（即跟踪和检测）之间的相似性，以用于数据关联目的。最后，轨道不确定性水平被纳入我们的成本函数设计中，以指导数据关联过程。在两个典型数据集 KITTI 和 nuScenes 上进行了对比实验，结果表明我们提出的方法优于最先进的 3D 跟踪算法。为了社区的利益，我们的代码已在 https://github.com/hejiawei2023/UG3DMOT 上提供。 本文提出了一种基于不确定性引导的数据关联方法，用于改进3D多目标跟踪任务。 Jiawei He,Chunyun Fu,Xiyang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Muzhaffar Hazman,Susan McKeever,Josephine Griffith
title: Meme Sentiment Analysis Enhanced with Multimodal Spatial Encoding and Facial Embedding
title_zh: 通过多模态空间编码和面部嵌入增强模因情感分析
abstract: Internet memes are characterised by the interspersing of text amongst visual elements. State-of-the-art multimodal meme classifiers do not account for the relative positions of these elements across the two modalities, despite the latent meaning associated with where text and visual elements are placed. Against two meme sentiment classification datasets, we systematically show performance gains from incorporating the spatial position of visual objects, faces, and text clusters extracted from memes. In addition, we also present facial embedding as an impactful enhancement to image representation in a multimodal meme classifier. Finally, we show that incorporating this spatial information allows our fully automated approaches to outperform their corresponding baselines that rely on additional human validation of OCR-extracted text.
summary: Internet memes are characterised by the interspersing of text amongst visual elements. State-of-the-art multimodal meme classifiers do not account for the relative positions of these elements across the two modalities, despite the latent meaning associated with where text and visual elements are placed. Against two meme sentiment classification datasets, we systematically show performance gains from incorporating the spatial position of visual objects, faces, and text clusters extracted from memes. In addition, we also present facial embedding as an impactful enhancement to image representation in a multimodal meme classifier. Finally, we show that incorporating this spatial information allows our fully automated approaches to outperform their corresponding baselines that rely on additional human validation of OCR-extracted text.
abstract_zh: 互联网模因的特点是文本散布在视觉元素中。最先进的多模态模因分类器并没有考虑这些元素在两种模态中的相对位置，尽管潜在的含义与文本和视觉元素的放置位置相关。针对两个模因情感分类数据集，我们系统地展示了合并从模因中提取的视觉对象、面部和文本簇的空间位置所带来的性能提升。此外，我们还提出了面部嵌入作为多模态模因分类器中图像表示的有效增强。最后，我们表明，合并这些空间信息使我们的全自动方法能够超越依赖于 OCR 提取文本的额外人工验证的相应基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多模态空间编码和面部嵌入的方法，以提升网络迷因情感分析的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有迷因分类器未考虑文本与视觉元素的空间位置关系，而这些位置信息对理解迷因的潜在含义至关重要。
AI.method: 通过整合视觉对象、人脸及文本簇的空间位置信息，并引入面部嵌入增强图像表示，构建自动化分类模型。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上验证了空间信息整合与面部嵌入的有效性，自动化方法优于依赖人工验证OCR文本的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 空间位置信息与面部嵌入能显著提升迷因情感分析效果，且自动化方法可减少对人工标注的依赖。

authors_text: Satoshi Tsutsui,Zhengyang Su,Bihan Wen
title: Benchmarking White Blood Cell Classification Under Domain Shift
title_zh: 域转移下白细胞分类的基准测试
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023. More datasets are cited
comments: Accepted to the International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023. More datasets are cited
abstract: Recognizing the types of white blood cells (WBCs) in microscopic images of human blood smears is a fundamental task in the fields of pathology and hematology. Although previous studies have made significant contributions to the development of methods and datasets, few papers have investigated benchmarks or baselines that others can easily refer to. For instance, we observed notable variations in the reported accuracies of the same Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model across different studies, yet no public implementation exists to reproduce these results. In this paper, we establish a benchmark for WBC recognition. Our results indicate that CNN-based models achieve high accuracy when trained and tested under similar imaging conditions. However, their performance drops significantly when tested under different conditions. Moreover, the ResNet classifier, which has been widely employed in previous work, exhibits an unreasonably poor generalization ability under domain shifts due to batch normalization. We investigate this issue and suggest some alternative normalization techniques that can mitigate it. We make fully-reproducible code publicly available\footnote{\url{https://github.com/apple2373/wbc-benchmark}}.
summary: Recognizing the types of white blood cells (WBCs) in microscopic images of human blood smears is a fundamental task in the fields of pathology and hematology. Although previous studies have made significant contributions to the development of methods and datasets, few papers have investigated benchmarks or baselines that others can easily refer to. For instance, we observed notable variations in the reported accuracies of the same Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model across different studies, yet no public implementation exists to reproduce these results. In this paper, we establish a benchmark for WBC recognition. Our results indicate that CNN-based models achieve high accuracy when trained and tested under similar imaging conditions. However, their performance drops significantly when tested under different conditions. Moreover, the ResNet classifier, which has been widely employed in previous work, exhibits an unreasonably poor generalization ability under domain shifts due to batch normalization. We investigate this issue and suggest some alternative normalization techniques that can mitigate it. We make fully-reproducible code publicly available\footnote{\url{https://github.com/apple2373/wbc-benchmark}}.
abstract_zh: 识别人体血涂片显微图像中白细胞（WBC）的类型是病理学和血液学领域的一项基本任务。尽管以前的研究对方法和数据集的开发做出了重大贡献，但很少有论文研究其他人可以轻松参考的基准或基线。例如，我们观察到不同研究中同一卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型报告的准确度存在显着差异，但没有公共实施来重现这些结果。在本文中，我们建立了 WBC 识别的基准。我们的结果表明，基于 CNN 的模型在类似成像条件下进行训练和测试时可实现高精度。然而，在不同条件下测试时，它们的性能显着下降。此外，在之前的工作中广泛采用的 ResNet 分类器由于批量归一化而在域转移下表现出非常差的泛化能力。我们调查了这个问题并提出了一些可以缓解该问题的替代标准化技术。我们公开提供完全可重现的代码\footnote{\url{https://github.com/apple2373/wbc-benchmark}}。

AI.tldr: 本文建立白细胞分类的基准测试，研究在不同成像条件下卷积神经网络（CNN）模型的性能变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏可复现的基准测试，导致相同CNN模型在不同研究中的准确率报告差异显著，且无公开实现供参考。
AI.method: 通过构建基准测试，对比CNN模型在相似与不同成像条件下的表现，分析ResNet因批量归一化导致的领域迁移问题，并提出替代归一化方法。
AI.result: CNN模型在相似条件下表现优异，但领域迁移时准确率显著下降；ResNet因批量归一化泛化能力不足，替代方法可缓解此问题。
AI.conclusion: 领域迁移对白细胞分类模型性能影响显著，需改进归一化技术以提升泛化能力，本文提供的可复现代码有助于后续研究。

Although previous studies have made significant contributions to the development of methods and datasets, few papers have investigated benchmarks or baselines that others can easily refer to. For instance, we observed notable variations in the reported accuracies of the same Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model across different studies, yet no public implementation exists to reproduce these results. In this paper, we establish a benchmark for WBC recognition. Our results indicate that CNN-based models achieve high accuracy when trained and tested under similar imaging conditions. However, their performance drops significantly when tested under different conditions. Moreover, the ResNet classifier, which has been widely employed in previous work, exhibits an unreasonably poor generalization ability under domain shifts due to batch normalization. We investigate this issue and suggest some alternative normalization techniques that can mitigate it. authors_text: Jinsheng Wei,Haoyu Chen,Guanming Lu,Jingjie Yan,Yue Xie,Guoying Zhao
title: Prior Information based Decomposition and Reconstruction Learning for Micro-Expression Recognition
title_zh: 基于先验信息的微表情识别分解重构学习
comment: The article has been accepted by IEICE TRANS. Information and Systems
comments: The article has been accepted by IEICE TRANS. Information and Systems
abstract: Micro-expression recognition (MER) draws intensive research interest as micro-expressions (MEs) can infer genuine emotions. Prior information can guide the model to learn discriminative ME features effectively. However, most works focus on researching the general models with a stronger representation ability to adaptively aggregate ME movement information in a holistic way, which may ignore the prior information and properties of MEs. To solve this issue, driven by the prior information that the category of ME can be inferred by the relationship between the actions of facial different components, this work designs a novel model that can conform to this prior information and learn ME movement features in an interpretable way. Specifically, this paper proposes a Decomposition and Reconstruction-based Graph Representation Learning (DeRe-GRL) model to effectively learn high-level ME features. DeRe-GRL includes two modules: Action Decomposition Module (ADM) and Relation Reconstruction Module (RRM), where ADM learns action features of facial key components and RRM explores the relationship between these action features. Based on facial key components, ADM divides the geometric movement features extracted by the graph model-based backbone into several sub-features, and learns the map matrix to map these sub-features into multiple action features; then, RRM learns weights to weight all action features to build the relationship between action features. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed modules, and the proposed method achieves competitive performance.
summary: Micro-expression recognition (MER) draws intensive research interest as micro-expressions (MEs) can infer genuine emotions. Prior information can guide the model to learn discriminative ME features effectively. However, most works focus on researching the general models with a stronger representation ability to adaptively aggregate ME movement information in a holistic way, which may ignore the prior information and properties of MEs. To solve this issue, driven by the prior information that the category of ME can be inferred by the relationship between the actions of facial different components, this work designs a novel model that can conform to this prior information and learn ME movement features in an interpretable way. Specifically, this paper proposes a Decomposition and Reconstruction-based Graph Representation Learning (DeRe-GRL) model to effectively learn high-level ME features. DeRe-GRL includes two modules: Action Decomposition Module (ADM) and Relation Reconstruction Module (RRM), where ADM learns action features of facial key components and RRM explores the relationship between these action features. Based on facial key components, ADM divides the geometric movement features extracted by the graph model-based backbone into several sub-features, and learns the map matrix to map these sub-features into multiple action features; then, RRM learns weights to weight all action features to build the relationship between action features. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed modules, and the proposed method achieves competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 微表情识别（MER）引起了广泛的研究兴趣，因为微表情（ME）可以推断真实的情绪。先验信息可以指导模型有效地学习判别性ME特征。然而，大多数工作侧重于研究具有更强表示能力的通用模型，以整体方式自适应聚合ME运动信息，这可能会忽略ME的先验信息和属性。为了解决这个问题，在ME的类别可以通过面部不同组件的动作之间的关系来推断的先验信息的驱动下，本工作设计了一种新颖的模型，该模型可以符合该先验信息并以可解释的方式学习ME运动特征。具体来说，本文提出了一种基于分解和重构的图表示学习（DeRe-GRL）模型来有效学习高级 ME 特征。 DeRe-GRL包括两个模块：动作分解模块（ADM）和关系重建模块（RRM），其中ADM学习面部关键部件的动作特征，RRM探索这些动作特征之间的关系。基于面部关键组件，ADM将基于图模型的主干提取的几何运动特征划分为若干子特征，并学习映射矩阵以将这些子特征映射为多个动作特征；然后，RRM学习权重来对所有动作特征进行加权，以建立动作特征之间的关系。实验结果证明了所提出模块的有效性，并且所提出的方法取得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于先验信息的分解与重建学习方法，用于提升微表情识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有微表情识别方法侧重于通用模型的强表征能力，但忽视了微表情动作的先验信息及其面部组件间的关系，导致模型可解释性不足。
AI.method: 设计了分解与重建图表示学习模型（DeRe-GRL），包含动作分解模块（ADM）和关系重建模块（RRM）。ADM将面部关键组件的几何运动特征分解为子特征并映射为动作特征，RRM通过学习权重构建动作特征间的关系。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提模块的有效性，方法在微表情识别任务中表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 结合先验信息的分解与重建学习能够有效捕捉微表情动作特征，为可解释的微表情识别提供了新思路。

search_text: Prior Information based Decomposition and Reconstruction Learning for Micro-Expression Recognition 基于先验信息的微表情识别分解重构学习 Micro-expression recognition (MER) draws intensive research interest as micro-expressions (MEs) can infer genuine emotions. Prior information can guide the model to learn discriminative ME features effectively. However, most works focus on researching the general models with a stronger representation ability to adaptively aggregate ME movement information in a holistic way, which may ignore the prior information and properties of MEs. To solve this issue, driven by the prior information that the category of ME can be inferred by the relationship between the actions of facial different components, this work designs a novel model that can conform to this prior information and learn ME movement features in an interpretable way. Specifically, this paper proposes a Decomposition and Reconstruction-based Graph Representation Learning (DeRe-GRL) model to effectively learn high-level ME features. DeRe-GRL includes two modules: Action Decomposition Module (ADM) and Relation Reconstruction Module (RRM), where ADM learns action features of facial key components and RRM explores the relationship between these action features. Based on facial key components, ADM divides the geometric movement features extracted by the graph model-based backbone into several sub-features, and learns the map matrix to map these sub-features into multiple action features; then, RRM learns weights to weight all action features to build the relationship between action features. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed modules, and the proposed method achieves competitive performance. 微表情识别（MER）引起了广泛的研究兴趣，因为微表情（ME）可以推断真实的情绪。先验信息可以指导模型有效地学习判别性ME特征。然而，大多数工作侧重于研究具有更强表示能力的通用模型，以整体方式自适应聚合ME运动信息，这可能会忽略ME的先验信息和属性。为了解决这个问题，在ME的类别可以通过面部不同组件的动作之间的关系来推断的先验信息的驱动下，本工作设计了一种新颖的模型，该模型可以符合该先验信息并以可解释的方式学习ME运动特征。具体来说，本文提出了一种基于分解和重构的图表示学习（DeRe-GRL）模型来有效学习高级 ME 特征。 DeRe-GRL包括两个模块：动作分解模块（ADM）和关系重建模块（RRM），其中ADM学习面部关键部件的动作特征，RRM探索这些动作特征之间的关系。基于面部关键组件，ADM将基于图模型的主干提取的几何运动特征划分为若干子特征，并学习映射矩阵以将这些子特征映射为多个动作特征；然后，RRM学习权重来对所有动作特征进行加权，以建立动作特征之间的关系。实验结果证明了所提出模块的有效性，并且所提出的方法取得了有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种基于先验信息的分解与重建学习方法，用于提升微表情识别的性能。 Jinsheng Wei,Haoyu Chen,Guanming Lu,Jingjie Yan,Yue Xie,Guoying Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Wolgast,Astrid Nieße
title: Approximating Energy Market Clearing and Bidding With Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过基于模型的强化学习来近似能源市场清算和投标
abstract: Energy market rules should incentivize market participants to behave in a market and grid conform way. However, they can also provide incentives for undesired and unexpected strategies if the market design is flawed. Multi-agent Reinforcement learning (MARL) is a promising new approach to predicting the expected profit-maximizing behavior of energy market participants in simulation. However, reinforcement learning requires many interactions with the system to converge, and the power system environment often consists of extensive computations, e.g., optimal power flow (OPF) calculation for market clearing. To tackle this complexity, we provide a model of the energy market to a basic MARL algorithm in the form of a learned OPF approximation and explicit market rules. The learned OPF surrogate model makes an explicit solving of the OPF completely unnecessary. Our experiments demonstrate that the model additionally reduces training time by about one order of magnitude but at the cost of a slightly worse performance. Potential applications of our method are market design, more realistic modeling of market participants, and analysis of manipulative behavior.
summary: Energy market rules should incentivize market participants to behave in a market and grid conform way. However, they can also provide incentives for undesired and unexpected strategies if the market design is flawed. Multi-agent Reinforcement learning (MARL) is a promising new approach to predicting the expected profit-maximizing behavior of energy market participants in simulation. However, reinforcement learning requires many interactions with the system to converge, and the power system environment often consists of extensive computations, e.g., optimal power flow (OPF) calculation for market clearing. To tackle this complexity, we provide a model of the energy market to a basic MARL algorithm in the form of a learned OPF approximation and explicit market rules. The learned OPF surrogate model makes an explicit solving of the OPF completely unnecessary. Our experiments demonstrate that the model additionally reduces training time by about one order of magnitude but at the cost of a slightly worse performance. Potential applications of our method are market design, more realistic modeling of market participants, and analysis of manipulative behavior.
abstract_zh: 能源市场规则应激励市场参与者以符合市场和电网的方式行事。然而，如果市场设计有缺陷，它们也可能会激励人们采取不受欢迎和意想不到的策略。多智能体强化学习（MARL）是一种很有前途的新方法，可以在模拟中预测能源市场参与者的预期利润最大化行为。然而，强化学习需要与系统进行多次交互才能收敛，并且电力系统环境通常包含大量计算，例如用于市场出清的最优潮流（OPF）计算。为了解决这种复杂性，我们以学习的 OPF 近似和明确的市场规则的形式为基本 MARL 算法提供了能源市场模型。学习到的 OPF 代理模型使得完全不需要显式求解 OPF。我们的实验表明，该模型还减少了大约一个数量级的训练时间，但代价是性能稍差。我们的方法的潜在应用是市场设计、市场参与者的更现实的建模以及操纵行为的分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模型的强化学习方法，通过学习最优潮流（OPF）近似模型和显式市场规则，简化能源市场清算与竞价的模拟过程。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法在能源市场应用中面临计算复杂度高（如需反复求解OPF）和训练效率低的问题，需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 构建OPF近似模型作为环境代理，结合显式市场规则输入MARL算法，消除对真实OPF求解的依赖。
AI.result: 训练时间缩短约10倍，但策略性能略有下降；方法可应用于市场设计、参与者行为建模及市场操纵分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模型简化显著提升训练效率，为能源市场机制设计和行为分析提供了新工具，但需权衡性能损失。

authors_text: Sadegh Pourghasemi Hanza,Hamed Ghafarirad
title: Mechanics of fiber reinforced soft manipulators based on inhomogeneous Cosserat rod theory
title_zh: 基于非齐次Cosserat杆理论的纤维增强软体机械臂力学
comment: Mechanics of Advanced Materials and Structures (2023)
comments: Mechanics of Advanced Materials and Structures (2023)
abstract: In this study, an inhomogeneous Cosserat rod theory is introduced and compared to the conventional homogeneous rod for modeling soft manipulators. The inhomogeneity is addressed by considering the pressure actuation as part of the rod's constitutive laws, resulting in shifting the neutral axis. This shift is investigated for a soft manipulator with three parallel fiber-reinforced actuators. Furthermore, a fiber-reinforced actuator is modeled using nonlinear continuum mechanics to extract the effect of radial pressure on axial deformation and is combined with Cosserat model. Finally, several numerical methods are employed to solve the proposed model and validated by a series of experiments.
summary: In this study, an inhomogeneous Cosserat rod theory is introduced and compared to the conventional homogeneous rod for modeling soft manipulators. The inhomogeneity is addressed by considering the pressure actuation as part of the rod's constitutive laws, resulting in shifting the neutral axis. This shift is investigated for a soft manipulator with three parallel fiber-reinforced actuators. Furthermore, a fiber-reinforced actuator is modeled using nonlinear continuum mechanics to extract the effect of radial pressure on axial deformation and is combined with Cosserat model. Finally, several numerical methods are employed to solve the proposed model and validated by a series of experiments.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，引入了非齐次 Cosserat 杆理论，并将其与用于软机械臂建模的传统齐次杆进行了比较。通过将压力驱动视为杆本构定律的一部分来解决不均匀性，从而导致中性轴移动。针对具有三个平行纤维增强执行器的软操纵器研究了这种转变。此外，使用非线性连续介质力学对纤维增强执行器进行建模，以提取径向压力对轴向变形的影响，并与 Cosserat 模型相结合。最后，采用多种数值方法来求解所提出的模型，并通过一系列实验进行验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于非均匀Cosserat杆理论的软机械臂建模方法，通过考虑压力驱动导致的中性轴偏移，结合实验验证模型有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀Cosserat杆理论无法准确描述压力驱动下软机械臂的复杂变形行为，需引入非均匀理论提升建模精度。
AI.method: 建立非均匀Cosserat杆理论模型，将压力驱动纳入本构方程，结合非线性连续介质力学分析径向压力对轴向变形的影响，并通过数值方法与实验验证模型。
AI.result: 数值模拟与实验结果验证了非均匀模型在预测软机械臂变形及中性轴偏移方面的准确性，优于传统均匀模型。
AI.conclusion: 非均匀Cosserat杆理论能有效表征纤维增强软机械臂的力学特性，为柔性执行器设计提供理论依据。

ai_content_json.result: 数值模拟与实验结果验证了非均匀模型在预测软机械臂变形及中性轴偏移方面的准确性，优于传统均匀模型。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 非均匀Cosserat杆理论能有效表征纤维增强软机械臂的力学特性，为柔性执行器设计提供理论依据。

tldr: 本文提出基于非均匀Cosserat杆理论的软机械臂建模方法，通过考虑压力驱动导致的中性轴偏移，结合实验验证模型有效性。
motivation: 传统均匀Cosserat杆理论无法准确描述压力驱动下软机械臂的复杂变形行为，需引入非均匀理论提升建模精度。
method: 建立非均匀Cosserat杆理论模型，将压力驱动纳入本构方程，结合非线性连续介质力学分析径向压力对轴向变形的影响，并通过数值方法与实验验证模型。
result: 数值模拟与实验结果验证了非均匀模型在预测软机械臂变形及中性轴偏移方面的准确性，优于传统均匀模型。
conclusion: 非均匀Cosserat杆理论能有效表征纤维增强软机械臂的力学特性，为柔性执行器设计提供理论依据。
search_text: Mechanics of fiber reinforced soft manipulators based on inhomogeneous Cosserat rod theory 基于非齐次Cosserat杆理论的纤维增强软体机械臂力学 In this study, an inhomogeneous Cosserat rod theory is introduced and compared to the conventional homogeneous rod for modeling soft manipulators. The inhomogeneity is addressed by considering the pressure actuation as part of the rod's constitutive laws, resulting in shifting the neutral axis. This shift is investigated for a soft manipulator with three parallel fiber-reinforced actuators. Furthermore, a fiber-reinforced actuator is modeled using nonlinear continuum mechanics to extract the effect of radial pressure on axial deformation and is combined with Cosserat model. Finally, several numerical methods are employed to solve the proposed model and validated by a series of experiments. 在这项研究中，引入了非齐次 Cosserat 杆理论，并将其与用于软机械臂建模的传统齐次杆进行了比较。通过将压力驱动视为杆本构定律的一部分来解决不均匀性，从而导致中性轴移动。针对具有三个平行纤维增强执行器的软操纵器研究了这种转变。此外，使用非线性连续介质力学对纤维增强执行器进行建模，以提取径向压力对轴向变形的影响，并与 Cosserat 模型相结合。最后，采用多种数值方法来求解所提出的模型，并通过一系列实验进行验证。 本文提出基于非均匀Cosserat杆理论的软机械臂建模方法，通过考虑压力驱动导致的中性轴偏移，结合实验验证模型有效性。 Sadegh Pourghasemi Hanza,Hamed Ghafarirad cs.RO

authors_text: Xingqun Qi,Chen Liu,Muyi Sun,Lincheng Li,Changjie Fan,Xin Yu
title: Diverse 3D Hand Gesture Prediction from Body Dynamics by Bilateral Hand Disentanglement
title_zh: 通过双边手解缠结从身体动力学预测多种 3D 手势
abstract: Predicting natural and diverse 3D hand gestures from the upper body dynamics is a practical yet challenging task in virtual avatar creation. Previous works usually overlook the asymmetric motions between two hands and generate two hands in a holistic manner, leading to unnatural results. In this work, we introduce a novel bilateral hand disentanglement based two-stage 3D hand generation method to achieve natural and diverse 3D hand prediction from body dynamics. In the first stage, we intend to generate natural hand gestures by two hand-disentanglement branches. Considering the asymmetric gestures and motions of two hands, we introduce a Spatial-Residual Memory (SRM) module to model spatial interaction between the body and each hand by residual learning. To enhance the coordination of two hand motions wrt. body dynamics holistically, we then present a Temporal-Motion Memory (TMM) module. TMM can effectively model the temporal association between body dynamics and two hand motions. The second stage is built upon the insight that 3D hand predictions should be non-deterministic given the sequential body postures. Thus, we further diversify our 3D hand predictions based on the initial output from the stage one. Concretely, we propose a Prototypical-Memory Sampling Strategy (PSS) to generate the non-deterministic hand gestures by gradient-based Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art models on the B2H dataset and our newly collected TED Hands dataset. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/XingqunQi-lab/Diverse-3D-Hand-Gesture-Prediction.
summary: Predicting natural and diverse 3D hand gestures from the upper body dynamics is a practical yet challenging task in virtual avatar creation. Previous works usually overlook the asymmetric motions between two hands and generate two hands in a holistic manner, leading to unnatural results. In this work, we introduce a novel bilateral hand disentanglement based two-stage 3D hand generation method to achieve natural and diverse 3D hand prediction from body dynamics. In the first stage, we intend to generate natural hand gestures by two hand-disentanglement branches. Considering the asymmetric gestures and motions of two hands, we introduce a Spatial-Residual Memory (SRM) module to model spatial interaction between the body and each hand by residual learning. To enhance the coordination of two hand motions wrt. body dynamics holistically, we then present a Temporal-Motion Memory (TMM) module. TMM can effectively model the temporal association between body dynamics and two hand motions. The second stage is built upon the insight that 3D hand predictions should be non-deterministic given the sequential body postures. Thus, we further diversify our 3D hand predictions based on the initial output from the stage one. Concretely, we propose a Prototypical-Memory Sampling Strategy (PSS) to generate the non-deterministic hand gestures by gradient-based Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art models on the B2H dataset and our newly collected TED Hands dataset. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/XingqunQi-lab/Diverse-3D-Hand-Gesture-Prediction.
abstract_zh: 在虚拟化身创建中，从上半身动态预测自然且多样化的 3D 手势是一项实用但具有挑战性的任务。以前的作品通常会忽略两只手之间的不对称运动，并以整体方式生成两只手，从而导致不自然的结果。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的基于双边手解缠结的两阶段 3D 手生成方法，以根据身体动力学实现自然且多样化的 3D 手预测。在第一阶段，我们打算通过两个手部解开分支生成自然的手势。考虑到两只手的不对称手势和运动，我们引入了空间残留记忆（SRM）模块，通过残留学习来模拟身体和每只手之间的空间交互。增强两只手动作的协调性。从整体上了解身体动力学，然后我们提出了时间运动记忆（TMM）模块。 TMM 可以有效地模拟身体动力学和两只手运动之间的时间关联。第二阶段建立在这样的认识之上：考虑到连续的身体姿势，3D 手部预测应该是不确定的。因此，我们根据第一阶段的初始输出进一步使 3D 手部预测多样化。具体来说，我们提出了一种原型内存采样策略（PSS），通过基于梯度的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC）采样来生成非确定性手势。大量实验表明，我们的方法优于 B2H 数据集和我们新收集的 TED Hands 数据集上最先进的模型。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/XingqunQi-lab/Diverse-3D-Hand-Gesture-Prediction 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双侧手部解耦的两阶段3D手势预测方法，通过分析身体动态生成自然且多样的3D手部姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视双手运动的不对称性，导致生成结果不自然。需解决如何从身体动态中生成符合人体运动规律且多样化的3D手势问题。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过空间残差记忆模块（SRM）建模身体与单手的空间交互，再利用时序运动记忆模块（TMM）增强双手与身体动态的协调性；第二阶段基于原型记忆采样策略（PSS）结合梯度MCMC采样，生成非确定性的多样化手势。
AI.result: 在B2H数据集和新收集的TED Hands数据集上均优于现有方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过双侧解耦和非确定性采样有效提升了手势预测的自然性与多样性，为虚拟人像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Naoki Kimura,Michinari Kono,Jun Rekimoto
title: SottoVoce: An Ultrasound Imaging-Based Silent Speech Interaction Using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: SottoVoce：使用深度神经网络的基于超声成像的无声语音交互
abstract: The availability of digital devices operated by voice is expanding rapidly. However, the applications of voice interfaces are still restricted. For example, speaking in public places becomes an annoyance to the surrounding people, and secret information should not be uttered. Environmental noise may reduce the accuracy of speech recognition. To address these limitations, a system to detect a user's unvoiced utterance is proposed. From internal information observed by an ultrasonic imaging sensor attached to the underside of the jaw, our proposed system recognizes the utterance contents without the user's uttering voice. Our proposed deep neural network model is used to obtain acoustic features from a sequence of ultrasound images. We confirmed that audio signals generated by our system can control the existing smart speakers. We also observed that a user can adjust their oral movement to learn and improve the accuracy of their voice recognition.
summary: The availability of digital devices operated by voice is expanding rapidly. However, the applications of voice interfaces are still restricted. For example, speaking in public places becomes an annoyance to the surrounding people, and secret information should not be uttered. Environmental noise may reduce the accuracy of speech recognition. To address these limitations, a system to detect a user's unvoiced utterance is proposed. From internal information observed by an ultrasonic imaging sensor attached to the underside of the jaw, our proposed system recognizes the utterance contents without the user's uttering voice. Our proposed deep neural network model is used to obtain acoustic features from a sequence of ultrasound images. We confirmed that audio signals generated by our system can control the existing smart speakers. We also observed that a user can adjust their oral movement to learn and improve the accuracy of their voice recognition.
abstract_zh: 通过语音操作的数字设备的可用性正在迅速扩大。然而，语音接口的应用仍然受到限制。例如，在公共场所讲话会给周围的人带来烦恼，并且不应说出秘密信息。环境噪声可能会降低语音识别的准确性。为了解决这些限制，提出了一种检测用户无声话语的系统。根据连接到下颌下侧的超声波成像传感器观察到的内部信息，我们提出的系统无需用户发出声音即可识别话语内容。我们提出的深度神经网络模型用于从一系列超声图像中获取声学特征。我们确认我们的系统生成的音频信号可以控制现有的智能扬声器。我们还观察到用户可以调整他们的口腔运动来学习和提高语音识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超声成像的无声语音交互系统，通过深度神经网络识别用户的无声发音内容。
AI.motivation: 传统语音接口在公共场合使用不便且存在隐私泄露风险，环境噪声也会影响识别准确性，需开发无需发声的语音识别方案。
AI.method: 在下颌部安装超声传感器获取口腔内部影像序列，利用深度神经网络提取声学特征并重建语音信号。
AI.result: 系统生成的音频信号可控制智能音箱，用户通过调整口腔动作可提升识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无声语音交互，为隐私保护场景提供新方案，但需用户适应性训练以优化效果。
