We also observed that a user can adjust their oral movement to learn and improve the accuracy of their voice recognition. 通过语音操作的数字设备的可用性正在迅速扩大。然而，语音接口的应用仍然受到限制。例如，在公共场所讲话会给周围的人带来烦恼，并且不应说出秘密信息。环境噪声可能会降低语音识别的准确性。为了解决这些限制，提出了一种检测用户无声话语的系统。根据连接到下颌下侧的超声波成像传感器观察到的内部信息，我们提出的系统无需用户发出声音即可识别话语内容。我们提出的深度神经网络模型用于从一系列超声图像中获取声学特征。我们确认我们的系统生成的音频信号可以控制现有的智能扬声器。我们还观察到用户可以调整他们的口腔运动来学习和提高语音识别的准确性。 本文提出一种基于超声成像的无声语音交互系统，通过深度神经网络识别用户的无声发音内容。 Naoki Kimura,Michinari Kono,Jun Rekimoto cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Kushagra Pandey,Stephan Mandt
title: A Complete Recipe for Diffusion Generative Models
title_zh: 扩散生成模型的完整配方
abstract: Score-based Generative Models (SGMs) have demonstrated exceptional synthesis outcomes across various tasks. However, the current design landscape of the forward diffusion process remains largely untapped and often relies on physical heuristics or simplifying assumptions. Utilizing insights from the development of scalable Bayesian posterior samplers, we present a complete recipe for formulating forward processes in SGMs, ensuring convergence to the desired target distribution. Our approach reveals that several existing SGMs can be seen as specific manifestations of our framework. Building upon this method, we introduce Phase Space Langevin Diffusion (PSLD), which relies on score-based modeling within an augmented space enriched by auxiliary variables akin to physical phase space. Empirical results exhibit the superior sample quality and improved speed-quality trade-off of PSLD compared to various competing approaches on established image synthesis benchmarks. Remarkably, PSLD achieves sample quality akin to state-of-the-art SGMs (FID: 2.10 for unconditional CIFAR-10 generation). Lastly, we demonstrate the applicability of PSLD in conditional synthesis using pre-trained score networks, offering an appealing alternative as an SGM backbone for future advancements. Code and model checkpoints can be accessed at \url{https://github.com/mandt-lab/PSLD}.
summary: Score-based Generative Models (SGMs) have demonstrated exceptional synthesis outcomes across various tasks. However, the current design landscape of the forward diffusion process remains largely untapped and often relies on physical heuristics or simplifying assumptions. Utilizing insights from the development of scalable Bayesian posterior samplers, we present a complete recipe for formulating forward processes in SGMs, ensuring convergence to the desired target distribution. Our approach reveals that several existing SGMs can be seen as specific manifestations of our framework. Building upon this method, we introduce Phase Space Langevin Diffusion (PSLD), which relies on score-based modeling within an augmented space enriched by auxiliary variables akin to physical phase space. Empirical results exhibit the superior sample quality and improved speed-quality trade-off of PSLD compared to various competing approaches on established image synthesis benchmarks. Remarkably, PSLD achieves sample quality akin to state-of-the-art SGMs (FID: 2.10 for unconditional CIFAR-10 generation). Lastly, we demonstrate the applicability of PSLD in conditional synthesis using pre-trained score networks, offering an appealing alternative as an SGM backbone for future advancements. Code and model checkpoints can be accessed at \url{https://github.com/mandt-lab/PSLD}.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的生成模型（SGM）已经在各种任务中展示了出色的综合结果。然而，当前前向扩散过程的设计景观在很大程度上仍未开发，并且通常依赖于物理启发法或简化假设。利用可扩展贝叶斯后采样器开发的见解，我们提出了在 SGM 中制定前向过程的完整方案，确保收敛到所需的目标分布。我们的方法表明，现有的几个 SGM 可以被视为我们框架的具体表现。在此方法的基础上，我们引入了相空间朗之万扩散（PSLD），它依赖于由类似于物理相空间的辅助变量丰富的增强空间内基于分数的建模。实证结果表明，与已建立的图像合成基准上的各种竞争方法相比，PSLD 具有卓越的样本质量和改进的速度质量权衡。值得注意的是，PSLD 实现了类似于最先进的 SGM 的样本质量（FID：无条件 CIFAR-10 生成为 2.10）。最后，我们使用预先训练的评分网络展示了 PSLD 在条件合成中的适用性，为未来的进步提供了一个有吸引力的替代方案作为 SGM 骨干。代码和模型检查点可以在 \url{https://github.com/mandt-lab/PSLD} 访问。

AI.tldr: 提出一种完整的扩散生成模型前向过程设计方法，并引入相空间朗之万扩散（PSLD）模型以提升图像生成质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散生成模型的前向过程设计依赖物理启发式方法或简化假设，缺乏系统性框架，需更通用且收敛性保证的方法。
AI.method: 基于可扩展贝叶斯后验采样器的见解，提出通用前向过程框架，并引入相空间朗之万扩散（PSLD），通过扩展空间中的辅助变量进行分数建模。
AI.result: PSLD在图像生成任务中实现更优样本质量与速度-质量权衡，无条件CIFAR-10生成FID达2.10，接近SOTA模型。
AI.conclusion: PSLD为扩散生成模型提供有效框架，展示其在条件合成中的适用性，可作为未来SGM发展的替代骨干模型。

authors_text: Sajjad Moazeni
title: Next-generation Co-Packaged Optics for Future Disaggregated AI Systems
title_zh: 适用于未来分解人工智能系统的下一代联合封装光学器件
abstract: Co-packaged optics is poised to solve the interconnect bandwidth bottleneck for GPUs and AI accelerators in near future. This technology can immediately boost today's AI/ML compute power to train larger neural networks that can perform more complex tasks. More importantly, co-packaged optics unlocks new system-level opportunities to rethink our conventional supercomputing and datacenter architectures. Disaggregation of memory and compute units is one of such new paradigms that can greatly speed up AI/ML workloads by providing low-latency and high-throughput performance, while maintaining flexibility to support conventional cloud computing applications as well. This paper gives a brief overview of state-of-the-art of co-packaged optical I/O and requirements of its next generations. We also discuss ideas to exploit co-packaged optics in disaggregated AI systems and possible future directions.
summary: Co-packaged optics is poised to solve the interconnect bandwidth bottleneck for GPUs and AI accelerators in near future. This technology can immediately boost today's AI/ML compute power to train larger neural networks that can perform more complex tasks. More importantly, co-packaged optics unlocks new system-level opportunities to rethink our conventional supercomputing and datacenter architectures. Disaggregation of memory and compute units is one of such new paradigms that can greatly speed up AI/ML workloads by providing low-latency and high-throughput performance, while maintaining flexibility to support conventional cloud computing applications as well. This paper gives a brief overview of state-of-the-art of co-packaged optical I/O and requirements of its next generations. We also discuss ideas to exploit co-packaged optics in disaggregated AI systems and possible future directions.
abstract_zh: 联合封装光学器件有望在不久的将来解决 GPU 和 AI 加速器的互连带宽瓶颈。这项技术可以立即提高当今的人工智能/机器学习计算能力，以训练可以执行更复杂任务的更大的神经网络。更重要的是，共同封装的光学器件开启了新的系统级机会，重新思考我们传统的超级计算和数据中心架构。内存和计算单元的分解是此类新范例之一，它可以通过提供低延迟和高吞吐量性能来大大加快 AI/ML 工作负载，同时保持支持传统云计算应用程序的灵活性。本文简要概述了联合封装光学 I/O 的最新技术及其下一代的要求。我们还讨论了在分类人工智能系统中利用共同封装光学器件的想法以及未来可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了共封装光学技术的最新进展及其在下一代解耦AI系统中的应用潜力，探讨了其未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 为了解决当前GPU和AI加速器面临的互连带宽瓶颈问题，并探索共封装光学技术如何支持更高效的解耦AI系统架构。
AI.method: 通过综述现有共封装光学I/O技术，分析其在解耦AI系统中的潜在应用，并提出下一代技术的可能方向。
AI.result: 明确了共封装光学技术在解耦AI系统中的关键作用，提出了下一代技术的性能需求，并探讨了其在系统架构中的应用策略。
AI.conclusion: 共封装光学技术为未来解耦AI系统提供了高效的互连解决方案，未来需在技术集成和系统优化方面进一步研究。

authors_text: Yingda Yin,Yang Wang,He Wang,Baoquan Chen
title: A Laplace-inspired Distribution on SO(3) for Probabilistic Rotation Estimation
title_zh: 用于概率旋转估计的 SO(3) 上的拉普拉斯分布
abstract: Estimating the 3DoF rotation from a single RGB image is an important yet challenging problem. Probabilistic rotation regression has raised more and more attention with the benefit of expressing uncertainty information along with the prediction. Though modeling noise using Gaussian-resembling Bingham distribution and matrix Fisher distribution is natural, they are shown to be sensitive to outliers for the nature of quadratic punishment to deviations. In this paper, we draw inspiration from multivariate Laplace distribution and propose a novel Rotation Laplace distribution on SO(3). Rotation Laplace distribution is robust to the disturbance of outliers and enforces much gradient to the low-error region, resulting in a better convergence. Our extensive experiments show that our proposed distribution achieves state-of-the-art performance for rotation regression tasks over both probabilistic and non-probabilistic baselines. Our project page is at https://pku-epic.github.io/RotationLaplace.
summary: Estimating the 3DoF rotation from a single RGB image is an important yet challenging problem. Probabilistic rotation regression has raised more and more attention with the benefit of expressing uncertainty information along with the prediction. Though modeling noise using Gaussian-resembling Bingham distribution and matrix Fisher distribution is natural, they are shown to be sensitive to outliers for the nature of quadratic punishment to deviations. In this paper, we draw inspiration from multivariate Laplace distribution and propose a novel Rotation Laplace distribution on SO(3). Rotation Laplace distribution is robust to the disturbance of outliers and enforces much gradient to the low-error region, resulting in a better convergence. Our extensive experiments show that our proposed distribution achieves state-of-the-art performance for rotation regression tasks over both probabilistic and non-probabilistic baselines. Our project page is at https://pku-epic.github.io/RotationLaplace.
abstract_zh: 从单个 RGB 图像估计 3DoF 旋转是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。概率旋转回归因其在预测中表达不确定性信息的优点而引起了越来越多的关注。尽管使用类高斯宾汉分布和矩阵费舍尔分布对噪声进行建模是很自然的，但由于对偏差进行二次惩罚的性质，它们对异常值很敏感。在本文中，我们从多元拉普拉斯分布中汲取灵感，提出了一种新颖的 SO(3) 上的旋转拉普拉斯分布。旋转拉普拉斯分布对于异常值的干扰具有鲁棒性，并且对低误差区域施加很大的梯度，从而获得更好的收敛性。我们广泛的实验表明，我们提出的分布在概率和非概率基线上实现了旋转回归任务的最先进的性能。我们的项目页面位于 https://pku-epic.github.io/RotationLaplace。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拉普拉斯分布启发的SO(3)旋转拉普拉斯分布，用于单目RGB图像的3自由度旋转估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Bingham分布和矩阵Fisher分布的方法对异常值敏感，因其二次惩罚机制导致鲁棒性不足，需设计更抗干扰的分布模型。
AI.method: 受多元拉普拉斯分布启发，提出旋转拉普拉斯分布于SO(3)流形，通过梯度聚焦低误差区域提升收敛性，并在概率旋转回归框架中应用该分布。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在概率与非概率基线中均取得最先进性能，验证了分布的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 旋转拉普拉斯分布为概率旋转估计提供了更稳健的数学工具，其优异性能可推广至其他三维姿态估计任务。

search_text: A Laplace-inspired Distribution on SO(3) for Probabilistic Rotation Estimation 用于概率旋转估计的 SO(3) 上的拉普拉斯分布 Estimating the 3DoF rotation from a single RGB image is an important yet challenging problem. Probabilistic rotation regression has raised more and more attention with the benefit of expressing uncertainty information along with the prediction. Though modeling noise using Gaussian-resembling Bingham distribution and matrix Fisher distribution is natural, they are shown to be sensitive to outliers for the nature of quadratic punishment to deviations. In this paper, we draw inspiration from multivariate Laplace distribution and propose a novel Rotation Laplace distribution on SO(3). Rotation Laplace distribution is robust to the disturbance of outliers and enforces much gradient to the low-error region, resulting in a better convergence. Our extensive experiments show that our proposed distribution achieves state-of-the-art performance for rotation regression tasks over both probabilistic and non-probabilistic baselines. Our project page is at https://pku-epic.github.io/RotationLaplace. 从单个 RGB 图像估计 3DoF 旋转是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。概率旋转回归因其在预测中表达不确定性信息的优点而引起了越来越多的关注。尽管使用类高斯宾汉分布和矩阵费舍尔分布对噪声进行建模是很自然的，但由于对偏差进行二次惩罚的性质，它们对异常值很敏感。在本文中，我们从多元拉普拉斯分布中汲取灵感，提出了一种新颖的 SO(3) 上的旋转拉普拉斯分布。旋转拉普拉斯分布对于异常值的干扰具有鲁棒性，并且对低误差区域施加很大的梯度，从而获得更好的收敛性。我们广泛的实验表明，我们提出的分布在概率和非概率基线上实现了旋转回归任务的最先进的性能。我们的项目页面位于 https://pku-epic.github.io/RotationLaplace。 本文提出了一种基于拉普拉斯分布启发的SO(3)旋转拉普拉斯分布，用于单目RGB图像的3自由度旋转估计任务。 Yingda Yin,Yang Wang,He Wang,Baoquan Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Juan Hu,Xin Liao,Difei Gao,Satoshi Tsutsui,Qian Wang,Zheng Qin,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Mover: Mask and Recovery based Facial Part Consistency Aware Method for Deepfake Video Detection
title_zh: Mover：基于掩模和恢复的面部部分一致性感知方法，用于 Deepfake 视频检测
abstract: Deepfake techniques have been widely used for malicious purposes, prompting extensive research interest in developing Deepfake detection methods. Deepfake manipulations typically involve tampering with facial parts, which can result in inconsistencies across different parts of the face. For instance, Deepfake techniques may change smiling lips to an upset lip, while the eyes remain smiling. Existing detection methods depend on specific indicators of forgery, which tend to disappear as the forgery patterns are improved. To address the limitation, we propose Mover, a new Deepfake detection model that exploits unspecific facial part inconsistencies, which are inevitable weaknesses of Deepfake videos. Mover randomly masks regions of interest (ROIs) and recovers faces to learn unspecific features, which makes it difficult for fake faces to be recovered, while real faces can be easily recovered. Specifically, given a real face image, we first pretrain a masked autoencoder to learn facial part consistency by dividing faces into three parts and randomly masking ROIs, which are then recovered based on the unmasked facial parts. Furthermore, to maximize the discrepancy between real and fake videos, we propose a novel model with dual networks that utilize the pretrained encoder and masked autoencoder, respectively. 1) The pretrained encoder is finetuned for capturing the encoding of inconsistent information in the given video. 2) The pretrained masked autoencoder is utilized for mapping faces and distinguishing real and fake videos. Our extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Mover is highly effective.

Mover randomly masks regions of interest (ROIs) and recovers faces to learn unspecific features, which makes it difficult for fake faces to be recovered, while real faces can be easily recovered. Specifically, given a real face image, we first pretrain a masked autoencoder to learn facial part consistency by dividing faces into three parts and randomly masking ROIs, which are then recovered based on the unmasked facial parts. Furthermore, to maximize the discrepancy between real and fake videos, we propose a novel model with dual networks that utilize the pretrained encoder and masked autoencoder, respectively. 1) The pretrained encoder is finetuned for capturing the encoding of inconsistent information in the given video. 2) The pretrained masked autoencoder is utilized for mapping faces and distinguishing real and fake videos. Our extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Mover is highly effective.
abstract_zh: Deepfake 技术已广泛用于恶意目的，引发了人们对开发 Deepfake 检测方法的广泛研究兴趣。 Deepfake 操作通常涉及篡改面部部位，这可能会导致面部不同部位的不一致。例如，Deepfake 技术可能会将微笑的嘴唇变成不安的嘴唇，而眼睛仍保持微笑。现有的检测方法依赖于特定的伪造指标，随着伪造模式的改进，这些指标往往会消失。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 Mover，一种新的 Deepfake 检测模型，它利用非特定的面部部位不一致，这是 Deepfake 视频不可避免的弱点。 Mover 随机屏蔽感兴趣区域 (ROI) 并恢复人脸以学习非特定特征，这使得假人脸很难恢复，而真实人脸可以轻松恢复。具体来说，给定真实的人脸图像，我们首先预训练一个蒙版自动编码器，通过将人脸分为三部分并随机屏蔽 ROI 来学习面部部分一致性，然后根据未蒙版的面部部分恢复这些 ROI。此外，为了最大化真实和虚假视频之间的差异，我们提出了一种具有双网络的新颖模型，分别利用预训练编码器和屏蔽自动编码器。 1) 对预训练编码器进行微调，以捕获给定视频中不一致信息的编码。 2）预训练的屏蔽自动编码器用于映射人脸并区分真假视频。我们对标准基准的大量实验表明，Mover 非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于面部部分一致性感知的深度伪造视频检测方法Mover，通过掩码和恢复机制识别面部不一致特征。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法依赖特定伪造特征，但随着伪造技术进步这些特征易失效，需寻找更鲁棒的检测方式。
AI.method: 设计掩码自编码器随机遮挡面部区域并恢复，利用真实人脸与伪造脸在恢复难度上的差异；构建双网络模型，结合预训练编码器与掩码自编码器区分真伪。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中验证了Mover的高检测有效性，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘面部部分一致性缺陷，Mover为深度伪造检测提供了新思路，具有更强的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Youssef Abdelkareem,Shady Shehata,Fakhri Karray
title: Multi-Plane Neural Radiance Fields for Novel View Synthesis
title_zh: 用于新颖视图合成的多平面神经辐射场
abstract: Novel view synthesis is a long-standing problem that revolves around rendering frames of scenes from novel camera viewpoints. Volumetric approaches provide a solution for modeling occlusions through the explicit 3D representation of the camera frustum. Multi-plane Images (MPI) are volumetric methods that represent the scene using front-parallel planes at distinct depths but suffer from depth discretization leading to a 2.D scene representation. Another line of approach relies on implicit 3D scene representations. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) utilize neural networks for encapsulating the continuous 3D scene structure within the network weights achieving photorealistic synthesis results, however, methods are constrained to per-scene optimization settings which are inefficient in practice. Multi-plane Neural Radiance Fields (MINE) open the door for combining implicit and explicit scene representations. It enables continuous 3D scene representations, especially in the depth dimension, while utilizing the input image features to avoid per-scene optimization. The main drawback of the current literature work in this domain is being constrained to single-view input, limiting the synthesis ability to narrow viewpoint ranges. In this work, we thoroughly examine the performance, generalization, and efficiency of single-view multi-plane neural radiance fields. In addition, we propose a new multiplane NeRF architecture that accepts multiple views to improve the synthesis results and expand the viewing range. Features from the input source frames are effectively fused through a proposed attention-aware fusion module to highlight important information from different viewpoints. Experiments show the effectiveness of attention-based fusion and the promising outcomes of our proposed method when compared to multi-view NeRF and MPI techniques.
summary: Novel view synthesis is a long-standing problem that revolves around rendering frames of scenes from novel camera viewpoints. Volumetric approaches provide a solution for modeling occlusions through the explicit 3D representation of the camera frustum. Multi-plane Images (MPI) are volumetric methods that represent the scene using front-parallel planes at distinct depths but suffer from depth discretization leading to a 2.D scene representation. Another line of approach relies on implicit 3D scene representations. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) utilize neural networks for encapsulating the continuous 3D scene structure within the network weights achieving photorealistic synthesis results, however, methods are constrained to per-scene optimization settings which are inefficient in practice. Multi-plane Neural Radiance Fields (MINE) open the door for combining implicit and explicit scene representations. It enables continuous 3D scene representations, especially in the depth dimension, while utilizing the input image features to avoid per-scene optimization. The main drawback of the current literature work in this domain is being constrained to single-view input, limiting the synthesis ability to narrow viewpoint ranges. In this work, we thoroughly examine the performance, generalization, and efficiency of single-view multi-plane neural radiance fields. In addition, we propose a new multiplane NeRF architecture that accepts multiple views to improve the synthesis results and expand the viewing range. Features from the input source frames are effectively fused through a proposed attention-aware fusion module to highlight important information from different viewpoints. Experiments show the effectiveness of attention-based fusion and the promising outcomes of our proposed method when compared to multi-view NeRF and MPI techniques.
abstract_zh: 新视图合成是一个长期存在的问题，围绕着从新相机视点渲染场景帧而展开。体积方法提供了一种通过相机平截头体的显式 3D 表示来建模遮挡的解决方案。多平面图像 (MPI) 是一种体积方法，使用不同深度的前平行平面来表示场景，但会受到深度离散化的影响，从而导致 2.D 场景表示。另一种方法依赖于隐式 3D 场景表示。神经辐射场 (NeRF) 利用神经网络将连续 3D 场景结构封装在网络权重内，实现逼真的合成结果，但是，方法仅限于每个场景的优化设置，这在实践中效率低下。多平面神经辐射场（MINE）为结合隐式和显式场景表示打开了大门。它可以实现连续的 3D 场景表示，尤其是在深度维度上，同时利用输入图像特征来避免每个场景的优化。该领域当前文献工作的主要缺点是仅限于单视图输入，限制了窄视点范围的合成能力。在这项工作中，我们彻底检查了单视图多平面神经辐射场的性能、泛化和效率。此外，我们提出了一种新的多平面 NeRF 架构，它接受多个视图以改善合成结果并扩大观看范围。通过提出的注意力感知融合模块有效地融合输入源帧的特征，以突出显示来自不同观点的重要信息。实验表明，与多视图 NeRF 和 MPI 技术相比，基于注意力的融合的有效性以及我们提出的方法的有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角输入的多平面神经辐射场（MINE）方法，用于生成新视角的场景渲染，解决单视角输入限制并提升合成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如MPI存在深度离散化问题，NeRF需逐场景优化效率低，且单视角输入限制了视点范围，需结合显式与隐式表示以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计多视角输入的MINE架构，通过注意力感知融合模块整合多视角特征，实现连续深度表示与高效场景建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，注意力融合有效提升合成质量，扩展视点范围，优于多视角NeRF和MPI方法。
AI.conclusion: MINE方法通过融合多视角特征与连续深度表示，有效解决了单视角限制问题，在新视角合成任务中展现优越性。

search_text: Multi-Plane Neural Radiance Fields for Novel View Synthesis 用于新颖视图合成的多平面神经辐射场 Novel view synthesis is a long-standing problem that revolves around rendering frames of scenes from novel camera viewpoints. Volumetric approaches provide a solution for modeling occlusions through the explicit 3D representation of the camera frustum. Multi-plane Images (MPI) are volumetric methods that represent the scene using front-parallel planes at distinct depths but suffer from depth discretization leading to a 2.D scene representation. Another line of approach relies on implicit 3D scene representations. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) utilize neural networks for encapsulating the continuous 3D scene structure within the network weights achieving photorealistic synthesis results, however, methods are constrained to per-scene optimization settings which are inefficient in practice. Multi-plane Neural Radiance Fields (MINE) open the door for combining implicit and explicit scene representations. It enables continuous 3D scene representations, especially in the depth dimension, while utilizing the input image features to avoid per-scene optimization. The main drawback of the current literature work in this domain is being constrained to single-view input, limiting the synthesis ability to narrow viewpoint ranges. In this work, we thoroughly examine the performance, generalization, and efficiency of single-view multi-plane neural radiance fields. In addition, we propose a new multiplane NeRF architecture that accepts multiple views to improve the synthesis results and expand the viewing range. Features from the input source frames are effectively fused through a proposed attention-aware fusion module to highlight important information from different viewpoints. Experiments show the effectiveness of attention-based fusion and the promising outcomes of our proposed method when compared to multi-view NeRF and MPI techniques. 新视图合成是一个长期存在的问题，围绕着从新相机视点渲染场景帧而展开。体积方法提供了一种通过相机平截头体的显式 3D 表示来建模遮挡的解决方案。多平面图像 (MPI) 是一种体积方法，使用不同深度的前平行平面来表示场景，但会受到深度离散化的影响，从而导致 2.D 场景表示。另一种方法依赖于隐式 3D 场景表示。神经辐射场 (NeRF) 利用神经网络将连续 3D 场景结构封装在网络权重内，实现逼真的合成结果，但是，方法仅限于每个场景的优化设置，这在实践中效率低下。多平面神经辐射场（MINE）为结合隐式和显式场景表示打开了大门。它可以实现连续的 3D 场景表示，尤其是在深度维度上，同时利用输入图像特征来避免每个场景的优化。该领域当前文献工作的主要缺点是仅限于单视图输入，限制了窄视点范围的合成能力。在这项工作中，我们彻底检查了单视图多平面神经辐射场的性能、泛化和效率。此外，我们提出了一种新的多平面 NeRF 架构，它接受多个视图以改善合成结果并扩大观看范围。通过提出的注意力感知融合模块有效地融合输入源帧的特征，以突出显示来自不同观点的重要信息。实验表明，与多视图 NeRF 和 MPI 技术相比，基于注意力的融合的有效性以及我们提出的方法的有希望的结果。 本文提出一种多视角输入的多平面神经辐射场（MINE）方法，用于生成新视角的场景渲染，解决单视角输入限制并提升合成效果。 Youssef Abdelkareem,Shady Shehata,Fakhri Karray cs.CV

authors_text: Amira Guesmi,Ioan Marius Bilasco,Muhammad Shafique,Ihsen Alouani
title: AdvART: Adversarial Art for Camouflaged Object Detection Attacks
title_zh: AdvART：伪装对象检测攻击的对抗艺术
abstract: Physical adversarial attacks pose a significant practical threat as it deceives deep learning systems operating in the real world by producing prominent and maliciously designed physical perturbations. Emphasizing the evaluation of naturalness is crucial in such attacks, as humans can readily detect and eliminate unnatural manipulations. To overcome this limitation, recent work has proposed leveraging generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate naturalistic patches, which may not catch human's attention. However, these approaches suffer from a limited latent space which leads to an inevitable trade-off between naturalness and attack efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate naturalistic and inconspicuous adversarial patches. Specifically, we redefine the optimization problem by introducing an additional loss term to the cost function. This term works as a semantic constraint to ensure that the generated camouflage pattern holds semantic meaning rather than arbitrary patterns. The additional term leverages similarity metrics to construct a similarity loss that we optimize within the global objective function. Our technique is based on directly manipulating the pixel values in the patch, which gives higher flexibility and larger space compared to the GAN-based techniques that are based on indirectly optimizing the patch by modifying the latent vector. Our attack achieves superior success rate of up to 91.19\% and 72\%, respectively, in the digital world and when deployed in smart cameras at the edge compared to the GAN-based technique.
summary: Physical adversarial attacks pose a significant practical threat as it deceives deep learning systems operating in the real world by producing prominent and maliciously designed physical perturbations. Emphasizing the evaluation of naturalness is crucial in such attacks, as humans can readily detect and eliminate unnatural manipulations. To overcome this limitation, recent work has proposed leveraging generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate naturalistic patches, which may not catch human's attention. However, these approaches suffer from a limited latent space which leads to an inevitable trade-off between naturalness and attack efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate naturalistic and inconspicuous adversarial patches. Specifically, we redefine the optimization problem by introducing an additional loss term to the cost function. This term works as a semantic constraint to ensure that the generated camouflage pattern holds semantic meaning rather than arbitrary patterns. The additional term leverages similarity metrics to construct a similarity loss that we optimize within the global objective function. Our technique is based on directly manipulating the pixel values in the patch, which gives higher flexibility and larger space compared to the GAN-based techniques that are based on indirectly optimizing the patch by modifying the latent vector. Our attack achieves superior success rate of up to 91.19\% and 72\%, respectively, in the digital world and when deployed in smart cameras at the edge compared to the GAN-based technique.
abstract_zh: 物理对抗性攻击构成了重大的实际威胁，因为它通过产生显着的、恶意设计的物理扰动来欺骗在现实世界中运行的深度学习系统。强调对自然性的评估在此类攻击中至关重要，因为人类可以轻松检测并消除不自然的操纵。为了克服这一限制，最近的工作提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成自然的补丁，这可能不会引起人类的注意。然而，这些方法的潜在空间有限，导致自然性和攻击效率之间不可避免的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成自然且不显眼的对抗性补丁的新方法。具体来说，我们通过在成本函数中引入额外的损失项来重新定义优化问题。该术语充当语义约束，以确保生成的迷彩图案具有语义含义而不是任意图案。附加项利用相似性度量来构建我们在全局目标函数中优化的相似性损失。我们的技术基于直接操作 patch 中的像素值，与基于 GAN 的技术（基于通过修改潜在向量间接优化 patch）相比，这提供了更高的灵活性和更大的空间。与基于 GAN 的技术相比，我们的攻击在数字世界中以及部署在边缘智能相机中时的成功率分别高达 91.19% 和 72%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdvART方法，通过引入语义约束生成自然且隐蔽的对抗性补丁，以提升对物体检测系统的攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的物理对抗攻击方法因潜在空间限制，难以同时保证对抗性补丁的自然性与攻击效率，需解决语义无关模式导致的检测漏洞。
AI.method: 在优化目标函数中增加语义相似性损失项，直接操控补丁像素值而非间接优化潜在向量，确保生成的伪装图案具有语义关联性。
AI.result: 在数字环境和边缘智能相机部署场景中，攻击成功率分别达到91.19%和72%，显著优于基于GAN的方法。
AI.conclusion: AdvART通过像素级语义约束优化，有效解决了自然性与攻击效率的矛盾，为物理对抗攻击提供了更高效且隐蔽的解决方案。

authors_text: Hisashi Ishida,Juan Antonio Barragan,Adnan Munawar,Zhaoshuo Li,Andy Ding,Peter Kazanzides,Danielle Trakimas,Francis X. Creighton,Russell H. Taylor
title: Improving Surgical Situational Awareness with Signed Distance Field: A Pilot Study in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 利用符号距离场提高手术情境意识：虚拟现实试点研究
comment: First two authors contributed equally. 6 pages
comments: First two authors contributed equally. 6 pages
abstract: The introduction of image-guided surgical navigation (IGSN) has greatly benefited technically demanding surgical procedures by providing real-time support and guidance to the surgeon during surgery. To develop effective IGSN, a careful selection of the surgical information and the medium to present this information to the surgeon is needed. However, this is not a trivial task due to the broad array of available options. To address this problem, we have developed an open-source library that facilitates the development of multimodal navigation systems in a wide range of surgical procedures relying on medical imaging data. To provide guidance, our system calculates the minimum distance between the surgical instrument and the anatomy and then presents this information to the user through different mechanisms. The real-time performance of our approach is achieved by calculating Signed Distance Fields at initialization from segmented anatomical volumes. Using this framework, we developed a multimodal surgical navigation system to help surgeons navigate anatomical variability in a skull base surgery simulation environment. Three different feedback modalities were explored: visual, auditory, and haptic. To evaluate the proposed system, a pilot user study was conducted in which four clinicians performed mastoidectomy procedures with and without guidance. Each condition was assessed using objective performance and subjective workload metrics. This pilot user study showed improvements in procedural safety without additional time or workload. These results demonstrate our pipeline's successful use case in the context of mastoidectomy.
summary: The introduction of image-guided surgical navigation (IGSN) has greatly benefited technically demanding surgical procedures by providing real-time support and guidance to the surgeon during surgery. To develop effective IGSN, a careful selection of the surgical information and the medium to present this information to the surgeon is needed. However, this is not a trivial task due to the broad array of available options. To address this problem, we have developed an open-source library that facilitates the development of multimodal navigation systems in a wide range of surgical procedures relying on medical imaging data. To provide guidance, our system calculates the minimum distance between the surgical instrument and the anatomy and then presents this information to the user through different mechanisms. The real-time performance of our approach is achieved by calculating Signed Distance Fields at initialization from segmented anatomical volumes. Using this framework, we developed a multimodal surgical navigation system to help surgeons navigate anatomical variability in a skull base surgery simulation environment. Three different feedback modalities were explored: visual, auditory, and haptic. To evaluate the proposed system, a pilot user study was conducted in which four clinicians performed mastoidectomy procedures with and without guidance. Each condition was assessed using objective performance and subjective workload metrics. This pilot user study showed improvements in procedural safety without additional time or workload. These results demonstrate our pipeline's successful use case in the context of mastoidectomy.
abstract_zh: 图像引导手术导航 (IGSN) 的引入通过在手术过程中为外科医生提供实时支持和指导，极大地改善了技术要求较高的手术过程。为了开发有效的 IGSN，需要仔细选择手术信息以及向外科医生呈现该信息的媒介。然而，由于可用选项的范围广泛，这并不是一项简单的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个开源库，有助于在依赖医学成像数据的各种外科手术中开发多模式导航系统。为了提供指导，我们的系统计算手术器械和解剖结构之间的最小距离，然后通过不同的机制将该信息呈现给用户。我们的方法的实时性能是通过在初始化时从分段的解剖体积计算有符号距离场来实现的。使用这个框架，我们开发了一种多模式手术导航系统，以帮助外科医生在颅底手术模拟环境中导航解剖结构的变化。探索了三种不同的反馈方式：视觉、听觉和触觉。为了评估所提出的系统，进行了一项试点用户研究，其中四名临床医生在有指导和无指导的情况下进行了乳突切除术。使用客观表现和主观工作量指标来评估每种情况。这项试点用户研究表明，无需额外的时间或工作量即可提高程序安全性。这些结果证明了我们的管道在乳突切除术中的成功用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号距离场（SDF）的开源库，用于开发多模态手术导航系统，并在虚拟现实环境中通过试点用户研究验证其在颅底手术模拟中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 图像引导手术导航（IGSN）需在复杂手术中提供实时支持，但如何选择合适的手术信息呈现方式仍具挑战性，需探索更高效的导航系统设计。
AI.method: 通过初始化时计算分割解剖体积的符号距离场（SDF），实时获取手术器械与解剖结构的最小距离，并结合视觉、听觉和触觉三种反馈模态开发多模态导航系统。通过四名临床医生的乳突切除术试点研究评估系统效果。
AI.result: 试点研究显示，使用该系统可提升手术安全性，且未增加操作时间或认知负担。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了符号距离场在手术导航中的可行性，为复杂解剖变异的手术提供了有效的多模态反馈方案。

search_text: Improving Surgical Situational Awareness with Signed Distance Field: A Pilot Study in Virtual Reality 利用符号距离场提高手术情境意识：虚拟现实试点研究 The introduction of image-guided surgical navigation (IGSN) has greatly benefited technically demanding surgical procedures by providing real-time support and guidance to the surgeon during surgery. To develop effective IGSN, a careful selection of the surgical information and the medium to present this information to the surgeon is needed. However, this is not a trivial task due to the broad array of available options. To address this problem, we have developed an open-source library that facilitates the development of multimodal navigation systems in a wide range of surgical procedures relying on medical imaging data. To provide guidance, our system calculates the minimum distance between the surgical instrument and the anatomy and then presents this information to the user through different mechanisms. The real-time performance of our approach is achieved by calculating Signed Distance Fields at initialization from segmented anatomical volumes. Using this framework, we developed a multimodal surgical navigation system to help surgeons navigate anatomical variability in a skull base surgery simulation environment. Three different feedback modalities were explored: visual, auditory, and haptic. To evaluate the proposed system, a pilot user study was conducted in which four clinicians performed mastoidectomy procedures with and without guidance. Each condition was assessed using objective performance and subjective workload metrics. This pilot user study showed improvements in procedural safety without additional time or workload. These results demonstrate our pipeline's successful use case in the context of mastoidectomy. 图像引导手术导航 (IGSN) 的引入通过在手术过程中为外科医生提供实时支持和指导，极大地改善了技术要求较高的手术过程。为了开发有效的 IGSN，需要仔细选择手术信息以及向外科医生呈现该信息的媒介。然而，由于可用选项的范围广泛，这并不是一项简单的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个开源库，有助于在依赖医学成像数据的各种外科手术中开发多模式导航系统。为了提供指导，我们的系统计算手术器械和解剖结构之间的最小距离，然后通过不同的机制将该信息呈现给用户。我们的方法的实时性能是通过在初始化时从分段的解剖体积计算有符号距离场来实现的。使用这个框架，我们开发了一种多模式手术导航系统，以帮助外科医生在颅底手术模拟环境中导航解剖结构的变化。探索了三种不同的反馈方式：视觉、听觉和触觉。为了评估所提出的系统，进行了一项试点用户研究，其中四名临床医生在有指导和无指导的情况下进行了乳突切除术。使用客观表现和主观工作量指标来评估每种情况。这项试点用户研究表明，无需额外的时间或工作量即可提高程序安全性。这些结果证明了我们的管道在乳突切除术中的成功用例。 本文提出了一种基于符号距离场（SDF）的开源库，用于开发多模态手术导航系统，并在虚拟现实环境中通过试点用户研究验证其在颅底手术模拟中的有效性。 Hisashi Ishida,Juan Antonio Barragan,Adnan Munawar,Zhaoshuo Li,Andy Ding,Peter Kazanzides,Danielle Trakimas,Francis X. Creighton,Russell H. Taylor cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Takato Yasuno,Masahiro Okano,Junichiro Fujii
title: One-class Damage Detector Using Deeper Fully-Convolutional Data Descriptions for Civil Application
title_zh: 使用更深入的全卷积数据描述进行民用应用的一级损伤检测器
abstract: Infrastructure managers must maintain high standards to ensure user satisfaction during the lifecycle of infrastructures. Surveillance cameras and visual inspections have enabled progress in automating the detection of anomalous features and assessing the occurrence of deterioration. However, collecting damage data is typically time consuming and requires repeated inspections. The one-class damage detection approach has an advantage in that normal images can be used to optimize model parameters. Additionally, visual evaluation of heatmaps enables us to understand localized anomalous features. The authors highlight damage vision applications utilized in the robust property and localized damage explainability. First, we propose a civil-purpose application for automating one-class damage detection reproducing a fully convolutional data description (FCDD) as a baseline model. We have obtained accurate and explainable results demonstrating experimental studies on concrete damage and steel corrosion in civil engineering. Additionally, to develop a more robust application, we applied our method to another outdoor domain that contains complex and noisy backgrounds using natural disaster datasets collected using various devices. Furthermore, we propose a valuable solution of deeper FCDDs focusing on other powerful backbones to improve the performance of damage detection and implement ablation studies on disaster datasets. The key results indicate that the deeper FCDDs outperformed the baseline FCDD on datasets representing natural disaster damage caused by hurricanes, typhoons, earthquakes, and four-event disasters.

Surveillance cameras and visual inspections have enabled progress in automating the detection of anomalous features and assessing the occurrence of deterioration. The one-class damage detection approach has an advantage in that normal images can be used to optimize model parameters. Additionally, visual evaluation of heatmaps enables us to understand localized anomalous features. The authors highlight damage vision applications utilized in the robust property and localized damage explainability. First, we propose a civil-purpose application for automating one-class damage detection reproducing a fully convolutional data description (FCDD) as a baseline model. We have obtained accurate and explainable results demonstrating experimental studies on concrete damage and steel corrosion in civil engineering. Additionally, to develop a more robust application, we applied our method to another outdoor domain that contains complex and noisy backgrounds using natural disaster datasets collected using various devices. Furthermore, we propose a valuable solution of deeper FCDDs focusing on other powerful backbones to improve the performance of damage detection and implement ablation studies on disaster datasets. The key results indicate that the deeper FCDDs outperformed the baseline FCDD on datasets representing natural disaster damage caused by hurricanes, typhoons, earthquakes, and four-event disasters.
abstract_zh: 基础设施管理者必须保持高标准，以确保基础设施生命周期内的用户满意度。监控摄像头和目视检查在自动检测异常特征和评估恶化发生方面取得了进展。然而，收集损坏数据通常非常耗时并且需要重复检查。一类损伤检测方法的优点是可以使用正常图像来优化模型参数。此外，热图的视觉评估使我们能够了解局部异常特征。作者强调了损伤视觉应用在鲁棒性和局部损伤可解释性方面的应用。首先，我们提出了一种民用应用程序，用于自动化一级损伤检测，复制完全卷积数据描述（FCDD）作为基线模型。我们获得了准确且可解释的结果，证明了土木工程中混凝土损坏和钢材腐蚀的实验研究。此外，为了开发更强大的应用程序，我们使用使用各种设备收集的自然灾害数据集将我们的方法应用于包含复杂且嘈杂背景的另一个室外域。此外，我们提出了一种有价值的更深层次 FCDD 解决方案，重点关注其他强大的骨干网，以提高损坏检测的性能并针对灾难数据集实施消融研究。关键结果表明，在代表飓风、台风、地震和四事件灾害造成的自然灾害损失的数据集上，更深层次的 FCDD 优于基线 FCDD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于民用基础设施的一类损伤检测方法，基于更深的全卷积数据描述模型（FCDD）。
AI.motivation: 基础设施管理者需要在基础设施的整个生命周期中保持高标准以确保用户满意度，但收集损伤数据通常耗时且需要重复检查。使用正常图像优化模型参数的一类损伤检测方法具有优势。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于全卷积数据描述（FCDD）的民用自动化一类损伤检测应用，并应用了更深的FCDD模型以提高性能，同时在自然灾害数据集上进行了消融研究。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，更深的FCDD模型在飓风、台风、地震和四类灾害引起的自然灾难损伤数据集上优于基线FCDD模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的更深FCDD模型能够有效检测基础设施损伤，并在复杂和嘈杂的户外环境中表现出更强的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhenghai Xue,Zhenghao Peng,Quanyi Li,Zhihan Liu,Bolei Zhou
title: Guarded Policy Optimization with Imperfect Online Demonstrations
title_zh: 不完善的在线演示的守护策略优化
abstract: The Teacher-Student Framework (TSF) is a reinforcement learning setting where a teacher agent guards the training of a student agent by intervening and providing online demonstrations. Assuming optimal, the teacher policy has the perfect timing and capability to intervene in the learning process of the student agent, providing safety guarantee and exploration guidance. Nevertheless, in many real-world settings it is expensive or even impossible to obtain a well-performing teacher policy. In this work, we relax the assumption of a well-performing teacher and develop a new method that can incorporate arbitrary teacher policies with modest or inferior performance. We instantiate an Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning algorithm, termed Teacher-Student Shared Control (TS2C), which incorporates teacher intervention based on trajectory-based value estimation. Theoretical analysis validates that the proposed TS2C algorithm attains efficient exploration and substantial safety guarantee without being affected by the teacher's own performance. Experiments on various continuous control tasks show that our method can exploit teacher policies at different performance levels while maintaining a low training cost. Moreover, the student policy surpasses the imperfect teacher policy in terms of higher accumulated reward in held-out testing environments. Code is available at https://metadriverse.github.io/TS2C.
summary: The Teacher-Student Framework (TSF) is a reinforcement learning setting where a teacher agent guards the training of a student agent by intervening and providing online demonstrations. Assuming optimal, the teacher policy has the perfect timing and capability to intervene in the learning process of the student agent, providing safety guarantee and exploration guidance. Nevertheless, in many real-world settings it is expensive or even impossible to obtain a well-performing teacher policy. In this work, we relax the assumption of a well-performing teacher and develop a new method that can incorporate arbitrary teacher policies with modest or inferior performance. We instantiate an Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning algorithm, termed Teacher-Student Shared Control (TS2C), which incorporates teacher intervention based on trajectory-based value estimation. Theoretical analysis validates that the proposed TS2C algorithm attains efficient exploration and substantial safety guarantee without being affected by the teacher's own performance. Experiments on various continuous control tasks show that our method can exploit teacher policies at different performance levels while maintaining a low training cost. Moreover, the student policy surpasses the imperfect teacher policy in terms of higher accumulated reward in held-out testing environments. Code is available at https://metadriverse.github.io/TS2C.
abstract_zh: 教师-学生框架（TSF）是一种强化学习设置，其中教师代理通过干预和提供在线演示来保护学生代理的培训。假设最优，教师策略有完美的时机和能力干预学生智能体的学习过程，提供安全保障和探索指导。然而，在许多现实世界中，获得良好的教师政策是昂贵的，甚至是不可能的。在这项工作中，我们放松了对表现良好的教师的假设，并开发了一种新方法，可以将任意教师政策与表现中等或较差的教师结合起来。我们实例化了一种离策略强化学习算法，称为教师-学生共享控制（TS2C），该算法结合了基于轨迹价值估计的教师干预。理论分析验证了所提出的TS2C算法在不受教师自身表现影响的情况下实现了高效的探索和实质性的安全保证。对各种连续控制任务的实验表明，我们的方法可以利用不同绩效水平的教师策略，同时保持较低的培训成本。此外，在坚持测试环境中，学生政策在更高的累积奖励方面超越了不完善的教师政策。代码可在 https://metadriverse.github.io/TS2C 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TS2C的算法，用于在教师策略不完美时进行策略优化，确保安全性和探索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统教师-学生框架假设教师策略完美，但现实中难以获取高性能教师策略，需开发能处理低效教师策略的方法。
AI.method: 设计基于离线策略强化学习的TS2C算法，通过轨迹价值估计整合教师干预，理论分析证明其不受教师性能影响。
AI.result: 实验显示TS2C在多种连续控制任务中能有效利用不同性能的教师策略，训练成本低且学生策略在测试环境表现优于教师。
AI.conclusion: TS2C算法在无需完美教师策略的前提下实现了高效安全学习，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Guarded Policy Optimization with Imperfect Online Demonstrations 不完善的在线演示的守护策略优化 The Teacher-Student Framework (TSF) is a reinforcement learning setting where a teacher agent guards the training of a student agent by intervening and providing online demonstrations. Assuming optimal, the teacher policy has the perfect timing and capability to intervene in the learning process of the student agent, providing safety guarantee and exploration guidance. Nevertheless, in many real-world settings it is expensive or even impossible to obtain a well-performing teacher policy. In this work, we relax the assumption of a well-performing teacher and develop a new method that can incorporate arbitrary teacher policies with modest or inferior performance. We instantiate an Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning algorithm, termed Teacher-Student Shared Control (TS2C), which incorporates teacher intervention based on trajectory-based value estimation. Theoretical analysis validates that the proposed TS2C algorithm attains efficient exploration and substantial safety guarantee without being affected by the teacher's own performance. Experiments on various continuous control tasks show that our method can exploit teacher policies at different performance levels while maintaining a low training cost. Moreover, the student policy surpasses the imperfect teacher policy in terms of higher accumulated reward in held-out testing environments. Code is available at https://metadriverse.github.io/TS2C. 教师-学生框架（TSF）是一种强化学习设置，其中教师代理通过干预和提供在线演示来保护学生代理的培训。假设最优，教师策略有完美的时机和能力干预学生智能体的学习过程，提供安全保障和探索指导。然而，在许多现实世界中，获得良好的教师政策是昂贵的，甚至是不可能的。在这项工作中，我们放松了对表现良好的教师的假设，并开发了一种新方法，可以将任意教师政策与表现中等或较差的教师结合起来。我们实例化了一种离策略强化学习算法，称为教师-学生共享控制（TS2C），该算法结合了基于轨迹价值估计的教师干预。理论分析验证了所提出的TS2C算法在不受教师自身表现影响的情况下实现了高效的探索和实质性的安全保证。对各种连续控制任务的实验表明，我们的方法可以利用不同绩效水平的教师策略，同时保持较低的培训成本。此外，在坚持测试环境中，学生政策在更高的累积奖励方面超越了不完善的教师政策。代码可在 https://metadriverse.github.io/TS2C 获取。 本文提出了一种名为TS2C的算法，用于在教师策略不完美时进行策略优化，确保安全性和探索效率。 Zhenghai Xue,Zhenghao Peng,Quanyi Li,Zhihan Liu,Bolei Zhou cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Hiroto Fujimaru,Yuto Nakashima,Shunsuke Inenaga
title: Tight bounds for the sensitivity of CDAWGs with left-end edits
title_zh: 具有左端编辑的 CDAWG 灵敏度的严格界限
comment: This is a full version of the paper that appeared in the proceedings of WORDS 2023. Accepted for Acta Informatica
comments: This is a full version of the paper that appeared in the proceedings of WORDS 2023. Accepted for Acta Informatica
abstract: Compact directed acyclic word graphs (CDAWGs) [Blumer et al. 1987] are a fundamental data structure on strings with applications in text pattern searching, data compression, and pattern discovery. Intuitively, the CDAWG of a string $T$ is obtained by merging isomorphic subtrees of the suffix tree [Weiner 1973] of the same string $T$, thus CDAWGs are a compact indexing structure. In this paper, we investigate the sensitivity of CDAWGs when a single character edit operation (insertion, deletion, or substitution) is performed at the left-end of the input string $T$, namely, we are interested in the worst-case increase in the size of the CDAWG after a left-end edit operation. We prove that if $e$ is the number of edges of the CDAWG for string $T$, then the number of new edges added to the CDAWG after a left-end edit operation on $T$ does not exceed $e$. Further, we present a matching lower bound on the sensitivity of CDAWGs for left-end insertions, and almost matching lower bounds for left-end deletions and substitutions. We then generalize our lower-bound instance for left-end insertions to leftward online construction of the CDAWG, and show that it requires $Ω(n^2)$ time for some string of length $n$.
summary: Compact directed acyclic word graphs (CDAWGs) [Blumer et al. 1987] are a fundamental data structure on strings with applications in text pattern searching, data compression, and pattern discovery. Intuitively, the CDAWG of a string $T$ is obtained by merging isomorphic subtrees of the suffix tree [Weiner 1973] of the same string $T$, thus CDAWGs are a compact indexing structure. In this paper, we investigate the sensitivity of CDAWGs when a single character edit operation (insertion, deletion, or substitution) is performed at the left-end of the input string $T$, namely, we are interested in the worst-case increase in the size of the CDAWG after a left-end edit operation. We prove that if $e$ is the number of edges of the CDAWG for string $T$, then the number of new edges added to the CDAWG after a left-end edit operation on $T$ does not exceed $e$. Further, we present a matching lower bound on the sensitivity of CDAWGs for left-end insertions, and almost matching lower bounds for left-end deletions and substitutions. We then generalize our lower-bound instance for left-end insertions to leftward online construction of the CDAWG, and show that it requires $Ω(n^2)$ time for some string of length $n$.
abstract_zh: 紧凑有向无环字图 (CDAWG) [Blumer 等人。 1987] 是字符串的基本数据结构，应用于文本模式搜索、数据压缩和模式发现。直观上，字符串 $T$ 的 CDAWG 是通过合并同一字符串 $T$ 的后缀树 [Weiner 1973] 的同构子树获得的，因此 CDAWG 是一个紧凑的索引结构。在本文中，我们研究了在输入字符串 $T$ 的左端执行单字符编辑操作（插入、删除或替换）时 CDAWG 的敏感性，即我们感兴趣的是左端编辑操作后 CDAWG 大小增加的最坏情况。我们证明，如果$e$是字符串$T$的CDAWG的边数，那么在$T$上进行左端编辑操作后添加到CDAWG的新边数不会超过$e$。此外，我们提出了 CDAWG 对左端插入的敏感性的匹配下限，以及几乎匹配的左端删除和替换的下限。然后，我们将左端插入的下界实例推广到 CDAWG 的向左在线构造，并表明对于某些长度为 $n$ 的字符串，它需要 $Ω(n^2)$ 时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在输入字符串左端进行单字符编辑操作后，CDAWG（紧致有向无环字图）的敏感性，即其大小的最坏情况增长情况，并建立了严格的上下界。
AI.motivation: CDAWG作为一种高效的字符串索引结构，广泛应用于文本处理领域。理解其在动态字符串（如左端编辑）下的敏感性，有助于优化相关算法的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与构造性实例，研究左端插入、删除和替换操作对CDAWG边数的影响，结合在线构建场景进行复杂度分析。
AI.result: 证明左端编辑后新增边数不超过原边数e，并给出插入操作的匹配下界及删除、替换的近似下界；进一步表明在线构建某些字符串时需Ω(n²)时间。
AI.conclusion: CDAWG对左端编辑具有显著敏感性，其大小可能呈线性增长，该结果为动态字符串处理中的数据结构设计提供了理论依据与优化方向。

authors_text: Nir Shlezinger,Mengyuan Ma,Ortal Lavi,Nhan Thanh Nguyen,Yonina C. Eldar,Markku Juntti
title: AI-Empowered Hybrid MIMO Beamforming
title_zh: AI 赋能的混合 MIMO 波束赋形
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Hybrid multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) is an attractive technology for realizing extreme massive MIMO systems envisioned for future wireless communications in a scalable and power-efficient manner. However, the fact that hybrid MIMO systems implement part of their beamforming in analog and part in digital makes the optimization of their beampattern notably more challenging compared with conventional fully digital MIMO. Consequently, recent years have witnessed a growing interest in using data-aided artificial intelligence (AI) tools for hybrid beamforming design. This article reviews candidate strategies to leverage data to improve real-time hybrid beamforming design. We discuss the architectural constraints and characterize the core challenges associated with hybrid beamforming optimization. We then present how these challenges are treated via conventional optimization, and identify different AI-aided design approaches. These can be roughly divided into purely data-driven deep learning models and different forms of deep unfolding techniques for combining AI with classical optimization.We provide a systematic comparative study between existing approaches including both numerical evaluations and qualitative measures. We conclude by presenting future research opportunities associated with the incorporation of AI in hybrid MIMO systems.
summary: Hybrid multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) is an attractive technology for realizing extreme massive MIMO systems envisioned for future wireless communications in a scalable and power-efficient manner. However, the fact that hybrid MIMO systems implement part of their beamforming in analog and part in digital makes the optimization of their beampattern notably more challenging compared with conventional fully digital MIMO. Consequently, recent years have witnessed a growing interest in using data-aided artificial intelligence (AI) tools for hybrid beamforming design. This article reviews candidate strategies to leverage data to improve real-time hybrid beamforming design. We discuss the architectural constraints and characterize the core challenges associated with hybrid beamforming optimization. We then present how these challenges are treated via conventional optimization, and identify different AI-aided design approaches. These can be roughly divided into purely data-driven deep learning models and different forms of deep unfolding techniques for combining AI with classical optimization.We provide a systematic comparative study between existing approaches including both numerical evaluations and qualitative measures. We conclude by presenting future research opportunities associated with the incorporation of AI in hybrid MIMO systems.
abstract_zh: 混合多输入多输出 (MIMO) 是一种极具吸引力的技术，可用于以可扩展且节能的方式实现未来无线通信所设想的超大规模 MIMO 系统。然而，与传统的全数字 MIMO 相比，混合 MIMO 系统以模拟方式实现部分波束成形，以数字方式实现部分波束成形，这使得其波束方向图的优化更具挑战性。因此，近年来人们对使用数据辅助人工智能 (AI) 工具进行混合波束成形设计越来越感兴趣。本文回顾了利用数据改进实时混合波束成形设计的候选策略。我们讨论了架构限制并描述了与混合波束成形优化相关的核心挑战。然后，我们介绍如何通过传统优化来应对这些挑战，并确定不同的人工智能辅助设计方法。这些可以大致分为纯粹数据驱动的深度学习模型和将人工智能与经典优化相结合的不同形式的深度展开技术。我们对现有方法（包括数值评估和定性测量）进行了系统的比较研究。最后，我们提出了与将 AI 纳入混合 MIMO 系统相关的未来研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用数据驱动的AI方法优化混合MIMO系统的波束成形设计，探讨了传统优化与AI技术结合的策略。
AI.motivation: 混合MIMO系统因同时采用模拟和数字波束成形导致优化难度增加，传统方法难以满足实时性和效率需求，需借助AI提升性能。
AI.method: 通过对比传统优化方法与AI辅助设计（包括纯数据驱动的深度学习模型及深度展开技术），结合数值评估与定性分析进行系统性研究。
AI.result: 明确了AI方法在混合MIMO波束成形中的核心挑战，比较了不同技术路线的优劣，为实际应用提供参考。
AI.conclusion: AI技术为混合MIMO系统带来新机遇，但需进一步解决模型适应性、计算复杂度与实时性等关键问题。

ai_content_json.method: 通过对比传统优化方法与AI辅助设计（包括纯数据驱动的深度学习模型及深度展开技术），结合数值评估与定性分析进行系统性研究。
ai_content_json.result: 明确了AI方法在混合MIMO波束成形中的核心挑战，比较了不同技术路线的优劣，为实际应用提供参考。
ai_content_json.conclusion: AI技术为混合MIMO系统带来新机遇，但需进一步解决模型适应性、计算复杂度与实时性等关键问题。

tldr: 本文综述了利用数据驱动的AI方法优化混合MIMO系统的波束成形设计，探讨了传统优化与AI技术结合的策略。
motivation: 混合MIMO系统因同时采用模拟和数字波束成形导致优化难度增加，传统方法难以满足实时性和效率需求，需借助AI提升性能。
method: 通过对比传统优化方法与AI辅助设计（包括纯数据驱动的深度学习模型及深度展开技术），结合数值评估与定性分析进行系统性研究。
result: 明确了AI方法在混合MIMO波束成形中的核心挑战，比较了不同技术路线的优劣，为实际应用提供参考。
conclusion: AI技术为混合MIMO系统带来新机遇，但需进一步解决模型适应性、计算复杂度与实时性等关键问题。
search_text: AI-Empowered Hybrid MIMO Beamforming AI 赋能的混合 MIMO 波束赋形 Hybrid multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) is an attractive technology for realizing extreme massive MIMO systems envisioned for future wireless communications in a scalable and power-efficient manner. However, the fact that hybrid MIMO systems implement part of their beamforming in analog and part in digital makes the optimization of their beampattern notably more challenging compared with conventional fully digital MIMO. Consequently, recent years have witnessed a growing interest in using data-aided artificial intelligence (AI) tools for hybrid beamforming design. This article reviews candidate strategies to leverage data to improve real-time hybrid beamforming design. We discuss the architectural constraints and characterize the core challenges associated with hybrid beamforming optimization. We then present how these challenges are treated via conventional optimization, and identify different AI-aided design approaches. These can be roughly divided into purely data-driven deep learning models and different forms of deep unfolding techniques for combining AI with classical optimization.We provide a systematic comparative study between existing approaches including both numerical evaluations and qualitative measures. We conclude by presenting future research opportunities associated with the incorporation of AI in hybrid MIMO systems. 混合多输入多输出 (MIMO) 是一种极具吸引力的技术，可用于以可扩展且节能的方式实现未来无线通信所设想的超大规模 MIMO 系统。然而，与传统的全数字 MIMO 相比，混合 MIMO 系统以模拟方式实现部分波束成形，以数字方式实现部分波束成形，这使得其波束方向图的优化更具挑战性。因此，近年来人们对使用数据辅助人工智能 (AI) 工具进行混合波束成形设计越来越感兴趣。本文回顾了利用数据改进实时混合波束成形设计的候选策略。我们讨论了架构限制并描述了与混合波束成形优化相关的核心挑战。然后，我们介绍如何通过传统优化来应对这些挑战，并确定不同的人工智能辅助设计方法。这些可以大致分为纯粹数据驱动的深度学习模型和将人工智能与经典优化相结合的不同形式的深度展开技术。我们对现有方法（包括数值评估和定性测量）进行了系统的比较研究。最后，我们提出了与将 AI 纳入混合 MIMO 系统相关的未来研究机会。 本文综述了利用数据驱动的AI方法优化混合MIMO系统的波束成形设计，探讨了传统优化与AI技术结合的策略。 Nir Shlezinger,Mengyuan Ma,Ortal Lavi,Nhan Thanh Nguyen,Yonina C. Eldar,Markku Juntti cs.IT,cs.AI,eess.SP
